usageTranslations.de: Der Release-Viewer bietet eine Echtzeitverfolgung aller Deployment-Events und Release-Metriken über mehrere Umgebungen hinweg.
usageTranslations.es: El visor de lanzamiento ofrece seguimiento en tiempo real de todos los eventos de despliegue y métricas de publicación en múltiples entornos.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布查看器可在多个环境中实时跟踪所有部署事件和发布指标。
usageTranslations.ar: يقدم عارض الإصدارات تتبعًا في الوقت الحقيقي لجميع أحداث النشر ومقاييس الإصدار عبر بيئات متعددة.
usageTranslations.pt: O visualizador de releases oferece rastreamento em tempo real de todos os eventos de implantação e métricas de release em múltiplos ambientes.
usageTranslations.ru: Просмотр релиза обеспечивает отслеживание всех событий развертывания и метрик релиза в реальном времени по различным средам.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースビューアーは複数の環境でのすべてのデプロイメントイベントとリリースメトリクスのリアルタイム追跡を提供します。
usageTranslations.it: Il visualizzatore di rilascio offre il tracciamento in tempo reale di tutti gli eventi di distribuzione e delle metriche di rilascio su più ambienti.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình xem phát hành cung cấp theo dõi thời gian thực tất cả các sự kiện triển khai và chỉ số phát hành trên nhiều môi trường.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ व्यूअर कई परिवेशों में सभी डिप्लॉयमेंट इवेंट्स और रिलीज़ मेट्रिक्स को रियल टाइम में ट्रैक करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวดูการปล่อยช่วยให้สามารถติดตามเหตุการณ์การปรับใช้และตัวชี้วัดการปล่อยทั้งหมดในสภาพแวดล้อมต่าง ๆ ได้แบบเรียลไทม์
usageTranslations.id: Penampil rilis menawarkan pelacakan waktu nyata untuk semua event deployment dan metrik rilis di berbagai lingkungan.

terms.definition: A unique identifier assigned to a build artifact or version during the CI/CD process, enabling traceability, tracking, and versioning of software releases across environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The build tag allows operations teams to quickly identify and roll back to specific build versions in production environments.

termTranslations.th: แท็กบิลด์

usageTranslations.en: The build tag allows operations teams to quickly identify and roll back to specific build versions in production environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Build etiketi, operasyon ekiplerinin üretim ortamlarında belirli build sürümlerini hızlıca tanımlamasına ve geri almasına olanak tanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le tag de build permet aux équipes d’exploitation d’identifier et de restaurer rapidement des versions spécifiques en production.
usageTranslations.de: Der Build-Tag ermöglicht es Betriebsteams, bestimmte Build-Versionen in Produktionsumgebungen schnell zu identifizieren und zurückzusetzen.
usageTranslations.es: La etiqueta de build permite a los equipos de operaciones identificar y restaurar rápidamente versiones específicas en entornos de producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 构建标签使运维团队能够在生产环境中快速识别和回滚到特定的构建版本。
usageTranslations.ar: تتيح علامة البناء لفرق العمليات تحديد إصدارات البناء واستعادتها بسرعة في بيئات الإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: A tag de build permite que as equipes de operações identifiquem e revertam rapidamente para versões específicas em ambientes de produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Тег сборки позволяет операционным командам быстро определять и откатываться к определённым версиям сборок в продуктивных средах.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルドタグにより、運用チームは本番環境で特定のビルドバージョンを迅速に特定しロールバックできます。
usageTranslations.it: Il tag di build consente ai team operativi di identificare rapidamente e ripristinare versioni specifiche in produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Thẻ build cho phép nhóm vận hành nhanh chóng xác định và hoàn tác về các phiên bản build cụ thể trong môi trường sản xuất.
usageTranslations.hi: बिल्ड टैग ऑपरेशंस टीमों को प्रोडक्शन में विशिष्ट बिल्ड वर्शन तुरंत पहचानने और रोलबैक करने की अनुमति देता है।
usageTranslations.th: แท็กบิลด์ช่วยให้ทีมปฏิบัติการสามารถระบุและย้อนกลับไปยังเวอร์ชันบิลด์ที่เฉพาะเจาะจงในสภาพแวดล้อมโปรดักชันได้อย่างรวดเร็ว
usageTranslations.id: Tag build memungkinkan tim operasi mengidentifikasi dan rollback ke versi build tertentu di lingkungan produksi dengan cepat.

terms.definition: An interactive interface or guided workflow that simplifies the configuration process for applications, integrations, or deployments, reducing setup errors and increasing operational consistency.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The config wizard guides administrators through initial setup, ensuring all integration parameters are validated before deployment.

termTranslations.th: วิซาร์ดการกำหนดค่า

usageTranslations.en: The config wizard guides administrators through initial setup, ensuring all integration parameters are validated before deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Yapılandırma sihirbazı, yöneticileri ilk kurulumdan geçirir ve tüm entegrasyon parametrelerinin dağıtımdan önce doğrulanmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’assistant de configuration guide les administrateurs lors de l’installation initiale, garantissant que tous les paramètres d’intégration sont validés avant le déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Der Konfigurationsassistent führt Administratoren durch die Ersteinrichtung und stellt sicher, dass alle Integrationsparameter vor dem Deployment validiert werden.
usageTranslations.es: El asistente de configuración guía a los administradores en la configuración inicial, asegurando que todos los parámetros de integración estén validados antes del despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 配置向导引导管理员完成初始设置，确保所有集成参数在部署前都经过验证。
usageTranslations.ar: يقود معالج الإعدادات المسؤولين خلال الإعداد الأولي ويضمن التحقق من جميع معلمات التكامل قبل النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: O assistente de configuração orienta os administradores na configuração inicial, garantindo que todos os parâmetros de integração sejam validados antes da implantação.
usageTranslations.ru: Мастер настройки помогает администраторам пройти начальную настройку и обеспечивает проверку всех параметров интеграции перед развертыванием.
usageTranslations.ja: 構成ウィザードは管理者が初期設定を行う際にガイドし、すべての統合パラメータがデプロイ前に検証されていることを保証します。
usageTranslations.it: La procedura guidata di configurazione assiste gli amministratori nell’installazione iniziale, garantendo la validazione dei parametri d’integrazione prima del rilascio.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình hướng dẫn cấu hình hướng dẫn quản trị viên qua cài đặt ban đầu, đảm bảo tất cả thông số tích hợp được xác nhận trước khi triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: कॉन्फ़िग विज़ार्ड एडमिनिस्ट्रेटर्स को आरंभिक सेटअप में मार्गदर्शन करता है और सुनिश्चित करता है कि सभी इंटीग्रेशन पैरामीटर डिप्लॉयमेंट से पहले वैलिडेट हों।
usageTranslations.th: วิซาร์ดการกำหนดค่าจะแนะนำผู้ดูแลระบบผ่านการตั้งค่าเริ่มต้นเพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าพารามิเตอร์การผสานรวมทั้งหมดได้รับการตรวจสอบก่อนใช้งานจริง
usageTranslations.id: Wizard konfigurasi membimbing admin melalui pengaturan awal, memastikan semua parameter integrasi divalidasi sebelum deployment.

terms.definition: The process of reinstating a previous configuration state from backup or snapshot, used to recover systems after configuration errors or failures in enterprise environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Config restore allows teams to quickly recover from faulty deployments by reverting to a previously validated configuration state.

termTranslations.th: กู้คืนการกำหนดค่า

usageTranslations.en: Config restore allows teams to quickly recover from faulty deployments by reverting to a previously validated configuration state.
usageTranslations.tr: Yapılandırma geri yükleme, ekiplerin daha önce doğrulanmış bir yapılandırma durumuna dönerek hatalı dağıtımlardan hızla kurtulmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La restauration de configuration permet aux équipes de récupérer rapidement des déploiements défectueux en revenant à un état de configuration validé.
usageTranslations.de: Die Konfigurationswiederherstellung ermöglicht es Teams, fehlerhafte Deployments schnell zu beheben, indem sie auf einen zuvor validierten Zustand zurücksetzen.
usageTranslations.es: La restauración de configuración permite a los equipos recuperarse rápidamente de implementaciones defectuosas volviendo a un estado de configuración validado.
usageTranslations.zh: 配置还原使团队能够通过恢复到先前验证过的配置状态，快速从错误部署中恢复。
usageTranslations.ar: تسمح استعادة التكوين للفرق بالتعافي بسرعة من عمليات النشر الخاطئة من خلال العودة إلى حالة تكوين تم التحقق منها مسبقًا.
usageTranslations.pt: A restauração de configuração permite que as equipes se recuperem rapidamente de implantações com falha, revertendo para um estado de configuração validado anteriormente.
usageTranslations.ru: Восстановление конфигурации позволяет командам быстро восстановиться после неудачных развертываний, вернувшись к ранее проверенному состоянию.
usageTranslations.ja: 構成リストアにより、チームは以前に検証された構成状態に戻すことで、不正なデプロイメントから迅速に回復できます。
usageTranslations.it: Il ripristino della configurazione consente ai team di recuperare rapidamente da distribuzioni errate tornando a uno stato di configurazione precedentemente validato.
usageTranslations.vi: Khôi phục cấu hình cho phép các nhóm nhanh chóng phục hồi sau khi triển khai lỗi bằng cách quay lại trạng thái cấu hình đã xác thực trước đó.
usageTranslations.hi: कॉन्फ़िग पुनर्स्थापना टीमों को पहले से सत्यापित स्थिति में लौटकर ग़लत डिप्लॉयमेंट से जल्दी उबरने में मदद करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การกู้คืนการกำหนดค่าช่วยให้ทีมสามารถกู้คืนจากการปรับใช้ที่ผิดพลาดโดยย้อนกลับไปยังสถานะการกำหนดค่าที่ตรวจสอบแล้ว
usageTranslations.id: Pemulihan konfigurasi memungkinkan tim dengan cepat pulih dari deployment yang gagal dengan kembali ke status konfigurasi yang telah divalidasi.

terms.definition: A predefined collection of key-value pairs or variables applied to configurations or deployments to ensure consistency and repeatability in multi-environment integration workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Parameter sets simplify environment-specific deployments by encapsulating all required configuration values for each target environment.

termTranslations.th: ชุดพารามิเตอร์

usageTranslations.en: Parameter sets simplify environment-specific deployments by encapsulating all required configuration values for each target environment.
usageTranslations.tr: Parametre setleri, her hedef ortam için gerekli tüm yapılandırma değerlerini kapsayarak ortam tabanlı dağıtımları kolaylaştırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les ensembles de paramètres simplifient les déploiements propres à chaque environnement en encapsulant toutes les valeurs de configuration requises.
usageTranslations.de: Parametersätze vereinfachen umgebungsspezifische Deployments, indem sie alle erforderlichen Konfigurationswerte für jede Zielumgebung kapseln.
usageTranslations.es: Los conjuntos de parámetros simplifican los despliegues específicos del entorno al encapsular todos los valores de configuración requeridos para cada entorno objetivo.
usageTranslations.zh: 参数集通过封装每个目标环境所需的所有配置值，简化了特定环境的部署。
usageTranslations.ar: تعمل مجموعات المعلمات على تبسيط عمليات النشر الخاصة بالبيئة عن طريق تجميع جميع القيم المطلوبة لكل بيئة مستهدفة.
usageTranslations.pt: Conjuntos de parâmetros simplificam implantações específicas de ambiente encapsulando todos os valores de configuração necessários para cada ambiente alvo.
usageTranslations.ru: Наборы параметров упрощают развертывания для отдельных сред, инкапсулируя все необходимые значения конфигураций.
usageTranslations.ja: パラメータセットは各ターゲット環境に必要な全構成値をカプセル化することで、環境固有のデプロイメントを簡素化します。
usageTranslations.it: I set di parametri semplificano i deployment specifici per ambiente, racchiudendo tutti i valori di configurazione necessari.
usageTranslations.vi: Bộ tham số giúp đơn giản hóa việc triển khai theo môi trường bằng cách đóng gói tất cả giá trị cấu hình cần thiết.
usageTranslations.hi: पैरामीटर सेट प्रत्येक लक्ष्य वातावरण के लिए आवश्यक सभी कॉन्फ़िगरेशन मानों को समाहित कर वातावरण-विशिष्ट डिप्लॉयमेंट को आसान बनाता है।
usageTranslations.th: ชุดพารามิเตอร์ช่วยให้การปรับใช้ที่เฉพาะเจาะจงกับแต่ละสภาพแวดล้อมง่ายขึ้นโดยรวบรวมค่าการกำหนดค่าที่จำเป็นทั้งหมดไว้ในชุดเดียว
usageTranslations.id: Set parameter menyederhanakan deployment spesifik lingkungan dengan mengenkapsulasi semua nilai konfigurasi yang diperlukan.

terms.definition: A release approach that deploys only the incremental changes (deltas) since the last deployment, minimizing downtime and resource usage in enterprise systems.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Delta deployment reduces service disruption by applying only the files and configurations changed since the last release.

termTranslations.ja: デルタデプロイメント
termTranslations.th: ดีลต้า ดีพลอยเมนต์

usageTranslations.en: Delta deployment reduces service disruption by applying only the files and configurations changed since the last release.
usageTranslations.tr: Delta dağıtımı, yalnızca son sürümden bu yana değişen dosya ve yapılandırmaları uygulayarak hizmet kesintisini azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le déploiement delta réduit les interruptions de service en appliquant uniquement les fichiers et configurations modifiés depuis la dernière version.
usageTranslations.de: Delta-Deployment verringert Serviceunterbrechungen, indem nur die seit dem letzten Release geänderten Dateien und Konfigurationen angewendet werden.
usageTranslations.es: El despliegue delta reduce la interrupción del servicio aplicando solo los archivos y configuraciones cambiados desde la última versión.
usageTranslations.zh: 增量部署仅应用自上次发布以来更改的文件和配置，从而减少服务中断。
usageTranslations.ar: يقلل نشر دلتا من انقطاع الخدمة من خلال تطبيق الملفات والتكوينات التي تم تغييرها فقط منذ آخر إصدار.
usageTranslations.pt: A implantação delta reduz a interrupção do serviço aplicando apenas os arquivos e configurações alterados desde o último release.
usageTranslations.ru: Дельта-развертывание снижает перебои в работе, применяя только изменённые файлы и конфигурации с момента последнего релиза.
usageTranslations.ja: デルタデプロイメントは、前回リリース以降に変更されたファイルと構成のみを適用してサービス中断を軽減します。
usageTranslations.it: Il deployment delta riduce l’interruzione dei servizi applicando solo i file e le configurazioni modificati dall’ultimo rilascio.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai delta giảm gián đoạn dịch vụ bằng cách chỉ áp dụng các file và cấu hình thay đổi kể từ lần phát hành trước.
usageTranslations.hi: डेल्टा डिप्लॉयमेंट पिछले रिलीज़ के बाद बदली गई फ़ाइलें और कॉन्फ़िगरेशन ही लागू कर सेवा बाधा को कम करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ดีลต้า ดีพลอยเมนต์ลดการหยุดชะงักของบริการโดยใช้เฉพาะไฟล์และการกำหนดค่าที่เปลี่ยนแปลงตั้งแต่การปล่อยครั้งล่าสุด
usageTranslations.id: Deployment delta mengurangi gangguan layanan dengan hanya menerapkan file dan konfigurasi yang diubah sejak rilis terakhir.

terms.definition: A tool, dashboard, or agent that continuously tracks the status, health, and outcomes of release processes, alerting teams to anomalies, failures, or compliance breaches.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The release monitor tracks all deployment steps and immediately flags any failed health checks or policy violations.

termTranslations.th: ตัวตรวจสอบการปล่อย

usageTranslations.en: The release monitor tracks all deployment steps and immediately flags any failed health checks or policy violations.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm izleyici, tüm dağıtım adımlarını izler ve başarısız sağlık kontrolleri veya ilke ihlallerini anında işaretler.
usageTranslations.fr: Le moniteur de release suit toutes les étapes de déploiement et signale immédiatement les contrôles de santé ou violations de politique échoués.
usageTranslations.de: Der Release-Monitor verfolgt alle Deployment-Schritte und meldet sofort fehlgeschlagene Health Checks oder Richtlinienverletzungen.
usageTranslations.es: El monitor de lanzamiento rastrea todos los pasos de despliegue y señala inmediatamente cualquier fallo en la verificación de estado o violaciones de políticas.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布监控器跟踪所有部署步骤，并在健康检查失败或策略违规时立即报警。
usageTranslations.ar: يراقب مراقب الإصدار جميع خطوات النشر وينبه فورًا إلى أي فشل في اختبارات الصحة أو انتهاكات السياسة.
usageTranslations.pt: O monitor de release acompanha todas as etapas da implantação e sinaliza imediatamente falhas em verificações de integridade ou violações de política.
usageTranslations.ru: Монитор релиза отслеживает все этапы развертывания и немедленно сигнализирует о сбоях или нарушениях политик.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースモニターはすべてのデプロイ手順を追跡し、ヘルスチェックやポリシー違反の失敗を即座にフラグします。
usageTranslations.it: Il monitor di rilascio traccia tutti i passaggi di distribuzione e segnala immediatamente eventuali controlli di integrità falliti o violazioni delle policy.
usageTranslations.vi: Giám sát phát hành theo dõi mọi bước triển khai và ngay lập tức cảnh báo khi kiểm tra sức khỏe thất bại hoặc vi phạm chính sách.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ मॉनिटर सभी डिप्लॉयमेंट चरणों को ट्रैक करता है और जैसे ही कोई हेल्थ चेक या पॉलिसी उल्लंघन असफल होता है, तुरंत अलर्ट करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวตรวจสอบการปล่อยติดตามทุกขั้นตอนการปรับใช้และแจ้งเตือนทันทีหากมีการตรวจสอบสถานะหรือนโยบายล้มเหลว
usageTranslations.id: Monitor rilis melacak semua langkah deployment dan langsung memberi tanda pada health check atau pelanggaran kebijakan yang gagal.

terms.definition: A structured, auditable record of all build, deployment, and configuration artifacts managed and tracked throughout CI/CD and release pipelines, referenced in enterprise monitoring and compliance dashboards.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Review the Artifact Log to verify which build artifacts were deployed to production and their associated checksums.

termTranslations.ja: アーティファクトログ
termTranslations.th: บันทึกอาร์ติแฟกต์

usageTranslations.en: Review the Artifact Log to verify which build artifacts were deployed to production and their associated checksums.
usageTranslations.tr: Üretime hangi derleme artefaktlarının dağıtıldığını ve bunlara ait sağlama toplamlarını doğrulamak için Artefakt Günlüğü'nü inceleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Consultez le Journal des artefacts pour vérifier quels artefacts ont été déployés en production et leurs sommes de contrôle.
usageTranslations.de: Überprüfen Sie das Artefaktprotokoll, um festzustellen, welche Artefakte in die Produktion bereitgestellt wurden und deren Prüfsummen.
usageTranslations.es: Revise el Registro de artefactos para verificar qué artefactos de compilación se desplegaron en producción y sus sumas de verificación.
usageTranslations.zh: 检查工件日志，以验证哪些构建工件已部署到生产环境及其校验和。
usageTranslations.ar: راجع سجل القطع البرمجية للتحقق من القطع التي تم نشرها في الإنتاج وقيم التحقق الخاصة بها.
usageTranslations.pt: Revise o Registro de artefatos para verificar quais artefatos foram implantados em produção e seus checksums.
usageTranslations.ru: Просмотрите журнал артефактов, чтобы проверить, какие артефакты были развернуты на продакшн и их контрольные суммы.
usageTranslations.ja: アーティファクトログを確認し、本番環境にデプロイされたビルドアーティファクトとそのチェックサムを検証します。
usageTranslations.it: Consulta il Registro artefatti per verificare quali artefatti sono stati distribuiti in produzione e i relativi checksum.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm tra Nhật ký hiện vật để xác minh hiện vật nào đã được triển khai lên môi trường sản xuất và giá trị kiểm tra đi kèm.
usageTranslations.hi: आर्टिफैक्ट लॉग की समीक्षा करें ताकि पता चले कि कौन से बिल्ड आर्टिफैक्ट प्रोडक्शन में डिप्लॉय किए गए थे और उनके चेकसम क्या हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ตรวจสอบบันทึกอาร์ติแฟกต์เพื่อยืนยันว่าอาร์ติแฟกต์ใดถูกนำไปใช้ในระบบโปรดักชันและเช็คซัมที่เกี่ยวข้อง
usageTranslations.id: Tinjau Log Artefak untuk memverifikasi artefak build mana yang telah dideploy ke produksi dan checksumnya.

terms.definition: An automated safeguard or control mechanism that enforces pre-defined checks, approvals, and policy gates before a release is promoted between environments or deployed to production, as used in release pipelines.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Release Guard blocked the deployment due to an unresolved critical vulnerability flagged in the build scan.

termTranslations.th: การ์ดการปล่อย

usageTranslations.en: Release Guard blocked the deployment due to an unresolved critical vulnerability flagged in the build scan.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm Koruyucu, derleme taramasında tespit edilen kritik bir güvenlik açığı nedeniyle dağıtımı engelledi.
usageTranslations.fr: La Garde de publication a bloqué le déploiement en raison d'une vulnérabilité critique non résolue détectée lors de l'analyse du build.
usageTranslations.de: Der Release-Schutz hat das Deployment aufgrund einer ungelösten kritischen Schwachstelle im Build-Scan blockiert.
usageTranslations.es: La Guardia de lanzamiento bloqueó la implementación debido a una vulnerabilidad crítica no resuelta detectada en el escaneo de compilación.
usageTranslations.zh: 由于构建扫描中发现未解决的严重漏洞，发布保护阻止了部署。
usageTranslations.ar: حارس الإصدار منع النشر بسبب وجود ثغرة أمنية حرجة غير محلولة في فحص البناء.
usageTranslations.pt: O Guarda de liberação bloqueou a implantação devido a uma vulnerabilidade crítica não resolvida detectada na verificação de build.
usageTranslations.ru: Охрана релиза заблокировала развертывание из-за неустраненной критической уязвимости, выявленной при сканировании сборки.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースガードはビルドスキャンで検出された未解決の重大な脆弱性のため、デプロイをブロックしました。
usageTranslations.it: La Guardia di rilascio ha bloccato la distribuzione a causa di una vulnerabilità critica irrisolta rilevata nello scan di build.
usageTranslations.vi: Bảo vệ phát hành đã chặn việc triển khai do phát hiện lỗ hổng nghiêm trọng chưa được xử lý trong quá trình quét build.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ गार्ड ने डिप्लॉयमेंट को रोक दिया क्योंकि बिल्ड स्कैन में एक गंभीर अनसुलझी भेद्यता मिली।
usageTranslations.th: การ์ดการปล่อยบล็อกการนำไปใช้เนื่องจากพบช่องโหว่ร้ายแรงที่ยังไม่แก้ไขในการสแกนบิลด์
usageTranslations.id: Penjaga Rilis memblokir deployment karena kerentanan kritis yang belum terselesaikan pada pemindaian build.

terms.definition: A consolidated record or report that summarizes all released, pending, and superseded versions of an artifact, application, or integration for operational visibility and audit trails.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Version Rollup provides a historical view of every integration release, including those deprecated or replaced.

termTranslations.th: สรุปรวมเวอร์ชัน

usageTranslations.en: The Version Rollup provides a historical view of every integration release, including those deprecated or replaced.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm Toplama, her entegrasyon sürümünün, kullanımdan kaldırılanlar dahil, tarihsel bir görünümünü sunar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le Récapitulatif des versions offre une vue historique de chaque version d'intégration, y compris celles obsolètes ou remplacées.
usageTranslations.de: Die Versionsübersicht bietet einen historischen Überblick über alle Integrations-Releases, einschließlich abgelöster Versionen.
usageTranslations.es: El Resumen de versiones proporciona una visión histórica de cada lanzamiento de integración, incluidos los que han quedado obsoletos o reemplazados.
usageTranslations.zh: 版本汇总提供了每个集成发布的历史视图，包括已弃用或已替换的版本。
usageTranslations.ar: تجميع الإصدارات يوفر عرضًا تاريخيًا لكل إصدار تكامل، بما في ذلك تلك المهملة أو المستبدلة.
usageTranslations.pt: A Consolidação de versões fornece uma visão histórica de cada lançamento de integração, inclusive os obsoletos ou substituídos.
usageTranslations.ru: Сводка версий предоставляет исторический обзор всех выпусков интеграций, включая устаревшие или заменённые.
usageTranslations.ja: バージョン集計は、廃止または置き換えられたものも含め、すべての統合リリースの履歴を提供します。
usageTranslations.it: Il Riepilogo versioni fornisce una panoramica storica di ogni rilascio di integrazione, inclusi quelli deprecati o sostituiti.
usageTranslations.vi: Tổng hợp phiên bản cung cấp cái nhìn lịch sử về mọi bản phát hành tích hợp, bao gồm cả bản đã ngưng sử dụng hoặc thay thế.
usageTranslations.hi: वर्शन रोलअप हर इंटीग्रेशन रिलीज़ का ऐतिहासिक दृश्य देता है, जिनमें अप्रचलित या प्रतिस्थापित वर्शन भी शामिल हैं।
usageTranslations.th: สรุปรวมเวอร์ชันให้มุมมองทางประวัติศาสตร์ของการปล่อยแต่ละครั้ง รวมถึงเวอร์ชันที่เลิกใช้หรือถูกแทนที่
usageTranslations.id: Ringkasan Versi memberikan tampilan historis dari setiap rilis integrasi, termasuk yang tidak lagi digunakan atau telah digantikan.

terms.definition: A dedicated dashboard or system that tracks and visualizes the status, health, and performance of build pipelines and associated jobs in real-time for operational and troubleshooting visibility.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Build Monitor displays real-time build job statuses, allowing developers to quickly identify and resolve failures.

termTranslations.th: ตัวติดตามการสร้าง

usageTranslations.en: The Build Monitor displays real-time build job statuses, allowing developers to quickly identify and resolve failures.
usageTranslations.tr: Derleme İzleyicisi, gerçek zamanlı derleme iş durumu göstererek geliştiricilerin hataları hızlıca tespit etmesini ve çözmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le Moniteur de build affiche le statut des tâches en temps réel, permettant aux développeurs d'identifier et résoudre rapidement les échecs.
usageTranslations.de: Der Build-Monitor zeigt den Status von Build-Jobs in Echtzeit an, sodass Entwickler Fehler schnell erkennen und beheben können.
usageTranslations.es: El Monitor de compilación muestra el estado de los trabajos en tiempo real, permitiendo a los desarrolladores identificar y resolver fallos rápidamente.
usageTranslations.zh: 构建监控器显示实时构建作业状态，使开发人员能够快速识别并解决故障。
usageTranslations.ar: يعرض مراقب البناء حالة وظائف البناء في الوقت الحقيقي، مما يسمح للمطورين بتحديد المشكلات وحلها بسرعة.
usageTranslations.pt: O Monitor de build exibe o status dos jobs em tempo real, permitindo que desenvolvedores identifiquem e resolvam falhas rapidamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Монитор сборки показывает статусы заданий в реальном времени, позволяя разработчикам быстро находить и устранять сбои.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルドモニターはリアルタイムのビルドジョブの状態を表示し、開発者が迅速に失敗を特定し解決できるようにします。
usageTranslations.it: Il Monitor build mostra lo stato dei job in tempo reale, consentendo agli sviluppatori di identificare e risolvere rapidamente i guasti.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình giám sát bản dựng hiển thị trạng thái công việc bản dựng theo thời gian thực, giúp lập trình viên nhận diện và khắc phục lỗi nhanh chóng.
usageTranslations.hi: बिल्ड मॉनिटर वास्तविक समय में बिल्ड जॉब की स्थिति दिखाता है, जिससे डेवलपर्स जल्दी से समस्याओं की पहचान और समाधान कर सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวติดตามการสร้างแสดงสถานะงานสร้างแบบเรียลไทม์ ช่วยให้นักพัฒนาระบุและแก้ไขข้อผิดพลาดได้อย่างรวดเร็ว
usageTranslations.id: Monitor Build menampilkan status job build secara real time, memungkinkan developer mengidentifikasi dan menyelesaikan kegagalan dengan cepat.

terms.definition: An actionable interface element in deployment or release management systems that triggers automated reversion of services, applications, or integrations to a previous stable state or version upon detection of issues.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: If critical errors are detected post-release, use the Rollback Button to restore the last known good configuration.

termTranslations.th: ปุ่มย้อนกลับ

usageTranslations.en: If critical errors are detected post-release, use the Rollback Button to restore the last known good configuration.
usageTranslations.tr: Kritik hatalar yayın sonrası tespit edilirse, son bilinen iyi yapılandırmayı geri yüklemek için Geri Alma Düğmesi'ni kullanın.
usageTranslations.fr: En cas d'erreurs critiques après publication, utilisez le Bouton de retour arrière pour restaurer la dernière configuration valide.
usageTranslations.de: Werden nach dem Release kritische Fehler erkannt, nutzen Sie die Rollback-Schaltfläche, um die letzte bekannte stabile Konfiguration wiederherzustellen.
usageTranslations.es: Si se detectan errores críticos tras la publicación, utilice el Botón de reversión para restaurar la última configuración válida conocida.
usageTranslations.zh: 如在发布后检测到严重错误，请使用回滚按钮恢复到上次的有效配置。
usageTranslations.ar: إذا تم اكتشاف أخطاء حرجة بعد الإصدار، استخدم زر التراجع لاستعادة آخر تكوين جيد معروف.
usageTranslations.pt: Se erros críticos forem detectados após a liberação, use o Botão de reversão para restaurar a última configuração válida.
usageTranslations.ru: Если после релиза обнаружены критические ошибки, используйте кнопку отката для восстановления последней рабочей конфигурации.
usageTranslations.ja: リリース後に重大なエラーが検出された場合は、ロールバックボタンを使用して最後に正常だった構成を復元します。
usageTranslations.it: Se vengono rilevati errori critici dopo il rilascio, usa il Pulsante rollback per ripristinare l'ultima configurazione valida nota.
usageTranslations.vi: Nếu phát hiện lỗi nghiêm trọng sau khi phát hành, hãy dùng Nút hoàn tác để khôi phục cấu hình tốt cuối cùng.
usageTranslations.hi: अगर रिलीज़ के बाद गंभीर त्रुटियाँ मिलती हैं, तो अंतिम ज्ञात सही कॉन्फ़िगरेशन को पुनर्स्थापित करने के लिए रोलबैक बटन का उपयोग करें।
usageTranslations.th: หากพบข้อผิดพลาดร้ายแรงหลังปล่อยระบบ ให้ใช้ปุ่มย้อนกลับเพื่อกู้คืนการตั้งค่าที่ดีล่าสุด
usageTranslations.id: Jika terjadi error kritis setelah rilis, gunakan Tombol Rollback untuk mengembalikan konfigurasi terakhir yang baik.

terms.definition: A systematic process and associated records for reviewing, validating, and certifying that each release complies with required policies, standards, approvals, and controls in integration and deployment pipelines.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Release Audit logs confirm all approval steps, control gates, and compliance checks were completed before deployment.

termTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบการปล่อย

usageTranslations.en: Release Audit logs confirm all approval steps, control gates, and compliance checks were completed before deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm Denetimi günlükleri, dağıtımdan önce tüm onay adımlarının, kontrol kapılarının ve uyumluluk kontrollerinin tamamlandığını doğrular.
usageTranslations.fr: Les journaux d'audit de publication confirment que toutes les étapes d'approbation, portes de contrôle et vérifications de conformité ont été effectuées avant le déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Release-Audit-Protokolle bestätigen, dass alle Freigabeschritte, Kontrollpunkte und Compliance-Prüfungen vor dem Deployment abgeschlossen wurden.
usageTranslations.es: Los registros de auditoría de lanzamiento confirman que todos los pasos de aprobación, puertas de control y verificaciones de cumplimiento se completaron antes del despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布审计日志确认所有审批步骤、控制关卡和合规检查在部署前已完成。
usageTranslations.ar: تؤكد سجلات تدقيق الإصدار إكمال جميع خطوات الموافقة وبوابات التحكم وفحوصات الامتثال قبل النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Os logs de Auditoria de liberação confirmam que todas as etapas de aprovação, gates de controle e verificações de conformidade foram concluídas antes da implantação.
usageTranslations.ru: Журналы аудита релиза подтверждают, что все этапы утверждения, контрольные точки и проверки соответствия были завершены до развертывания.
usageTranslations.ja: リリース監査ログは、すべての承認手順、コントロールゲート、およびコンプライアンスチェックがデプロイ前に完了したことを確認します。
usageTranslations.it: I log di Audit di rilascio confermano che tutti i passaggi di approvazione, i gate di controllo e le verifiche di conformità sono stati completati prima della distribuzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhật ký kiểm toán phát hành xác nhận rằng mọi bước phê duyệt, cổng kiểm soát và kiểm tra tuân thủ đều đã hoàn thành trước khi triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ ऑडिट लॉग्स पुष्टि करते हैं कि सभी स्वीकृति चरण, नियंत्रण गेट और अनुपालन जांच तैनाती से पहले पूरी कर ली गई थीं।
usageTranslations.th: บันทึกการตรวจสอบการปล่อยยืนยันว่าทุกขั้นตอนการอนุมัติ ประตูควบคุม และการตรวจสอบความสอดคล้องเสร็จสิ้นก่อนการนำไปใช้
usageTranslations.id: Log Audit Rilis mengonfirmasi semua langkah persetujuan, kontrol, dan pengecekan kepatuhan telah selesai sebelum deployment.

terms.definition: An automated tool or plugin that analyzes configuration files for errors, policy violations, and best-practice deviations, widely integrated into CI/CD pipelines for operational reliability.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Config Linter flagged multiple policy violations in the Kubernetes deployment manifest before approval.

termTranslations.th: เครื่องตรวจสอบคอนฟิก

usageTranslations.en: The Config Linter flagged multiple policy violations in the Kubernetes deployment manifest before approval.
usageTranslations.tr: Yapılandırma Denetleyicisi, onay öncesi Kubernetes dağıtım manifestinde birden fazla politika ihlali tespit etti.
usageTranslations.fr: Le Linter de configuration a signalé plusieurs violations de politiques dans le manifeste de déploiement Kubernetes avant approbation.
usageTranslations.de: Der Konfigurations-Linter kennzeichnete mehrere Richtlinienverstöße im Kubernetes-Deployment-Manifest vor der Freigabe.
usageTranslations.es: El Linter de configuración marcó múltiples violaciones de políticas en el manifiesto de despliegue de Kubernetes antes de la aprobación.
usageTranslations.zh: 配置检查器在审批前标记了Kubernetes部署清单中的多个策略违规。
usageTranslations.ar: مدقق التكوين أبلغ عن انتهاكات سياسات متعددة في بيان نشر Kubernetes قبل الموافقة.
usageTranslations.pt: O Linter de configuração sinalizou várias violações de política no manifesto de implantação do Kubernetes antes da aprovação.
usageTranslations.ru: Линтер конфигураций отметил несколько нарушений политики в манифесте развертывания Kubernetes до утверждения.
usageTranslations.ja: コンフィグリンターは、承認前にKubernetesデプロイマニフェストの複数のポリシー違反を検出しました。
usageTranslations.it: Il Linter di configurazione ha segnalato più violazioni di policy nel manifest di deployment Kubernetes prima dell'approvazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình kiểm tra cấu hình đã phát hiện nhiều vi phạm chính sách trong manifest triển khai Kubernetes trước khi phê duyệt.
usageTranslations.hi: कॉन्फ़िग लिन्टर ने अप्रूवल से पहले कुबेरनेट्स डिप्लॉयमेंट मैनिफेस्ट में कई पॉलिसी उल्लंघनों को चिह्नित किया।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องตรวจสอบคอนฟิกแจ้งเตือนการละเมิดนโยบายหลายรายการใน manifest ของ Kubernetes ก่อนอนุมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Linter Konfigurasi menandai beberapa pelanggaran kebijakan dalam manifest deployment Kubernetes sebelum persetujuan.

terms.definition: A logical set of releases managed and tracked together, often for coordinated deployment, approval, or rollback, as represented in release management dashboards and CI/CD orchestration.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: All microservices updates were deployed as part of the same Release Group for synchronized rollout and rollback.

termTranslations.th: กลุ่มการปล่อย

usageTranslations.en: All microservices updates were deployed as part of the same Release Group for synchronized rollout and rollback.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm mikroservis güncellemeleri, eşzamanlı dağıtım ve geri alma için aynı Sürüm Grubu kapsamında dağıtıldı.
usageTranslations.fr: Toutes les mises à jour de microservices ont été déployées dans le même Groupe de publication pour un déploiement et un retour synchronisés.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Microservices-Updates wurden im Rahmen derselben Release-Gruppe für synchronisierte Bereitstellung und Rollback implementiert.
usageTranslations.es: Todas las actualizaciones de microservicios se implementaron como parte del mismo Grupo de lanzamiento para un despliegue y reversión sincronizados.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有微服务更新都作为同一发布组的一部分进行同步发布和回滚。
usageTranslations.ar: تم نشر جميع تحديثات الخدمات المصغرة كجزء من نفس مجموعة الإصدارات لضمان التنفيذ والتراجع المتزامنين.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as atualizações de microsserviços foram implantadas como parte do mesmo Grupo de liberação para rollout e rollback sincronizados.
usageTranslations.ru: Все обновления микросервисов были развернуты в составе одной группы релизов для синхронизированного выпуска и отката.
usageTranslations.ja: すべてのマイクロサービスのアップデートは、同じリリースグループの一部として同期的に展開およびロールバックされました。
usageTranslations.it: Tutti gli aggiornamenti dei microservizi sono stati distribuiti come parte dello stesso Gruppo di rilascio per un rollout e un rollback sincronizzati.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả bản cập nhật microservice đều được triển khai như một phần của cùng Nhóm phát hành để đảm bảo rollout và rollback đồng bộ.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी माइक्रोसर्विस अपडेट्स को एक ही रिलीज़ समूह के तहत समकालिक रोलआउट और रोलबैक के लिए डिप्लॉय किया गया।
usageTranslations.th: การอัปเดตไมโครเซอร์วิสทั้งหมดถูกนำไปใช้เป็นส่วนหนึ่งของกลุ่มการปล่อยเดียวกันเพื่อให้ rollout และ rollback สอดคล้องกัน
usageTranslations.id: Semua pembaruan microservice dideploy sebagai bagian dari Grup Rilis yang sama untuk rollout dan rollback yang sinkron.

terms.definition: A diagnostic or analytical tool used to examine the details, logs, and configuration of releases for issues, compliance, and operational insights within CI/CD environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Release Inspector provides detailed logs and configuration checks for each deployment, assisting with root cause analysis.

termTranslations.ja: リリースインスペクター
termTranslations.th: ผู้ตรวจสอบการปล่อย

usageTranslations.en: The Release Inspector provides detailed logs and configuration checks for each deployment, assisting with root cause analysis.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm Denetleyicisi, her dağıtım için ayrıntılı günlükler ve yapılandırma kontrolleri sunarak kök neden analizine yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: L'Inspecteur de publication fournit des journaux détaillés et des contrôles de configuration pour chaque déploiement, facilitant l'analyse des causes profondes.
usageTranslations.de: Der Release-Inspektor stellt für jede Bereitstellung detaillierte Protokolle und Konfigurationsprüfungen bereit und unterstützt die Ursachenanalyse.
usageTranslations.es: El Inspector de lanzamiento proporciona registros detallados y verificaciones de configuración para cada implementación, ayudando en el análisis de la causa raíz.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布检查器为每次部署提供详细日志和配置检查，有助于根本原因分析。
usageTranslations.ar: يوفر مفتش الإصدارات سجلات مفصلة وفحوصات تكوين لكل نشر، مما يساعد في تحليل السبب الجذري.
usageTranslations.pt: O Inspetor de liberação fornece logs detalhados e verificações de configuração para cada implantação, auxiliando na análise da causa raiz.
usageTranslations.ru: Инспектор релиза предоставляет подробные журналы и проверки конфигурации для каждого развертывания, помогая анализировать первопричины.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースインスペクターは各デプロイメントの詳細なログと構成チェックを提供し、根本原因分析を支援します。
usageTranslations.it: L'Ispettore di rilascio fornisce log dettagliati e controlli di configurazione per ogni distribuzione, assistendo nell'analisi della causa principale.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình kiểm tra phát hành cung cấp nhật ký chi tiết và kiểm tra cấu hình cho từng lần triển khai, hỗ trợ phân tích nguyên nhân gốc.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ इंस्पेक्टर प्रत्येक डिप्लॉयमेंट के लिए विस्तृत लॉग और कॉन्फ़िगरेशन चेक प्रदान करता है, जिससे मूल कारण विश्लेषण में सहायता मिलती है।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ตรวจสอบการปล่อยให้บันทึกและตรวจสอบการตั้งค่าโดยละเอียดสำหรับแต่ละการนำไปใช้ ช่วยวิเคราะห์หาสาเหตุหลัก
usageTranslations.id: Inspektur Rilis memberikan log rinci dan pemeriksaan konfigurasi untuk setiap deployment, membantu analisis akar masalah.

terms.definition: An automated event or condition that initiates the execution of a CI/CD pipeline, such as a code commit, scheduled timer, or external webhook as defined in integration or deployment systems.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A pipeline trigger starts the integration workflow automatically when a developer pushes new code to the repository.

termTranslations.ja: パイプライントリガー
termTranslations.th: ทริกเกอร์ไปป์ไลน์

usageTranslations.en: A pipeline trigger starts the integration workflow automatically when a developer pushes new code to the repository.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir boru hattı tetikleyicisi, geliştirici yeni kodu repoya gönderdiğinde entegrasyon iş akışını otomatik başlatır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un déclencheur de pipeline lance automatiquement le flux d’intégration lors d’un push de code.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Pipeline-Trigger startet den Integrationsworkflow automatisch beim Pushen von neuem Code.
usageTranslations.es: Un disparador de canalización inicia el flujo de integración automáticamente cuando un desarrollador envía nuevo código.
usageTranslations.zh: 当开发者推送新代码时，流水线触发器会自动启动集成流程。
usageTranslations.ar: يبدأ مشغل خط الأنابيب سير عمل التكامل تلقائيًا عند دفع رمز جديد.
usageTranslations.pt: Um disparador de pipeline inicia o fluxo de integração automaticamente quando um desenvolvedor envia novo código.
usageTranslations.ru: Триггер конвейера автоматически запускает интеграционный процесс при отправке нового кода.
usageTranslations.ja: 開発者が新しいコードをプッシュすると、パイプライントリガーが自動的に統合ワークフローを開始します。
usageTranslations.it: Un trigger della pipeline avvia automaticamente il flusso d’integrazione al push di nuovo codice.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình kích hoạt pipeline sẽ tự động bắt đầu quy trình tích hợp khi nhà phát triển đẩy mã mới.
usageTranslations.hi: डिवेलपर के नया कोड पुश करते ही पाइपलाइन ट्रिगर स्वचालित रूप से वर्कफ़्लो शुरू करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ทริกเกอร์ไปป์ไลน์จะเริ่มกระบวนการรวมโดยอัตโนมัติเมื่อมีการผลักดันโค้ดใหม่
usageTranslations.id: Pemicu pipeline memulai alur kerja integrasi secara otomatis saat kode baru didorong.

terms.definition: A managed storage location for build artifacts, such as binaries, packages, or container images, used for version control and deployment in integration and delivery pipelines.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The artifact repository stores all compiled binaries and images for traceable, reliable releases across integration environments.

termTranslations.ja: アーティファクトリポジトリ
termTranslations.th: ที่เก็บอาร์ติแฟกต์

usageTranslations.en: The artifact repository stores all compiled binaries and images for traceable, reliable releases across integration environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Artifact deposu, tüm derlenmiş dosya ve görselleri izlenebilir, güvenilir sürümler için saklar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le référentiel d’artefacts stocke tous les binaires compilés pour des versions traçables et fiables.
usageTranslations.de: Das Artefakt-Repository speichert alle kompilierten Binärdateien und Images für nachvollziehbare Releases.
usageTranslations.es: El repositorio de artefactos almacena todos los binarios compilados e imágenes para lanzamientos rastreables y confiables.
usageTranslations.zh: 制品库存储所有已编译的二进制文件和镜像，确保版本可追踪可靠。
usageTranslations.ar: يخزن مستودع الحزم جميع الملفات الثنائية والصور المُجمعة للإصدارات الموثوقة.
usageTranslations.pt: O repositório de artefatos armazena todos os binários compilados para lançamentos rastreáveis.
usageTranslations.ru: Репозиторий артефактов хранит все собранные двоичные файлы для отслеживаемых и надежных релизов.
usageTranslations.ja: アーティファクトリポジトリは、すべてのバイナリやイメージを追跡可能なリリースのために保存します。
usageTranslations.it: Il repository degli artefatti conserva tutti i binari compilati per rilasci tracciabili.
usageTranslations.vi: Kho lưu trữ hiện vật lưu tất cả các tệp nhị phân đã biên dịch cho phát hành đáng tin cậy.
usageTranslations.hi: आर्टिफैक्ट रिपॉजिटरी सभी बायनरी और इमेज विश्वसनीय रिलीज़ के लिए संग्रहीत करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ที่เก็บอาร์ติแฟกต์จัดเก็บไบนารีและอิมเมจทั้งหมดเพื่อการปล่อยที่เชื่อถือได้
usageTranslations.id: Repositori artefak menyimpan semua file biner dan gambar untuk rilis yang dapat dilacak.

terms.definition: A defined sequence of automated steps that compile, test, and assemble code into deployable artifacts within the integration lifecycle.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The build pipeline compiles source code, runs automated tests, and prepares artifacts for further integration stages.

termTranslations.th: ไปป์ไลน์บิลด์

usageTranslations.en: The build pipeline compiles source code, runs automated tests, and prepares artifacts for further integration stages.
usageTranslations.tr: Derleme hattı kaynak kodu derler, otomatik testleri çalıştırır ve sonraki entegrasyon adımları için artefaktları hazırlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le pipeline de build compile le code source, exécute les tests et prépare les artefacts.
usageTranslations.de: Die Build-Pipeline kompiliert Quellcode, führt Tests aus und erstellt Artefakte.
usageTranslations.es: El pipeline de compilación compila el código fuente, ejecuta pruebas y prepara los artefactos.
usageTranslations.zh: 构建流水线编译源码、运行自动测试，并为后续集成阶段准备制品。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم خط أنابيب البناء بتجميع الكود وتشغيل الاختبارات وإعداد الحزم.
usageTranslations.pt: O pipeline de build compila código, executa testes e prepara artefatos.
usageTranslations.ru: Сборочный конвейер компилирует код, проводит тесты и формирует артефакты.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルドパイプラインはソースコードをコンパイルし、自動テストを実行します。
usageTranslations.it: La pipeline di build compila il codice e prepara gli artefatti.
usageTranslations.vi: Pipeline xây dựng biên dịch mã nguồn, chạy kiểm thử tự động và chuẩn bị artifact.
usageTranslations.hi: बिल्ड पाइपलाइन सोर्स कोड को कंपाइल, टेस्ट और आर्टिफैक्ट तैयार करती है।
usageTranslations.th: ไปป์ไลน์บิลด์คอมไพล์โค้ด ทดสอบ และเตรียมอาร์ติแฟกต์
usageTranslations.id: Pipeline build mengompilasi kode, menjalankan tes, dan menyiapkan artefak.

terms.definition: A series of automated stages that manage the deployment, testing, and promotion of software artifacts to production or other target environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A release pipeline automates deployment steps, including approval gates and environment promotion, for robust integration delivery.

termTranslations.ja: リリースパイプライン
termTranslations.th: ไปป์ไลน์ปล่อยซอฟต์แวร์

usageTranslations.en: A release pipeline automates deployment steps, including approval gates and environment promotion, for robust integration delivery.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm hattı, onay aşamaları ve ortam yükseltmesi dahil tüm dağıtım adımlarını otomatikleştirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le pipeline de déploiement automatise les étapes de livraison et les validations.
usageTranslations.de: Die Release-Pipeline automatisiert Deployments und Genehmigungsstufen.
usageTranslations.es: El pipeline de liberación automatiza los pasos de despliegue y las promociones de entorno.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布流水线自动化部署步骤，包括审批和环境升级。
usageTranslations.ar: يؤتمت خط أنابيب الإصدارات جميع خطوات النشر والترقية.
usageTranslations.pt: O pipeline de release automatiza etapas de implantação e aprovação.
usageTranslations.ru: Конвейер релиза автоматизирует развертывания и этапы согласования.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースパイプラインは承認や環境昇格を自動化します。
usageTranslations.it: La pipeline di rilascio automatizza distribuzioni e promozioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Pipeline phát hành tự động hóa các bước triển khai và thăng cấp môi trường.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ पाइपलाइन सभी डिप्लॉयमेंट स्टेप्स को ऑटोमेट करती है।
usageTranslations.th: ไปป์ไลน์ปล่อยซอฟต์แวร์จะอัตโนมัติทุกขั้นตอนการปล่อย
usageTranslations.id: Pipeline rilis mengotomatisasi langkah-langkah deployment dan promosi lingkungan.

terms.definition: A formal proposal to merge code changes from one branch into another, usually requiring automated checks and peer review in integrated development workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A merge request initiates code review, automated testing, and policy checks before integration into the main branch.

termTranslations.th: คำขอผสาน

usageTranslations.en: A merge request initiates code review, automated testing, and policy checks before integration into the main branch.
usageTranslations.tr: Birleştirme isteği, ana dala entegrasyon öncesi kod incelemesi ve testleri başlatır.
usageTranslations.fr: La demande de fusion déclenche la revue de code, les tests et les vérifications de politique.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Merge-Request löst Code-Review, Tests und Richtlinienprüfungen aus.
usageTranslations.es: La solicitud de fusión inicia la revisión y pruebas antes de fusionar.
usageTranslations.zh: 合并请求会在主分支集成前启动代码审查和测试。
usageTranslations.ar: طلب الدمج يبدأ مراجعة الكود واختبار السياسات.
usageTranslations.pt: A solicitação de merge inicia a revisão e os testes.
usageTranslations.ru: Запрос на слияние запускает проверку кода и тесты.
usageTranslations.ja: マージリクエストは統合前にレビューとテストを開始します。
usageTranslations.it: La richiesta di merge avvia revisione e test.
usageTranslations.vi: Yêu cầu hợp nhất sẽ khởi tạo kiểm tra code và test.
usageTranslations.hi: मर्ज अनुरोध कोड रिव्यू और टेस्टिंग शुरू करता है।
usageTranslations.th: คำขอผสานจะเริ่มการรีวิวโค้ดและทดสอบ
usageTranslations.id: Permintaan merge memulai peninjauan kode dan pengujian.

terms.definition: A record of the result of automated checks or tests associated with a specific commit in a version control or integration system.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Commit status provides visibility into whether code changes pass all tests before integration.

termTranslations.th: สถานะคอมมิต

usageTranslations.en: Commit status provides visibility into whether code changes pass all tests before integration.
usageTranslations.tr: Commit durumu, kod değişikliklerinin tüm testleri geçip geçmediğini gösterir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le statut du commit indique si le code passe tous les tests.
usageTranslations.de: Der Commit-Status zeigt, ob der Code alle Tests besteht.
usageTranslations.es: El estado del commit indica si los cambios superan las pruebas.
usageTranslations.zh: 提交状态显示代码变更是否通过了所有测试。
usageTranslations.ar: توفر حالة الالتزام رؤية لنجاح الاختبارات.
usageTranslations.pt: O status do commit mostra se todas as verificações foram aprovadas.
usageTranslations.ru: Статус коммита показывает прохождение тестов.
usageTranslations.ja: コミットステータスはすべてのテスト通過を示します。
usageTranslations.it: Lo stato del commit indica se tutti i test sono superati.
usageTranslations.vi: Trạng thái commit thể hiện mã có vượt qua mọi kiểm thử không.
usageTranslations.hi: कमिट स्थिति सभी परीक्षणों को पास करने का दृश्य देती है।
usageTranslations.th: สถานะคอมมิตแสดงว่าโค้ดผ่านการทดสอบหรือไม่
usageTranslations.id: Status commit menunjukkan apakah kode lulus semua tes.

terms.definition: A tool or framework that executes automated tests, collects results, and reports on the status of integration test suites.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The test runner validates integration points by executing all test cases and reporting failures in real time.

termTranslations.th: ตัวรันทดสอบ

usageTranslations.en: The test runner validates integration points by executing all test cases and reporting failures in real time.
usageTranslations.tr: Test koşucu, tüm test vakalarını çalıştırarak entegrasyon noktalarını doğrular ve anında raporlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’exécuteur de tests valide les points d’intégration en temps réel.
usageTranslations.de: Der Test-Runner prüft Integrationspunkte durch Ausführen aller Testfälle.
usageTranslations.es: El ejecutor de pruebas valida los puntos de integración y reporta fallos.
usageTranslations.zh: 测试运行器通过执行全部测试用例验证集成点并实时报告失败。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم مشغل الاختبارات بالتحقق من نقاط التكامل وتنبيه عن الإخفاقات.
usageTranslations.pt: O executor de testes valida pontos de integração em tempo real.
usageTranslations.ru: Тест-раннер проверяет интеграцию, исполняя тесты.
usageTranslations.ja: テストランナーは統合ポイントを検証し、失敗を報告します。
usageTranslations.it: L’esecutore di test convalida i punti d’integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình chạy kiểm thử xác thực các điểm tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: टेस्ट रनर सभी परीक्षण मामलों को चलाकर सत्यापन करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวรันทดสอบจะตรวจสอบจุดเชื่อมต่อแบบเรียลไทม์
usageTranslations.id: Test runner memvalidasi titik integrasi dan melaporkan kegagalan.

terms.definition: A predefined set of quality criteria or checks that code must meet before advancing to the next stage of an integration or deployment pipeline.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A quality gate enforces code coverage and static analysis before code is released to integration environments.

termTranslations.th: เกตคุณภาพ

usageTranslations.en: A quality gate enforces code coverage and static analysis before code is released to integration environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Kalite kapısı, kod entegrasyonundan önce kapsam ve analiz kontrolü yapar.
usageTranslations.fr: La barrière de qualité impose la couverture et l’analyse du code.
usageTranslations.de: Die Qualitätsschranke prüft Testabdeckung vor dem Release.
usageTranslations.es: La puerta de calidad impone revisiones antes de la integración.
usageTranslations.zh: 质量门槛要求在集成前进行代码覆盖和静态分析。
usageTranslations.ar: بوابة الجودة تفرض اختبارات التغطية قبل النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: A barreira de qualidade exige análise estática antes da liberação.
usageTranslations.ru: Контроль качества требует покрытие и анализ перед интеграцией.
usageTranslations.ja: 品質ゲートはコードカバレッジと解析を強制します。
usageTranslations.it: Il cancello di qualità impone copertura e analisi del codice.
usageTranslations.vi: Cổng chất lượng áp dụng kiểm thử và phân tích tĩnh.
usageTranslations.hi: क्वालिटी गेट कोड कवरेज और विश्लेषण लागू करता है।
usageTranslations.th: เกตคุณภาพจะบังคับใช้การตรวจสอบโค้ด
usageTranslations.id: Gerbang kualitas menerapkan cakupan kode dan analisis statis.

terms.definition: A graphical or tabular representation of the current status and progress of each stage within an integration or deployment pipeline, as seen in dashboards or monitoring tools.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The stage view in Jenkins provides a visual map of each pipeline phase and highlights bottlenecks during integration.

termTranslations.th: มุมมองขั้นตอน

usageTranslations.en: The stage view in Jenkins provides a visual map of each pipeline phase and highlights bottlenecks during integration.
usageTranslations.tr: Jenkins’teki aşama görünümü, boru hattı fazlarını ve darboğazları görsel olarak gösterir.
usageTranslations.fr: La vue des étapes dans Jenkins affiche chaque phase et les points de blocage.
usageTranslations.de: Die Stufenansicht in Jenkins visualisiert alle Phasen und Engpässe.
usageTranslations.es: La vista de etapas en Jenkins muestra fases y cuellos de botella.
usageTranslations.zh: Jenkins中的阶段视图可视化各阶段和瓶颈。
usageTranslations.ar: عرض المراحل في Jenkins يوضح كل مرحلة ونقاط الاختناق.
usageTranslations.pt: A visão de etapas no Jenkins mostra fases e gargalos.
usageTranslations.ru: Просмотр этапов в Jenkins показывает фазы и узкие места.
usageTranslations.ja: Jenkinsのステージビューは各段階とボトルネックを可視化します。
usageTranslations.it: La vista delle fasi in Jenkins mostra fasi e colli di bottiglia.
usageTranslations.vi: Chế độ xem giai đoạn trên Jenkins hiển thị các giai đoạn và điểm tắc.
usageTranslations.hi: Jenkins में स्टेज व्यू प्रत्येक चरण और बाधाओं को दर्शाता है।
usageTranslations.th: มุมมองขั้นตอนใน Jenkins แสดงแต่ละเฟสและคอขวด
usageTranslations.id: Tampilan tahap di Jenkins menunjukkan setiap fase dan hambatan.

terms.definition: A structured configuration that defines multiple combinations of job parameters (e.g., environments, versions, dependencies) for parallel or conditional execution in integration pipelines.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A job matrix enables testing across multiple OS and dependency versions in a single integration workflow, increasing pipeline coverage and efficiency.

termTranslations.th: เมทริกซ์งาน

usageTranslations.en: A job matrix enables testing across multiple OS and dependency versions in a single integration workflow, increasing pipeline coverage and efficiency.
usageTranslations.tr: İş matrisi, entegrasyon iş akışında birden fazla işletim sistemi ve bağımlılık sürümüyle test yapılmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La matrice de tâches permet de tester plusieurs systèmes et versions dans un même workflow.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Job-Matrix ermöglicht Tests über mehrere Betriebssystem- und Abhängigkeitsversionen hinweg.
usageTranslations.es: La matriz de trabajos permite pruebas en múltiples versiones y entornos en un flujo único.
usageTranslations.zh: 作业矩阵实现单一流程下多操作系统和依赖测试，提高覆盖率和效率。
usageTranslations.ar: تمكن مصفوفة الوظائف من الاختبار عبر أنظمة وإصدارات متعددة ضمن سير عمل واحد.
usageTranslations.pt: A matriz de jobs permite testar diferentes sistemas e versões no mesmo fluxo.
usageTranslations.ru: Матрица заданий позволяет тестировать на разных ОС и зависимостях в одном конвейере.
usageTranslations.ja: ジョブマトリクスで複数のOS・依存関係を一括テストできる。
usageTranslations.it: La matrice dei job consente test su più sistemi e dipendenze in un workflow.
usageTranslations.vi: Ma trận công việc cho phép kiểm thử nhiều hệ điều hành và phiên bản.
usageTranslations.hi: जॉब मैट्रिक्स से एक ही वर्कफ़्लो में कई OS व वर्शन टेस्ट होते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: เมทริกซ์งานช่วยให้ทดสอบหลายระบบและเวอร์ชันได้ในครั้งเดียว
usageTranslations.id: Matriks job memungkinkan pengujian pada berbagai OS dan versi.

terms.definition: A predefined set of procedures for reverting deployed systems or applications to a previous stable state in case of integration or release failure.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A rollback plan is critical for ensuring service continuity when a deployment introduces failures that cannot be resolved immediately.

termTranslations.th: แผนย้อนกลับ

usageTranslations.en: A rollback plan is critical for ensuring service continuity when a deployment introduces failures that cannot be resolved immediately.
usageTranslations.tr: Geri alma planı, dağıtımda hemen çözülemeyen hatalarda hizmet sürekliliği sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le plan de retour arrière est essentiel pour garantir la continuité du service en cas d’échec du déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Der Rollback-Plan stellt die Dienstkontinuität bei Problemen nach dem Deployment sicher.
usageTranslations.es: El plan de reversión es clave para garantizar la continuidad del servicio ante fallos de despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 回滚计划确保在部署失败时维持服务连续性。
usageTranslations.ar: خطة التراجع ضرورية لاستمرارية الخدمة عند فشل النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: O plano de rollback garante a continuidade do serviço após falhas de implantação.
usageTranslations.ru: План отката обеспечивает непрерывность при неудачном развертывании.
usageTranslations.ja: ロールバックプランは障害時のサービス継続に不可欠。
usageTranslations.it: Il piano di rollback garantisce la continuità del servizio in caso di errori.
usageTranslations.vi: Kế hoạch khôi phục đảm bảo dịch vụ liên tục khi triển khai gặp sự cố.
usageTranslations.hi: रोलबैक योजना त्वरित समस्या समाधान न होने पर सेवा चालू रखती है।
usageTranslations.th: แผนย้อนกลับสำคัญสำหรับความต่อเนื่องเมื่อเกิดข้อผิดพลาด
usageTranslations.id: Rencana rollback penting untuk kelangsungan layanan saat terjadi kegagalan.

terms.definition: A policy-enforced checkpoint in a pipeline that requires manual or automated approval before allowing progression to the next integration or release stage.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: An approval gate pauses the pipeline until a responsible party reviews and approves the change for further integration or deployment.

termTranslations.th: เกตอนุมัติ

usageTranslations.en: An approval gate pauses the pipeline until a responsible party reviews and approves the change for further integration or deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Onay kapısı, sorumlu kişi onay verene kadar hattı duraklatır.
usageTranslations.fr: La barrière d’approbation suspend le pipeline jusqu’à validation.
usageTranslations.de: Das Genehmigungs-Gate pausiert die Pipeline bis zur Freigabe.
usageTranslations.es: La puerta de aprobación detiene el flujo hasta la revisión.
usageTranslations.zh: 审批门会暂停流程，直到相关责任人批准。
usageTranslations.ar: بوابة الموافقة توقف خط العمليات حتى تتم المراجعة.
usageTranslations.pt: A barreira de aprovação pausa a pipeline até aprovação.
usageTranslations.ru: Порог одобрения приостанавливает процесс до утверждения.
usageTranslations.ja: 承認ゲートは承認までパイプラインを一時停止します。
usageTranslations.it: Il gate di approvazione sospende la pipeline finché non c’è approvazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Cổng phê duyệt tạm dừng pipeline đến khi được duyệt.
usageTranslations.hi: अनुमोदन द्वार तब तक रुकता है जब तक स्वीकृति न मिले।
usageTranslations.th: เกตอนุมัติหยุดไลน์จนกว่าจะอนุมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Gerbang persetujuan menghentikan pipeline sampai ada persetujuan.

terms.definition: The operation of retrieving specific versions or branches of source code from a version control repository for integration, testing, or deployment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Code checkout is performed at the start of every pipeline run to ensure that the latest source is used for integration and testing.

termTranslations.ja: コードチェックアウト
termTranslations.th: เช็กเอาต์โค้ด

usageTranslations.en: Code checkout is performed at the start of every pipeline run to ensure that the latest source is used for integration and testing.
usageTranslations.tr: Kod çıkışı, entegrasyon ve testlerde güncel kaynağın kullanılması için her boru hattı başında yapılır.
usageTranslations.fr: L’extraction de code a lieu au début de chaque pipeline pour garantir l’actualité du code.
usageTranslations.de: Der Code-Checkout erfolgt zu Beginn jedes Pipeline-Laufs für Aktualität.
usageTranslations.es: La extracción de código se realiza al iniciar la pipeline para usar el código más reciente.
usageTranslations.zh: 每次流程启动时都会进行代码签出以保证最新源码。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم سحب الكود في بداية كل تنفيذ لضمان استخدام الأحدث.
usageTranslations.pt: O checkout de código ocorre no início de cada execução para garantir atualização.
usageTranslations.ru: Получение кода производится в начале каждого запуска конвейера.
usageTranslations.ja: コードチェックアウトは常にパイプライン開始時に行われます。
usageTranslations.it: Il checkout del codice avviene a inizio pipeline per garantire la versione aggiornata.
usageTranslations.vi: Lấy mã nguồn thực hiện khi bắt đầu pipeline để đảm bảo mã mới nhất.
usageTranslations.hi: कोड चेकआउट हर रन की शुरुआत में होता है।
usageTranslations.th: เช็กเอาต์โค้ดจะเริ่มต้นทุกครั้งที่ pipeline ทำงาน
usageTranslations.id: Checkout kode dilakukan setiap awal pipeline untuk memastikan kode terbaru.

terms.definition: A dynamic key-value pair set in the operating system or runtime environment, used to configure integration, deployment, and operational parameters for pipelines or applications.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Environment variables store secrets, credentials, and runtime parameters required for secure and portable integration deployments.

termTranslations.th: ตัวแปรสภาพแวดล้อม

usageTranslations.en: Environment variables store secrets, credentials, and runtime parameters required for secure and portable integration deployments.
usageTranslations.tr: Ortam değişkenleri, entegrasyon dağıtımları için gizli bilgiler ve parametreleri tutar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les variables d’environnement stockent des secrets et paramètres pour le déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Umgebungsvariablen speichern geheime und Laufzeitparameter für Deployments.
usageTranslations.es: Las variables de entorno almacenan secretos y parámetros para despliegues seguros.
usageTranslations.zh: 环境变量保存集成部署所需的密钥和参数。
usageTranslations.ar: تخزن متغيرات البيئة الأسرار والمعايير اللازمة للنشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Variáveis de ambiente guardam segredos e parâmetros de implantação.
usageTranslations.ru: Переменные среды хранят секреты и параметры интеграции.
usageTranslations.ja: 環境変数は機密情報やパラメータを保持します。
usageTranslations.it: Le variabili d’ambiente memorizzano segreti e parametri per il deployment.
usageTranslations.vi: Biến môi trường lưu trữ thông tin nhạy cảm cho tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: पर्यावरण चर डिप्लॉयमेंट के लिए क्रेडेंशियल्स रखते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวแปรสภาพแวดล้อมเก็บข้อมูลสำคัญสำหรับดีพลอย
usageTranslations.id: Variabel lingkungan menyimpan rahasia dan parameter penting.

terms.definition: A build version of software that is considered stable and feature-complete, intended for final testing before production release in integration workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A release candidate undergoes comprehensive testing to validate integration stability before the final production rollout.

termTranslations.th: รีลีสแคนดิเดต

usageTranslations.en: A release candidate undergoes comprehensive testing to validate integration stability before the final production rollout.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm adayı, üretimden önce kapsamlı testlerden geçer.
usageTranslations.fr: Le candidat à la publication subit des tests complets avant mise en production.
usageTranslations.de: Der Release-Kandidat wird umfassend getestet, bevor er produktiv geht.
usageTranslations.es: El candidato a lanzamiento pasa pruebas integrales antes del despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布候选版在最终发布前要经过全面测试。
usageTranslations.ar: يخضع مرشح الإصدار لاختبارات شاملة قبل النشر النهائي.
usageTranslations.pt: O candidato a release passa por testes antes da publicação final.
usageTranslations.ru: Кандидат в релизы проходит тестирование перед релизом.
usageTranslations.ja: リリース候補は本番前に徹底的にテストされます。
usageTranslations.it: Il release candidate è sottoposto a test prima del rilascio finale.
usageTranslations.vi: Bản phát hành thử được kiểm thử toàn diện trước phát hành thật.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ कैंडिडेट को फाइनल रिलीज़ से पहले पूरी तरह जांचा जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: รีลีสแคนดิเดตจะถูกทดสอบก่อนปล่อยจริง
usageTranslations.id: Kandidat rilis diuji secara menyeluruh sebelum produksi.

terms.definition: A specified server, environment, or platform where the integrated application or artifact is deployed during the release process.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Each deployment target must be properly configured and authorized for automated releases from the integration pipeline.

termTranslations.ja: デプロイメントターゲット
termTranslations.th: เป้าหมายดีพลอย

usageTranslations.en: Each deployment target must be properly configured and authorized for automated releases from the integration pipeline.
usageTranslations.tr: Her dağıtım hedefi otomatik entegrasyon dağıtımları için yapılandırılmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Chaque cible de déploiement doit être configurée pour l’automatisation.
usageTranslations.de: Jedes Bereitstellungsziel muss für automatische Deployments vorbereitet sein.
usageTranslations.es: Cada destino de implementación debe estar autorizado para lanzamientos automáticos.
usageTranslations.zh: 每个部署目标都需正确配置并授权自动发布。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب تكوين كل هدف نشر وتفويضه للنشر التلقائي.
usageTranslations.pt: Cada destino de implantação precisa ser configurado e autorizado.
usageTranslations.ru: Цели развертывания должны быть настроены для автоматических релизов.
usageTranslations.ja: 各デプロイメントターゲットは自動リリースに設定が必要。
usageTranslations.it: Ogni target di deployment deve essere configurato per i rilasci automatici.
usageTranslations.vi: Mỗi đích triển khai cần cấu hình và cấp quyền phát hành tự động.
usageTranslations.hi: हर डिप्लॉयमेंट टार्गेट को स्वचालित रिलीज के लिए तैयार रखना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: แต่ละเป้าหมายดีพลอยต้องตั้งค่าอย่างถูกต้อง
usageTranslations.id: Setiap target deployment harus dikonfigurasi dan diberi izin.

terms.definition: A formalized process for reviewing, approving, and documenting modifications to integrated systems or software, ensuring traceability and compliance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Change control is mandatory for all production releases to track, approve, and audit every integration-related change.

termTranslations.th: ควบคุมการเปลี่ยนแปลง

usageTranslations.en: Change control is mandatory for all production releases to track, approve, and audit every integration-related change.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm üretim sürümlerinde entegrasyon değişikliklerinin izlenmesi için değişiklik kontrolü zorunludur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le contrôle des changements est obligatoire pour tout déploiement en production.
usageTranslations.de: Änderungskontrolle ist für alle Produktiv-Releases Pflicht.
usageTranslations.es: El control de cambios es obligatorio en todas las publicaciones productivas.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有生产发布都需进行变更控制以追踪和审核。
usageTranslations.ar: ضبط التغيير إلزامي في جميع الإصدارات الإنتاجية.
usageTranslations.pt: Controle de mudanças é obrigatório em releases de produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Контроль изменений обязателен для всех продакшен-релизов.
usageTranslations.ja: 本番リリースには変更管理が必須です。
usageTranslations.it: Il controllo delle modifiche è obbligatorio per ogni rilascio.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm soát thay đổi là bắt buộc cho mọi phát hành sản xuất.
usageTranslations.hi: हर प्रोडक्शन रिलीज़ में परिवर्तन नियंत्रण अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องควบคุมการเปลี่ยนแปลงสำหรับทุกการปล่อยใช้งานจริง
usageTranslations.id: Kontrol perubahan wajib untuk setiap rilis produksi.

terms.definition: The coordinated management and automation of all tasks, approvals, and stages involved in releasing integrated applications or services to target environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Release orchestration manages dependencies, gates, and approvals, ensuring controlled and auditable software releases in complex integration environments.

termTranslations.ja: リリースオーケストレーション
termTranslations.th: ออร์เคสเตรชันการปล่อย

usageTranslations.en: Release orchestration manages dependencies, gates, and approvals, ensuring controlled and auditable software releases in complex integration environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm orkestrasyonu, bağımlılıkları, kapıları ve onayları yönetir; kontrollü sürüm sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’orchestration des releases gère dépendances et validations pour des déploiements maîtrisés.
usageTranslations.de: Die Release-Orchestrierung steuert Abhängigkeiten und Freigaben.
usageTranslations.es: La orquestación de lanzamientos gestiona dependencias y aprobaciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布编排管理依赖、门控和审批，确保受控发布。
usageTranslations.ar: تنسيق الإصدار يدير الاعتماديات والموافقات.
usageTranslations.pt: A orquestração de release gerencia dependências e aprovações.
usageTranslations.ru: Оркестрация релиза управляет зависимостями и согласованиями.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースオーケストレーションは依存関係と承認を管理します。
usageTranslations.it: L’orchestrazione del rilascio gestisce dipendenze e approvazioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Điều phối phát hành quản lý phụ thuộc và phê duyệt.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ ऑर्केस्ट्रेशन अनुमोदन और निर्भरता को प्रबंधित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ออร์เคสเตรชันการปล่อยจะบริหารจัดการการอนุมัติและข้อจำกัด
usageTranslations.id: Orkestrasi rilis mengelola dependensi dan persetujuan.

terms.definition: A dedicated version control branch used to merge and test code changes from multiple contributors before integrating into the main branch or production.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Developers use an integration branch to validate merges and detect conflicts before promoting code to the main repository.

termTranslations.th: สาขารวม

usageTranslations.en: Developers use an integration branch to validate merges and detect conflicts before promoting code to the main repository.
usageTranslations.tr: Geliştiriciler, ana depoya göndermeden önce entegrasyon dalında birleştirmeleri doğrular.
usageTranslations.fr: La branche d’intégration sert à valider les fusions avant la mise en prod.
usageTranslations.de: Im Integrations-Branch werden Merges und Konflikte geprüft.
usageTranslations.es: La rama de integración valida fusiones antes del repositorio principal.
usageTranslations.zh: 集成分支用于在推送主仓库前验证合并和检测冲突。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم المطورون فرع الدمج للتحقق من الدمج قبل النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: O branch de integração valida merges e conflitos antes do principal.
usageTranslations.ru: Интеграционная ветка помогает выявлять конфликты перед слиянием.
usageTranslations.ja: 統合ブランチはメインへの統合前に検証します。
usageTranslations.it: La branch di integrazione serve a convalidare merge e conflitti.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhánh tích hợp giúp kiểm tra hợp nhất và xung đột trước khi đẩy lên nhánh chính.
usageTranslations.hi: इंटीग्रेशन ब्रांच से कोड प्रमोट करने से पहले कन्फ्लिक्ट पता चलते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: สาขารวมช่วยตรวจสอบการรวมโค้ดก่อนส่งเข้า repository หลัก
usageTranslations.id: Cabang integrasi digunakan untuk memvalidasi merge dan konflik.

terms.definition: An error or interruption that prevents a CI/CD or integration pipeline from completing its defined process, often reported via dashboards or alerts.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pipeline failure notifications are sent to the integration team when build or deployment stages encounter errors or unmet conditions.

termTranslations.th: ไปป์ไลน์ล้มเหลว

usageTranslations.en: Pipeline failure notifications are sent to the integration team when build or deployment stages encounter errors or unmet conditions.
usageTranslations.tr: Boru hattı hatası bildirimleri, hata olduğunda entegrasyon ekibine gönderilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les échecs de pipeline sont notifiés à l’équipe d’intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Bei Pipeline-Fehlern wird das Integrationsteam informiert.
usageTranslations.es: Las fallas de pipeline se notifican al equipo de integración.
usageTranslations.zh: 流水线失败时会通知集成团队。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم إخطار فريق الدمج عند فشل خط الأنابيب.
usageTranslations.pt: Falhas de pipeline são notificadas para a equipe de integração.
usageTranslations.ru: О сбоях конвейера уведомляется команда интеграции.
usageTranslations.ja: パイプライン失敗は統合チームに通知されます。
usageTranslations.it: Gli errori di pipeline vengono notificati al team di integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Thông báo thất bại pipeline sẽ gửi cho đội tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: पाइपलाइन फेल होने पर टीम को सूचना मिलती है।
usageTranslations.th: เมื่อไปป์ไลน์ล้มเหลวจะมีการแจ้งเตือนทีม
usageTranslations.id: Kegagalan pipeline diberitahukan ke tim integrasi.

terms.definition: A metric indicating the percentage of source code executed by automated tests within the integration pipeline, used to assess software quality and risk.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: High test coverage in the integration pipeline reduces the risk of undetected defects and improves software reliability.

termTranslations.th: ความครอบคลุมของการทดสอบ

usageTranslations.en: High test coverage in the integration pipeline reduces the risk of undetected defects and improves software reliability.
usageTranslations.tr: Entegrasyon hattındaki yüksek test kapsamı, hataların tespit edilme riskini azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: Une bonne couverture de tests diminue le risque d’erreur non détectée.
usageTranslations.de: Hohe Testabdeckung reduziert das Fehlerrisiko.
usageTranslations.es: Alta cobertura de pruebas reduce el riesgo de defectos no detectados.
usageTranslations.zh: 高测试覆盖率可降低缺陷风险，提高可靠性。
usageTranslations.ar: تغطية الاختبارات العالية تقلل من مخاطر العيوب.
usageTranslations.pt: Alta cobertura de testes reduz riscos e melhora confiabilidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Высокое покрытие тестами снижает риск ошибок.
usageTranslations.ja: テストカバレッジが高いほど信頼性が上がる。
usageTranslations.it: Una copertura elevata riduce i rischi di difetti.
usageTranslations.vi: Độ bao phủ kiểm thử cao giúp giảm rủi ro lỗi.
usageTranslations.hi: अधिक टेस्ट कवरेज से सॉफ़्टवेयर विश्वसनीयता बढ़ती है।
usageTranslations.th: ความครอบคลุมของการทดสอบที่สูงช่วยลดความเสี่ยง
usageTranslations.id: Cakupan pengujian yang tinggi menurunkan risiko kesalahan.

terms.definition: A formal process in which peers examine source code changes for quality, correctness, security, and compliance before integration or deployment in the pipeline.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A code review ensures that all changes meet organizational standards and do not introduce new vulnerabilities before merging into the integration branch.

termTranslations.th: รีวิวโค้ด

usageTranslations.en: A code review ensures that all changes meet organizational standards and do not introduce new vulnerabilities before merging into the integration branch.
usageTranslations.tr: Kod incelemesi, entegrasyon dalına birleştirilmeden önce değişikliklerin standartlara uygunluğunu ve güvenliğini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La revue de code vérifie la conformité et la sécurité des modifications avant la fusion dans la branche d'intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Das Code-Review stellt sicher, dass alle Änderungen Standards erfüllen und keine neuen Schwachstellen einführen.
usageTranslations.es: La revisión de código garantiza la conformidad y la seguridad antes de fusionar en la rama de integración.
usageTranslations.zh: 代码评审确保所有更改符合标准且不会引入新漏洞。
usageTranslations.ar: مراجعة الكود تضمن التوافق وعدم وجود ثغرات قبل الدمج.
usageTranslations.pt: A revisão de código garante conformidade e segurança antes da mesclagem.
usageTranslations.ru: Код-ревью обеспечивает соответствие стандартам и отсутствие новых уязвимостей.
usageTranslations.ja: コードレビューは統合ブランチへのマージ前に品質と安全性を確認します。
usageTranslations.it: La revisione del codice verifica conformità e sicurezza prima della fusione.
usageTranslations.vi: Xét duyệt mã đảm bảo đáp ứng chuẩn và không có lỗi bảo mật mới.
usageTranslations.hi: कोड रिव्यू सभी बदलावों की गुणवत्ता और सुरक्षा की जांच करता है।
usageTranslations.th: รีวิวโค้ดตรวจสอบมาตรฐานและความปลอดภัยก่อนผสาน
usageTranslations.id: Tinjauan kode memastikan perubahan memenuhi standar dan tidak menambah kerentanan.

terms.definition: The process of releasing and enabling integrated software or system changes to a live production environment, making them accessible to end-users.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A production rollout is carefully planned to minimize downtime and ensure business continuity for all users.

termTranslations.th: โรลเอาต์โปรดักชัน

usageTranslations.en: A production rollout is carefully planned to minimize downtime and ensure business continuity for all users.
usageTranslations.tr: Canlıya alma işlemi, kesinti süresini azaltmak ve kesintisiz hizmet sağlamak için dikkatlice planlanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le déploiement en production est planifié pour minimiser les interruptions et garantir la continuité du service.
