usageTranslations.de: Der Produktiv-Rollout wird sorgfältig geplant, um Ausfallzeiten zu minimieren.
usageTranslations.es: El despliegue en producción se planifica para reducir tiempos de inactividad.
usageTranslations.zh: 生产发布需精心规划，以最大限度减少停机并保障连续性。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تخطيط طرح الإنتاج بعناية لتقليل التوقف وضمان استمرارية الخدمة.
usageTranslations.pt: A implantação em produção é planejada para minimizar indisponibilidades.
usageTranslations.ru: Внедрение в продакшен тщательно планируется для минимизации простоев.
usageTranslations.ja: 本番ロールアウトは停止を最小限に抑えて実施されます。
usageTranslations.it: Il rilascio in produzione è pianificato per ridurre i tempi di inattività.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai sản xuất được lên kế hoạch kỹ để giảm gián đoạn.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रोडक्शन रोलआउट सेवा में न्यूनतम बाधा के साथ किया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: โรลเอาต์โปรดักชันวางแผนเพื่อให้ระบบไม่หยุดชะงัก
usageTranslations.id: Rollout produksi direncanakan untuk meminimalkan downtime.

terms.definition: A configuration mechanism that enables or disables application features in real time without code changes, often used in continuous delivery and A/B testing.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Feature flags allow teams to enable or disable new functionality in production without deploying new code.

termTranslations.th: แฟล็กคุณลักษณะ

usageTranslations.en: Feature flags allow teams to enable or disable new functionality in production without deploying new code.
usageTranslations.tr: Özellik bayrakları, yeni kod dağıtmadan fonksiyonelliği etkinleştirmeyi veya devre dışı bırakmayı sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les drapeaux de fonctionnalité permettent d'activer ou désactiver des fonctions sans déployer de nouveau code.
usageTranslations.de: Feature-Flags erlauben Funktionen ohne neuen Code zu aktivieren/deaktivieren.
usageTranslations.es: Las banderas de característica permiten activar o desactivar funciones sin nuevo despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 功能开关使团队无需部署新代码即可切换功能。
usageTranslations.ar: تتيح أعلام الميزة تفعيل أو تعطيل وظائف دون نشر كود جديد.
usageTranslations.pt: Flags de funcionalidade permitem ativar recursos sem novo deploy.
usageTranslations.ru: Флаги функции позволяют включать/отключать функционал без релиза.
usageTranslations.ja: フィーチャーフラグは新しいコードなしで機能を切替可能。
usageTranslations.it: I flag di funzionalità attivano/disattivano funzioni senza rilascio.
usageTranslations.vi: Cờ tính năng giúp bật/tắt chức năng mà không cần phát hành lại.
usageTranslations.hi: फीचर फ्लैग नई कोड तैनाती के बिना फीचर्स बदलते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: แฟล็กคุณลักษณะช่วยเปิด-ปิดฟีเจอร์โดยไม่ต้อง deploy ใหม่
usageTranslations.id: Feature flag memungkinkan fitur diaktifkan/tidak tanpa kode baru.

terms.definition: The concurrent running of multiple tasks, jobs, or pipeline stages to optimize integration speed and resource utilization in CI/CD workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Parallel execution of test jobs reduces overall build time and increases the efficiency of the integration pipeline.

termTranslations.th: การดำเนินการขนาน

usageTranslations.en: Parallel execution of test jobs reduces overall build time and increases the efficiency of the integration pipeline.
usageTranslations.tr: Test işlerinin paralel yürütülmesi, toplam derleme süresini azaltır ve entegrasyon hattının verimliliğini artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: L'exécution parallèle des tests réduit la durée globale du build.
usageTranslations.de: Parallele Ausführung verkürzt die Build-Zeit und steigert die Effizienz.
usageTranslations.es: La ejecución paralela de trabajos reduce el tiempo de compilación.
usageTranslations.zh: 并行执行测试任务可缩短整体构建时间并提升效率。
usageTranslations.ar: التنفيذ المتوازي يسرع وقت البناء ويزيد الكفاءة.
usageTranslations.pt: A execução paralela reduz o tempo total do build.
usageTranslations.ru: Параллельное выполнение сокращает время сборки и повышает эффективность.
usageTranslations.ja: 並列実行でビルド時間が短縮され効率向上。
usageTranslations.it: L'esecuzione parallela riduce i tempi di build.
usageTranslations.vi: Thực thi song song giúp giảm thời gian build.
usageTranslations.hi: समानांतर निष्पादन से कुल बिल्ड समय कम होता है।
usageTranslations.th: การดำเนินการขนานลดเวลาและเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพ
usageTranslations.id: Eksekusi paralel mempercepat waktu build dan efisiensi.

terms.definition: A storage mechanism that saves build outputs or intermediate results to avoid redundant work, accelerating subsequent integration or deployment processes.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A build cache significantly reduces integration pipeline time by reusing unchanged build artifacts across different jobs or pipeline runs.

termTranslations.th: แคชของบิลด์

usageTranslations.en: A build cache significantly reduces integration pipeline time by reusing unchanged build artifacts across different jobs or pipeline runs.
usageTranslations.tr: Derleme önbelleği, değişmeyen artefaktları yeniden kullanarak entegrasyon süresini önemli ölçüde azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le cache de build réduit la durée de la pipeline en réutilisant les artefacts.
usageTranslations.de: Build-Cache verkürzt die Pipeline-Zeit durch Wiederverwendung von Artefakten.
usageTranslations.es: La caché de compilación reduce el tiempo al reutilizar artefactos.
usageTranslations.zh: 构建缓存通过复用未变更构建物大大缩短流程时间。
usageTranslations.ar: تقلل ذاكرة التخزين المؤقت للبناء الوقت بإعادة استخدام المخرجات.
usageTranslations.pt: O cache de build reduz o tempo reutilizando artefatos não alterados.
usageTranslations.ru: Кэш сборки ускоряет интеграцию за счет повторного использования артефактов.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルドキャッシュで変化のない成果物を再利用し時間短縮。
usageTranslations.it: La cache di build riduce i tempi riutilizzando gli artefatti.
usageTranslations.vi: Bộ nhớ đệm build giúp giảm thời gian tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: बिल्ड कैश बिना बदले artifacts को फिर से उपयोग करता है।
usageTranslations.th: แคชของบิลด์ช่วยประหยัดเวลาโดยใช้ของเดิมซ้ำ
usageTranslations.id: Cache build mengurangi waktu dengan menggunakan artefak lama.

terms.definition: A packaged, versioned output of a build process (e.g., binary, container image) approved for deployment during production or integration releases.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A release artifact is stored in a secure repository and referenced by deployment pipelines to ensure consistent production releases.

termTranslations.ja: リリースアーティファクト
termTranslations.th: อาร์ติแฟกต์ของรีลีส

usageTranslations.en: A release artifact is stored in a secure repository and referenced by deployment pipelines to ensure consistent production releases.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm artefaktı güvenli bir depoda saklanır ve tutarlı dağıtımlar için kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: L’artefact de release est stocké et utilisé pour des déploiements cohérents.
usageTranslations.de: Das Release-Artefakt wird im Repository gespeichert und für Deployments genutzt.
usageTranslations.es: El artefacto de lanzamiento se almacena para despliegues coherentes.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布产物被安全保存，并由发布流程引用以保证一致性。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تخزين عنصر الإصدار في مستودع آمن لضمان النشر المتسق.
usageTranslations.pt: O artefato de release é armazenado e usado por pipelines.
usageTranslations.ru: Артефакт релиза хранится в репозитории для стабильных релизов.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースアーティファクトはリポジトリに保存されデプロイで参照。
usageTranslations.it: L’artefatto di rilascio viene memorizzato e usato per i deployment.
usageTranslations.vi: Artifact phát hành được lưu trữ và dùng cho các triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ आर्टिफैक्ट सुरक्षित रिपॉजिटरी में रखा जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: อาร์ติแฟกต์ของรีลีสจะถูกเก็บไว้ใน repository
usageTranslations.id: Artefak rilis disimpan dan digunakan untuk deployment.

terms.definition: An agent or component that executes CI/CD pipeline jobs by provisioning environments, running tasks, and reporting results to the integration system.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A job runner provisions the required environment, executes tasks, and returns status to the integration dashboard after completion.

termTranslations.th: รันเนอร์ของงาน

usageTranslations.en: A job runner provisions the required environment, executes tasks, and returns status to the integration dashboard after completion.
usageTranslations.tr: İş koşucu gerekli ortamı hazırlar, görevleri çalıştırır ve sonucu entegrasyon paneline bildirir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’exécuteur de jobs prépare l’environnement, exécute les tâches et envoie le statut.
usageTranslations.de: Der Job-Runner stellt die Umgebung bereit, führt Aufgaben aus und meldet den Status.
usageTranslations.es: El ejecutor de trabajos prepara el entorno, ejecuta tareas y reporta el estado.
usageTranslations.zh: 作业运行器配置环境、执行任务，并将状态返回集成面板。
usageTranslations.ar: مشغل الوظائف يجهز البيئة وينفذ المهام ويرسل الحالة.
usageTranslations.pt: O executor de jobs prepara o ambiente, executa tarefas e retorna o status.
usageTranslations.ru: Джоб-раннер подготавливает среду, выполняет задачи и сообщает статус.
usageTranslations.ja: ジョブランナーは環境を用意しタスクを実行し、状況を返します。
usageTranslations.it: L’esecutore di job prepara l’ambiente, esegue i task e restituisce lo stato.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình chạy job chuẩn bị môi trường, thực thi tác vụ và trả kết quả.
usageTranslations.hi: जॉब रनर वातावरण सेटअप, कार्य निष्पादित और स्थिति रिपोर्ट करता है।
usageTranslations.th: รันเนอร์ของงานจัดเตรียมสภาพแวดล้อมและรายงานผล
usageTranslations.id: Job runner menyiapkan lingkungan, menjalankan tugas, dan melaporkan status.

terms.definition: A collection of agents or runners available to execute jobs in integration pipelines, managed to optimize workload distribution and resource utilization.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The agent pool dynamically assigns jobs to available agents, balancing the integration pipeline workload across multiple environments.

termTranslations.th: พูลของเอเจนต์

usageTranslations.en: The agent pool dynamically assigns jobs to available agents, balancing the integration pipeline workload across multiple environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Aracı havuzu, iş yükünü çeşitli ortamlara dengeli şekilde dağıtarak işler atar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le pool d’agents affecte dynamiquement les tâches pour équilibrer la charge.
usageTranslations.de: Der Agenten-Pool verteilt Jobs dynamisch auf verfügbare Agents.
usageTranslations.es: El grupo de agentes distribuye tareas de manera equilibrada.
usageTranslations.zh: 代理池动态分配任务，平衡各环境的工作负载。
usageTranslations.ar: تجمع الوكلاء يوزع الوظائف ديناميكياً.
usageTranslations.pt: O pool de agentes distribui dinamicamente os jobs.
usageTranslations.ru: Пул агентов динамически распределяет задачи между средами.
usageTranslations.ja: エージェントプールは作業負荷を複数環境に割り当てます。
usageTranslations.it: Il pool di agenti assegna i job agli agenti disponibili.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhóm agent phân bổ công việc cho các môi trường.
usageTranslations.hi: एजेंट पूल कार्य को विभिन्न एजेंटों में बांटता है।
usageTranslations.th: พูลของเอเจนต์จะกระจายงานให้แต่ละเอเจนต์อย่างสมดุล
usageTranslations.id: Pool agen mendistribusikan pekerjaan ke beberapa lingkungan.

terms.definition: A defined, ordered set of steps or tasks that are executed as part of an integration, deployment, or automation workflow in IT operations.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The task sequence defines each operation required to configure, validate, and deploy integrated services in the pipeline.

termTranslations.th: ลำดับงาน

usageTranslations.en: The task sequence defines each operation required to configure, validate, and deploy integrated services in the pipeline.
usageTranslations.tr: Görev dizisi, entegrasyon hattında gerekli tüm yapılandırma ve dağıtım adımlarını tanımlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La séquence de tâches définit toutes les opérations du pipeline.
usageTranslations.de: Die Aufgabenfolge legt alle erforderlichen Schritte fest.
usageTranslations.es: La secuencia de tareas define todos los pasos de integración y despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 任务序列定义流程中所需的全部操作。
usageTranslations.ar: تسلسل المهام يحدد جميع العمليات المطلوبة.
usageTranslations.pt: A sequência de tarefas define as operações do pipeline.
usageTranslations.ru: Последовательность задач определяет все этапы в конвейере.
usageTranslations.ja: タスクシーケンスはすべての操作を定義します。
usageTranslations.it: La sequenza di attività definisce tutte le operazioni necessarie.
usageTranslations.vi: Chuỗi tác vụ xác định mọi bước triển khai tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: टास्क सीक्वेंस सभी कॉन्फ़िगरेशन और डिप्लॉयमेंट स्टेप्स तय करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ลำดับงานกำหนดทุกขั้นตอนใน pipeline
usageTranslations.id: Urutan tugas mendefinisikan semua langkah pada pipeline.

terms.definition: A structured sequence of approval steps required for integration or deployment actions, often enforced for governance, compliance, and change management.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The approval workflow automates and records each authorization step required for production deployments or high-risk integration changes.

termTranslations.th: เวิร์กโฟลว์อนุมัติ

usageTranslations.en: The approval workflow automates and records each authorization step required for production deployments or high-risk integration changes.
usageTranslations.tr: Onay iş akışı, üretim dağıtımları veya yüksek riskli entegrasyonlar için gerekli tüm onay adımlarını otomatikleştirir ve kaydeder.
usageTranslations.fr: Le workflow d’approbation automatise chaque étape d’autorisation nécessaire pour les déploiements critiques.
usageTranslations.de: Der Genehmigungs-Workflow automatisiert und protokolliert jede Freigabe.
usageTranslations.es: El flujo de aprobación automatiza y registra cada paso requerido.
usageTranslations.zh: 审批工作流自动记录关键部署的每一步。
usageTranslations.ar: سير عمل الموافقة يؤتمت جميع خطوات التصريح اللازمة.
usageTranslations.pt: O workflow de aprovação automatiza cada etapa de autorização.
usageTranslations.ru: Процесс утверждения автоматизирует все этапы разрешения.
usageTranslations.ja: 承認ワークフローはすべての認可手順を自動化します。
usageTranslations.it: Il workflow di approvazione automatizza ogni autorizzazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Quy trình phê duyệt tự động hóa và ghi nhận mọi bước duyệt.
usageTranslations.hi: अनुमोदन वर्कफ़्लो हर आवश्यक स्वीकृति चरण रिकॉर्ड करता है।
usageTranslations.th: เวิร์กโฟลว์อนุมัติจะบันทึกทุกขั้นตอนที่จำเป็น
usageTranslations.id: Workflow persetujuan mengotomatisasi semua langkah otorisasi.

terms.definition: A file or package produced as the output of a build process, such as binaries, libraries, or container images, used for integration, testing, or deployment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Build artifacts are published to artifact repositories and referenced in subsequent pipeline stages for testing and deployment.

termTranslations.ja: ビルドアーティファクト
termTranslations.th: อาร์ติแฟกต์ของบิลด์

usageTranslations.en: Build artifacts are published to artifact repositories and referenced in subsequent pipeline stages for testing and deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Derleme artefaktları, depo'ya gönderilir ve sonraki adımlarda kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les artefacts de build sont publiés et utilisés dans les étapes suivantes.
usageTranslations.de: Build-Artefakte werden im Repository gespeichert und später genutzt.
usageTranslations.es: Los artefactos de compilación se publican para etapas posteriores.
usageTranslations.zh: 构建产物被发布到仓库，并在后续阶段引用。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم نشر عناصر البناء في المستودع وتستخدم لاحقًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Artefatos de build são publicados e utilizados nos próximos estágios.
usageTranslations.ru: Артефакты сборки публикуются и используются далее.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルドアーティファクトは保存され後続ステージで使われる。
usageTranslations.it: Gli artefatti di build sono pubblicati e riutilizzati.
usageTranslations.vi: Artifact build được lưu trữ và dùng cho các bước tiếp theo.
usageTranslations.hi: बिल्ड आर्टिफैक्ट आगे की स्टेज में उपयोग किए जाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: อาร์ติแฟกต์ของบิลด์จะถูกใช้ในขั้นตอนถัดไป
usageTranslations.id: Artefak build diterbitkan dan digunakan di tahap berikutnya.

terms.definition: A pre-production environment that closely replicates the production setup, used for final integration testing and validation before live deployment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A staging environment provides a safe space to validate integration and deployment processes before pushing changes to production.

termTranslations.th: สภาพแวดล้อม staging

usageTranslations.en: A staging environment provides a safe space to validate integration and deployment processes before pushing changes to production.
usageTranslations.tr: Hazırlık ortamı, değişiklikleri canlıya almadan önce entegrasyon ve dağıtımı doğrulamak için güvenli bir alan sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’environnement de préproduction permet de valider les processus avant la mise en production.
usageTranslations.de: Die Staging-Umgebung dient zur Validierung vor dem Produktivbetrieb.
usageTranslations.es: El entorno de staging permite validar procesos antes de pasar a producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 预生产环境为上线前的集成和部署验证提供安全空间。
usageTranslations.ar: توفر البيئة المرحلية مساحة آمنة للتحقق قبل الإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: O ambiente de staging valida integrações antes do deploy.
usageTranslations.ru: Промежуточная среда используется для тестирования перед продакшеном.
usageTranslations.ja: ステージング環境は本番前に検証できる安全な場所です。
usageTranslations.it: L’ambiente di staging consente di verificare i processi prima del rilascio.
usageTranslations.vi: Môi trường staging giúp kiểm thử trước khi đưa lên production.
usageTranslations.hi: स्टेजिंग एनवायरनमेंट लाइव से पहले वेलिडेशन के लिए सुरक्षित है।
usageTranslations.th: สภาพแวดล้อม staging ช่วยทดสอบก่อนขึ้น production
usageTranslations.id: Lingkungan staging digunakan untuk validasi sebelum produksi.

terms.definition: A pre-configured environment within a platform-as-a-service (PaaS) or cloud service that enables swapping, testing, or staging of application versions without impacting production.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Using a deployment slot allows seamless testing of new versions and instant rollback by swapping slots in Azure App Service.

termTranslations.ja: デプロイメントスロット
termTranslations.th: ช่องการดีพลอย

usageTranslations.en: Using a deployment slot allows seamless testing of new versions and instant rollback by swapping slots in Azure App Service.
usageTranslations.tr: Dağıtım slotu, Azure App Service’te yeni sürümlerin sorunsuz test edilmesini ve anında geri almayı sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Un emplacement de déploiement permet de tester des versions et de faire un retour instantané.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Deployment-Slot ermöglicht das Testen und sofortiges Zurücksetzen in Azure App Service.
usageTranslations.es: El slot de implementación permite probar versiones y revertir instantáneamente en Azure App Service.
usageTranslations.zh: 使用部署插槽可在 Azure App Service 中无缝测试和快速回滚。
usageTranslations.ar: تسمح فتحة النشر باختبار النسخ والتراجع الفوري في Azure App Service.
usageTranslations.pt: Um slot de implantação permite testes e rollback instantâneo no Azure App Service.
usageTranslations.ru: Слот развертывания обеспечивает тестирование и быстрый откат в Azure App Service.
usageTranslations.ja: デプロイメントスロットで新バージョンをテスト・即時ロールバック。
usageTranslations.it: Lo slot di deployment consente test e rollback immediato su Azure App Service.
usageTranslations.vi: Khe triển khai cho phép thử nghiệm và rollback tức thì trên Azure App Service.
usageTranslations.hi: डिप्लॉयमेंट स्लॉट Azure App Service में seamless टेस्टिंग व instant rollback देता है।
usageTranslations.th: ช่องการดีพลอยช่วยทดสอบและย้อนกลับใน Azure App Service
usageTranslations.id: Slot deployment memungkinkan testing dan rollback instan di Azure App Service.

terms.definition: The automated or manual setup of infrastructure, platform, or application environments required for integration, testing, or deployment workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Automated environment provisioning with Terraform enables rapid creation and consistent configuration of integration and test environments.

termTranslations.ja: 環境プロビジョニング
termTranslations.th: การจัดเตรียมสภาพแวดล้อม

usageTranslations.en: Automated environment provisioning with Terraform enables rapid creation and consistent configuration of integration and test environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Terraform ile otomatik ortam sağlama, entegrasyon ve test ortamlarını hızlı ve tutarlı şekilde oluşturur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le provisionnement automatisé avec Terraform permet de créer et configurer rapidement les environnements.
usageTranslations.de: Automatisierte Umgebungsbereitstellung mit Terraform ermöglicht schnelle und konsistente Konfiguration.
usageTranslations.es: El provisionamiento automatizado con Terraform agiliza la creación y configuración.
usageTranslations.zh: 使用 Terraform 自动配置可快速、一致地创建测试和集成环境。
usageTranslations.ar: يوفر Terraform إعداد بيئات التكامل والاختبار بشكل سريع.
usageTranslations.pt: Provisionamento automatizado com Terraform agiliza a criação de ambientes.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматизированная подготовка среды с Terraform ускоряет создание тестовых сред.
usageTranslations.ja: Terraformでの自動プロビジョニングは統合・テスト環境の迅速な構成を実現。
usageTranslations.it: Il provisioning automatizzato con Terraform permette la creazione rapida e coerente degli ambienti.
usageTranslations.vi: Provisioning môi trường với Terraform giúp tạo môi trường nhanh chóng.
usageTranslations.hi: Terraform से automated provisioning तेज़ी से environment बनाता है।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดเตรียมสภาพแวดล้อมด้วย Terraform ช่วยให้ตั้งค่าได้รวดเร็ว
usageTranslations.id: Provisioning lingkungan otomatis dengan Terraform mempercepat pembuatan lingkungan.

terms.definition: A reusable, parameterized file (e.g., YAML, JSON, HCL) that defines the desired state of cloud or on-premises infrastructure for automated provisioning and deployment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Infrastructure templates enable consistent, repeatable deployments by codifying network, compute, and storage resources as code.

termTranslations.ja: インフラテンプレート
termTranslations.th: เทมเพลตโครงสร้างพื้นฐาน

usageTranslations.en: Infrastructure templates enable consistent, repeatable deployments by codifying network, compute, and storage resources as code.
usageTranslations.tr: Altyapı şablonları, ağı, bilgisayarı ve depolamayı kod ile tanımlayarak tutarlı dağıtımlar sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les modèles d’infrastructure garantissent des déploiements cohérents et répétables.
usageTranslations.de: Infrastrukturvorlagen ermöglichen konsistente, wiederholbare Bereitstellungen als Code.
usageTranslations.es: Las plantillas de infraestructura permiten despliegues coherentes y repetibles.
usageTranslations.zh: 基础设施模板将网络、计算和存储以代码方式实现一致部署。
usageTranslations.ar: تمكّن قوالب البنية التحتية من عمليات نشر متكررة ومتسقة.
usageTranslations.pt: Templates de infraestrutura viabilizam deploys consistentes e reproduzíveis.
usageTranslations.ru: Шаблоны инфраструктуры обеспечивают воспроизводимые развертывания как код.
usageTranslations.ja: インフラテンプレートで一貫性のあるデプロイを実現。
usageTranslations.it: I template di infrastruttura permettono deployment coerenti e ripetibili.
usageTranslations.vi: Mẫu hạ tầng giúp triển khai đồng nhất và lặp lại.
usageTranslations.hi: इन्फ्रास्ट्रक्चर टेम्पलेट से deployment repeatable और consistent होते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: เทมเพลตโครงสร้างพื้นฐานช่วยให้ deployment มีความสม่ำเสมอ
usageTranslations.id: Template infrastruktur memungkinkan deployment konsisten dan berulang.

terms.definition: A network address or URL that exposes an application, API, or integration service to internal or external consumers, used for connectivity, monitoring, and automation.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A service endpoint must be securely managed and monitored to enable safe, reliable integration and automation across environments.

termTranslations.ja: サービスエンドポイント
termTranslations.th: เอนด์พอยต์ของเซอร์วิส

usageTranslations.en: A service endpoint must be securely managed and monitored to enable safe, reliable integration and automation across environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Servis uç noktası, güvenli entegrasyon ve otomasyon için izlenmeli ve yönetilmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le point de terminaison doit être sécurisé et surveillé pour l’intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Der Service-Endpunkt muss sicher verwaltet und überwacht werden.
usageTranslations.es: El extremo de servicio debe gestionarse y supervisarse de forma segura.
usageTranslations.zh: 服务终端需安全管理和监控以实现集成自动化。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب إدارة نقطة نهاية الخدمة بأمان لتحقيق تكامل وأتمتة موثوقة.
usageTranslations.pt: O endpoint de serviço deve ser seguro e monitorado.
usageTranslations.ru: Сервисная точка должна безопасно управляться и мониториться.
usageTranslations.ja: サービスエンドポイントは安全に管理・監視が必要。
usageTranslations.it: L’endpoint di servizio va gestito e monitorato in modo sicuro.
usageTranslations.vi: Endpoint dịch vụ phải được quản lý và giám sát an toàn.
usageTranslations.hi: सर्विस एंडपॉइंट को सुरक्षित रूप से प्रबंधित व मॉनिटर करना जरूरी है।
usageTranslations.th: เอนด์พอยต์ต้องมีความปลอดภัยและติดตามสถานะได้
usageTranslations.id: Endpoint layanan harus dikelola dan dimonitor secara aman.

terms.definition: A deployment strategy that maintains two identical production environments, switching user traffic from the old (blue) to the new (green) to minimize downtime and risk.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Blue-green deployment enables instant rollback by rerouting traffic from the green environment back to blue in case of issues.

termTranslations.ja: ブルーグリーンデプロイメント
termTranslations.th: การดีพลอยแบบ blue-green

usageTranslations.en: Blue-green deployment enables instant rollback by rerouting traffic from the green environment back to blue in case of issues.
usageTranslations.tr: Mavi-yeşil dağıtım, sorun durumunda trafiği eski ortama yönlendirerek anında geri dönüş sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le blue-green permet un retour instantané en cas de problème.
usageTranslations.de: Blue-Green-Deployment erlaubt sofortigen Rollback durch Traffic-Umschaltung.
usageTranslations.es: La implementación blue-green permite un rollback instantáneo.
usageTranslations.zh: 蓝绿部署可在出现问题时立即回滚流量至旧环境。
usageTranslations.ar: النشر الأزرق-الأخضر يتيح التراجع الفوري بإعادة توجيه الحركة.
usageTranslations.pt: O deploy blue-green permite rollback instantâneo redirecionando o tráfego.
usageTranslations.ru: Blue-Green Deployment позволяет мгновенный откат.
usageTranslations.ja: ブルーグリーンで障害時に即座にロールバック可能。
usageTranslations.it: Il deployment blue-green permette rollback immediato.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai blue-green cho phép rollback tức thì.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्लू-ग्रीन डिप्लॉयमेंट तुरंत ट्रैफिक वापस स्विच करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การดีพลอยแบบ blue-green ช่วยให้ rollback ได้ทันที
usageTranslations.id: Blue-green deployment memungkinkan rollback instan.

terms.definition: A deployment strategy that gradually releases a new version to a small subset of users or servers before full rollout, monitoring for issues.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A canary release helps identify integration or performance issues early by exposing changes to a small, monitored segment of users.

termTranslations.th: คานารีรีลีส

usageTranslations.en: A canary release helps identify integration or performance issues early by exposing changes to a small, monitored segment of users.
usageTranslations.tr: Canary sürümü, küçük bir kullanıcı segmentinde değişiklikleri test ederek erken aşamada sorunları tespit etmeye yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: La mise en production canari permet de détecter précocement les problèmes.
usageTranslations.de: Canary Release erkennt frühzeitig Probleme durch schrittweises Ausrollen.
usageTranslations.es: El release canario ayuda a detectar fallos tempranamente.
usageTranslations.zh: 金丝雀发布通过小范围上线提前发现问题。
usageTranslations.ar: إصدار الكناري يكشف المشاكل مبكرًا لدى مجموعة مستخدمين صغيرة.
usageTranslations.pt: Release canário identifica problemas cedo em segmento restrito.
usageTranslations.ru: Canary Release позволяет выявить проблемы на небольшой группе.
usageTranslations.ja: カナリアリリースは限定的な展開で問題を早期発見。
usageTranslations.it: Il rilascio canary consente di individuare problemi nelle prime fasi.
usageTranslations.vi: Canary release giúp phát hiện lỗi sớm trên nhóm nhỏ.
usageTranslations.hi: कैनरी रिलीज़ छोटे यूजर्स ग्रुप पर जल्दी issue पकड़ता है।
usageTranslations.th: คานารีรีลีสช่วยตรวจพบปัญหาได้เร็ว
usageTranslations.id: Canary release membantu mendeteksi masalah lebih awal.

terms.definition: An official document or summary describing the features, fixes, and known issues included in a specific integration or production release.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Release notes must be published with each deployment, detailing all changes and fixes introduced in the integration or production release.

termTranslations.th: บันทึกรีลีส

usageTranslations.en: Release notes must be published with each deployment, detailing all changes and fixes introduced in the integration or production release.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm notları, her dağıtımla birlikte yayımlanmalı ve yapılan tüm değişiklikleri ve düzeltmeleri içermelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les notes de version doivent être publiées avec chaque déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Release-Notes sind bei jedem Deployment zu veröffentlichen.
usageTranslations.es: Las notas de lanzamiento deben publicarse en cada despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 每次发布都应公布发布说明，列出所有变更和修复。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب نشر ملاحظة الإصدار مع كل عملية نشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Notas de release devem ser publicadas em cada implantação.
usageTranslations.ru: Примечания к релизу публикуются при каждом развертывании.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースノートは毎回のデプロイ時に公開される。
usageTranslations.it: Le note di rilascio sono pubblicate a ogni deploy.
usageTranslations.vi: Ghi chú phát hành phải được đăng cùng mỗi lần triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: हर deployment के साथ रिलीज़ नोट प्रकाशित होने चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: บันทึกรีลีสต้องเผยแพร่ทุกครั้งที่ดีพลอย
usageTranslations.id: Catatan rilis harus diterbitkan di setiap deployment.

terms.definition: The divergence of actual infrastructure or environment state from its defined configuration, typically due to manual changes or unmanaged updates.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Configuration drift detection tools alert teams when infrastructure diverges from the source-of-truth template or code.

termTranslations.th: การเปลี่ยนแปลงของการตั้งค่า

usageTranslations.en: Configuration drift detection tools alert teams when infrastructure diverges from the source-of-truth template or code.
usageTranslations.tr: Yapılandırma sapması tespit araçları, altyapı tanımlı şablondan saptığında ekibi uyarır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les outils de détection alertent lors de dérive de configuration.
usageTranslations.de: Abweichungserkennung informiert Teams über Konfigurationsabweichung.
usageTranslations.es: Las herramientas de detección alertan sobre desviaciones de configuración.
usageTranslations.zh: 配置漂移检测工具在发现偏离模板时通知团队。
usageTranslations.ar: تنبه أدوات الكشف عن انحراف التهيئة عند التباعد.
usageTranslations.pt: Ferramentas de detecção avisam sobre desvio de configuração.
usageTranslations.ru: Инструменты выявления дрейфа конфигурации уведомляют команду.
usageTranslations.ja: 構成ドリフト検出ツールがズレを通知。
usageTranslations.it: Gli strumenti rilevano il drift di configurazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Công cụ phát hiện trôi cấu hình sẽ cảnh báo nhóm.
usageTranslations.hi: ड्रिफ्ट डिटेक्शन टूल्स टीम को अलर्ट करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องมือจะเตือนเมื่อการตั้งค่าคลาดเคลื่อน
usageTranslations.id: Alat deteksi drift konfigurasi memberi peringatan.

terms.definition: A design principle in which infrastructure components are never modified after deployment; updates are implemented by replacing rather than changing resources.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Immutable infrastructure ensures consistency by enforcing that updates require redeployment of new resources instead of modifying existing ones.

termTranslations.ja: イミュータブルインフラストラクチャ
termTranslations.th: โครงสร้างพื้นฐานถาวร

usageTranslations.en: Immutable infrastructure ensures consistency by enforcing that updates require redeployment of new resources instead of modifying existing ones.
usageTranslations.tr: Değiştirilemez altyapı, mevcut kaynakları değiştirmek yerine yeni kaynak dağıtarak tutarlılık sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’infrastructure immuable garantit la cohérence par des redéploiements.
usageTranslations.de: Unveränderliche Infrastruktur stellt Konsistenz durch erneute Bereitstellung sicher.
usageTranslations.es: La infraestructura inmutable asegura la consistencia al requerir despliegue de nuevos recursos.
usageTranslations.zh: 不可变基础设施通过强制替换实现一致性。
usageTranslations.ar: البنية التحتية غير القابلة للتغيير تضمن الاتساق بإعادة النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Infraestrutura imutável garante consistência por meio de novos deploys.
usageTranslations.ru: Невозможная инфраструктура обеспечивает консистентность за счет новых развертываний.
usageTranslations.ja: イミュータブルインフラはリリースで一貫性を担保。
usageTranslations.it: L’infrastruttura immutabile garantisce coerenza solo con nuove distribuzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Hạ tầng bất biến đảm bảo tính nhất quán qua việc triển khai mới.
usageTranslations.hi: इम्युटेबल इन्फ्रास्ट्रक्चर consistency के लिए नए deploy की मांग करता है।
usageTranslations.th: โครงสร้างพื้นฐานถาวรช่วยให้เกิดความสม่ำเสมอ
usageTranslations.id: Infrastruktur immutable menjamin konsistensi melalui redeployment.

terms.definition: A deployment method where repeated execution of the process produces the same result, ensuring stability and preventing duplicate changes in integration environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Idempotent deployment scripts ensure that running the deployment multiple times will not result in unintended changes or errors.

termTranslations.ja: 冪等なデプロイメント
termTranslations.th: การดีพลอยแบบ idempotent

usageTranslations.en: Idempotent deployment scripts ensure that running the deployment multiple times will not result in unintended changes or errors.
usageTranslations.tr: Idempotent dağıtım betikleri, dağıtım tekrarlandığında istenmeyen değişikliklerin veya hataların oluşmamasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le déploiement idempotent garantit l’absence d’effets secondaires lors des relances.
usageTranslations.de: Idempotente Bereitstellung vermeidet unerwünschte Änderungen bei Mehrfachausführung.
usageTranslations.es: La implementación idempotente evita cambios indeseados si se ejecuta varias veces.
usageTranslations.zh: 幂等部署保证多次执行不会引入额外变更。
usageTranslations.ar: النشر متعدّد التماثل يمنع التغييرات غير المرغوبة عند التكرار.
usageTranslations.pt: Deploy idempotente garante ausência de mudanças indesejadas em execuções repetidas.
usageTranslations.ru: Идемпотентное развертывание предотвращает непреднамеренные изменения при повторе.
usageTranslations.ja: 冪等なデプロイは再実行でも副作用がない。
usageTranslations.it: Il deployment idempotente evita modifiche involontarie alle ripetizioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai idempotent đảm bảo chạy lại không gây thay đổi ngoài ý muốn.
usageTranslations.hi: आईडेम्पोटेंट डिप्लॉयमेंट से बार-बार रन करने पर भी स्थिति समान रहती है।
usageTranslations.th: การดีพลอยแบบ idempotent ทำให้ผลลัพธ์เหมือนเดิมทุกครั้ง
usageTranslations.id: Deployment idempotent memastikan tidak ada perubahan saat dijalankan berulang kali.

terms.definition: The process of reverting an application or service to a previous stable state in case of integration, deployment, or operational failure.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A well-documented service rollback plan enables rapid restoration of operations after a failed deployment or critical incident.

termTranslations.ja: サービスロールバック
termTranslations.th: โรลแบ็กของเซอร์วิส

usageTranslations.en: A well-documented service rollback plan enables rapid restoration of operations after a failed deployment or critical incident.
usageTranslations.tr: Belgelenmiş bir servis geri alma planı, başarısız dağıtım sonrası hizmetin hızlı şekilde geri dönmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Un plan de retour du service permet une reprise rapide après un échec.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Service-Rollback-Plan ermöglicht schnelle Wiederherstellung nach Fehlern.
usageTranslations.es: El rollback de servicio permite restaurar rápidamente tras fallos.
usageTranslations.zh: 服务回滚计划能在故障后迅速恢复服务。
usageTranslations.ar: خطة تراجع الخدمة تتيح استعادة العمليات بسرعة.
usageTranslations.pt: O rollback de serviço permite restauração rápida após falhas.
usageTranslations.ru: План отката сервиса обеспечивает быстрое восстановление.
usageTranslations.ja: サービスロールバック計画で障害時に迅速復旧が可能。
usageTranslations.it: Il piano di rollback del servizio consente un rapido ripristino.
usageTranslations.vi: Rollback dịch vụ giúp phục hồi nhanh sau sự cố.
usageTranslations.hi: सर्विस रोलबैक प्लान से सेवा तुरंत रीस्टोर हो जाती है।
usageTranslations.th: โรลแบ็กช่วยฟื้นฟูระบบได้รวดเร็วหลัง deploy fail
usageTranslations.id: Rollback layanan mempercepat pemulihan setelah deploy gagal.

terms.definition: A maximum allowable threshold for service errors or downtime, set to balance reliability and velocity in integration, deployment, and site reliability engineering (SRE) practices.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Error budgets help SRE teams decide when to halt new releases and focus on reliability to meet service level objectives.

termTranslations.th: งบประมาณข้อผิดพลาด

usageTranslations.en: Error budgets help SRE teams decide when to halt new releases and focus on reliability to meet service level objectives.
usageTranslations.tr: Hata bütçeleri, SRE ekiplerinin yeni sürümleri durdurup güvenilirliğe odaklanmasına yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le budget d’erreur aide à prioriser la fiabilité pour les objectifs de service.
usageTranslations.de: Das Error-Budget hilft SRE-Teams, Zuverlässigkeit zu priorisieren.
usageTranslations.es: El presupuesto de error ayuda a priorizar la confiabilidad.
usageTranslations.zh: 错误预算帮助团队平衡发布和可靠性目标。
usageTranslations.ar: ميزانية الخطأ تساعد في موازنة الاعتمادية والإصدارات الجديدة.
usageTranslations.pt: O orçamento de erro ajuda a priorizar confiabilidade e lançamentos.
usageTranslations.ru: Бюджет ошибок помогает приоритезировать стабильность.
usageTranslations.ja: エラーバジェットは信頼性重視か新リリース継続かを判断する材料です。
usageTranslations.it: Il budget di errore aiuta a gestire affidabilità e nuovi rilasci.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân sách lỗi giúp nhóm quyết định dừng phát hành mới để tập trung vào độ tin cậy.
usageTranslations.hi: एरर बजट तय करता है कि नई रिलीज़ रोकनी है या नहीं।
usageTranslations.th: งบประมาณข้อผิดพลาดช่วยทีม SRE ตัดสินใจหยุดการปล่อยใหม่
usageTranslations.id: Error budget membantu SRE fokus pada reliabilitas atau rilis baru.

terms.definition: A standardized process for detecting, analyzing, and resolving unplanned integration, operational, or security events that disrupt service availability or performance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A clear incident response plan enables IT teams to contain and resolve outages, minimizing customer impact and downtime.

termTranslations.th: การตอบสนองเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: A clear incident response plan enables IT teams to contain and resolve outages, minimizing customer impact and downtime.
usageTranslations.tr: Açık bir olay müdahale planı, BT ekiplerinin kesintileri hızla çözmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Un plan de réponse aux incidents permet de limiter l’impact d’une panne.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Incident-Response-Plan hilft, Ausfälle schnell zu beheben.
usageTranslations.es: Un plan de respuesta a incidentes permite resolver interrupciones rápidamente.
usageTranslations.zh: 明确的事件响应计划有助于快速解决中断，减少影响。
usageTranslations.ar: خطة الاستجابة للحوادث تتيح احتواء الأعطال بسرعة.
usageTranslations.pt: Um plano de resposta a incidentes agiliza a resolução de falhas.
usageTranslations.ru: План реагирования на инциденты минимизирует последствия сбоев.
usageTranslations.ja: 明確なインシデント対応計画で停止被害を最小限に。
usageTranslations.it: Un piano di gestione degli incidenti limita i disservizi.
usageTranslations.vi: Kế hoạch ứng phó sự cố giúp giảm thiểu gián đoạn dịch vụ.
usageTranslations.hi: स्पष्ट इंसिडेंट रेस्पॉन्स प्लान डाऊनटाइम कम करता है।
usageTranslations.th: แผนตอบสนองเหตุการณ์ช่วยลดผลกระทบของปัญหา
usageTranslations.id: Rencana respons insiden membantu mengurangi dampak gangguan.

terms.definition: A periodic or continuous assessment of system, service, or integration endpoint status to ensure operational health and early detection of issues.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Automated health checks notify the operations team immediately when an integration endpoint becomes unresponsive.

termTranslations.th: เช็คสุขภาพ

usageTranslations.en: Automated health checks notify the operations team immediately when an integration endpoint becomes unresponsive.
usageTranslations.tr: Otomatik sağlık kontrolleri, bir entegrasyon uç noktası yanıt vermediğinde operasyon ekibini bilgilendirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les vérifications de l’état préviennent l’équipe si un service ne répond pas.
usageTranslations.de: Automatisierte Health Checks melden sofort, wenn ein Endpoint nicht reagiert.
usageTranslations.es: Los chequeos automáticos notifican si un endpoint no responde.
usageTranslations.zh: 自动健康检查在端点无响应时立刻通知运维团队。
usageTranslations.ar: الفحوصات الآلية تُبلغ الفريق عند توقف نقطة التكامل.
usageTranslations.pt: Verificações automatizadas notificam falha de endpoint.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматические проверки мгновенно уведомляют команду о сбое.
usageTranslations.ja: 自動ヘルスチェックで応答停止時に通知。
usageTranslations.it: I controlli automatici segnalano endpoint non reattivi.
usageTranslations.vi: Health check tự động báo cho nhóm khi endpoint không phản hồi.
usageTranslations.hi: ऑटो हेल्थ चेक टीम को तुरंत अलर्ट करता है।
usageTranslations.th: เช็คสุขภาพแบบอัตโนมัติแจ้งทีมเมื่อ endpoint ไม่ตอบสนอง
usageTranslations.id: Health check otomatis memberi tahu tim saat endpoint tidak responsif.

terms.definition: A visual interface that aggregates and displays real-time metrics, logs, and alerts from integration services, applications, and infrastructure for observability and operational insight.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The monitoring dashboard consolidates key metrics from all integration pipelines and highlights failures or latency in real time.

termTranslations.th: แดชบอร์ดมอนิเตอร์

usageTranslations.en: The monitoring dashboard consolidates key metrics from all integration pipelines and highlights failures or latency in real time.
usageTranslations.tr: İzleme paneli, tüm entegrasyon hatlarının metriklerini toplar ve anlık hataları gösterir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le tableau de bord centralise les métriques des pipelines d’intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Das Dashboard aggregiert Metriken aller Integrationspipelines.
usageTranslations.es: El panel centraliza métricas e incidencias en tiempo real.
usageTranslations.zh: 监控仪表板实时聚合和展示所有集成流水线的关键指标和异常。
usageTranslations.ar: تجمع لوحة المراقبة مؤشرات خطوط التكامل وتعرض الإخفاقات.
usageTranslations.pt: O painel de monitoramento exibe métricas e falhas em tempo real.
usageTranslations.ru: Панель мониторинга собирает метрики и выявляет сбои в режиме реального времени.
usageTranslations.ja: 監視ダッシュボードはすべての統合パイプラインの指標を集約し、障害を即座に示す。
usageTranslations.it: La dashboard aggrega le metriche delle pipeline e segnala anomalie.
usageTranslations.vi: Bảng điều khiển giám sát hợp nhất các chỉ số và cảnh báo lỗi.
usageTranslations.hi: मॉनिटरिंग डैशबोर्ड सभी मेट्रिक्स रीयल टाइम दिखाता है।
usageTranslations.th: แดชบอร์ดมอนิเตอร์แสดงข้อมูลและปัญหาแบบ real-time
usageTranslations.id: Dashboard monitoring mengonsolidasikan metrik dan kegagalan secara real time.

terms.definition: A centralized directory that stores and manages the locations and metadata of integration services, APIs, or microservices for dynamic discovery and connectivity.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A service registry automates service discovery and enables integration between distributed components by tracking service endpoints and metadata.

termTranslations.th: รีจิสทรีของเซอร์วิส

usageTranslations.en: A service registry automates service discovery and enables integration between distributed components by tracking service endpoints and metadata.
usageTranslations.tr: Servis kayıt defteri, uç noktaları ve meta verileri izleyerek dağıtık bileşenler arasında entegrasyonu sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le registre de services automatise la découverte et l’intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Die Service-Registry automatisiert Discovery und Integration verteilter Komponenten.
usageTranslations.es: El registro de servicios facilita la integración de componentes distribuidos.
usageTranslations.zh: 服务注册表自动发现服务并促进分布式集成。
usageTranslations.ar: يسهل سجل الخدمات اكتشاف ودمج المكونات الموزعة.
usageTranslations.pt: O registro de serviços automatiza a descoberta e integração de componentes.
usageTranslations.ru: Реестр сервисов автоматизирует обнаружение и интеграцию.
usageTranslations.ja: サービスレジストリは分散コンポーネント間の統合を自動化。
usageTranslations.it: Il registro dei servizi automatizza la scoperta e l’integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Sổ đăng ký dịch vụ giúp tự động phát hiện và tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: सर्विस रजिस्ट्री कम्पोनेंट्स के बीच इंटीग्रेशन सरल करती है।
usageTranslations.th: รีจิสทรีของเซอร์วิสช่วยค้นหาและเชื่อมโยงระบบ
usageTranslations.id: Registri layanan mengotomatisasi penemuan dan integrasi komponen.

terms.definition: The discipline of systematically managing, tracking, and controlling infrastructure, software, and integration configuration states to ensure consistency and compliance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Effective configuration management ensures all infrastructure and services adhere to defined states, preventing drift and unauthorized changes.

termTranslations.th: การจัดการการตั้งค่า

usageTranslations.en: Effective configuration management ensures all infrastructure and services adhere to defined states, preventing drift and unauthorized changes.
usageTranslations.tr: Etkili yapılandırma yönetimi, altyapı ve hizmetlerin belirlenen durumlara uygun kalmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La gestion de configuration prévient la dérive et les changements non autorisés.
usageTranslations.de: Konfigurationsmanagement verhindert Drift und unbefugte Änderungen.
usageTranslations.es: La gestión de configuración previene desviaciones y cambios no autorizados.
usageTranslations.zh: 配置管理防止漂移和未授权更改。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن إدارة التهيئة الامتثال وتمنع الانحراف.
usageTranslations.pt: O gerenciamento de configuração previne desvios e mudanças não autorizadas.
usageTranslations.ru: Управление конфигурацией предотвращает дрейф и несанкционированные изменения.
usageTranslations.ja: 構成管理は逸脱や無許可の変更を防ぐ。
usageTranslations.it: La gestione della configurazione evita deviazioni e cambi non autorizzati.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý cấu hình ngăn ngừa lệch chuẩn và thay đổi trái phép.
usageTranslations.hi: कुशल कॉन्फ़िगरेशन मैनेजमेंट ड्रिफ्ट और unauthorized बदलाव रोकता है।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดการการตั้งค่าช่วยป้องกัน drift และการเปลี่ยนแปลงไม่ได้รับอนุญาต
usageTranslations.id: Manajemen konfigurasi mencegah drift dan perubahan tanpa izin.

terms.definition: A designated period following a deployment or integration change during which a service or application can be safely reverted to its previous state.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: During the rollback window, engineers can safely revert the deployment if new issues are detected post-release.

termTranslations.ja: ロールバックウィンドウ
termTranslations.th: หน้าต่างโรลแบ็ก

usageTranslations.en: During the rollback window, engineers can safely revert the deployment if new issues are detected post-release.
usageTranslations.tr: Geri alma zaman aralığında, yeni bir sorun tespit edilirse dağıtım güvenle geri alınabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Pendant la fenêtre de retour, on peut revenir à l’état précédent en cas de problème.
usageTranslations.de: Im Rollback-Zeitfenster kann die Bereitstellung zurückgesetzt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Durante la ventana de reversión, el despliegue puede revertirse si surgen problemas.
usageTranslations.zh: 在回滚窗口内，发现问题可安全回退。
usageTranslations.ar: أثناء نافذة التراجع يمكن استعادة النشر بأمان.
usageTranslations.pt: Na janela de rollback, é possível reverter a implantação.
usageTranslations.ru: В окне отката можно безопасно вернуть систему к прежнему состоянию.
usageTranslations.ja: ロールバックウィンドウ内は安全にリリースを戻せる。
usageTranslations.it: Durante la finestra di rollback è possibile ripristinare la versione precedente.
usageTranslations.vi: Trong thời gian rollback có thể hoàn nguyên bản phát hành nếu phát hiện lỗi.
usageTranslations.hi: रोलबैक विंडो में नई issue मिलने पर deployment revert कर सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ในหน้าต่างโรลแบ็กวิศวกรสามารถย้อนกลับได้
usageTranslations.id: Dalam jendela rollback, deployment dapat dikembalikan jika ada masalah.

terms.definition: A chronological record of changes, activities, or access events related to integration, deployment, or operational systems, supporting accountability and regulatory compliance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: An audit trail documents every integration and deployment action for security, investigation, and compliance audits.

termTranslations.th: เส้นทางตรวจสอบ

usageTranslations.en: An audit trail documents every integration and deployment action for security, investigation, and compliance audits.
usageTranslations.tr: Denetim kaydı, güvenlik ve mevzuat denetimleri için tüm entegrasyon ve dağıtım işlemlerini kaydeder.
usageTranslations.fr: La piste d’audit enregistre chaque opération pour les enquêtes.
usageTranslations.de: Der Audit-Trail dokumentiert alle Integrations- und Deployment-Aktionen.
usageTranslations.es: El registro de auditoría documenta todas las acciones de integración.
usageTranslations.zh: 审计跟踪记录所有集成和部署操作。
usageTranslations.ar: سجل التدقيق يوثق جميع عمليات التكامل والتوزيع.
usageTranslations.pt: A trilha de auditoria registra todas as ações de integração.
usageTranslations.ru: Аудитный журнал фиксирует все действия интеграции и развертывания.
usageTranslations.ja: 監査証跡は統合・デプロイのすべての操作を記録する。
usageTranslations.it: La traccia di audit documenta ogni azione di integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Dấu vết kiểm toán ghi lại mọi thao tác tích hợp và triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: ऑडिट ट्रेल हर action का रिकॉर्ड रखता है।
usageTranslations.th: เส้นทางตรวจสอบบันทึกทุกการดำเนินการ
usageTranslations.id: Audit trail mencatat setiap tindakan integrasi dan deployment.

terms.definition: A set of integrated tools and services that collect, correlate, and visualize metrics, logs, and traces to provide comprehensive insight into integration and application health.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: An observability stack aggregates logs, metrics, and traces, enabling teams to analyze system behavior and detect issues in integration workflows.

termTranslations.ja: オブザーバビリティスタック
termTranslations.th: ชุดเครื่องมือ observability

usageTranslations.en: An observability stack aggregates logs, metrics, and traces, enabling teams to analyze system behavior and detect issues in integration workflows.
usageTranslations.tr: Gözlemlenebilirlik yığını, logları ve metrikleri toplayıp entegrasyon süreçlerinde sorunları tespit etmeye yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: La pile d’observabilité permet d’analyser le comportement du système.
usageTranslations.de: Der Observability Stack sammelt Logs und Metriken für die Analyse.
usageTranslations.es: La pila de observabilidad agrega logs y métricas para análisis.
usageTranslations.zh: 可观测性栈聚合日志和指标，便于分析和发现问题。
usageTranslations.ar: حزمة الرصد تجمع السجلات والبيانات لتحليل النظام.
usageTranslations.pt: O stack de observabilidade agrega logs e métricas para análise.
usageTranslations.ru: Стек наблюдаемости агрегирует логи и метрики для анализа.
usageTranslations.ja: オブザーバビリティスタックでログと指標を集約し分析。
usageTranslations.it: Lo stack di osservabilità aggrega dati per l’analisi.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngăn xếp quan sát tổng hợp logs, metrics cho phân tích.
usageTranslations.hi: ऑब्ज़र्वेबिलिटी स्टैक logs और metrics एकत्र करता है।
usageTranslations.th: observability stack รวม log, metric เพื่อการวิเคราะห์
usageTranslations.id: Observability stack mengagregasi log dan metrik untuk analisis.

terms.definition: An automation capability that enables integration services or infrastructure to detect failures and recover to a healthy state without human intervention.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Self-healing systems automatically restart failed components or reroute traffic to ensure continuous integration service availability.

termTranslations.th: ระบบซ่อมแซมตัวเอง

usageTranslations.en: Self-healing systems automatically restart failed components or reroute traffic to ensure continuous integration service availability.
usageTranslations.tr: Kendi kendini iyileştiren sistemler, arızalı bileşenleri otomatik olarak başlatır ve hizmetin sürekliliğini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les systèmes auto-réparateurs redémarrent ou réorientent le trafic automatiquement.
usageTranslations.de: Self-Healing-Systeme starten fehlerhafte Komponenten automatisch neu.
usageTranslations.es: Los sistemas autocurativos reinician o redirigen tráfico automáticamente.
usageTranslations.zh: 自愈系统自动重启故障组件并保证服务可用性。
usageTranslations.ar: الأنظمة ذاتية التعافي تعيد تشغيل المكونات تلقائيًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Sistemas auto-curativos reiniciam componentes automaticamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Самовосстанавливающиеся системы автоматически перезапускают компоненты.
usageTranslations.ja: セルフヒーリングで障害発生時に自動復旧。
usageTranslations.it: I sistemi autoriparanti riavviano i componenti difettosi.
usageTranslations.vi: Hệ thống tự phục hồi tự động khởi động lại các thành phần lỗi.
usageTranslations.hi: सेल्फ-हीलिंग सिस्टम फेल हिस्सों को खुद से रिस्टार्ट करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบซ่อมแซมตัวเองจะรีสตาร์ทอัตโนมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Self-healing secara otomatis restart komponen yang gagal.

terms.definition: The process of moving tested code changes through successive integration, staging, and production environments as part of controlled deployment workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Automated pipelines handle code promotion from integration to production, enforcing approval gates and rollback windows at each stage.

termTranslations.ja: コードプロモーション
termTranslations.th: โปรโมทโค้ด

usageTranslations.en: Automated pipelines handle code promotion from integration to production, enforcing approval gates and rollback windows at each stage.
usageTranslations.tr: Otomatik pipeline’lar, kod terfisinde entegrasyondan canlıya geçişi ve onay adımlarını yönetir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les pipelines automatisés gèrent la promotion du code à chaque étape.
usageTranslations.de: Automatisierte Pipelines steuern die Code-Promotion mit Freigaben.
usageTranslations.es: Los pipelines automáticos gestionan la promoción de código en cada fase.
usageTranslations.zh: 自动化流水线在每个阶段管理代码提升与审批。
usageTranslations.ar: الأنظمة المؤتمتة تدير ترقية الكود وتطبيق الموافقات.
usageTranslations.pt: Pipelines automatizados controlam a promoção do código em cada fase.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматические пайплайны управляют промоутингом кода и откатами.
usageTranslations.ja: 自動パイプラインでコードの昇格と各種ゲート管理。
usageTranslations.it: Le pipeline automatizzate gestiscono la promozione del codice.
usageTranslations.vi: Pipeline tự động xử lý việc thăng tiến mã nguồn qua từng môi trường.
usageTranslations.hi: पाइपलाइन कोड प्रमोशन के हर स्टेज को हैंडल करती है।
usageTranslations.th: pipeline อัตโนมัติจะโปรโมทโค้ดและตรวจสอบทุกขั้นตอน
usageTranslations.id: Pipeline otomatis menangani promosi kode di setiap tahap.

terms.definition: The graphical representation of integration, build, and deployment workflows, stages, and dependencies to support monitoring and troubleshooting.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pipeline visualization tools provide real-time insight into build progress and identify failed or delayed stages quickly.

termTranslations.ja: パイプラインの可視化
termTranslations.th: ภาพแสดง pipeline

usageTranslations.en: Pipeline visualization tools provide real-time insight into build progress and identify failed or delayed stages quickly.
usageTranslations.tr: Pipeline görselleştirme araçları, derleme ilerlemesini ve başarısız adımları gerçek zamanlı gösterir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les outils de visualisation montrent l’état du pipeline en temps réel.
usageTranslations.de: Pipeline-Visualisierung bietet Einblicke in den Build-Verlauf.
usageTranslations.es: Las herramientas de visualización muestran el progreso y errores en tiempo real.
usageTranslations.zh: 流水线可视化工具实时展示构建进度并快速发现异常。
usageTranslations.ar: توفر أدوات تصوير الخط الزمن الفعلي للتقدم والأخطاء.
usageTranslations.pt: Ferramentas de visualização mostram progresso e falhas em tempo real.
usageTranslations.ru: Визуализация пайплайна показывает прогресс и сбои в режиме реального времени.
usageTranslations.ja: パイプライン可視化ツールで進捗と失敗ステージを即把握。
usageTranslations.it: Gli strumenti di visualizzazione mostrano l’avanzamento e gli errori.
usageTranslations.vi: Công cụ trực quan hóa pipeline cho thấy tiến độ và lỗi realtime.
usageTranslations.hi: पाइपलाइन visualization tools बिल्ड की स्थिति realtime दिखाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องมือแสดง pipeline บอกสถานะและปัญหาแบบเรียลไทม์
usageTranslations.id: Visualisasi pipeline memperlihatkan progres dan kegagalan secara real time.

terms.definition: A temporary halt of code promotions or deployments in integration or production environments to maintain stability, often enforced during critical periods.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A release freeze is often scheduled before major events or holidays to avoid risk of service disruption.

termTranslations.th: หยุดปล่อย release ชั่วคราว

usageTranslations.en: A release freeze is often scheduled before major events or holidays to avoid risk of service disruption.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm dondurma, genellikle büyük etkinlikler veya tatiller öncesinde hizmet kesintisi riskini azaltmak için uygulanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le gel des releases est appliqué avant les grands événements.
usageTranslations.de: Release-Freeze wird vor kritischen Zeiträumen angesetzt.
usageTranslations.es: La congelación de releases se usa antes de eventos importantes.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布冻结常在重大活动或假期前实施以避免中断。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تطبيق تجميد الإصدار قبل الفعاليات الهامة.
usageTranslations.pt: Freeze de release é comum antes de eventos críticos.
usageTranslations.ru: Заморозка релиза проводится перед важными событиями.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースフリーズは大規模イベント前に行われる。
usageTranslations.it: Il blocco dei rilasci si applica prima di eventi importanti.
usageTranslations.vi: Đóng băng phát hành thường diễn ra trước các sự kiện lớn.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ फ्रीज़ त्योहार या बड़े इवेंट से पहले लागू होता है।
usageTranslations.th: การหยุด release มักใช้ก่อนช่วงสำคัญ
usageTranslations.id: Freeze release dijadwalkan sebelum event penting.

terms.definition: A software mechanism that enables or disables application features in production, integration, or testing environments without redeployment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Feature toggles allow new functionality to be safely tested in production without affecting all users or requiring redeployment.

termTranslations.th: ฟีเจอร์ท็อกเกิล

usageTranslations.en: Feature toggles allow new functionality to be safely tested in production without affecting all users or requiring redeployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Özellik anahtarları, yeni işlevlerin yeniden dağıtıma gerek kalmadan test edilmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les bascules permettent de tester de nouvelles fonctionnalités sans redéploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Feature-Toggles erlauben das Testen neuer Funktionen ohne Redeployment.
usageTranslations.es: Los interruptores de funcionalidad permiten probar novedades sin redeploy.
usageTranslations.zh: 功能开关支持无需重新部署即可上线新功能。
usageTranslations.ar: تمكّن مفاتيح الميزات اختبار وظائف جديدة دون إعادة النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Toggles permitem testar novas funcionalidades sem redeploy.
usageTranslations.ru: Переключатели функций позволяют тестировать новшества без развертывания.
usageTranslations.ja: フィーチャートグルで再デプロイ不要のテストが可能。
usageTranslations.it: Gli interruttori consentono test senza nuovi deploy.
usageTranslations.vi: Công tắc tính năng giúp thử nghiệm mới không cần redeploy.
usageTranslations.hi: फ़ीचर टॉगल से नया फीचर redeploy बिना चालू/बंद किया जा सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: ฟีเจอร์ท็อกเกิลช่วยให้ทดสอบโดยไม่ต้อง redeploy
usageTranslations.id: Feature toggle memungkinkan testing tanpa redeploy.

terms.definition: The process of securely storing, accessing, and controlling credentials, tokens, certificates, and API keys across integrations, pipelines, and operational environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Secret management enforces access controls to API keys and credentials in distributed CI/CD pipelines.

termTranslations.th: การจัดการความลับ

usageTranslations.en: Secret management enforces access controls to API keys and credentials in distributed CI/CD pipelines.
usageTranslations.tr: Gizli bilgi yönetimi, dağıtık CI/CD hatlarında API anahtarlarına ve kimlik bilgilerine erişim kontrolü sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La gestion des secrets applique des contrôles d'accès aux clés API et identifiants dans les pipelines CI/CD distribués.
usageTranslations.de: Geheimnisverwaltung erzwingt Zugriffskontrollen auf API-Schlüssel und Anmeldeinformationen in verteilten CI/CD-Pipelines.
usageTranslations.es: La gestión de secretos aplica controles de acceso a claves API y credenciales en canalizaciones CI/CD distribuidas.
usageTranslations.zh: 机密管理在分布式CI/CD流水线中对API密钥和凭证实施访问控制。
usageTranslations.ar: تفرض إدارة الأسرار ضوابط وصول على مفاتيح API والبيانات المعتمدة في خطوط أنابيب CI/CD الموزعة.
usageTranslations.pt: A gestão de segredos aplica controles de acesso a chaves de API e credenciais em pipelines CI/CD distribuídos.
usageTranslations.ru: Управление секретами обеспечивает контроль доступа к API-ключам и учетным данным в распределённых CI/CD-конвейерах.
usageTranslations.ja: シークレット管理は分散CI/CDパイプラインにおけるAPIキーや認証情報へのアクセス制御を強化します。
usageTranslations.it: La gestione dei segreti applica controlli di accesso a chiavi API e credenziali nei pipeline CI/CD distribuiti.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý bí mật thực thi kiểm soát truy cập cho khóa API và thông tin xác thực trong các pipeline CI/CD phân tán.
usageTranslations.hi: सीक्रेट प्रबंधन वितरित CI/CD पाइपलाइनों में API कुंजी और क्रेडेंशियल्स की एक्सेस कंट्रोल लागू करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดการความลับบังคับใช้การควบคุมการเข้าถึงคีย์ API และข้อมูลรับรองในไปป์ไลน์ CI/CD แบบกระจาย
usageTranslations.id: Manajemen rahasia menerapkan kontrol akses ke kunci API dan kredensial di pipeline CI/CD terdistribusi.

terms.definition: The automated analysis of integration or application code for errors, style violations, or quality issues prior to build, deployment, or orchestration.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Code linting runs automatically in integration pipelines to catch style and logic errors before deployment.

termTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบโค้ด (Linting)

usageTranslations.en: Code linting runs automatically in integration pipelines to catch style and logic errors before deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Kod düzeltme analizi, entegrasyon hatlarında dağıtımdan önce stil ve mantık hatalarını otomatik olarak yakalar.
usageTranslations.fr: L'analyse de code (linting) s'exécute automatiquement dans les pipelines d'intégration pour détecter les erreurs de style et de logique avant le déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Code-Linting läuft automatisch in Integrations-Pipelines, um Stil- und Logikfehler vor der Bereitstellung zu erkennen.
usageTranslations.es: El linting de código se ejecuta automáticamente en pipelines de integración para detectar errores de estilo y lógica antes del despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 代码静态检查在集成流水线中自动运行，以便在部署前捕获样式和逻辑错误。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تشغيل تحليل الشيفرة البرمجية تلقائيًا في خطوط أنابيب التكامل لاكتشاف أخطاء الأسلوب والمنطق قبل النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: O linting de código roda automaticamente em pipelines de integração para capturar erros de estilo e lógica antes do deploy.
usageTranslations.ru: Проверка кода автоматически выполняется в интеграционных конвейерах для выявления ошибок стиля и логики до развертывания.
usageTranslations.ja: コードリントは統合パイプラインで自動的に実行され、デプロイ前にスタイルやロジックのエラーを検出します。
usageTranslations.it: Il linting del codice viene eseguito automaticamente nei pipeline di integrazione per rilevare errori di stile e logica prima del deploy.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm tra mã nguồn tự động chạy trong pipeline tích hợp để phát hiện lỗi trước khi triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: कोड लिंटिंग डिप्लॉयमेंट से पहले स्टाइल और लॉजिक त्रुटियाँ पकड़ने के लिए इंटीग्रेशन पाइपलाइन में स्वतः चलती है।
usageTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบโค้ด (Linting) จะทำงานโดยอัตโนมัติในไปป์ไลน์การรวมเพื่อจับข้อผิดพลาดก่อนการปรับใช้
usageTranslations.id: Linting kode berjalan otomatis di pipeline integrasi untuk menangkap kesalahan sebelum deployment.

terms.definition: The practice of automatically executing and managing tests for system integrations, APIs, or components to validate functionality and prevent regression in release pipelines.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Test automation validates system integrations and helps detect failures before changes impact production environments.

termTranslations.th: ระบบทดสอบอัตโนมัติ

usageTranslations.en: Test automation validates system integrations and helps detect failures before changes impact production environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Test otomasyonu, sistem entegrasyonlarını doğrular ve değişiklikler üretimi etkilemeden önce hataları tespit etmeye yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: L'automatisation des tests valide les intégrations système et aide à détecter les défaillances avant que les changements n'affectent la production.
usageTranslations.de: Testautomatisierung validiert Systemintegrationen und hilft, Fehler zu erkennen, bevor Änderungen die Produktion beeinflussen.
usageTranslations.es: La automatización de pruebas valida integraciones y ayuda a detectar fallos antes de impactar la producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 测试自动化验证系统集成，并在变更影响生产环境前帮助检测故障。
usageTranslations.ar: تتحقق أتمتة الاختبار من تكامل الأنظمة وتساعد في اكتشاف الأعطال قبل أن تؤثر التغييرات على بيئة الإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: A automação de testes valida integrações e ajuda a detectar falhas antes de impactar o ambiente de produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматизация тестирования проверяет интеграции систем и помогает выявлять сбои до того, как изменения затронут продакшн.
usageTranslations.ja: テスト自動化はシステム統合を検証し、本番環境に影響が出る前に障害を検知します。
usageTranslations.it: L'automazione dei test valida le integrazioni di sistema e aiuta a rilevare errori prima che le modifiche impattino la produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Tự động hóa kiểm thử xác thực tích hợp hệ thống và phát hiện lỗi trước khi triển khai vào sản xuất.
usageTranslations.hi: टेस्ट ऑटोमेशन सिस्टम इंटीग्रेशन को सत्यापित करता है और प्रोडक्शन में बदलाव से पहले त्रुटियाँ पकड़ता है।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบทดสอบอัตโนมัติช่วยตรวจสอบการรวมระบบและตรวจจับข้อผิดพลาดก่อนมีผลกระทบต่อการผลิต
usageTranslations.id: Otomatisasi pengujian memvalidasi integrasi sistem dan mendeteksi kegagalan sebelum perubahan berdampak pada produksi.

terms.definition: A controlled validation process to verify functional and operational interoperability between connected IT systems, services, or APIs within integration pipelines.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Integration tests confirm the compatibility of microservices and third-party APIs before release to production.

termTranslations.th: การทดสอบการผสานระบบ

usageTranslations.en: Integration tests confirm the compatibility of microservices and third-party APIs before release to production.
usageTranslations.tr: Entegrasyon testleri, üretime geçmeden önce mikroservislerin ve üçüncü taraf API'lerin uyumluluğunu doğrular.
usageTranslations.fr: Les tests d'intégration confirment la compatibilité des microservices et des API tierces avant la mise en production.
usageTranslations.de: Integrationstests bestätigen die Kompatibilität von Microservices und Drittanbieter-APIs vor der Produktivsetzung.
usageTranslations.es: Las pruebas de integración confirman la compatibilidad de microservicios y API de terceros antes de la puesta en producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 集成测试在生产发布前确认微服务和第三方API的兼容性。
usageTranslations.ar: تؤكد اختبارات التكامل توافقية الخدمات المصغرة وواجهات برمجة التطبيقات الخارجية قبل النشر للإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: Os testes de integração confirmam a compatibilidade de microsserviços e APIs de terceiros antes da produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Интеграционные тесты подтверждают совместимость микросервисов и сторонних API перед релизом в продуктив.
usageTranslations.ja: 統合テストは、本番リリース前にマイクロサービスやサードパーティAPIの互換性を確認します。
usageTranslations.it: I test di integrazione confermano la compatibilità tra microservizi e API di terze parti prima della produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm thử tích hợp xác nhận tính tương thích của microservice và API bên thứ ba trước khi đưa vào sản xuất.
usageTranslations.hi: इंटीग्रेशन टेस्ट प्रोडक्शन में जाने से पहले माइक्रोसर्विस और थर्ड-पार्टी API की संगतता की पुष्टि करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การทดสอบการผสานระบบยืนยันความเข้ากันได้ของไมโครเซอร์วิสและ API ของบุคคลที่สามก่อนใช้งานจริง
usageTranslations.id: Uji integrasi memastikan kompatibilitas microservices dan API pihak ketiga sebelum produksi.

terms.definition: A configured event or condition that initiates an automated build process within CI/CD or integration pipelines.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A build trigger automatically starts the CI pipeline whenever code is pushed to the main branch.

termTranslations.th: ทริกเกอร์การ build

usageTranslations.en: A build trigger automatically starts the CI pipeline whenever code is pushed to the main branch.
usageTranslations.tr: Ana dalda kod gönderildiğinde derleme tetikleyici CI hattını otomatik olarak başlatır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un déclencheur de build lance automatiquement le pipeline CI dès qu'un code est poussé sur la branche principale.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Build-Trigger startet automatisch die CI-Pipeline, sobald Code auf den Hauptbranch gepusht wird.
usageTranslations.es: Un disparador de compilación inicia automáticamente el pipeline CI al realizar un push al branch principal.
usageTranslations.zh: 每当代码推送到主分支时，构建触发器会自动启动CI流水线。
usageTranslations.ar: مشغل البناء يبدأ خط أنابيب CI تلقائيًا عند دفع الشيفرة إلى الفرع الرئيسي.
usageTranslations.pt: Um gatilho de build inicia automaticamente o pipeline CI sempre que há push para o branch principal.
usageTranslations.ru: Триггер сборки автоматически запускает CI-конвейер при пуше кода в основную ветку.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルドトリガーはメインブランチにコードがプッシュされるたびにCIパイプラインを自動開始します。
usageTranslations.it: Un trigger di build avvia automaticamente la pipeline CI quando viene pushato codice sul branch principale.
usageTranslations.vi: Kích hoạt build tự động khởi động pipeline CI khi có mã được đẩy lên nhánh chính.
usageTranslations.hi: मुख्य ब्रांच में कोड पुश होने पर बिल्ड ट्रिगर CI पाइपलाइन को स्वतः शुरू करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ทริกเกอร์การ build จะเริ่ม pipeline CI โดยอัตโนมัติเมื่อมีการ push โค้ดไปยัง branch หลัก
usageTranslations.id: Pemicu build secara otomatis memulai pipeline CI saat kode didorong ke branch utama.

terms.definition: A dynamic visual indicator embedded in documentation, dashboards, or repositories showing the current state of integration pipelines, build health, or deployment status.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A status badge on the README instantly informs teams if the latest integration build passed or failed.

termTranslations.th: ป้ายสถานะ

usageTranslations.en: A status badge on the README instantly informs teams if the latest integration build passed or failed.
usageTranslations.tr: README üzerindeki durum rozeti, son entegrasyon derlemesinin geçip geçmediğini anında ekiplere bildirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un badge d'état sur le README informe instantanément les équipes du succès ou de l'échec de la dernière build d'intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Status-Badge im README informiert Teams sofort, ob der letzte Integrations-Build erfolgreich war.
usageTranslations.es: Una insignia de estado en el README informa instantáneamente a los equipos si la última build pasó o falló.
usageTranslations.zh: README上的状态徽章可即时告知团队最新集成构建是否通过。
usageTranslations.ar: شارة الحالة في README تبلغ الفرق فورًا إذا نجح أو فشل آخر بناء للتكامل.
usageTranslations.pt: Um selo de status no README informa instantaneamente as equipes se o último build de integração foi aprovado ou reprovado.
usageTranslations.ru: Индикатор статуса в README мгновенно информирует команды о результате последней сборки.
usageTranslations.ja: READMEのステータスバッジは最新のビルドの成否を即座にチームに伝えます。
usageTranslations.it: Un badge di stato nel README informa subito il team sullo stato dell’ultima build di integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Huy hiệu trạng thái trên README thông báo ngay cho nhóm biết build tích hợp mới nhất thành công hay thất bại.
usageTranslations.hi: README पर स्टेटस बैज टीम को तुरंत बताता है कि नवीनतम इंटीग्रेशन बिल्ड पास हुआ या फेल।
usageTranslations.th: ป้ายสถานะบน README แจ้งทีมงานทันทีว่าการ build ล่าสุดสำเร็จหรือไม่
usageTranslations.id: Lencana status di README langsung memberi tahu tim jika build integrasi terbaru berhasil atau gagal.

terms.definition: A required human action in an integration or deployment pipeline where a designated user must review and approve before proceeding to the next stage.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Manual approval is enforced before deploying to production to ensure compliance and risk mitigation.

termTranslations.th: การอนุมัติด้วยตนเอง

usageTranslations.en: Manual approval is enforced before deploying to production to ensure compliance and risk mitigation.
usageTranslations.tr: Üretime geçmeden önce uyumluluk ve risk azaltımı için manuel onay zorunlu tutulur.
usageTranslations.fr: L'approbation manuelle est requise avant le déploiement en production pour garantir la conformité.
usageTranslations.de: Manuelle Freigabe ist vor dem Deployment in Produktion vorgeschrieben, um Compliance zu gewährleisten.
usageTranslations.es: La aprobación manual es obligatoria antes de desplegar en producción para garantizar la conformidad.
usageTranslations.zh: 为确保合规与风险缓解，在生产部署前需进行人工审批。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم فرض الموافقة اليدوية قبل النشر للإنتاج لضمان الامتثال وتقليل المخاطر.
usageTranslations.pt: A aprovação manual é exigida antes do deploy em produção para garantir conformidade e mitigação de riscos.
usageTranslations.ru: Ручное одобрение требуется перед продакшн-развертыванием для соблюдения нормативов.
usageTranslations.ja: 本番環境へのデプロイ前にはコンプライアンスのため手動承認が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: L'approvazione manuale è richiesta prima della produzione per la conformità.
usageTranslations.vi: Phê duyệt thủ công được thực hiện trước khi triển khai sản xuất để đảm bảo tuân thủ.
usageTranslations.hi: कंप्लायंस और रिस्क रिडक्शन के लिए प्रोडक्शन में तैनाती से पहले मैन्युअल अप्रूवल अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องมีการอนุมัติด้วยตนเองก่อนดีพลอยไปยังโปรดักชันเพื่อความสอดคล้องและลดความเสี่ยง
usageTranslations.id: Persetujuan manual diwajibkan sebelum deployment ke produksi untuk memastikan kepatuhan.

terms.definition: A fixed schedule and repeatable process for delivering new features, integrations, or updates across multiple teams, often used in scaled agile and enterprise IT environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The release train model synchronizes integration deployments across business units on a predefined cadence.

termTranslations.th: รถไฟปล่อยเวอร์ชัน

usageTranslations.en: The release train model synchronizes integration deployments across business units on a predefined cadence.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm treni modeli, entegrasyon dağıtımlarını iş birimleri arasında önceden belirlenmiş bir ritimde senkronize eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Le modèle du train de publication synchronise les déploiements d'intégration sur un rythme prédéfini.
usageTranslations.de: Das Release-Train-Modell synchronisiert Integrations-Deployments auf festgelegtem Zeitplan.
usageTranslations.es: El modelo de tren de lanzamientos sincroniza despliegues de integración en un ritmo predefinido.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布列车模式以预定节奏同步各业务部门的集成部署。
usageTranslations.ar: نموذج قطار الإصدار يزامن عمليات التكامل عبر وحدات الأعمال بجدول زمني محدد.
usageTranslations.pt: O modelo de trem de lançamentos sincroniza os deployments em ritmo predefinido.
usageTranslations.ru: Модель поезда релизов синхронизирует развертывания между подразделениями по расписанию.
usageTranslations.ja: リリーストレインモデルは事前に決めた周期で部署間のデプロイを同期します。
usageTranslations.it: Il modello di treno di rilascio sincronizza i deployment su una cadenza prestabilita.
