usageTranslations.vi: Mô hình chuỗi phát hành đồng bộ triển khai tích hợp theo nhịp độ xác định trước.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ ट्रेन मॉडल व्यवसाय इकाइयों में पूर्वनिर्धारित कैडेंस पर डिप्लॉयमेंट को सिंक करता है।
usageTranslations.th: โมเดลรถไฟปล่อยเวอร์ชันช่วยซิงโครไนซ์ดีพลอยเมนต์ตามจังหวะที่กำหนดไว้
usageTranslations.id: Model kereta rilis menyinkronkan deployment integrasi secara terjadwal.

terms.definition: An urgent deployment of a code fix or patch to resolve critical integration, security, or production issues outside regular release cycles.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Hotfix deployment is triggered to immediately address a critical API failure impacting integrations.

termTranslations.ja: ホットフィックスデプロイ
termTranslations.th: การ deploy hotfix

usageTranslations.en: Hotfix deployment is triggered to immediately address a critical API failure impacting integrations.
usageTranslations.tr: Entegrasyonları etkileyen kritik bir API arızasını gidermek için acil yama dağıtımı başlatılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un déploiement de correctif d'urgence est lancé pour résoudre une défaillance critique d'API.
usageTranslations.de: Hotfix-Deployment wird ausgelöst, um einen kritischen API-Fehler sofort zu beheben.
usageTranslations.es: Se implementa un hotfix para solucionar inmediatamente un fallo crítico de API.
usageTranslations.zh: 热修复部署被触发以立即解决影响集成的关键API故障。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تشغيل نشر التصحيح العاجل لمعالجة فشل API الحرج الذي يؤثر على التكاملات.
usageTranslations.pt: Implantação de hotfix é acionada para corrigir uma falha crítica de API.
usageTranslations.ru: Экстренное внедрение исправлений запускается для устранения критической ошибки API.
usageTranslations.ja: 統合に影響する重大なAPI障害に即対応するためホットフィックスデプロイが実施されます。
usageTranslations.it: La distribuzione di hotfix viene eseguita per risolvere immediatamente un errore critico di API.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai hotfix được kích hoạt để xử lý ngay lỗi API nghiêm trọng.
usageTranslations.hi: इंटीग्रेशन को प्रभावित करने वाली गंभीर API विफलता को तुरंत सुधारने के लिए हॉटफिक्स डिप्लॉयमेंट ट्रिगर होता है।
usageTranslations.th: มีการ deploy hotfix ทันทีเพื่อแก้ไขข้อผิดพลาด API สำคัญที่ส่งผลต่อการผสานระบบ
usageTranslations.id: Deployment hotfix dilakukan untuk segera mengatasi kegagalan API kritis.

terms.definition: A pre-configured checkpoint or validation in an integration or deployment pipeline that must be passed before promoting code or artifacts to the next stage.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A deployment gate blocks the pipeline until automated quality checks and external approvals are completed.

termTranslations.th: เกตการ deploy

usageTranslations.en: A deployment gate blocks the pipeline until automated quality checks and external approvals are completed.
usageTranslations.tr: Dağıtım kapısı, otomatik kalite kontrolleri ve dış onaylar tamamlanana kadar hattı durdurur.
usageTranslations.fr: Une porte de déploiement bloque le pipeline tant que les contrôles qualité automatisés ne sont pas terminés.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Deployment-Gate blockiert die Pipeline bis alle Qualitätsprüfungen abgeschlossen sind.
usageTranslations.es: Una puerta de despliegue bloquea el pipeline hasta que se completen las validaciones automáticas.
usageTranslations.zh: 部署门槛会阻止流水线，直到自动质量检查和外部审批完成。
usageTranslations.ar: توقف بوابة النشر خط الأنابيب حتى تكتمل الفحوصات والموافقات.
usageTranslations.pt: Um gate de implantação bloqueia o pipeline até que as verificações estejam concluídas.
usageTranslations.ru: Ворота деплоймента блокируют конвейер до завершения всех проверок.
usageTranslations.ja: デプロイゲートは自動チェックと承認が完了するまでパイプラインを停止します。
usageTranslations.it: Il gate di deployment blocca la pipeline finché i controlli non sono completati.
usageTranslations.vi: Cửa kiểm duyệt triển khai chặn pipeline cho đến khi kiểm tra hoàn tất.
usageTranslations.hi: डिप्लॉयमेंट गेट, सभी स्वीकृतियाँ और क्वालिटी चेक पूरे होने तक पाइपलाइन को रोकता है।
usageTranslations.th: เกตการ deploy จะหยุด pipeline ไว้จนกว่าการตรวจสอบและอนุมัติจะเสร็จสิ้น
usageTranslations.id: Gerbang deployment memblokir pipeline sampai pemeriksaan selesai.

terms.definition: A set of enforced rules and requirements governing code commits, merges, and reviews for specific branches in version-controlled repositories to ensure integration quality.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Branch policies require all integration code to pass review and checks before merging into main.

termTranslations.th: นโยบาย branch

usageTranslations.en: Branch policies require all integration code to pass review and checks before merging into main.
usageTranslations.tr: Dal politikaları, tüm entegrasyon kodlarının ana dala birleştirilmeden önce inceleme ve kontrollerden geçmesini zorunlu kılar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les politiques de branche imposent des revues et contrôles avant fusion.
usageTranslations.de: Branch-Policies verlangen Reviews und Prüfungen vor dem Mergen.
usageTranslations.es: Las políticas de rama exigen revisiones antes de fusionar a la principal.
usageTranslations.zh: 分支策略要求所有集成代码合并主分支前通过检查。
usageTranslations.ar: سياسات الفرع تتطلب مراجعة الشيفرة قبل الدمج.
usageTranslations.pt: Políticas de branch exigem revisões antes do merge.
usageTranslations.ru: Политика ветки требует проверки перед слиянием в основную ветку.
usageTranslations.ja: ブランチポリシーはマージ前にレビューを義務付けます。
usageTranslations.it: La policy di branch richiede revisioni prima della fusione.
usageTranslations.vi: Chính sách nhánh yêu cầu kiểm tra trước khi merge vào main.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रांच पॉलिसी, मुख्य में मर्ज से पहले कोड की समीक्षा अनिवार्य करती है।
usageTranslations.th: นโยบาย branch กำหนดให้ต้องตรวจสอบก่อน merge
usageTranslations.id: Kebijakan branch mewajibkan review sebelum merge ke main.

terms.definition: An automated sequence of provisioning, configuring, and managing IT infrastructure resources and integrations using infrastructure-as-code and orchestration tools.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The infrastructure pipeline provisions cloud resources and configures network integrations automatically.

termTranslations.ja: インフラパイプライン
termTranslations.th: ไปป์ไลน์โครงสร้างพื้นฐาน

usageTranslations.en: The infrastructure pipeline provisions cloud resources and configures network integrations automatically.
usageTranslations.tr: Altyapı hattı, bulut kaynaklarını sağlar ve ağ entegrasyonlarını otomatik olarak yapılandırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le pipeline d'infrastructure provisionne les ressources cloud et configure les intégrations réseau automatiquement.
usageTranslations.de: Die Infrastruktur-Pipeline stellt Cloud-Ressourcen bereit und konfiguriert Integrationen.
usageTranslations.es: El pipeline de infraestructura aprovisiona recursos cloud y configura integraciones de red.
usageTranslations.zh: 基础设施流水线自动配置云资源和网络集成。
usageTranslations.ar: يجهز خط أنابيب البنية التحتية الموارد السحابية ويهيئ التكاملات.
usageTranslations.pt: O pipeline de infraestrutura provisiona recursos em nuvem e configura integrações.
usageTranslations.ru: Инфраструктурный конвейер автоматически настраивает облачные ресурсы и интеграции.
usageTranslations.ja: インフラパイプラインはクラウドリソースを自動的に構成します。
usageTranslations.it: La pipeline di infrastruttura configura risorse cloud e integrazioni di rete automaticamente.
usageTranslations.vi: Pipeline hạ tầng tự động cung cấp tài nguyên cloud và cấu hình tích hợp mạng.
usageTranslations.hi: इन्फ्रास्ट्रक्चर पाइपलाइन क्लाउड रिसोर्स को ऑटोमेटेड तरीके से प्रोविजन करती है।
usageTranslations.th: ไปป์ไลน์โครงสร้างพื้นฐานจัดสรรทรัพยากรคลาวด์โดยอัตโนมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Pipeline infrastruktur secara otomatis menyiapkan resource cloud dan integrasi jaringan.

terms.definition: A declarative configuration file or set of parameters defining how source code is compiled, integrated, tested, and packaged within the build process.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The build specification defines compilation steps and test scripts used by the integration pipeline.

termTranslations.th: ข้อกำหนด build

usageTranslations.en: The build specification defines compilation steps and test scripts used by the integration pipeline.
usageTranslations.tr: Derleme spesifikasyonu, entegrasyon hattında kullanılan derleme adımlarını ve test betiklerini tanımlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La spécification de build définit les étapes de compilation et les scripts de test.
usageTranslations.de: Die Build-Spezifikation definiert Kompilierungsschritte und Tests.
usageTranslations.es: La especificación de build define pasos de compilación y scripts de prueba.
usageTranslations.zh: 构建规范定义了集成流水线中的编译步骤和测试脚本。
usageTranslations.ar: تحدد مواصفات البناء خطوات التجميع وبرامج الاختبار.
usageTranslations.pt: A especificação de build define etapas de compilação e scripts de teste.
usageTranslations.ru: Спецификация сборки определяет этапы компиляции и тестовые скрипты.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルド仕様はコンパイル手順とテストスクリプトを定義します。
usageTranslations.it: La specifica di build definisce fasi di compilazione e test.
usageTranslations.vi: Đặc tả build xác định các bước biên dịch và script kiểm thử.
usageTranslations.hi: बिल्ड स्पेसिफिकेशन, इंटीग्रेशन पाइपलाइन में कम्पाइल और टेस्ट स्क्रिप्ट्स को परिभाषित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ข้อกำหนด build กำหนดขั้นตอนและสคริปต์ทดสอบ
usageTranslations.id: Spesifikasi build mendefinisikan langkah kompilasi dan script pengujian.

terms.definition: A defined relationship where one integration or pipeline job cannot execute until another specified job or step completes successfully.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Job dependencies ensure test jobs do not run until all integration builds are successful.

termTranslations.th: การพึ่งพางาน

usageTranslations.en: Job dependencies ensure test jobs do not run until all integration builds are successful.
usageTranslations.tr: İş bağımlılıkları, tüm entegrasyon derlemeleri başarıyla tamamlanana kadar test işlerinin çalışmamasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les dépendances de tâches garantissent que les tests ne s'exécutent qu'après réussite des builds.
usageTranslations.de: Job-Abhängigkeiten verhindern Testausführung vor Abschluss aller Builds.
usageTranslations.es: Las dependencias de trabajo evitan la ejecución de tests antes de finalizar los builds.
usageTranslations.zh: 作业依赖确保在所有集成构建成功前测试作业不会运行。
usageTranslations.ar: اعتمادية المهام تضمن عدم تشغيل اختبارات قبل اكتمال جميع عمليات البناء.
usageTranslations.pt: Dependências de job garantem que testes não rodem antes dos builds.
usageTranslations.ru: Зависимости заданий не позволяют запускать тесты до завершения сборок.
usageTranslations.ja: ジョブ依存関係によりビルド完了前にテストが実行されません。
usageTranslations.it: Le dipendenze di job impediscono i test prima del completamento dei build.
usageTranslations.vi: Phụ thuộc công việc đảm bảo các job kiểm thử chỉ chạy sau khi build tích hợp hoàn thành.
usageTranslations.hi: जॉब डिपेंडेंसी के कारण टेस्ट जॉब्स तब तक नहीं चलते जब तक सभी बिल्ड पूरे न हों।
usageTranslations.th: การพึ่งพางานช่วยให้ job ทดสอบไม่ทำงานจนกว่า build ทั้งหมดจะสำเร็จ
usageTranslations.id: Ketergantungan job memastikan tes tidak berjalan sebelum semua build selesai.

terms.definition: A point-in-time, read-only capture of configuration, state, and deployed resources in an IT environment, used for audit, rollback, or compliance tracking.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Taking an environment snapshot before major integration changes enables quick rollback if a deployment fails.

termTranslations.ja: 環境スナップショット
termTranslations.th: สแนปชอตสภาพแวดล้อม

usageTranslations.en: Taking an environment snapshot before major integration changes enables quick rollback if a deployment fails.
usageTranslations.tr: Büyük entegrasyon değişikliklerinden önce ortam anlık görüntüsü almak, dağıtım hatasında hızlı geri dönüş sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Prendre un instantané d'environnement avant les changements majeurs permet une restauration rapide en cas d'échec du déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Umgebungssnapshot vor großen Integrationsänderungen ermöglicht schnelles Rollback bei Fehlern.
usageTranslations.es: Tomar una instantánea del entorno antes de grandes cambios permite una reversión rápida si falla la implementación.
usageTranslations.zh: 在重大集成变更前拍环境快照，可在部署失败时快速回滚。
usageTranslations.ar: أخذ لقطة للبيئة قبل تغييرات التكامل الرئيسية يتيح العودة السريعة عند فشل النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Capturar um instantâneo do ambiente antes de mudanças permite rollback rápido em falha.
usageTranslations.ru: Снимок окружения перед изменениями интеграции позволяет быстро откатить при сбое.
usageTranslations.ja: 大きな統合変更前に環境スナップショットを取ると失敗時に即復元できる。
usageTranslations.it: Uno snapshot dell'ambiente prima di grandi cambiamenti consente rollback rapido se il deploy fallisce.
usageTranslations.vi: Chụp ảnh môi trường trước khi tích hợp giúp rollback nhanh khi deployment lỗi.
usageTranslations.hi: बड़े बदलाव से पहले स्नैपशॉट लेने से deployment fail होने पर त्वरित rollback संभव होता है।
usageTranslations.th: การสร้างสแนปชอตก่อนเปลี่ยนแปลงใหญ่ช่วย rollback ได้เร็วถ้าดีพลอยล้มเหลว
usageTranslations.id: Mengambil snapshot lingkungan sebelum perubahan besar memungkinkan rollback cepat jika deployment gagal.

terms.definition: The divergence of an IT environment’s actual configuration from its intended or documented baseline due to manual changes, updates, or integrations.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Continuous monitoring detects configuration drift and alerts when server settings deviate from approved baselines.

termTranslations.th: การลื่นไถลของคอนฟิก

usageTranslations.en: Continuous monitoring detects configuration drift and alerts when server settings deviate from approved baselines.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürekli izleme, yapılandırma sürüklenmesini tespit eder ve sunucu ayarları onaylı tabandan saptığında uyarı verir.
usageTranslations.fr: La surveillance continue détecte la dérive de configuration et alerte en cas d'écart.
usageTranslations.de: Kontinuierliches Monitoring erkennt Konfigurationsabweichungen und schlägt Alarm.
usageTranslations.es: La monitorización detecta la desviación de configuración y alerta ante discrepancias.
usageTranslations.zh: 持续监控可检测配置漂移，并在偏离基线时发出警报。
usageTranslations.ar: المراقبة المستمرة تكشف عن انحراف التكوين وتنبه عند التباعد.
usageTranslations.pt: Monitoramento contínuo detecta desvio de configuração e alerta para desvios.
usageTranslations.ru: Постоянный мониторинг выявляет дрейф конфигураций и предупреждает об отклонениях.
usageTranslations.ja: 継続監視は設定ドリフトを検出し逸脱時にアラートを発します。
usageTranslations.it: Il monitoraggio continuo rileva la deviazione di configurazione e avvisa in caso di scostamento.
usageTranslations.vi: Giám sát liên tục phát hiện trôi cấu hình và cảnh báo khi lệch chuẩn.
usageTranslations.hi: लगातार मॉनिटरिंग ड्रिफ्ट को पहचानती है और deviation पर alert देती है।
usageTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบต่อเนื่องช่วยตรวจพบและแจ้งเตือน drift ของคอนฟิก
usageTranslations.id: Monitoring terus-menerus mendeteksi drift konfigurasi dan memberi peringatan jika terjadi penyimpangan.

terms.definition: An automated mechanism for identifying, registering, and connecting distributed services or endpoints within an integration environment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Service discovery allows microservices to register themselves and locate other services dynamically at runtime.

termTranslations.ja: サービスディスカバリー
termTranslations.th: ค้นพบบริการ

usageTranslations.en: Service discovery allows microservices to register themselves and locate other services dynamically at runtime.
usageTranslations.tr: Servis keşfi, mikroservislerin kendilerini kaydedip çalışma anında diğer servisleri dinamik olarak bulmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La découverte de service permet aux microservices de s’enregistrer et de trouver d’autres services dynamiquement.
usageTranslations.de: Service Discovery ermöglicht Microservices die dynamische Registrierung und Suche zur Laufzeit.
usageTranslations.es: El descubrimiento de servicios permite a los microservicios registrarse y localizar otros servicios dinámicamente.
usageTranslations.zh: 服务发现使微服务能够在运行时动态注册和定位其他服务。
usageTranslations.ar: اكتشاف الخدمة يسمح للميكروسيرفيس بتسجيل نفسها والعثور على الخدمات الأخرى ديناميكيًا.
usageTranslations.pt: A descoberta de serviço permite que microserviços se registrem e encontrem outros serviços dinamicamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Обнаружение сервисов позволяет микросервисам регистрироваться и находить другие сервисы во время выполнения.
usageTranslations.ja: サービスディスカバリーによりマイクロサービスは動的に他のサービスを発見できる。
usageTranslations.it: Il service discovery consente ai microservizi di registrarsi e trovare altri servizi dinamicamente.
usageTranslations.vi: Khám phá dịch vụ cho phép microservice đăng ký và tìm các dịch vụ khác động.
usageTranslations.hi: सर्विस डिस्कवरी से माइक्रोसर्विसेज़ रनटाइम पर खुद को रजिस्टर और अन्य सर्विस ढूंढ सकती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: Service discovery ช่วยให้ microservice สามารถลงทะเบียนและค้นหาบริการอื่นแบบไดนามิก
usageTranslations.id: Service discovery memungkinkan microservices mendaftar dan menemukan layanan lain secara dinamis.

terms.definition: The structured process of planning, scheduling, coordinating, and controlling software releases, integrations, and deployments to production environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Release management defines approval workflows, release notes, and rollback plans for coordinated integration deployments.

termTranslations.th: การจัดการ release

usageTranslations.en: Release management defines approval workflows, release notes, and rollback plans for coordinated integration deployments.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm yönetimi, entegrasyon dağıtımları için onay süreçleri, sürüm notları ve geri dönüş planlarını tanımlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La gestion des versions définit les flux d'approbation, les notes de version et les plans de retour arrière.
usageTranslations.de: Release Management definiert Freigabeprozesse, Release Notes und Rollback-Pläne.
usageTranslations.es: La gestión de lanzamientos define flujos de aprobación, notas de lanzamiento y planes de reversión.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布管理定义了审批流程、发布说明和回滚计划。
usageTranslations.ar: إدارة الإصدارات تحدد تدفقات الموافقة وملاحظات الإصدار وخطط التراجع.
usageTranslations.pt: O gerenciamento de releases define fluxos de aprovação, notas e planos de rollback.
usageTranslations.ru: Управление релизами определяет процессы утверждения, примечания и планы отката.
usageTranslations.ja: リリース管理は承認フロー、リリースノート、ロールバック計画を定義します。
usageTranslations.it: La gestione release definisce i flussi di approvazione, note e piani di rollback.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý phát hành xác định luồng phê duyệt, ghi chú và kế hoạch rollback.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ मैनेजमेंट में अप्रूवल वर्कफ़्लो, नोट्स व रोलबैक प्लान होते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: Release management กำหนด workflow การอนุมัติ, หมายเหตุ release, และแผน rollback
usageTranslations.id: Manajemen rilis mendefinisikan alur persetujuan, catatan, dan rencana rollback.

terms.definition: A graphical or interactive representation of integration, build, or deployment pipelines, showing job status, dependencies, and progress in real time.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pipeline visualization tools help teams monitor each integration stage and quickly identify pipeline bottlenecks or failures.

termTranslations.th: การแสดงภาพ pipeline

usageTranslations.en: Pipeline visualization tools help teams monitor each integration stage and quickly identify pipeline bottlenecks or failures.
usageTranslations.tr: Hat görselleştirme araçları, ekiplerin entegrasyon aşamalarını izlemesini ve darboğazları hızlıca tespit etmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les outils de visualisation de pipeline aident à surveiller chaque étape et à identifier rapidement les blocages.
usageTranslations.de: Pipeline-Visualisierungstools helfen Teams Engpässe schnell zu erkennen.
usageTranslations.es: Las herramientas de visualización ayudan a identificar cuellos de botella.
usageTranslations.zh: 流水线可视化工具帮助团队监控各集成阶段并快速发现瓶颈。
usageTranslations.ar: أدوات تصور خط الأنابيب تساعد الفرق على تحديد الاختناقات بسرعة.
usageTranslations.pt: Ferramentas de visualização facilitam o monitoramento e identificação de gargalos.
usageTranslations.ru: Визуализация пайплайна помогает выявлять узкие места и сбои.
usageTranslations.ja: パイプライン可視化はボトルネックや失敗を早期に把握可能にします。
usageTranslations.it: Gli strumenti di visualizzazione pipeline aiutano a individuare i colli di bottiglia.
usageTranslations.vi: Công cụ trực quan hóa giúp xác định điểm tắc nghẽn pipeline nhanh chóng.
usageTranslations.hi: पाइपलाइन विज़ुअलाइज़ेशन से टीम बॉटलनेक और फेल्योर पहचान सकती है।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องมือ visualization pipeline ช่วยตรวจพบคอขวดและความล้มเหลวได้เร็ว
usageTranslations.id: Alat visualisasi pipeline membantu tim memantau tahapan dan mengidentifikasi masalah.

terms.definition: A quantifiable metric or agreement that defines the expected performance, uptime, or quality of a service or integration within an environment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Service level objectives for API integrations specify minimum uptime and response time requirements in SLAs.

termTranslations.th: ระดับบริการ

usageTranslations.en: Service level objectives for API integrations specify minimum uptime and response time requirements in SLAs.
usageTranslations.tr: API entegrasyonları için servis seviyesi hedefleri, SLA’lerde minimum çalışma süresi ve yanıt süresi gereksinimlerini belirtir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les objectifs de niveau de service pour les API précisent le temps de disponibilité minimum dans les SLA.
usageTranslations.de: Service Level Objectives für APIs spezifizieren Mindestverfügbarkeit und Antwortzeit in SLAs.
usageTranslations.es: Los objetivos de nivel de servicio para APIs establecen tiempos mínimos en los SLA.
usageTranslations.zh: API集成的服务级别目标在SLA中规定了最小正常运行和响应时间。
usageTranslations.ar: تحدد أهداف مستوى الخدمة لواجهات برمجة التطبيقات متطلبات الحد الأدنى في اتفاقيات SLA.
usageTranslations.pt: Os objetivos de nível de serviço para APIs definem requisitos mínimos em SLAs.
usageTranslations.ru: Цели уровня сервиса для API определяют минимальное время работы и отклика в SLA.
usageTranslations.ja: API連携のサービスレベル目標はSLAで稼働率や応答時間を定める。
usageTranslations.it: Gli obiettivi di livello di servizio delle API specificano uptime e tempi di risposta nelle SLA.
usageTranslations.vi: Mục tiêu mức dịch vụ cho API xác định thời gian uptime tối thiểu và yêu cầu SLA.
usageTranslations.hi: API के लिए सर्विस लेवल ऑब्जेक्टिव्स, SLA में न्यूनतम uptime और response time सेट करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: Service level objective สำหรับ API กำหนด uptime ขั้นต่ำใน SLA
usageTranslations.id: Tujuan tingkat layanan untuk API menentukan uptime minimum dalam SLA.

terms.definition: The automated coordination and sequencing of deployment tasks and integrations across environments to ensure reliable and repeatable releases.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Deployment orchestration tools automate environment setup, integration testing, and progressive rollouts in CI/CD pipelines.

termTranslations.ja: デプロイオーケストレーション
termTranslations.th: การ orchestrate การ deploy

usageTranslations.en: Deployment orchestration tools automate environment setup, integration testing, and progressive rollouts in CI/CD pipelines.
usageTranslations.tr: Dağıtım orkestrasyon araçları, ortam kurulumunu, entegrasyon testlerini ve kademeli dağıtımları CI/CD hatlarında otomatikleştirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les outils d'orchestration de déploiement automatisent la configuration, les tests et les déploiements progressifs.
usageTranslations.de: Deployment-Orchestrierungs-Tools automatisieren Setup, Tests und progressive Rollouts.
usageTranslations.es: Las herramientas de orquestación automatizan la configuración y despliegue progresivo.
usageTranslations.zh: 部署编排工具自动化环境配置、集成测试和分阶段发布。
usageTranslations.ar: أدوات تنسيق النشر تؤتمت الإعداد والاختبار والتوزيع التدريجي.
usageTranslations.pt: Ferramentas de orquestração automatizam setup e rollout em CI/CD.
usageTranslations.ru: Инструменты оркестрации автоматизируют настройку, тесты и развёртывания.
usageTranslations.ja: デプロイオーケストレーションはセットアップや段階的展開を自動化。
usageTranslations.it: Strumenti di orchestrazione automatizzano setup, test e rollout progressivi.
usageTranslations.vi: Công cụ orchestration tự động hóa thiết lập môi trường và rollout.
usageTranslations.hi: डिप्लॉयमेंट ऑर्केस्ट्रेशन से सेटअप, टेस्ट और रोलआउट ऑटोमेट होते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องมือ orchestrate ช่วย setup และ rollout โดยอัตโนมัติใน CI/CD
usageTranslations.id: Alat orkestrasi deployment mengotomasi setup, tes, dan rollout bertahap.

terms.definition: A condition where an automated build process fails to complete successfully due to errors in code, configuration, tests, or integrations.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A build failure notification is sent to the integration team when code changes break automated tests.

termTranslations.th: ข้อผิดพลาด build

usageTranslations.en: A build failure notification is sent to the integration team when code changes break automated tests.
usageTranslations.tr: Kod değişiklikleri otomatik testleri bozduğunda derleme hatası bildirimi entegrasyon ekibine gönderilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une notification d'échec de build est envoyée à l'équipe d'intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Bei Build-Fehler wird das Integrationsteam benachrichtigt.
usageTranslations.es: Se notifica un fallo de build al equipo de integración.
usageTranslations.zh: 当代码更改导致自动化测试失败时，构建失败通知会发送给集成团队。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم إرسال إشعار فشل البناء إلى فريق التكامل عند فشل الاختبارات.
usageTranslations.pt: Falha de build notificada ao time de integração.
usageTranslations.ru: О сбое сборки уведомляется команда интеграции.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルド失敗時は統合チームに通知が送られる。
usageTranslations.it: Notifica di errore di build inviata al team di integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Thông báo lỗi build được gửi tới nhóm tích hợp khi kiểm thử tự động thất bại.
usageTranslations.hi: कोड बदलने पर टेस्ट फेल हो जाए तो टीम को बिल्ड फेल्योर नोटिफिकेशन मिलता है।
usageTranslations.th: หาก build ล้มเหลวจะมีการแจ้งเตือนทีมงาน
usageTranslations.id: Notifikasi kegagalan build dikirim ke tim integrasi jika tes gagal.

terms.definition: A formal sign-off, usually by an authorized stakeholder, required before deploying an integration, update, or release to production.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A release approval workflow ensures only authorized personnel can promote code to production.

termTranslations.th: การอนุมัติ release

usageTranslations.en: A release approval workflow ensures only authorized personnel can promote code to production.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm onay süreci, sadece yetkili kişilerin kodu üretime taşımasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le workflow d'approbation garantit que seuls les autorisés déploient en prod.
usageTranslations.de: Release-Freigabe erlaubt nur Befugten die Veröffentlichung.
usageTranslations.es: El workflow de aprobación solo permite a autorizados desplegar en producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布批准流程确保只有授权人员才能部署到生产环境。
usageTranslations.ar: سير عمل الموافقة يضمن نشر الكود للإنتاج فقط من قبل المخولين.
usageTranslations.pt: Aprovação de release garante deploy por pessoal autorizado.
usageTranslations.ru: Одобрение релиза позволяет промоутить код только уполномоченным.
usageTranslations.ja: リリース承認ワークフローにより認可された人のみ本番リリース可能。
usageTranslations.it: Il workflow di approvazione assicura deploy solo a personale autorizzato.
usageTranslations.vi: Luồng phê duyệt phát hành đảm bảo chỉ người được phép mới deploy production.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ अप्रूवल से केवल अधिकृत व्यक्ति ही प्रोडक्शन में कोड डाल सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: Workflow อนุมัติ release รับรองว่ามีแต่ผู้ได้รับอนุญาตที่ deploy ได้
usageTranslations.id: Workflow persetujuan release memastikan hanya pihak berwenang yang bisa deploy ke produksi.

terms.definition: The automated planning, sequencing, and execution of integration, build, or test jobs according to predefined criteria or time windows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Job scheduling in CI/CD ensures integration tests are executed during low-traffic periods to reduce system impact.

termTranslations.ja: ジョブスケジューリング
termTranslations.th: การ scheduling งาน

usageTranslations.en: Job scheduling in CI/CD ensures integration tests are executed during low-traffic periods to reduce system impact.
usageTranslations.tr: CI/CD'de iş zamanlaması, entegrasyon testlerinin düşük trafik dönemlerinde çalıştırılmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La planification des jobs dans CI/CD garantit l'exécution pendant les périodes creuses.
usageTranslations.de: Job-Scheduling in CI/CD lässt Tests in verkehrsarmen Zeiten laufen.
usageTranslations.es: La programación de trabajos en CI/CD ejecuta pruebas en horarios de baja carga.
usageTranslations.zh: CI/CD中的作业调度确保集成测试在低流量时段执行。
usageTranslations.ar: جدولة الوظائف في CI/CD تضمن تنفيذ الاختبارات في الفترات ذات الحمل المنخفض.
usageTranslations.pt: Agendamento de jobs em CI/CD executa testes em horários de menor impacto.
usageTranslations.ru: Планирование заданий в CI/CD запускает тесты в периоды низкой нагрузки.
usageTranslations.ja: CI/CDのジョブスケジューリングは低トラフィック時にテストを実行。
usageTranslations.it: La schedulazione job in CI/CD esegue i test nei periodi a basso traffico.
usageTranslations.vi: Lên lịch job trong CI/CD đảm bảo kiểm thử chạy lúc lưu lượng thấp.
usageTranslations.hi: CI/CD में जॉब शेड्यूलिंग, लो ट्रैफिक में टेस्ट चलाती है ताकि सिस्टम पर लोड न पड़े।
usageTranslations.th: Scheduling งานใน CI/CD ทำให้เทสต์รันช่วงที่ทราฟฟิคน้อย
usageTranslations.id: Penjadwalan job di CI/CD memastikan tes berjalan di waktu trafik rendah.

terms.definition: A preliminary set of integration or system tests designed to reveal major failures before more rigorous testing or production deployment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Smoke testing after each deployment validates that all critical integrations are functioning before full test suites run.

termTranslations.th: การ smoke test

usageTranslations.en: Smoke testing after each deployment validates that all critical integrations are functioning before full test suites run.
usageTranslations.tr: Her dağıtımdan sonra duman testi, tam testten önce kritik entegrasyonların çalıştığını doğrular.
usageTranslations.fr: Le smoke testing valide l'intégration critique après chaque déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Smoke-Tests prüfen kritische Integrationen nach jedem Deployment.
usageTranslations.es: Las pruebas de humo validan integraciones tras cada despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 每次部署后进行冒烟测试以验证关键集成正常。
usageTranslations.ar: اختبار الدخان بعد كل نشر يتحقق من عمل التكاملات الأساسية.
usageTranslations.pt: Smoke testing valida integrações críticas após cada deploy.
usageTranslations.ru: Дымовое тестирование подтверждает работоспособность интеграций после каждого релиза.
usageTranslations.ja: スモークテストは本格テスト前に重要統合を検証します。
usageTranslations.it: Lo smoke test valida le integrazioni critiche dopo ogni deploy.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm thử smoke xác nhận tích hợp quan trọng sau mỗi lần triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: हर डिप्लॉयमेंट के बाद स्मोक टेस्टिंग से क्रिटिकल इंटीग्रेशन की पुष्टि होती है।
usageTranslations.th: Smoke test หลัง deploy ช่วยยืนยันฟังก์ชันที่สำคัญทำงานถูกต้อง
usageTranslations.id: Smoke testing memvalidasi integrasi penting setelah setiap deployment.

terms.definition: A system or service that distributes incoming network traffic or integration requests across multiple servers or services for reliability and performance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A load balancer improves integration reliability by routing requests to healthy backend services.

termTranslations.th: ตัวกระจายโหลด

usageTranslations.en: A load balancer improves integration reliability by routing requests to healthy backend services.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük dengeleyici, istekleri sağlıklı arka uç servislere yönlendirerek entegrasyonun güvenilirliğini artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un équilibreur de charge améliore la fiabilité en redirigeant vers les backends sains.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Load-Balancer erhöht die Zuverlässigkeit durch Routing zu gesunden Diensten.
usageTranslations.es: Un balanceador de carga mejora la fiabilidad redirigiendo a backends sanos.
usageTranslations.zh: 负载均衡器通过将请求路由到健康的后端服务提高可靠性。
usageTranslations.ar: موازن التحميل يعزز الموثوقية بتوجيه الطلبات للخوادم السليمة.
usageTranslations.pt: O balanceador de carga aumenta a confiabilidade ao direcionar para serviços saudáveis.
usageTranslations.ru: Балансировщик нагрузки повышает надёжность, направляя запросы к здоровым бэкендам.
usageTranslations.ja: ロードバランサーは正常なサービスに振り分け信頼性を高めます。
usageTranslations.it: Il bilanciatore di carico migliora l'affidabilità indirizzando le richieste ai backend funzionanti.
usageTranslations.vi: Bộ cân bằng tải tăng độ tin cậy khi phân phối yêu cầu đến backend khỏe mạnh.
usageTranslations.hi: लोड बैलेंसर, रिक्वेस्ट को हेल्दी बैकएंड्स पर भेजकर इंटीग्रेशन की विश्वसनीयता बढ़ाता है।
usageTranslations.th: Load balancer เพิ่มความน่าเชื่อถือโดยส่ง request ไปยัง backend ที่พร้อมใช้งาน
usageTranslations.id: Load balancer meningkatkan keandalan dengan mengarahkan permintaan ke backend sehat.

terms.definition: An automated notification triggered by monitoring systems when defined thresholds, errors, or anomalies occur in integrations or platform services.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A monitoring alert is sent when API latency exceeds the defined service level threshold.

termTranslations.ja: モニタリングアラート
termTranslations.th: การแจ้งเตือน monitoring

usageTranslations.en: A monitoring alert is sent when API latency exceeds the defined service level threshold.
usageTranslations.tr: API gecikmesi belirlenen servis seviyesi eşiğini aştığında izleme uyarısı gönderilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une alerte de surveillance est envoyée si la latence API dépasse le seuil défini.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Monitoring-Alarm wird gesendet, wenn die Latenz den Schwellenwert überschreitet.
usageTranslations.es: Se envía una alerta de monitoreo cuando la latencia API supera el umbral.
usageTranslations.zh: API延迟超出阈值时会触发监控警报。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم إرسال تنبيه مراقبة عند تجاوز الكمون عتبة الخدمة.
usageTranslations.pt: Um alerta de monitoramento é enviado quando a latência excede o limite.
usageTranslations.ru: Оповещение мониторинга отправляется при превышении задержки API.
usageTranslations.ja: API遅延が閾値を超えるとモニタリングアラートが送信されます。
usageTranslations.it: Allerta di monitoraggio inviata se la latenza supera la soglia.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảnh báo giám sát được gửi khi độ trễ API vượt ngưỡng.
usageTranslations.hi: API latency थ्रेशोल्ड पार करते ही मॉनिटरिंग अलर्ट भेजा जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: แจ้งเตือน monitoring จะถูกส่งหาก latency เกินที่กำหนด
usageTranslations.id: Peringatan monitoring dikirim saat latensi API melebihi batas.

terms.definition: A worker process or machine that executes build, integration, or test jobs as part of automated pipelines in CI/CD environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Distributed build agents enable parallel execution of integration and test jobs in scalable CI/CD pipelines.

termTranslations.th: Build agent

usageTranslations.en: Distributed build agents enable parallel execution of integration and test jobs in scalable CI/CD pipelines.
usageTranslations.tr: Dağıtık derleme aracısı, ölçeklenebilir CI/CD hatlarında entegrasyon ve test işlerinin paralel yürütülmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les agents de build distribués permettent l’exécution parallèle dans CI/CD.
usageTranslations.de: Verteilte Build-Agents erlauben parallele Ausführung in CI/CD.
usageTranslations.es: Agentes distribuidos permiten ejecución paralela en CI/CD.
usageTranslations.zh: 分布式构建代理支持CI/CD中的并行作业执行。
usageTranslations.ar: العاملون الموزعون يمكّنون التشغيل المتوازي للمهام في CI/CD.
usageTranslations.pt: Agentes distribuídos permitem execução paralela em CI/CD.
usageTranslations.ru: Распределённые агенты сборки обеспечивают параллельное выполнение в CI/CD.
usageTranslations.ja: 分散ビルドエージェントは並列実行を可能にします。
usageTranslations.it: Agenti distribuiti permettono esecuzioni parallele in CI/CD.
usageTranslations.vi: Build agent phân tán cho phép chạy song song jobs tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: डिस्ट्रिब्यूटेड एजेंट CI/CD में पैरेलल जॉब्स चलाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: Build agent แบบกระจายช่วยให้รันงานแบบขนานใน CI/CD
usageTranslations.id: Agen build terdistribusi memungkinkan eksekusi paralel di CI/CD.

terms.definition: An automated workflow dedicated to executing, validating, and reporting integration, system, or regression tests in a CI/CD environment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A dedicated test pipeline automates all integration and regression tests before production deployment.

termTranslations.th: ไปป์ไลน์ทดสอบ

usageTranslations.en: A dedicated test pipeline automates all integration and regression tests before production deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Özel bir test hattı, üretim dağıtımı öncesinde tüm entegrasyon ve regresyon testlerini otomatikleştirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un pipeline de test dédié automatise tous les tests avant la production.
usageTranslations.de: Eine dedizierte Test-Pipeline automatisiert alle Tests vor Produktivsetzung.
usageTranslations.es: Un pipeline de pruebas automatiza todas las pruebas antes de producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 专用测试流水线在生产部署前自动化所有测试。
usageTranslations.ar: خط اختبار مخصص يؤتمت جميع الاختبارات قبل النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Pipeline de teste automatiza todos os testes antes do deploy.
usageTranslations.ru: Выделенный тестовый конвейер автоматизирует все тесты перед продакшном.
usageTranslations.ja: 専用テストパイプラインは本番前に全テストを自動化。
usageTranslations.it: La pipeline di test automatizza tutti i test pre-produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Pipeline kiểm thử tự động hóa mọi kiểm thử trước khi deploy.
usageTranslations.hi: डेडिकेटेड टेस्ट पाइपलाइन, प्रोडक्शन से पहले सभी टेस्ट्स ऑटोमेट करती है।
usageTranslations.th: Pipeline ทดสอบเฉพาะทางช่วย automate test ทั้งหมดก่อน production
usageTranslations.id: Pipeline pengujian otomatisasi semua tes sebelum deployment.

terms.definition: A set of enterprise-defined rules governing automated integration, deployment, and delivery pipelines, including approval requirements, compliance checks, and operational constraints.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pipeline policies must enforce code review and artifact security before deployment is permitted in production environments.

termTranslations.ja: パイプラインポリシー
termTranslations.th: นโยบายไปป์ไลน์

usageTranslations.en: Pipeline policies must enforce code review and artifact security before deployment is permitted in production environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Boru hattı politikaları, üretim ortamında dağıtıma izin verilmeden önce kod incelemesi ve eser güvenliğini zorunlu kılmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les politiques de pipeline doivent imposer la révision du code et la sécurité des artefacts avant tout déploiement en production.
usageTranslations.de: Pipeline-Richtlinien müssen Code-Reviews und Artefaktsicherheit vor der Bereitstellung in Produktionsumgebungen durchsetzen.
usageTranslations.es: Las políticas de canalización deben exigir revisión de código y seguridad de artefactos antes del despliegue en producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 流水线策略必须在允许生产环境部署前强制进行代码审查和工件安全性检查。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن تفرض سياسات خطوط الأنابيب مراجعة الكود وأمان العناصر قبل السماح بالنشر في بيئات الإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: As políticas de pipeline devem impor revisão de código e segurança de artefatos antes da implantação em produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Политика конвейера должна обеспечивать проверку кода и безопасность артефактов до разрешения развертывания в продакшене.
usageTranslations.ja: パイプラインポリシーは、本番環境でのデプロイ許可前にコードレビューとアーティファクトのセキュリティを義務付ける必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Le politiche della pipeline devono imporre la revisione del codice e la sicurezza degli artefatti prima della distribuzione in produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Chính sách đường ống phải bắt buộc kiểm tra mã và bảo mật hiện vật trước khi triển khai vào môi trường sản xuất.
usageTranslations.hi: पाइपलाइन नीतियों को उत्पादन परिवेश में डिप्लॉयमेंट से पहले कोड समीक्षा और आर्टिफैक्ट सुरक्षा लागू करनी चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: นโยบายไปป์ไลน์ต้องบังคับใช้การทบทวนโค้ดและความปลอดภัยของอาร์ติแฟกต์ก่อนอนุญาตให้นำไปใช้งานในระบบโปรดักชัน
usageTranslations.id: Kebijakan pipeline harus memberlakukan tinjauan kode dan keamanan artefak sebelum penyebaran di lingkungan produksi diizinkan.

terms.definition: A formal ITIL-based process for controlling, tracking, and authorizing changes to integration components, configurations, or deployment workflows in production systems.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Change management ensures that all modifications to integration flows are tracked, reviewed, and approved before rollout.

termTranslations.th: การจัดการการเปลี่ยนแปลง

usageTranslations.en: Change management ensures that all modifications to integration flows are tracked, reviewed, and approved before rollout.
usageTranslations.tr: Değişiklik yönetimi, entegrasyon akışlarında yapılan tüm değişikliklerin izlenmesini, incelenmesini ve onaylanmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La gestion des changements garantit que toutes les modifications des flux d'intégration sont suivies, examinées et approuvées avant leur déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Change Management stellt sicher, dass alle Änderungen an Integrationsabläufen vor der Einführung verfolgt, überprüft und genehmigt werden.
usageTranslations.es: La gestión de cambios garantiza que todas las modificaciones en los flujos de integración se rastreen, revisen y aprueben antes del lanzamiento.
usageTranslations.zh: 变更管理确保所有集成流程的修改在发布前都被跟踪、审查和批准。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن إدارة التغيير تتبع جميع التعديلات على تدفقات التكامل ومراجعتها والموافقة عليها قبل التنفيذ.
usageTranslations.pt: O gerenciamento de mudanças garante que todas as modificações nos fluxos de integração sejam rastreadas, revisadas e aprovadas antes da implementação.
usageTranslations.ru: Управление изменениями обеспечивает отслеживание, проверку и одобрение всех изменений в интеграционных потоках перед внедрением.
usageTranslations.ja: 変更管理は、展開前にすべての統合フローの変更が追跡、レビュー、および承認されることを保証します。
usageTranslations.it: La gestione delle modifiche garantisce che tutte le modifiche ai flussi di integrazione siano tracciate, revisionate e approvate prima della distribuzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý thay đổi đảm bảo tất cả các thay đổi đối với luồng tích hợp đều được theo dõi, xem xét và phê duyệt trước khi triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: परिवर्तन प्रबंधन यह सुनिश्चित करता है कि एकीकरण प्रवाह में सभी संशोधनों को रोलआउट से पहले ट्रैक, समीक्षा और अनुमोदित किया जाए।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดการการเปลี่ยนแปลงช่วยให้มั่นใจว่าการปรับเปลี่ยนในโฟลว์การผสานรวมทั้งหมดได้รับการติดตาม ตรวจสอบ และอนุมัติก่อนใช้งาน
usageTranslations.id: Manajemen perubahan memastikan semua modifikasi pada alur integrasi dilacak, ditinjau, dan disetujui sebelum diterapkan.

terms.definition: A documented, stepwise plan for deploying new integration solutions, system updates, or features, outlining sequence, timing, and risk mitigation actions.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A phased rollout strategy reduces risk by introducing integration changes to select systems before global deployment.

termTranslations.th: กลยุทธ์การเปิดตัว

usageTranslations.en: A phased rollout strategy reduces risk by introducing integration changes to select systems before global deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Aşamalı bir yaygınlaştırma stratejisi, entegrasyon değişikliklerini küresel dağıtımdan önce belirli sistemlere sunarak riski azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: Une stratégie de déploiement par étapes réduit les risques en introduisant les changements d'intégration dans des systèmes sélectionnés avant un déploiement global.
usageTranslations.de: Eine gestufte Rollout-Strategie verringert das Risiko, indem Integrationsänderungen vor dem weltweiten Einsatz in ausgewählten Systemen eingeführt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Una estrategia de despliegue gradual reduce el riesgo al introducir cambios de integración en sistemas seleccionados antes del despliegue global.
usageTranslations.zh: 分阶段上线策略通过先在部分系统中引入集成更改再全局部署来降低风险。
usageTranslations.ar: تقلل استراتيجية الطرح المرحلي من المخاطر من خلال إدخال تغييرات التكامل إلى أنظمة محددة قبل النشر العالمي.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma estratégia de implantação faseada reduz o risco ao introduzir mudanças de integração em sistemas selecionados antes da implantação global.
usageTranslations.ru: Пошаговая стратегия внедрения снижает риски, внедряя изменения интеграции сначала в выбранные системы до глобального развертывания.
usageTranslations.ja: 段階的なロールアウト戦略は、グローバル展開前に特定のシステムに統合変更を導入することでリスクを低減します。
usageTranslations.it: Una strategia di rollout graduale riduce il rischio introducendo modifiche di integrazione in sistemi selezionati prima della distribuzione globale.
usageTranslations.vi: Chiến lược triển khai theo giai đoạn giảm thiểu rủi ro bằng cách áp dụng thay đổi tích hợp vào các hệ thống chọn lọc trước khi triển khai toàn cầu.
usageTranslations.hi: चरणबद्ध रोलआउट रणनीति चयनित प्रणालियों में वैश्विक परिनियोजन से पहले एकीकरण परिवर्तन लाकर जोखिम को कम करती है।
usageTranslations.th: กลยุทธ์การเปิดตัวแบบเป็นขั้นตอนช่วยลดความเสี่ยงโดยนำการเปลี่ยนแปลงการผสานรวมไปใช้กับระบบที่เลือกก่อนนำไปใช้ทั่วโลก
usageTranslations.id: Strategi peluncuran bertahap mengurangi risiko dengan memperkenalkan perubahan integrasi ke sistem tertentu sebelum penerapan global.

terms.definition: A detailed, pre-approved sequence of actions, schedules, and resources required to deliver, install, and activate integration components in live environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A deployment plan should specify rollback procedures in case the integration release causes unexpected issues in production.

termTranslations.th: แผนการปรับใช้

usageTranslations.en: A deployment plan should specify rollback procedures in case the integration release causes unexpected issues in production.
usageTranslations.tr: Dağıtım planı, entegrasyon yayınının üretimde beklenmedik sorunlara neden olması durumunda geri alma prosedürlerini içermelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un plan de déploiement doit spécifier les procédures de retour en arrière en cas de problème inattendu lors de la mise en production de l'intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Bereitstellungsplan sollte Rücksetzverfahren angeben, falls die Integrationsfreigabe unerwartete Probleme in der Produktion verursacht.
usageTranslations.es: Un plan de implementación debe especificar procedimientos de reversión en caso de que la liberación de integración cause problemas inesperados en producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 部署计划应在集成发布导致生产中出现意外问题时规定回滚程序。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن يحدد خطة النشر إجراءات التراجع في حالة تسبب إصدار التكامل في مشكلات غير متوقعة في الإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: Um plano de implantação deve especificar procedimentos de reversão caso a liberação de integração cause problemas inesperados em produção.
usageTranslations.ru: План развертывания должен предусматривать процедуры отката на случай, если интеграционный релиз вызовет непредвиденные проблемы в продакшене.
usageTranslations.ja: デプロイメント計画には、統合リリースが本番環境で予期しない問題を引き起こした場合のロールバック手順を明記すべきです。
usageTranslations.it: Un piano di distribuzione dovrebbe specificare le procedure di rollback nel caso in cui il rilascio dell'integrazione causi problemi imprevisti in produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Kế hoạch triển khai cần chỉ rõ quy trình hoàn tác phòng khi phát hành tích hợp gây ra sự cố không mong muốn trong môi trường sản xuất.
usageTranslations.hi: परिनियोजन योजना में यह निर्दिष्ट होना चाहिए कि यदि एकीकरण रिलीज़ के कारण उत्पादन में अप्रत्याशित समस्याएँ आती हैं तो रोलबैक प्रक्रिया क्या होगी।
usageTranslations.th: แผนการปรับใช้ควรกำหนดขั้นตอนการย้อนกลับกรณีการเปิดตัวการผสานรวมก่อให้เกิดปัญหาที่ไม่คาดคิดในระบบโปรดักชัน
usageTranslations.id: Rencana penerapan harus menentukan prosedur rollback jika rilis integrasi menyebabkan masalah tak terduga di produksi.

terms.definition: An operational, stepwise list of mandatory tasks, tests, and validations required before an integration or software release is approved for production.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Every integration deployment must pass the release checklist, including regression tests and rollback verification, before production approval.

termTranslations.fr: Liste de contrôle de la version
termTranslations.es: Lista de verificación de la versión
termTranslations.ja: リリースチェックリスト
termTranslations.vi: Danh sách kiểm tra phát hành
termTranslations.th: รายการตรวจสอบก่อนเปิดตัว

usageTranslations.en: Every integration deployment must pass the release checklist, including regression tests and rollback verification, before production approval.
usageTranslations.tr: Her entegrasyon dağıtımı, üretim onayı öncesinde regresyon testleri ve geri alma doğrulaması dahil olmak üzere sürüm kontrol listesinden geçmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Chaque déploiement d'intégration doit passer la liste de contrôle de la version, y compris les tests de régression et la vérification du retour arrière, avant l'approbation en production.
usageTranslations.de: Jede Integrationsbereitstellung muss vor der Produktionsfreigabe die Release-Checkliste bestehen, einschließlich Regressionstests und Rücksetzungsverifizierung.
usageTranslations.es: Cada despliegue de integración debe pasar la lista de verificación de la versión, incluidas las pruebas de regresión y la verificación de reversión, antes de la aprobación en producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 每次集成部署都必须在生产批准前通过发布清单，包括回归测试和回滚验证。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن يجتاز كل نشر للتكامل قائمة التحقق من الإصدار، بما في ذلك اختبارات الانحدار والتحقق من التراجع، قبل الموافقة على الإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: Cada implantação de integração deve passar pela lista de verificação de lançamento, incluindo testes de regressão e verificação de rollback, antes da aprovação para produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Каждое развертывание интеграции должно пройти через чек-лист релиза, включая регрессионные тесты и проверку отката, до утверждения в продакшене.
usageTranslations.ja: すべての統合デプロイは、本番承認前に回帰テストとロールバック検証を含むリリースチェックリストに合格しなければなりません。
usageTranslations.it: Ogni distribuzione di integrazione deve superare la checklist di rilascio, compresi i test di regressione e la verifica del rollback, prima dell'approvazione in produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Mỗi lần triển khai tích hợp phải vượt qua danh sách kiểm tra phát hành, bao gồm kiểm tra hồi quy và xác minh hoàn tác, trước khi được phê duyệt sản xuất.
usageTranslations.hi: हर एकीकरण परिनियोजन को उत्पादन स्वीकृति से पहले, रिग्रेशन परीक्षण और रोलबैक सत्यापन सहित, रिलीज़ चेकलिस्ट पास करनी होगी।
usageTranslations.th: การปรับใช้การผสานรวมทุกครั้งต้องผ่านรายการตรวจสอบก่อนเปิดตัว รวมถึงการทดสอบรีเกรสชันและการตรวจสอบการย้อนกลับก่อนการอนุมัติใช้งานในระบบโปรดักชัน
usageTranslations.id: Setiap penerapan integrasi harus lulus daftar periksa rilis, termasuk pengujian regresi dan verifikasi rollback, sebelum disetujui untuk produksi.

terms.definition: A software platform that automates, manages, and tracks multi-step integration, orchestration, and operational processes across IT environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The workflow engine coordinates integration tasks, approvals, and event triggers to ensure reliable process automation.

termTranslations.ja: ワークフローエンジン
termTranslations.vi: Công cụ quy trình làm việc
termTranslations.th: เอนจินเวิร์กโฟลว์

usageTranslations.en: The workflow engine coordinates integration tasks, approvals, and event triggers to ensure reliable process automation.
usageTranslations.tr: İş akışı motoru, entegrasyon görevlerini, onayları ve olay tetikleyicilerini koordine ederek güvenilir süreç otomasyonu sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le moteur de workflow coordonne les tâches d'intégration, les validations et les déclencheurs d'événements pour assurer l'automatisation fiable des processus.
usageTranslations.de: Die Workflow-Engine koordiniert Integrationsaufgaben, Freigaben und Ereignisauslöser für eine zuverlässige Prozessautomatisierung.
usageTranslations.es: El motor de flujo de trabajo coordina tareas de integración, aprobaciones y disparadores de eventos para garantizar una automatización confiable de procesos.
usageTranslations.zh: 工作流引擎协调集成任务、审批和事件触发，确保流程自动化的可靠性。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم محرك سير العمل بتنسيق مهام التكامل والموافقات ومشغلات الأحداث لضمان أتمتة العمليات بشكل موثوق.
usageTranslations.pt: O motor de fluxo de trabalho coordena tarefas de integração, aprovações e gatilhos de eventos para garantir a automação confiável de processos.
usageTranslations.ru: Движок рабочих процессов координирует интеграционные задачи, утверждения и события для обеспечения надежной автоматизации процессов.
usageTranslations.ja: ワークフローエンジンは、統合タスク、承認、およびイベントトリガーを調整して、信頼性の高いプロセス自動化を実現します。
usageTranslations.it: Il motore di workflow coordina attività di integrazione, approvazioni e trigger di eventi per garantire l'automazione affidabile dei processi.
usageTranslations.vi: Công cụ quy trình làm việc phối hợp các nhiệm vụ tích hợp, phê duyệt và kích hoạt sự kiện để đảm bảo tự động hóa quy trình đáng tin cậy.
usageTranslations.hi: वर्कफ़्लो इंजन एकीकरण कार्यों, अनुमोदनों और इवेंट ट्रिगर्स को समन्वित करता है ताकि विश्वसनीय प्रक्रिया स्वचालन सुनिश्चित हो सके।
usageTranslations.th: เอนจินเวิร์กโฟลว์ประสานงานงานผสานรวม การอนุมัติ และทริกเกอร์เหตุการณ์ เพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าการทำงานอัตโนมัติของกระบวนการมีความน่าเชื่อถือ
usageTranslations.id: Mesin alur kerja mengoordinasikan tugas integrasi, persetujuan, dan pemicu peristiwa untuk memastikan otomasi proses yang andal.

terms.definition: A managed platform that provides all necessary resources, configurations, and services for integrated applications to execute as designed.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The integration requires a specific runtime environment with configured libraries, network access, and security policies.

termTranslations.th: สภาพแวดล้อมรันไทม์

usageTranslations.en: The integration requires a specific runtime environment with configured libraries, network access, and security policies.
usageTranslations.tr: Entegrasyon, yapılandırılmış kütüphaneler, ağ erişimi ve güvenlik politikaları olan belirli bir çalışma zamanı ortamı gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: L'intégration nécessite un environnement d'exécution spécifique avec des bibliothèques configurées, un accès réseau et des politiques de sécurité.
usageTranslations.de: Die Integration erfordert eine bestimmte Laufzeitumgebung mit konfigurierten Bibliotheken, Netzwerkzugang und Sicherheitsrichtlinien.
usageTranslations.es: La integración requiere un entorno de ejecución específico con bibliotecas configuradas, acceso a la red y políticas de seguridad.
usageTranslations.zh: 该集成需要特定的运行环境，包括配置好的库、网络访问和安全策略。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب التكامل بيئة تشغيل محددة مع مكتبات مكونة والوصول إلى الشبكة وسياسات الأمان.
usageTranslations.pt: A integração requer um ambiente de execução específico com bibliotecas configuradas, acesso à rede e políticas de segurança.
usageTranslations.ru: Интеграция требует определённой исполняющей среды с настроенными библиотеками, сетевым доступом и политиками безопасности.
usageTranslations.ja: 統合には、構成済みのライブラリ、ネットワークアクセス、およびセキュリティポリシーを備えた特定のランタイム環境が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: L'integrazione richiede un ambiente di runtime specifico con librerie configurate, accesso alla rete e politiche di sicurezza.
usageTranslations.vi: Tích hợp yêu cầu một môi trường thời gian chạy cụ thể với các thư viện được cấu hình, quyền truy cập mạng và chính sách bảo mật.
usageTranslations.hi: इंटीग्रेशन के लिए कॉन्फ़िगर की गई लाइब्रेरी, नेटवर्क एक्सेस और सुरक्षा नीतियों सहित विशिष्ट रनटाइम पर्यावरण आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: การผสานรวมต้องการสภาพแวดล้อมรันไทม์เฉพาะที่มีไลบรารีที่กำหนดค่าไว้ การเข้าถึงเครือข่าย และนโยบายความปลอดภัย
usageTranslations.id: Integrasi membutuhkan lingkungan runtime khusus dengan pustaka yang dikonfigurasi, akses jaringan, dan kebijakan keamanan.

terms.definition: A dedicated infrastructure layer that manages service-to-service communications, security, and observability in distributed integration architectures.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The service mesh provides integrated observability, secure routing, and policy enforcement between microservices.

termTranslations.th: เซอร์วิสเมช

usageTranslations.en: The service mesh provides integrated observability, secure routing, and policy enforcement between microservices.
usageTranslations.tr: Servis mesh, mikroservisler arasında entegre gözlemlenebilirlik, güvenli yönlendirme ve politika uygulaması sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le service mesh fournit une observabilité intégrée, un routage sécurisé et l'application des politiques entre les microservices.
usageTranslations.de: Das Service Mesh bietet integrierte Beobachtbarkeit, sichere Weiterleitung und Durchsetzung von Richtlinien zwischen Microservices.
usageTranslations.es: La malla de servicios proporciona observabilidad integrada, enrutamiento seguro y aplicación de políticas entre microservicios.
usageTranslations.zh: 服务网格为微服务之间提供集成可观测性、安全路由和策略执行。
usageTranslations.ar: توفر شبكة الخدمة إمكانية المراقبة المتكاملة والتوجيه الآمن وتطبيق السياسات بين الخدمات الصغيرة.
usageTranslations.pt: A malha de serviço fornece observabilidade integrada, roteamento seguro e aplicação de políticas entre microsserviços.
usageTranslations.ru: Сервисная сетка обеспечивает интегрируемую наблюдаемость, безопасную маршрутизацию и применение политик между микросервисами.
usageTranslations.ja: サービスメッシュは、マイクロサービス間で統合された可観測性、安全なルーティング、およびポリシーの適用を提供します。
usageTranslations.it: Il service mesh fornisce osservabilità integrata, routing sicuro e applicazione delle policy tra microservizi.
usageTranslations.vi: Lưới dịch vụ cung cấp khả năng quan sát tích hợp, định tuyến an toàn và thực thi chính sách giữa các dịch vụ vi mô.
usageTranslations.hi: सर्विस मेष माइक्रोसर्विसेस के बीच एकीकृत प्रेक्षणीयता, सुरक्षित राउटिंग और नीति प्रवर्तन प्रदान करता है।
usageTranslations.th: เซอร์วิสเมชให้การสังเกตการณ์ที่บูรณาการ การกำหนดเส้นทางที่ปลอดภัย และการบังคับใช้นโยบายระหว่างไมโครเซอร์วิส
usageTranslations.id: Service mesh menyediakan observabilitas terintegrasi, perutean aman, dan penegakan kebijakan di antara layanan mikro.

terms.definition: A network-accessible URL, address, or interface through which integration components, applications, or users access a specific service or API.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The service endpoint URL is required to establish a secure API connection for data exchange between systems.

termTranslations.ja: サービスエンドポイント
termTranslations.th: จุดสิ้นสุดของบริการ

usageTranslations.en: The service endpoint URL is required to establish a secure API connection for data exchange between systems.
usageTranslations.tr: Sistemler arasında veri alışverişi için güvenli bir API bağlantısı kurmak amacıyla servis uç noktası URL'si gereklidir.
usageTranslations.fr: L'URL du point de terminaison de service est requise pour établir une connexion API sécurisée pour l'échange de données entre les systèmes.
usageTranslations.de: Die Service-Endpunkt-URL ist erforderlich, um eine sichere API-Verbindung für den Datenaustausch zwischen Systemen herzustellen.
usageTranslations.es: Se requiere la URL del punto final de servicio para establecer una conexión API segura para el intercambio de datos entre sistemas.
usageTranslations.zh: 需要服务端点URL来建立系统间数据交换的安全API连接。
usageTranslations.ar: مطلوب عنوان URL لنقطة نهاية الخدمة لإنشاء اتصال API آمن لتبادل البيانات بين الأنظمة.
usageTranslations.pt: O URL do endpoint de serviço é necessário para estabelecer uma conexão API segura para troca de dados entre sistemas.
usageTranslations.ru: URL сервисной точки доступа необходим для установления безопасного API-соединения для обмена данными между системами.
usageTranslations.ja: システム間のデータ交換のために安全なAPI接続を確立するには、サービスエンドポイントURLが必要です。
usageTranslations.it: L'URL dell'endpoint di servizio è necessario per stabilire una connessione API sicura per lo scambio di dati tra sistemi.
usageTranslations.vi: URL điểm cuối dịch vụ cần thiết để thiết lập kết nối API an toàn cho trao đổi dữ liệu giữa các hệ thống.
usageTranslations.hi: सिस्टम्स के बीच डेटा एक्सचेंज के लिए एक सुरक्षित API कनेक्शन स्थापित करने हेतु सर्विस एंडपॉइंट URL आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องใช้ URL จุดสิ้นสุดของบริการเพื่อสร้างการเชื่อมต่อ API ที่ปลอดภัยสำหรับการแลกเปลี่ยนข้อมูลระหว่างระบบ
usageTranslations.id: URL endpoint layanan diperlukan untuk membangun koneksi API yang aman untuk pertukaran data antar sistem.

terms.definition: A mandatory automated process that validates the integrity and functionality of an integration build before it is promoted or released.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Build verification tests ensure that every integration artifact passes functional and regression checks before deployment.

termTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบการสร้าง

usageTranslations.en: Build verification tests ensure that every integration artifact passes functional and regression checks before deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Yapı doğrulama testleri, her entegrasyon öğesinin dağıtımdan önce fonksiyonel ve regresyon kontrollerinden geçtiğini garanti eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Les tests de vérification de build garantissent que chaque artefact d'intégration réussit les contrôles fonctionnels et de régression avant le déploiement.
usageTranslations.de: Build-Verifizierungstests stellen sicher, dass jedes Integrationsartefakt vor der Bereitstellung Funktions- und Regressionstests besteht.
usageTranslations.es: Las pruebas de verificación de compilación aseguran que cada artefacto de integración pase los controles funcionales y de regresión antes del despliegue.
usageTranslations.zh: 构建验证测试确保每个集成工件在部署前通过功能和回归检查。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن اختبارات التحقق من البناء أن كل عنصر تكامل يجتاز الفحوصات الوظيفية والانحدارية قبل النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Os testes de verificação de build garantem que cada artefato de integração passe nas verificações funcionais e de regressão antes da implantação.
usageTranslations.ru: Тесты проверки сборки гарантируют, что каждый интеграционный артефакт проходит функциональные и регрессионные проверки перед развертыванием.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルド検証テストは、すべての統合アーティファクトがデプロイ前に機能とリグレッションチェックを通過することを保証します。
usageTranslations.it: I test di verifica della build assicurano che ogni artefatto di integrazione superi i controlli funzionali e di regressione prima della distribuzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Các bài kiểm tra xác minh bản dựng đảm bảo mọi hiện vật tích hợp đều vượt qua kiểm tra chức năng và hồi quy trước khi triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: बिल्ड सत्यापन परीक्षण यह सुनिश्चित करते हैं कि प्रत्येक एकीकरण आर्टिफैक्ट परिनियोजन से पहले कार्यात्मक और रिग्रेशन जांचों से गुजरे।
usageTranslations.th: การทดสอบการตรวจสอบการสร้างทำให้มั่นใจว่าอาร์ติแฟกต์การผสานรวมทุกชิ้นผ่านการตรวจสอบการทำงานและการถอยกลับก่อนการปรับใช้
usageTranslations.id: Pengujian verifikasi build memastikan setiap artefak integrasi lulus pemeriksaan fungsional dan regresi sebelum penerapan.

terms.definition: The authorized advancement of a tested integration build artifact to a higher environment (e.g., staging, production) after passing required validations.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Artifact promotion requires that the integration build passes all automated checks before being moved to the production repository.

termTranslations.ja: アーティファクトプロモーション
termTranslations.th: การโปรโมตอาร์ติแฟกต์

usageTranslations.en: Artifact promotion requires that the integration build passes all automated checks before being moved to the production repository.
usageTranslations.tr: Eser terfisi, entegrasyon yapısının üretim deposuna taşınmadan önce tüm otomatik kontrollerden geçmesini gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: La promotion d'artefact exige que le build d'intégration réussisse tous les contrôles automatisés avant d'être déplacé dans le référentiel de production.
usageTranslations.de: Die Artefakt-Beförderung erfordert, dass der Integrations-Build alle automatisierten Prüfungen besteht, bevor er in das Produktions-Repository verschoben wird.
usageTranslations.es: La promoción de artefactos requiere que la compilación de integración pase todas las comprobaciones automáticas antes de moverse al repositorio de producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 构件提升要求集成构建在移动到生产库之前通过所有自动检查。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب ترقية الأداة أن يجتاز بناء التكامل جميع الفحوصات الآلية قبل نقله إلى مستودع الإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: A promoção de artefato exige que a build de integração passe por todas as verificações automatizadas antes de ser movida para o repositório de produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Продвижение артефакта требует, чтобы интеграционная сборка прошла все автоматизированные проверки перед перемещением в производственный репозиторий.
usageTranslations.ja: アーティファクトプロモーションでは、統合ビルドが本番リポジトリに移動される前にすべての自動チェックに合格する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: La promozione dell'artefatto richiede che la build di integrazione superi tutti i controlli automatizzati prima di essere spostata nel repository di produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Thăng tiến hiện vật yêu cầu bản dựng tích hợp vượt qua mọi kiểm tra tự động trước khi được chuyển sang kho sản xuất.
usageTranslations.hi: आर्टिफैक्ट प्रमोशन के लिए आवश्यक है कि एकीकरण बिल्ड को उत्पादन रिपॉजिटरी में ले जाने से पहले सभी स्वचालित जांचों से गुजारा जाए।
usageTranslations.th: การโปรโมตอาร์ติแฟกต์ต้องผ่านการตรวจสอบอัตโนมัติทั้งหมดก่อนที่จะถูกย้ายไปยังคลังข้อมูลโปรดักชัน
usageTranslations.id: Promosi artefak mensyaratkan build integrasi melewati semua pemeriksaan otomatis sebelum dipindahkan ke repositori produksi.

terms.definition: A tool or service that tracks, visualizes, and reports on the status, progress, and outcomes of integration deployments in real time.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The deployment monitor provides live dashboards that display deployment status and any detected integration failures.

termTranslations.ja: デプロイメントモニター
termTranslations.th: ตัวตรวจสอบการปรับใช้

usageTranslations.en: The deployment monitor provides live dashboards that display deployment status and any detected integration failures.
usageTranslations.tr: Dağıtım izleyici, dağıtım durumunu ve tespit edilen entegrasyon hatalarını gösteren canlı paneller sunar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le moniteur de déploiement fournit des tableaux de bord en direct affichant le statut du déploiement et toute défaillance d'intégration détectée.
usageTranslations.de: Der Bereitstellungsmonitor bietet Live-Dashboards, die den Bereitstellungsstatus und erkannte Integrationsfehler anzeigen.
usageTranslations.es: El monitor de implementación proporciona paneles en vivo que muestran el estado de la implementación y cualquier fallo de integración detectado.
usageTranslations.zh: 部署监控提供实时仪表板，显示部署状态和检测到的集成故障。
usageTranslations.ar: يوفر مراقب النشر لوحات معلومات مباشرة تعرض حالة النشر وأي أعطال تكامل تم اكتشافها.
usageTranslations.pt: O monitor de implantação fornece painéis ao vivo que exibem o status da implantação e quaisquer falhas de integração detectadas.
usageTranslations.ru: Мониторинг развертывания предоставляет живые панели, отображающие статус развертывания и любые обнаруженные интеграционные сбои.
usageTranslations.ja: デプロイメントモニターは、デプロイ状況や検出された統合障害を表示するライブダッシュボードを提供します。
usageTranslations.it: Il monitoraggio delle distribuzioni offre dashboard in tempo reale che mostrano lo stato della distribuzione e eventuali errori di integrazione rilevati.
usageTranslations.vi: Giám sát triển khai cung cấp bảng điều khiển trực tiếp hiển thị trạng thái triển khai và mọi lỗi tích hợp được phát hiện.
usageTranslations.hi: परिनियोजन मॉनिटर लाइव डैशबोर्ड प्रदान करता है जो परिनियोजन स्थिति और पता की गई एकीकरण विफलताओं को दिखाता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวตรวจสอบการปรับใช้มีแดชบอร์ดสดที่แสดงสถานะการปรับใช้และข้อผิดพลาดในการผสานรวมที่ตรวจพบ
usageTranslations.id: Monitor penerapan menyediakan dasbor langsung yang menampilkan status penerapan dan setiap kegagalan integrasi yang terdeteksi.

terms.definition: A structured, ITIL-compliant process for identifying, logging, prioritizing, and resolving integration or system outages and operational disruptions.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Incident management procedures require logging every integration failure and escalating critical outages to the on-call team.

termTranslations.th: การจัดการเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: Incident management procedures require logging every integration failure and escalating critical outages to the on-call team.
usageTranslations.tr: Olay yönetimi prosedürleri, her entegrasyon hatasının kaydedilmesini ve kritik kesintilerin nöbetçi ekibe iletilmesini gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les procédures de gestion des incidents exigent l'enregistrement de chaque échec d'intégration et l'escalade des pannes critiques à l'équipe de garde.
usageTranslations.de: Incident-Management-Verfahren erfordern die Protokollierung jedes Integrationsfehlers und die Eskalation kritischer Ausfälle an das Bereitschaftsteam.
usageTranslations.es: Los procedimientos de gestión de incidentes requieren registrar cada fallo de integración y escalar las interrupciones críticas al equipo de guardia.
usageTranslations.zh: 事件管理流程要求记录每次集成失败，并将严重中断升级到值班团队。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب إجراءات إدارة الحوادث تسجيل كل فشل في التكامل وتصعيد الانقطاعات الحرجة إلى الفريق المناوب.
usageTranslations.pt: Os procedimentos de gestão de incidentes exigem o registro de todas as falhas de integração e o escalonamento das interrupções críticas para a equipe de plantão.
usageTranslations.ru: Процедуры управления инцидентами требуют регистрации каждого сбоя интеграции и эскалации критических отказов дежурной команде.
usageTranslations.ja: インシデント管理手順は、すべての統合失敗を記録し、重大な障害をオンコールチームにエスカレーションすることを求めます。
usageTranslations.it: Le procedure di gestione degli incidenti richiedono la registrazione di ogni errore di integrazione e l'escalation delle interruzioni critiche al team di reperibilità.
usageTranslations.vi: Quy trình quản lý sự cố yêu cầu ghi lại mọi sự cố tích hợp và chuyển các sự cố nghiêm trọng cho nhóm trực.
usageTranslations.hi: घटना प्रबंधन प्रक्रियाओं में प्रत्येक एकीकरण विफलता का लॉग रखना और गंभीर आउटेज को ऑन-कॉल टीम तक बढ़ाना आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ขั้นตอนการจัดการเหตุการณ์ต้องบันทึกความล้มเหลวในการผสานรวมทุกครั้งและส่งต่อเหตุขัดข้องสำคัญไปยังทีมที่ปฏิบัติหน้าที่
usageTranslations.id: Prosedur manajemen insiden memerlukan pencatatan setiap kegagalan integrasi dan mengeskalasi gangguan kritis ke tim siaga.

terms.definition: An ongoing process of collecting, analyzing, and acting upon real-time integration and deployment data to improve system performance and user experience.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Continuous feedback loops provide teams with actionable insights from integration monitoring and user reports after each release.

termTranslations.ja: 継続的なフィードバック
termTranslations.th: ข้อเสนอแนะอย่างต่อเนื่อง

usageTranslations.en: Continuous feedback loops provide teams with actionable insights from integration monitoring and user reports after each release.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürekli geri bildirim döngüleri, her sürümden sonra entegrasyon izleme ve kullanıcı raporlarından eyleme dönüştürülebilir içgörüler sunar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les boucles de retour continu offrent aux équipes des informations exploitables issues de la surveillance de l'intégration et des rapports utilisateurs après chaque version.
usageTranslations.de: Kontinuierliche Feedbackschleifen liefern Teams umsetzbare Erkenntnisse aus Integrationsüberwachung und Benutzerberichten nach jeder Freigabe.
usageTranslations.es: Los bucles de retroalimentación continua proporcionan a los equipos conocimientos procesables de la monitorización de la integración y los informes de usuarios después de cada lanzamiento.
usageTranslations.zh: 持续反馈循环为团队在每次发布后通过集成监控和用户报告提供可操作的见解。
usageTranslations.ar: توفر حلقات التعليقات المستمرة للفرق رؤى قابلة للتنفيذ من مراقبة التكامل وتقارير المستخدمين بعد كل إصدار.
usageTranslations.pt: Loops de feedback contínuo fornecem às equipes insights acionáveis do monitoramento de integração e relatórios de usuários após cada lançamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Непрерывные петли обратной связи предоставляют командам полезные выводы из мониторинга интеграции и отчетов пользователей после каждого релиза.
usageTranslations.ja: 継続的なフィードバックループは、各リリース後に統合監視とユーザー報告から実用的な洞察をチームに提供します。
usageTranslations.it: I cicli di feedback continuo offrono ai team informazioni utili dal monitoraggio dell'integrazione e dai report degli utenti dopo ogni rilascio.
usageTranslations.vi: Vòng phản hồi liên tục cung cấp cho nhóm các thông tin hữu ích từ việc giám sát tích hợp và báo cáo người dùng sau mỗi lần phát hành.
usageTranslations.hi: निरंतर फीडबैक लूप्स प्रत्येक रिलीज़ के बाद टीमों को इंटीग्रेशन मॉनिटरिंग और यूज़र रिपोर्ट से उपयोगी इनसाइट्स प्रदान करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: วงจรข้อเสนอแนะอย่างต่อเนื่องช่วยให้ทีมมีข้อมูลเชิงลึกที่นำไปใช้ได้จากการตรวจสอบการผสานรวมและรายงานของผู้ใช้หลังการเปิดตัวแต่ละครั้ง
usageTranslations.id: Siklus umpan balik berkelanjutan memberikan tim wawasan yang dapat ditindaklanjuti dari pemantauan integrasi dan laporan pengguna setelah setiap rilis.

terms.definition: The underlying technical or process issue that directly leads to an integration or operational incident, as determined by structured analysis.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Root cause analysis identified a misconfigured service endpoint as the source of recurring integration failures.

termTranslations.th: สาเหตุราก

usageTranslations.en: Root cause analysis identified a misconfigured service endpoint as the source of recurring integration failures.
usageTranslations.tr: Kök neden analizi, yinelenen entegrasyon hatalarının kaynağı olarak yanlış yapılandırılmış bir servis uç noktasını belirledi.
usageTranslations.fr: L'analyse de la cause racine a identifié un point de terminaison de service mal configuré comme source des échecs d'intégration récurrents.
usageTranslations.de: Die Ursachenanalyse identifizierte einen falsch konfigurierten Service-Endpunkt als Quelle wiederkehrender Integrationsfehler.
usageTranslations.es: El análisis de la causa raíz identificó un punto final de servicio mal configurado como la fuente de fallos recurrentes de integración.
usageTranslations.zh: 根本原因分析确定一个配置错误的服务端点是反复出现的集成故障的根源。
usageTranslations.ar: حددت تحليلات السبب الجذري نقطة نهاية خدمة تم تكوينها بشكل غير صحيح كمصدر لإخفاقات التكامل المتكررة.
usageTranslations.pt: A análise da causa raiz identificou um endpoint de serviço configurado incorretamente como a fonte das falhas recorrentes de integração.
usageTranslations.ru: Анализ корневой причины выявил некорректно настроенную сервисную точку доступа как источник повторяющихся сбоев интеграции.
usageTranslations.ja: 根本原因分析により、繰り返し発生する統合障害の原因が誤設定されたサービスエンドポイントであることが判明しました。
usageTranslations.it: L'analisi della causa principale ha identificato un endpoint di servizio mal configurato come causa dei ricorrenti errori di integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Phân tích nguyên nhân gốc rễ xác định một điểm cuối dịch vụ cấu hình sai là nguyên nhân gây ra các sự cố tích hợp lặp lại.
usageTranslations.hi: मूल कारण विश्लेषण ने बार-बार होने वाली इंटीग्रेशन विफलताओं के स्रोत के रूप में गलत कॉन्फ़िगर किए गए सर्विस एंडपॉइंट की पहचान की।
usageTranslations.th: การวิเคราะห์สาเหตุรากพบว่าจุดสิ้นสุดของบริการที่กำหนดค่าผิดเป็นสาเหตุของข้อผิดพลาดในการผสานรวมที่เกิดซ้ำ
usageTranslations.id: Analisis akar penyebab mengidentifikasi endpoint layanan yang salah konfigurasi sebagai sumber kegagalan integrasi yang berulang.

terms.definition: The process of identifying, aggregating, and assigning cloud spend to specific business units, projects, or cost centers, using metadata like resource tags or accounts, as defined by FinOps and cloud billing documentation.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Cost allocation allows organizations to track and optimize cloud spend by mapping costs to teams or projects.

termTranslations.th: การจัดสรรต้นทุน

usageTranslations.en: Cost allocation allows organizations to track and optimize cloud spend by mapping costs to teams or projects.
usageTranslations.tr: Maliyet dağılımı, maliyetlerin ekiplere veya projelere eşlenmesiyle bulut harcamalarının izlenmesini ve optimize edilmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La répartition des coûts permet aux organisations de suivre et d’optimiser les dépenses cloud en affectant les coûts aux équipes ou projets.
usageTranslations.de: Kostenzuweisung ermöglicht es Organisationen, Cloud-Ausgaben zu verfolgen und zu optimieren, indem Kosten Teams oder Projekten zugeordnet werden.
usageTranslations.es: La asignación de costos permite a las organizaciones rastrear y optimizar el gasto en la nube asignando los costos a equipos o proyectos.
usageTranslations.zh: 成本分配通过将成本映射到团队或项目，使组织能够跟踪和优化云支出。
usageTranslations.ar: يتيح تخصيص التكاليف للمؤسسات تتبع وتحسين إنفاق السحابة من خلال ربط التكاليف بالفرق أو المشاريع.
usageTranslations.pt: A alocação de custos permite que as organizações rastreiem e otimizem os gastos em nuvem mapeando custos para equipes ou projetos.
usageTranslations.ru: Распределение затрат позволяет организациям отслеживать и оптимизировать расходы на облако, сопоставляя затраты с командами или проектами.
usageTranslations.ja: コスト配分により、組織はコストをチームやプロジェクトに紐付けてクラウド支出を追跡・最適化できる。
