terms.usage: Automated change rollback in GitOps workflows restores the previous infrastructure state when a deployment fails policy checks.

termTranslations.th: ย้อนกลับการเปลี่ยนแปลง

usageTranslations.en: Automated change rollback in GitOps workflows restores the previous infrastructure state when a deployment fails policy checks.
usageTranslations.tr: GitOps iş akışlarında otomatik değişiklik geri alma, bir dağıtımın politika kontrollerinden geçememesi durumunda önceki altyapı durumunu geri yükler.
usageTranslations.fr: La rétrogradation automatisée des changements dans les workflows GitOps restaure l'état précédent de l'infrastructure lorsqu'un déploiement échoue aux contrôles de politique.
usageTranslations.de: Automatisches Änderungs-Rollback in GitOps-Workflows stellt den vorherigen Infrastrukturzustand wieder her, wenn ein Deployment bei den Richtlinienprüfungen fehlschlägt.
usageTranslations.es: La reversión automatizada de cambios en los flujos de trabajo GitOps restaura el estado anterior de la infraestructura cuando una implementación falla en las verificaciones de políticas.
usageTranslations.zh: 在 GitOps 工作流中自动更改回滚会在部署未通过策略检查时恢复到之前的基础设施状态。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم التراجع الآلي للتغيير في تدفقات عمل GitOps باستعادة حالة البنية التحتية السابقة عندما يفشل النشر في اختبارات السياسة.
usageTranslations.pt: A reversão automatizada de alterações em fluxos de trabalho GitOps restaura o estado anterior da infraestrutura quando uma implantação falha nas verificações de política.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматический откат изменений в рабочих процессах GitOps восстанавливает прежнее состояние инфраструктуры, если развертывание не проходит проверки политики.
usageTranslations.ja: GitOpsワークフローの自動変更ロールバックは、デプロイメントがポリシーチェックに失敗した場合に以前のインフラ状態を復元します。
usageTranslations.it: Il rollback automatico delle modifiche nei workflow GitOps ripristina lo stato precedente dell'infrastruttura quando una distribuzione non supera i controlli delle policy.
usageTranslations.vi: Hoàn tác thay đổi tự động trong quy trình GitOps khôi phục trạng thái hạ tầng trước đó khi triển khai không vượt qua kiểm tra chính sách.
usageTranslations.hi: GitOps वर्कफ़्लो में स्वचालित परिवर्तन रोलबैक, जब डिप्लॉयमेंट नीति जांच में विफल होता है, तब पिछले इन्फ्रास्ट्रक्चर स्थिति को पुनर्स्थापित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การย้อนกลับการเปลี่ยนแปลงแบบอัตโนมัติในเวิร์กโฟลว์ GitOps จะคืนค่าสถานะโครงสร้างพื้นฐานก่อนหน้าหากการปรับใช้ไม่ผ่านการตรวจสอบนโยบาย
usageTranslations.id: Rollback perubahan otomatis dalam workflow GitOps mengembalikan status infrastruktur sebelumnya saat deployment gagal dalam pemeriksaan kebijakan.

terms.definition: A physical or virtual machine within a container orchestration cluster, responsible for running containerized workloads and managed as part of a distributed platform.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Each cluster node is managed by the orchestration layer to ensure consistent deployment and resource utilization.

termTranslations.th: โหนดคลัสเตอร์

usageTranslations.en: Each cluster node is managed by the orchestration layer to ensure consistent deployment and resource utilization.
usageTranslations.tr: Her küme düğümü, tutarlı dağıtım ve kaynak kullanımı sağlamak için orkestrasyon katmanı tarafından yönetilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Chaque nœud de cluster est géré par la couche d'orchestration pour garantir un déploiement cohérent et l'utilisation des ressources.
usageTranslations.de: Jeder Cluster-Knoten wird von der Orchestrierungsschicht verwaltet, um eine konsistente Bereitstellung und Ressourcennutzung sicherzustellen.
usageTranslations.es: Cada nodo de clúster es gestionado por la capa de orquestación para asegurar un despliegue consistente y utilización de recursos.
usageTranslations.zh: 每个集群节点由编排层管理，以确保一致的部署和资源利用。
usageTranslations.ar: تتم إدارة كل عقدة عنقودية بواسطة طبقة الأوركسترا لضمان النشر والاستخدام المتسق للموارد.
usageTranslations.pt: Cada nó de cluster é gerenciado pela camada de orquestração para garantir implantação e uso consistente de recursos.
usageTranslations.ru: Каждый узел кластера управляется слоем оркестрации для обеспечения согласованного развертывания и использования ресурсов.
usageTranslations.ja: 各クラスタノードはオーケストレーション層によって管理され、一貫したデプロイとリソース利用を確保します。
usageTranslations.it: Ogni nodo del cluster è gestito dal livello di orchestrazione per garantire un deployment coerente e l'utilizzo delle risorse.
usageTranslations.vi: Mỗi nút cụm được quản lý bởi lớp điều phối để đảm bảo triển khai và sử dụng tài nguyên nhất quán.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रत्येक क्लस्टर नोड को ऑर्केस्ट्रेशन लेयर द्वारा प्रबंधित किया जाता है ताकि लगातार परिनियोजन और संसाधनों का उपयोग सुनिश्चित किया जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: โหนดคลัสเตอร์แต่ละโหนดได้รับการจัดการโดยชั้นการออร์เคสตราเพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าการปรับใช้และการใช้ทรัพยากรเป็นไปอย่างสม่ำเสมอ
usageTranslations.id: Setiap node klaster dikelola oleh lapisan orkestrasi untuk memastikan penyebaran dan pemanfaatan sumber daya yang konsisten.

terms.definition: The automated process by which an orchestration system assigns pods to available nodes, optimizing for workload distribution, resource constraints, and policy compliance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pod scheduling determines which node runs each pod based on current resource usage and defined policies.

termTranslations.ja: ポッドスケジューリング
termTranslations.th: การจัดตาราง Pod

usageTranslations.en: Pod scheduling determines which node runs each pod based on current resource usage and defined policies.
usageTranslations.tr: Pod zamanlaması, mevcut kaynak kullanımı ve tanımlı politikalara göre her pod'u hangi düğümün çalıştıracağını belirler.
usageTranslations.fr: L'ordonnancement des pods détermine quel nœud exécute chaque pod selon l'utilisation des ressources et les politiques définies.
usageTranslations.de: Das Pod-Scheduling bestimmt, welcher Knoten welche Pods ausführt, basierend auf aktueller Ressourcennutzung und festgelegten Richtlinien.
usageTranslations.es: La programación de pods determina qué nodo ejecuta cada pod en función del uso de recursos y las políticas definidas.
usageTranslations.zh: Pod调度根据当前资源使用情况和已定义策略决定每个Pod由哪个节点运行。
usageTranslations.ar: تحدد جدولة البودات أي عقدة تقوم بتشغيل كل بود بناءً على استخدام الموارد الحالي والسياسات المحددة.
usageTranslations.pt: O agendamento de pod determina qual nó executa cada pod com base no uso atual de recursos e nas políticas definidas.
usageTranslations.ru: Планирование Pod определяет, какой узел запускает каждый Pod на основе текущего использования ресурсов и заданных политик.
usageTranslations.ja: ポッドスケジューリングは、現在のリソース使用状況や定義済みのポリシーに基づいて各ポッドを実行するノードを決定します。
usageTranslations.it: Lo scheduling dei pod determina quale nodo esegue ogni pod in base all'utilizzo delle risorse e alle policy definite.
usageTranslations.vi: Lập lịch Pod xác định nút nào chạy từng pod dựa trên sử dụng tài nguyên hiện tại và các chính sách đã định.
usageTranslations.hi: पॉड अनुसूची यह निर्धारित करती है कि वर्तमान संसाधन उपयोग और परिभाषित नीतियों के आधार पर कौन सा नोड प्रत्येक पॉड चलाएगा।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดตาราง Pod จะกำหนดว่าโหนดใดจะรันแต่ละ Pod ตามการใช้ทรัพยากรปัจจุบันและนโยบายที่กำหนดไว้
usageTranslations.id: Penjadwalan pod menentukan node mana yang menjalankan setiap pod berdasarkan penggunaan sumber daya saat ini dan kebijakan yang ditetapkan.

terms.definition: The software component that executes containers, managing lifecycle operations such as image pull, start, stop, and resource isolation per runtime standards.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Docker and containerd are popular container runtimes supported in most enterprise Kubernetes environments.

termTranslations.th: รันไทม์คอนเทนเนอร์

usageTranslations.en: Docker and containerd are popular container runtimes supported in most enterprise Kubernetes environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Docker ve containerd, çoğu kurumsal Kubernetes ortamında desteklenen popüler konteyner çalışma zamanı yazılımlarıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Docker et containerd sont des environnements d’exécution de conteneur populaires pris en charge dans la plupart des environnements Kubernetes d'entreprise.
usageTranslations.de: Docker und containerd sind beliebte Container-Laufzeitumgebungen, die in den meisten Unternehmens-Kubernetes-Umgebungen unterstützt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Docker y containerd son tiempos de ejecución de contenedores populares compatibles con la mayoría de los entornos Kubernetes empresariales.
usageTranslations.zh: Docker和containerd是大多数企业Kubernetes环境中支持的流行容器运行时。
usageTranslations.ar: Docker و containerd هما أكثر أوقات تشغيل الحاويات شيوعًا المدعومة في معظم بيئات Kubernetes المؤسسية.
usageTranslations.pt: Docker e containerd são runtimes de container populares suportados na maioria dos ambientes corporativos Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ru: Docker и containerd — популярные среды выполнения контейнеров, поддерживаемые в большинстве корпоративных сред Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ja: Dockerとcontainerdは、ほとんどのエンタープライズKubernetes環境でサポートされている一般的なコンテナランタイムです。
usageTranslations.it: Docker e containerd sono runtime di container popolari supportati nella maggior parte degli ambienti Kubernetes aziendali.
usageTranslations.vi: Docker và containerd là runtime container phổ biến được hỗ trợ trong hầu hết môi trường Kubernetes doanh nghiệp.
usageTranslations.hi: Docker और containerd अधिकांश एंटरप्राइज Kubernetes वातावरण में समर्थित लोकप्रिय कंटेनर रनटाइम हैं।
usageTranslations.th: Docker และ containerd เป็นรันไทม์คอนเทนเนอร์ที่ได้รับความนิยมและรองรับในสภาพแวดล้อม Kubernetes ระดับองค์กรส่วนใหญ่
usageTranslations.id: Docker dan containerd adalah runtime kontainer populer yang didukung di sebagian besar lingkungan Kubernetes perusahaan.

terms.definition: An infrastructure layer for managing service-to-service communication, providing observability, security, and control in microservices architectures.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Service mesh platforms like Istio enable fine-grained traffic management and service observability.

termTranslations.th: เซอร์วิสเมช

usageTranslations.en: Service mesh platforms like Istio enable fine-grained traffic management and service observability.
usageTranslations.tr: Istio gibi servis mesh platformları, ayrıntılı trafik yönetimi ve servis gözlemlenebilirliği sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les plateformes de service mesh comme Istio permettent une gestion granulaire du trafic et l'observabilité des services.
usageTranslations.de: Service-Mesh-Plattformen wie Istio ermöglichen eine feingranulare Verkehrssteuerung und Service-Observability.
usageTranslations.es: Las plataformas de service mesh como Istio permiten una gestión detallada del tráfico y observabilidad de servicios.
usageTranslations.zh: 像Istio这样的服务网格平台实现了细粒度流量管理和服务可观测性。
usageTranslations.ar: تمكّن منصات خدمة mesh مثل Istio من إدارة حركة المرور الدقيقة وقابلية مراقبة الخدمة.
usageTranslations.pt: Plataformas de service mesh como Istio permitem gerenciamento de tráfego detalhado e observabilidade de serviços.
usageTranslations.ru: Сервисные сетки, такие как Istio, обеспечивают тонкое управление трафиком и наблюдаемость сервисов.
usageTranslations.ja: Istioのようなサービスメッシュプラットフォームは、きめ細やかなトラフィック管理とサービスの可観測性を可能にします。
usageTranslations.it: Piattaforme di service mesh come Istio consentono una gestione granulare del traffico e l'osservabilità dei servizi.
usageTranslations.vi: Nền tảng service mesh như Istio cho phép quản lý lưu lượng chi tiết và khả năng quan sát dịch vụ.
usageTranslations.hi: Istio जैसी सर्विस मेष प्लेटफ़ॉर्म्स सूक्ष्म ट्रैफिक प्रबंधन और सेवा अवलोकन को सक्षम बनाती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: แพลตฟอร์มเซอร์วิสเมชเช่น Istio ช่วยให้การจัดการทราฟฟิกและการสังเกตการณ์บริการทำได้อย่างละเอียด
usageTranslations.id: Platform service mesh seperti Istio memungkinkan manajemen lalu lintas yang terperinci dan pengamatan layanan.

terms.definition: A specialized load balancer that manages external access to services in a containerized cluster, routing HTTP(S) and other traffic based on policies.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The ingress controller manages routing for all inbound web traffic in the Kubernetes cluster.

termTranslations.ja: イングレスコントローラー
termTranslations.th: Ingress Controller

usageTranslations.en: The ingress controller manages routing for all inbound web traffic in the Kubernetes cluster.
usageTranslations.tr: Ingress denetleyicisi, Kubernetes kümesindeki tüm gelen web trafiğinin yönlendirilmesini yönetir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le contrôleur d'ingress gère le routage de tout le trafic web entrant dans le cluster Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.de: Der Ingress-Controller verwaltet das Routing für den gesamten eingehenden Webverkehr im Kubernetes-Cluster.
usageTranslations.es: El controlador de ingress gestiona el enrutamiento de todo el tráfico web entrante en el clúster de Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.zh: Ingress控制器管理Kubernetes集群中所有入站Web流量的路由。
usageTranslations.ar: يدير مراقب الدخول توجيه كل حركة مرور الويب الواردة في عنقود Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.pt: O controlador de ingress gerencia o roteamento de todo o tráfego web de entrada no cluster Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ru: Контроллер Ingress управляет маршрутизацией всего входящего веб-трафика в кластере Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ja: イングレスコントローラーはKubernetesクラスター内のすべてのインバウンドWebトラフィックのルーティングを管理します。
usageTranslations.it: Il controller di ingress gestisce il routing di tutto il traffico web in entrata nel cluster Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.vi: Ingress controller quản lý định tuyến cho tất cả lưu lượng web vào trong cụm Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.hi: इंग्रेस कंट्रोलर Kubernetes क्लस्टर में सभी इनबाउंड वेब ट्रैफिक की रूटिंग का प्रबंधन करता है।
usageTranslations.th: Ingress Controller จัดการการกำหนดเส้นทางสำหรับทราฟฟิกเว็บขาเข้าทั้งหมดในคลัสเตอร์ Kubernetes
usageTranslations.id: Ingress controller mengelola routing untuk semua lalu lintas web masuk di cluster Kubernetes.

terms.definition: An individual compute resource that is part of a container orchestration cluster, responsible for running containerized workloads and managed via the control plane.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Each cluster node in Kubernetes runs one or more pods and reports health status to the control plane for effective orchestration.

termTranslations.th: โหนดคลัสเตอร์

usageTranslations.en: Each cluster node in Kubernetes runs one or more pods and reports health status to the control plane for effective orchestration.
usageTranslations.tr: Kubernetes'te her küme düğümü bir veya daha fazla pod çalıştırır ve sağlık durumunu kontrol düzlemine raporlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Chaque nœud de cluster dans Kubernetes exécute un ou plusieurs pods et signale l'état de santé au plan de contrôle.
usageTranslations.de: Jeder Cluster-Knoten in Kubernetes betreibt einen oder mehrere Pods und meldet den Gesundheitsstatus an die Steuerungsebene.
usageTranslations.es: Cada nodo de clúster en Kubernetes ejecuta uno o más pods y reporta el estado de salud al plano de control.
usageTranslations.zh: Kubernetes中的每个集群节点运行一个或多个Pod，并向控制平面报告健康状态。
usageTranslations.ar: يشغل كل عقدة عنقودية في Kubernetes حاوية واحدة أو أكثر ويبلغ حالة الصحة إلى مستوى التحكم.
usageTranslations.pt: Cada nó de cluster no Kubernetes executa um ou mais pods e relata o status de integridade ao plano de controle.
usageTranslations.ru: Каждый узел кластера в Kubernetes запускает один или несколько pod’ов и сообщает о состоянии контролирующему компоненту.
usageTranslations.ja: Kubernetesの各クラスタノードは1つ以上のPodを実行し、コントロールプレーンにヘルスステータスを報告します。
usageTranslations.it: Ogni nodo del cluster in Kubernetes esegue uno o più pod e riporta lo stato di salute al piano di controllo.
usageTranslations.vi: Mỗi nút cụm trong Kubernetes chạy một hoặc nhiều pod và báo cáo tình trạng sức khỏe cho control plane.
usageTranslations.hi: Kubernetes में प्रत्येक क्लस्टर नोड एक या अधिक पॉड चलाता है और स्वास्थ्य स्थिति को नियंत्रण प्लेन पर रिपोर्ट करता है।
usageTranslations.th: แต่ละโหนดคลัสเตอร์ใน Kubernetes จะรันพ็อดหนึ่งตัวหรือมากกว่า และรายงานสถานะสุขภาพไปยัง control plane
usageTranslations.id: Setiap node klaster di Kubernetes menjalankan satu atau lebih pod dan melaporkan status kesehatan ke control plane.

terms.definition: The automated process within an orchestrator (e.g., Kubernetes) that assigns pods to suitable nodes based on resource availability and policies.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pod scheduling ensures workloads are distributed across cluster nodes according to defined resource constraints and affinity rules.

termTranslations.th: การจัดกำหนดการพ็อด

usageTranslations.en: Pod scheduling ensures workloads are distributed across cluster nodes according to defined resource constraints and affinity rules.
usageTranslations.tr: Pod zamanlaması, iş yüklerinin tanımlı kaynak kısıtları ve yakınlık kurallarına göre küme düğümlerine dağıtılmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L'ordonnancement des pods garantit la répartition des charges de travail sur les nœuds selon les contraintes de ressources et les règles d'affinité.
usageTranslations.de: Die Pod-Zuweisung stellt sicher, dass Workloads gemäß den Ressourcenbeschränkungen und Affinitätsregeln auf Cluster-Knoten verteilt werden.
usageTranslations.es: La programación de pods asegura que las cargas de trabajo se distribuyan en los nodos del clúster según las restricciones de recursos y reglas de afinidad.
usageTranslations.zh: Pod 调度确保工作负载根据资源约束和亲和性规则分布到各个集群节点。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن جدولة البود توزيع أحمال العمل على عقد العنقود وفقًا لقيود الموارد وقواعد التقارب المحددة.
usageTranslations.pt: O agendamento de pod garante que as cargas de trabalho sejam distribuídas nos nós do cluster conforme as restrições de recursos e regras de afinidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Планирование Pod’ов обеспечивает распределение нагрузок между узлами кластера в соответствии с ограничениями ресурсов и правилами аффинности.
usageTranslations.ja: Podスケジューリングは、リソース制約やアフィニティルールに基づいてワークロードをクラスタノードに分散させます。
usageTranslations.it: La schedulazione dei pod assicura la distribuzione dei carichi di lavoro tra i nodi del cluster secondo i vincoli di risorse e le regole di affinità.
usageTranslations.vi: Lập lịch pod đảm bảo tải công việc được phân phối qua các nút cụm theo ràng buộc tài nguyên và quy tắc affinity.
usageTranslations.hi: पॉड शेड्यूलिंग सुनिश्चित करता है कि वर्कलोड क्लस्टर नोड्स में संसाधन बाधाओं और निकटता नियमों के अनुसार वितरित हों।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดกำหนดการพ็อดช่วยให้เวิร์กโหลดกระจายไปตามโหนดคลัสเตอร์ตามข้อจำกัดของทรัพยากรและกฎ affinity
usageTranslations.id: Penjadwalan pod memastikan beban kerja didistribusikan di seluruh node klaster sesuai batasan sumber daya dan aturan afinitas.

terms.definition: The software component that executes and manages containerized applications on a host, interfacing with the OS kernel and orchestrator.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Container runtime like containerd or CRI-O is responsible for managing the complete lifecycle of containers on each node.

termTranslations.th: รันไทม์คอนเทนเนอร์

usageTranslations.en: Container runtime like containerd or CRI-O is responsible for managing the complete lifecycle of containers on each node.
usageTranslations.tr: Containerd veya CRI-O gibi konteyner çalışma zamanı, her düğümde konteynerlerin tüm yaşam döngüsünü yönetmekten sorumludur.
usageTranslations.fr: Un environnement d’exécution de conteneur comme containerd ou CRI-O gère l’intégralité du cycle de vie des conteneurs sur chaque nœud.
usageTranslations.de: Container-Laufzeitumgebungen wie containerd oder CRI-O verwalten den vollständigen Lebenszyklus der Container auf jedem Knoten.
usageTranslations.es: Un tiempo de ejecución de contenedores como containerd o CRI-O gestiona todo el ciclo de vida de los contenedores en cada nodo.
usageTranslations.zh: 像 containerd 或 CRI-O 这样的容器运行时负责管理每个节点上的容器完整生命周期。
usageTranslations.ar: وقت تشغيل الحاوية مثل containerd أو CRI-O مسؤول عن إدارة دورة حياة الحاوية بالكامل على كل عقدة.
usageTranslations.pt: Tempo de execução de contêineres como containerd ou CRI-O é responsável por gerenciar todo o ciclo de vida dos contêineres em cada nó.
usageTranslations.ru: Среда выполнения контейнеров, например containerd или CRI-O, отвечает за полный жизненный цикл контейнеров на каждом узле.
usageTranslations.ja: containerdやCRI-Oのようなコンテナランタイムは、各ノード上のコンテナのライフサイクル全体を管理します。
usageTranslations.it: Un runtime di contenitore come containerd o CRI-O gestisce l'intero ciclo di vita dei contenitori su ciascun nodo.
usageTranslations.vi: Runtime container như containerd hoặc CRI-O chịu trách nhiệm quản lý vòng đời container trên mỗi nút.
usageTranslations.hi: containerd या CRI-O जैसे कंटेनर रनटाइम प्रत्येक नोड पर कंटेनर के पूरे जीवनचक्र का प्रबंधन करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: รันไทม์คอนเทนเนอร์อย่าง containerd หรือ CRI-O มีหน้าที่จัดการวงจรชีวิตของคอนเทนเนอร์บนแต่ละโหนด
usageTranslations.id: Runtime kontainer seperti containerd atau CRI-O bertanggung jawab mengelola seluruh siklus hidup kontainer di setiap node.

terms.definition: A dedicated infrastructure layer that manages service-to-service communications, security, observability, and reliability in a microservices architecture.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Implementing a service mesh like Istio enables detailed traffic management, security, and visibility for microservices deployed in a Kubernetes cluster.

termTranslations.th: เซอร์วิสเมช

usageTranslations.en: Implementing a service mesh like Istio enables detailed traffic management, security, and visibility for microservices deployed in a Kubernetes cluster.
usageTranslations.tr: Istio gibi bir servis mesh uygulamak, Kubernetes kümesinde dağıtılmış mikroservisler için ayrıntılı trafik yönetimi, güvenlik ve görünürlük sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La mise en œuvre d’un maillage de services comme Istio permet la gestion détaillée du trafic, la sécurité et la visibilité des microservices déployés dans un cluster Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.de: Die Implementierung eines Service Mesh wie Istio ermöglicht detailliertes Verkehrsmanagement, Sicherheit und Sichtbarkeit für Microservices in einem Kubernetes-Cluster.
usageTranslations.es: Implementar una malla de servicios como Istio permite una gestión detallada del tráfico, seguridad y visibilidad de los microservicios desplegados en un clúster de Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.zh: 实现类似 Istio 的服务网格可以为部署在 Kubernetes 集群中的微服务提供详细的流量管理、安全性和可见性。
usageTranslations.ar: تمكّن شبكة الخدمة مثل Istio من إدارة حركة المرور بالتفصيل والأمان والرؤية للخدمات الصغيرة المنتشرة في عنقود Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.pt: A implementação de uma malha de serviço como o Istio permite gerenciamento detalhado de tráfego, segurança e visibilidade para microsserviços implantados em um cluster Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ru: Внедрение сервисной сетки, такой как Istio, обеспечивает детальное управление трафиком, безопасность и видимость микросервисов, развернутых в кластере Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ja: Istioのようなサービスメッシュを導入することで、Kubernetesクラスター内にデプロイされたマイクロサービスの詳細なトラフィック管理、セキュリティ、および可視性が実現できます。
usageTranslations.it: Implementare un service mesh come Istio consente una gestione dettagliata del traffico, sicurezza e visibilità per i microservizi distribuiti in un cluster Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai service mesh như Istio giúp quản lý lưu lượng chi tiết, bảo mật và quan sát cho microservices trên Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.hi: Istio जैसे सर्विस मेष को लागू करने से Kubernetes क्लस्टर में डिप्लॉय किए गए माइक्रोसर्विसेज के लिए विस्तृत ट्रैफिक प्रबंधन, सुरक्षा और दृश्यता सक्षम होती है।
usageTranslations.th: การติดตั้งเซอร์วิสเมชเช่น Istio ช่วยให้สามารถจัดการทราฟฟิกได้ละเอียดขึ้น รวมถึงความปลอดภัยและการมองเห็นสำหรับไมโครเซอร์วิสบน Kubernetes
usageTranslations.id: Menerapkan service mesh seperti Istio memungkinkan pengelolaan lalu lintas, keamanan, dan visibilitas mikroservis secara detail di klaster Kubernetes.

terms.definition: A Kubernetes resource that manages external access to services in a cluster, typically via HTTP/HTTPS routing and load balancing.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: An ingress controller manages HTTP routing rules and forwards traffic from outside the cluster to the correct internal Kubernetes services.

termTranslations.ja: イングレスコントローラー
termTranslations.th: Ingress Controller

usageTranslations.en: An ingress controller manages HTTP routing rules and forwards traffic from outside the cluster to the correct internal Kubernetes services.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir ingress denetleyicisi, HTTP yönlendirme kurallarını yönetir ve küme dışından gelen trafiği doğru Kubernetes servislerine yönlendirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un contrôleur d’ingress gère les règles de routage HTTP et transfère le trafic extérieur vers les services internes Kubernetes appropriés.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Ingress-Controller verwaltet HTTP-Routingregeln und leitet externen Traffic an die richtigen internen Kubernetes-Services weiter.
usageTranslations.es: Un controlador de ingress gestiona las reglas de enrutamiento HTTP y dirige el tráfico externo a los servicios internos adecuados de Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.zh: Ingress 控制器管理 HTTP 路由规则并将集群外部流量转发到正确的 Kubernetes 内部服务。
usageTranslations.ar: يتولى متحكم الدخول إدارة قواعد توجيه HTTP ويوجه الحركة القادمة من خارج العنقود إلى الخدمات الداخلية الصحيحة.
usageTranslations.pt: Um controlador de ingress gerencia regras de roteamento HTTP e encaminha o tráfego externo para os serviços internos corretos do Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ru: Ingress-контроллер управляет правилами маршрутизации HTTP и перенаправляет внешний трафик во внутренние сервисы Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ja: イングレスコントローラーはHTTPルーティングルールを管理し、クラスタ外部からのトラフィックを適切なKubernetesサービスに転送します。
usageTranslations.it: Un controller di ingress gestisce le regole di routing HTTP e indirizza il traffico esterno ai servizi Kubernetes interni appropriati.
usageTranslations.vi: Ingress controller quản lý các quy tắc định tuyến HTTP và chuyển tiếp lưu lượng từ ngoài cụm đến các dịch vụ nội bộ Kubernetes phù hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: एक इंग्रेस कंट्रोलर HTTP रूटिंग नियमों का प्रबंधन करता है और क्लस्टर के बाहर से आने वाले ट्रैफिक को सही Kubernetes सेवाओं तक पहुंचाता है।
usageTranslations.th: Ingress Controller จัดการกฎการกำหนดเส้นทาง HTTP และส่งต่อทราฟฟิกจากภายนอกคลัสเตอร์ไปยัง Kubernetes service ภายในที่ถูกต้อง
usageTranslations.id: Ingress controller mengelola aturan routing HTTP dan meneruskan trafik dari luar klaster ke layanan Kubernetes internal yang benar.

terms.definition: A Replica Set ensures that a specified number of pod replicas are running at all times in a Kubernetes cluster, automatically replacing pods if they fail.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A Replica Set maintains the desired number of identical pods and replaces any that fail or are deleted in the Kubernetes environment.

termTranslations.th: Replica Set

usageTranslations.en: A Replica Set maintains the desired number of identical pods and replaces any that fail or are deleted in the Kubernetes environment.
usageTranslations.tr: Replica Set, Kubernetes ortamında istenen sayıda aynı pod’u tutar ve başarısız olan veya silinenleri yeniden başlatır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un Replica Set maintient le nombre souhaité de pods identiques et remplace ceux qui échouent ou sont supprimés dans l'environnement Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Replica Set hält die gewünschte Anzahl identischer Pods und ersetzt fehlgeschlagene oder gelöschte im Kubernetes-Umfeld.
usageTranslations.es: Un Replica Set mantiene el número deseado de pods idénticos y reemplaza los que fallan o se eliminan en el entorno de Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.zh: 副本集在 Kubernetes 环境中维护所需数量的相同 Pod，并替换任何失败或被删除的 Pod。
usageTranslations.ar: تحافظ مجموعة النسخ على عدد البودات المتماثلة المطلوب وتستبدل أي فاشلة أو محذوفة في بيئة كوبرنيتيس.
usageTranslations.pt: Um Replica Set mantém o número desejado de pods idênticos e substitui os que falham ou são excluídos no ambiente Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ru: Replica Set поддерживает нужное количество идентичных подов и заменяет те, которые вышли из строя или были удалены в среде Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.ja: レプリカセットは、Kubernetes 環境で必要な数の同一ポッドを維持し、失敗または削除されたものを置き換えます。
usageTranslations.it: Un Replica Set mantiene il numero desiderato di pod identici e sostituisce quelli che falliscono o vengono eliminati nell'ambiente Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.vi: Replica Set duy trì số lượng pod giống hệt mong muốn và thay thế các pod bị lỗi hoặc bị xóa trong môi trường Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.hi: Replica Set Kubernetes पर्यावरण में इच्छित संख्या में समान pods बनाए रखता है और जो असफल होते हैं या हटाए जाते हैं, उन्हें बदल देता है।
usageTranslations.th: Replica Set ดูแลจำนวน pod ที่เหมือนกันให้ครบถ้วนและแทนที่ pod ที่ล้มเหลวหรือถูกลบในสภาพแวดล้อม Kubernetes
usageTranslations.id: Replica Set mempertahankan jumlah pod identik yang diinginkan dan menggantikan yang gagal atau dihapus di lingkungan Kubernetes.

terms.definition: A Persistent Volume is a piece of storage in a Kubernetes cluster provisioned by an administrator or dynamically, independent of the lifecycle of a specific pod.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Applications use Persistent Volumes in Kubernetes to retain data across pod restarts and failures, ensuring stateful workloads are supported.

termTranslations.th: Persistent Volume

usageTranslations.en: Applications use Persistent Volumes in Kubernetes to retain data across pod restarts and failures, ensuring stateful workloads are supported.
usageTranslations.tr: Kubernetes’te uygulamalar, pod yeniden başlatmalarında ve hatalarında veriyi korumak için Persistent Volume kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les applications utilisent des volumes persistants dans Kubernetes pour conserver les données lors des redémarrages de pods et des échecs, garantissant la prise en charge des workloads stateful.
usageTranslations.de: Anwendungen nutzen Persistente Volumes in Kubernetes, um Daten über Pod-Neustarts und Fehler hinweg zu behalten.
usageTranslations.es: Las aplicaciones usan Volúmenes Persistentes en Kubernetes para conservar datos durante reinicios o fallos de pods.
usageTranslations.zh: 应用程序在 Kubernetes 中使用持久卷以在 Pod 重启和失败时保留数据，确保有状态工作负载得到支持。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم التطبيقات وحدة تخزين دائمة في كوبرنيتيس للاحتفاظ بالبيانات عبر إعادة تشغيل البودات أو فشلها.
usageTranslations.pt: Aplicações usam Volumes Persistentes no Kubernetes para manter dados entre reinicializações e falhas dos pods.
usageTranslations.ru: Приложения используют постоянные тома в Kubernetes для сохранения данных при перезапуске и сбоях подов.
usageTranslations.ja: Kubernetes でアプリケーションは永続ボリュームを使用して、Pod の再起動や障害時もデータを保持します。
usageTranslations.it: Le applicazioni utilizzano i volumi persistenti in Kubernetes per mantenere i dati attraverso riavvii e guasti dei pod.
usageTranslations.vi: Các ứng dụng sử dụng Persistent Volume trong Kubernetes để giữ dữ liệu khi pod khởi động lại hoặc gặp sự cố.
usageTranslations.hi: ऐप्लिकेशन Kubernetes में Persistent Volume का उपयोग करती हैं ताकि pod रीस्टार्ट या फेल होने पर भी डेटा सुरक्षित रहे।
usageTranslations.th: แอปพลิเคชันใช้ Persistent Volume ใน Kubernetes เพื่อรักษาข้อมูลข้ามการรีสตาร์ทหรือความล้มเหลวของ pod
usageTranslations.id: Aplikasi menggunakan Persistent Volume di Kubernetes untuk mempertahankan data saat pod restart atau gagal.

terms.definition: A Stateful Set manages the deployment and scaling of a set of pods, providing each pod with a persistent identity and stable storage.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A Stateful Set in Kubernetes guarantees each pod has a unique identity and stable network storage, supporting workloads like databases.

termTranslations.th: Stateful Set

usageTranslations.en: A Stateful Set in Kubernetes guarantees each pod has a unique identity and stable network storage, supporting workloads like databases.
usageTranslations.tr: Kubernetes’te Stateful Set, her pod’a benzersiz kimlik ve kalıcı depolama sağlayarak veritabanı gibi iş yüklerini destekler.
usageTranslations.fr: Un Stateful Set dans Kubernetes garantit à chaque pod une identité unique et un stockage réseau stable, prenant en charge les charges de travail telles que les bases de données.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Stateful Set in Kubernetes garantiert jedem Pod eine eindeutige Identität und einen stabilen Netzwerkspeicher.
usageTranslations.es: Un Stateful Set en Kubernetes garantiza que cada pod tenga una identidad única y almacenamiento de red estable.
usageTranslations.zh: Kubernetes 中的有状态集合为每个 Pod 提供唯一身份和稳定的网络存储。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن مجموعة الحالة في كوبرنيتيس لكل بود هوية فريدة وتخزين شبكي ثابت.
usageTranslations.pt: Um Stateful Set no Kubernetes garante que cada pod tenha uma identidade única e armazenamento de rede estável.
usageTranslations.ru: Stateful Set в Kubernetes гарантирует уникальную идентичность и стабильное сетевое хранилище каждому поду.
usageTranslations.ja: Kubernetes のステートフルセットは、各ポッドに一意の ID と安定したネットワークストレージを保証します。
usageTranslations.it: Uno Stateful Set in Kubernetes garantisce a ogni pod un'identità unica e uno storage di rete stabile.
usageTranslations.vi: Stateful Set trong Kubernetes đảm bảo mỗi pod có một danh tính duy nhất và lưu trữ mạng ổn định.
usageTranslations.hi: Kubernetes में Stateful Set प्रत्येक pod को एक अद्वितीय पहचान और स्थिर नेटवर्क स्टोरेज देता है।
usageTranslations.th: Stateful Set ใน Kubernetes รับประกันแต่ละ pod มีตัวตนเฉพาะและพื้นที่จัดเก็บเครือข่ายที่เสถียร
usageTranslations.id: Stateful Set di Kubernetes memastikan setiap pod memiliki identitas unik dan penyimpanan jaringan yang stabil.

terms.definition: A Config Map stores configuration data as key-value pairs for use by Kubernetes pods and controllers, separating configuration from application code.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A Config Map in Kubernetes allows for decoupling environment-specific configuration from container images, improving deployment flexibility.

termTranslations.th: Config Map

usageTranslations.en: A Config Map in Kubernetes allows for decoupling environment-specific configuration from container images, improving deployment flexibility.
usageTranslations.tr: Kubernetes’teki Config Map, ortam bazlı konfigürasyonu konteyner imajlarından ayırarak dağıtım esnekliğini artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un ConfigMap dans Kubernetes permet de dissocier la configuration spécifique à l'environnement des images de conteneur.
usageTranslations.de: Ein ConfigMap in Kubernetes trennt umgebungsspezifische Konfiguration von Container-Images.
usageTranslations.es: Un ConfigMap en Kubernetes permite desacoplar la configuración específica del entorno de las imágenes de contenedor.
usageTranslations.zh: Kubernetes 中的配置映射允许将环境特定配置与容器镜像分离。
usageTranslations.ar: يسمح Config Map في كوبرنيتيس بفصل التكوين الخاص بالبيئة عن صور الحاوية.
usageTranslations.pt: Um ConfigMap no Kubernetes permite separar configurações específicas do ambiente das imagens de contêiner.
usageTranslations.ru: ConfigMap в Kubernetes позволяет отделить конфигурацию среды от образов контейнеров.
usageTranslations.ja: Kubernetes のコンフィグマップは、環境固有の設定をコンテナイメージから分離します。
usageTranslations.it: Un ConfigMap in Kubernetes consente di separare la configurazione specifica dell'ambiente dalle immagini del contenitore.
usageTranslations.vi: ConfigMap trong Kubernetes cho phép tách cấu hình đặc thù môi trường khỏi image container.
usageTranslations.hi: Kubernetes का Config Map पर्यावरण-विशिष्ट कॉन्फ़िगरेशन को कंटेनर इमेज से अलग करने देता है।
usageTranslations.th: Config Map ใน Kubernetes ช่วยแยกการกำหนดค่าสภาพแวดล้อมออกจากอิมเมจคอนเทนเนอร์
usageTranslations.id: ConfigMap di Kubernetes memungkinkan pemisahan konfigurasi spesifik lingkungan dari image container.

terms.definition: A Secret Store is a secure storage mechanism in Kubernetes or integration platforms for managing sensitive data such as passwords, API keys, and tokens.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A Secret Store centralizes management of sensitive credentials and encryption keys, improving security posture across cloud-native applications.

termTranslations.th: Secret Store

usageTranslations.en: A Secret Store centralizes management of sensitive credentials and encryption keys, improving security posture across cloud-native applications.
usageTranslations.tr: Secret Store, hassas kimlik bilgilerini ve anahtarlarını merkezi olarak yönetir, bulut tabanlı uygulamalarda güvenliği artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Secret Store centralise la gestion des identifiants sensibles et des clés de chiffrement.
usageTranslations.de: Secret Store zentralisiert die Verwaltung sensibler Zugangsdaten und Verschlüsselungsschlüssel.
usageTranslations.es: Secret Store centraliza la gestión de credenciales sensibles y claves de cifrado.
usageTranslations.zh: 密钥存储集中管理敏感凭证和加密密钥，提高云原生应用的安全性。
usageTranslations.ar: يعمل Secret Store على مركزية إدارة بيانات الاعتماد الحساسة ومفاتيح التشفير.
usageTranslations.pt: Secret Store centraliza a gestão de credenciais sensíveis e chaves de criptografia.
usageTranslations.ru: Secret Store централизует управление конфиденциальными учетными данными и ключами шифрования.
usageTranslations.ja: シークレットストアは機密情報や暗号鍵の管理を一元化します。
usageTranslations.it: Secret Store centralizza la gestione delle credenziali sensibili e delle chiavi di crittografia.
usageTranslations.vi: Secret Store tập trung quản lý thông tin nhạy cảm và khóa mã hóa.
usageTranslations.hi: Secret Store संवेदनशील क्रेडेंशियल्स और एन्क्रिप्शन कुंजियों का प्रबंधन केंद्रीकृत करता है।
usageTranslations.th: Secret Store รวมศูนย์การจัดการข้อมูลสำคัญและกุญแจเข้ารหัส
usageTranslations.id: Secret Store memusatkan pengelolaan kredensial sensitif dan kunci enkripsi.

terms.definition: Node Drain is the process of safely evicting all pods from a Kubernetes node, typically before maintenance or shutdown, to ensure workload continuity.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Node Drain safely moves pods off a node so it can be rebooted or taken out of service without disrupting running workloads.

termTranslations.th: ถ่ายโหนด

usageTranslations.en: Node Drain safely moves pods off a node so it can be rebooted or taken out of service without disrupting running workloads.
usageTranslations.tr: Node Boşaltma, çalışan iş yüklerini kesintiye uğratmadan bir node üzerindeki pod’ları güvenle taşır.
usageTranslations.fr: La vidange de nœud déplace les pods en toute sécurité pour l’entretien.
usageTranslations.de: Node Leeren verschiebt sicher Pods für Wartungszwecke.
usageTranslations.es: El vaciado de nodo mueve los pods con seguridad antes del mantenimiento.
usageTranslations.zh: 节点排空可安全迁移Pod以便维护。
usageTranslations.ar: إفراغ العقدة ينقل الحاويات بأمان قبل الصيانة.
usageTranslations.pt: O esvaziamento de nó move pods com segurança para manutenção.
usageTranslations.ru: Освобождение узла безопасно перемещает поды для обслуживания.
usageTranslations.ja: ノードドレインはPodを安全に移動させる。
usageTranslations.it: Lo svuotamento nodo sposta in sicurezza i pod per la manutenzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Xả Nút chuyển pod an toàn để bảo trì.
usageTranslations.hi: नोड ड्रेन मेंटेनेंस से पहले pod को सुरक्षित हटाता है।
usageTranslations.th: ถ่ายโหนดย้าย pod อย่างปลอดภัยสำหรับซ่อมบำรุง
usageTranslations.id: Node Drain memindahkan pod dengan aman untuk pemeliharaan.

terms.definition: Pod Eviction is the process by which Kubernetes forcibly removes a pod from a node, usually due to resource pressure, policy, or node maintenance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pod Eviction occurs when a node experiences resource shortage or maintenance, and pods are terminated and rescheduled elsewhere.

termTranslations.th: ขับไล่ pod

usageTranslations.en: Pod Eviction occurs when a node experiences resource shortage or maintenance, and pods are terminated and rescheduled elsewhere.
usageTranslations.tr: Pod Tahliyesi, node’da kaynak sıkıntısı veya bakım olduğunda pod’ların sonlandırılıp başka bir yere yeniden atanmasıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: L’éviction de pod intervient lors d’un manque de ressources ou maintenance.
usageTranslations.de: Pod Räumung erfolgt bei Ressourcenmangel oder Wartung.
usageTranslations.es: La expulsión de pod ocurre ante falta de recursos o mantenimiento.
usageTranslations.zh: Pod 驱逐在资源不足或维护时发生。
usageTranslations.ar: يحدث طرد البود عند نقص الموارد أو الصيانة.
usageTranslations.pt: A remoção de pod ocorre por falta de recursos ou manutenção.
usageTranslations.ru: Выселение пода происходит при нехватке ресурсов или обслуживании.
usageTranslations.ja: ポッドエビクションはリソース不足やメンテ時に発生する。
usageTranslations.it: La rimozione pod avviene per carenza di risorse o manutenzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Trục xuất pod xảy ra khi node thiếu tài nguyên hoặc bảo trì.
usageTranslations.hi: पॉड निष्कासन तब होता है जब node में संसाधनों की कमी या रखरखाव हो।
usageTranslations.th: ขับไล่ pod เกิดเมื่อ node ขาด resource หรือมี maintenance
usageTranslations.id: Pengusiran pod terjadi jika node kekurangan sumber daya atau pemeliharaan.

terms.definition: Rolling Update is a deployment strategy in which application instances are gradually replaced with new versions to ensure zero downtime and continuous service availability.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: With Rolling Update, new application pods are deployed gradually, ensuring continuous service and minimizing disruption.

termTranslations.ja: ローリングアップデート
termTranslations.th: อัปเดตแบบกลิ้ง

usageTranslations.en: With Rolling Update, new application pods are deployed gradually, ensuring continuous service and minimizing disruption.
usageTranslations.tr: Kademeli Güncelleme ile yeni pod’lar aşamalı olarak devreye alınır ve kesinti minimum olur.
usageTranslations.fr: La mise à jour progressive déploie les pods progressivement, minimisant l’interruption.
usageTranslations.de: Rollendes Update stellt Pods schrittweise bereit und minimiert Ausfälle.
usageTranslations.es: La actualización continua despliega los pods gradualmente y minimiza interrupciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 滚动更新逐步部署新Pods，减少中断。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم نشر الحاويات تدريجيًا مع التحديث التدريجي لتقليل الانقطاع.
usageTranslations.pt: A atualização gradual implanta pods novos aos poucos e reduz interrupções.
usageTranslations.ru: Пошаговое обновление внедряет новые поды постепенно, снижая простои.
usageTranslations.ja: ローリングアップデートで新しいPodが段階的に展開される。
usageTranslations.it: Aggiornamento progressivo distribuisce nuovi pod gradualmente e riduce le interruzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Cập nhật cuốn chiếu triển khai pod mới dần dần, giảm gián đoạn.
usageTranslations.hi: रोलिंग अपडेट में नए pod धीरे-धीरे लागू किए जाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: อัปเดตแบบกลิ้งจะ deploy pod ใหม่ทีละน้อยเพื่อป้องกัน downtime
usageTranslations.id: Pembaruan bergulir men-deploy pod baru secara bertahap untuk meminimalkan gangguan.

terms.definition: Blue Deployment is the existing stable version of an application in blue-green deployment strategies, running in production before switching to a new version.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Blue Deployment remains live in production until the green environment is fully validated and traffic is switched over.

termTranslations.ja: ブルーデプロイメント
termTranslations.th: การปรับใช้สีน้ำเงิน

usageTranslations.en: Blue Deployment remains live in production until the green environment is fully validated and traffic is switched over.
usageTranslations.tr: Mavi Dağıtım, green ortam doğrulanana kadar canlıda kalır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le déploiement bleu reste actif jusqu’à validation du vert.
usageTranslations.de: Blaues Deployment bleibt produktiv bis Grün umgeschaltet wird.
usageTranslations.es: El despliegue azul permanece activo hasta que el entorno verde se valida.
usageTranslations.zh: 蓝色部署在生产环境保持运行，直到绿色环境验证完成。
usageTranslations.ar: النشر الأزرق يظل نشطًا حتى يتم التبديل إلى الأخضر.
usageTranslations.pt: A implantação azul permanece ativa até a validação do verde.
usageTranslations.ru: Синий деплоймент работает до переключения на зелёный.
usageTranslations.ja: ブルーデプロイメントはグリーン切替まで本番稼働する。
usageTranslations.it: La distribuzione blu resta attiva fino alla validazione del verde.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai xanh dương chạy cho đến khi xanh lá xác thực.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्लू डिप्लॉयमेंट, ग्रीन के validate होने तक एक्टिव रहता है।
usageTranslations.th: การปรับใช้สีน้ำเงินจะทำงานจนกว่าจะ validate สีเขียว
usageTranslations.id: Blue Deployment tetap aktif sampai green tervalidasi.

terms.definition: Green Deployment is the new application version deployed in a blue-green deployment strategy, tested and validated before switching production traffic from blue.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Green Deployment is tested with a copy of live traffic before replacing blue to minimize risk during production rollout.

termTranslations.ja: グリーンデプロイメント
termTranslations.th: การปรับใช้สีเขียว

usageTranslations.en: Green Deployment is tested with a copy of live traffic before replacing blue to minimize risk during production rollout.
usageTranslations.tr: Yeşil Dağıtım, risk azaltmak için canlı trafiğin kopyasıyla test edilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le déploiement vert est testé avec un trafic réel avant la bascule.
usageTranslations.de: Grünes Deployment wird mit Live-Traffic getestet bevor umgeschaltet wird.
usageTranslations.es: El despliegue verde se prueba con tráfico real antes del cambio.
usageTranslations.zh: 绿色部署在切换前用真实流量测试。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم اختبار النشر الأخضر بنسخة من حركة المرور قبل التحويل.
usageTranslations.pt: A implantação verde é testada com tráfego antes da troca.
usageTranslations.ru: Зелёный деплоймент тестируется с копией трафика до переключения.
usageTranslations.ja: グリーンデプロイメントは本番切替前に検証される。
usageTranslations.it: La distribuzione verde viene testata prima della transizione.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai xanh lá được kiểm tra với traffic trước khi chuyển đổi.
usageTranslations.hi: ग्रीन डिप्लॉयमेंट, ब्लू के बदले से पहले टेस्ट होता है।
usageTranslations.th: การปรับใช้สีเขียวจะถูกทดสอบก่อนสลับจากสีน้ำเงิน
usageTranslations.id: Green Deployment diuji dengan traffic sebelum switch dari blue.

terms.definition: A Canary Release is a deployment technique where a new version is released to a small subset of users or nodes to monitor performance and errors before full rollout.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: With a Canary Release, a new application version is deployed to a small user group to monitor for issues before wider rollout.

termTranslations.th: การปล่อยแคนารี่

usageTranslations.en: With a Canary Release, a new application version is deployed to a small user group to monitor for issues before wider rollout.
usageTranslations.tr: Kanarya Sürümü ile yeni sürüm önce küçük bir kullanıcı grubuna açılır.
usageTranslations.fr: La mise en production Canary déploie la version à un sous-ensemble pour surveiller les problèmes.
usageTranslations.de: Beim Canary-Release wird die neue Version zuerst für wenige User ausgerollt.
usageTranslations.es: El lanzamiento canario despliega la versión a un pequeño grupo primero.
usageTranslations.zh: 金丝雀发布将新版本先部署给小部分用户以监控问题。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم نشر إصدار الكناري لمجموعة صغيرة أولاً لمراقبة المشاكل.
usageTranslations.pt: No lançamento Canary, a nova versão é implantada para poucos usuários.
usageTranslations.ru: Канареечный релиз сначала выкатывается на малую группу.
usageTranslations.ja: カナリアリリースは一部ユーザーに先行配信し検証する。
usageTranslations.it: Il rilascio canary distribuisce la versione a un piccolo gruppo inizialmente.
usageTranslations.vi: Phát hành canary triển khai phiên bản mới cho một nhóm nhỏ.
usageTranslations.hi: कनरी रिलीज़ में नई वर्शन को सीमित users के लिए जारी किया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: การปล่อยแคนารี่ปล่อยฟีเจอร์ใหม่ให้ user ส่วนน้อยก่อน
usageTranslations.id: Canary Release meluncurkan versi baru ke sebagian kecil user dulu.

terms.definition: Deployment Rollback is the process of reverting an application deployment to a previous stable version to restore service quickly if an update fails.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Deployment Rollback allows a cluster operator to quickly revert to a stable version if the latest update introduces errors.

termTranslations.ja: デプロイのロールバック
termTranslations.th: ย้อนกลับการปรับใช้

usageTranslations.en: Deployment Rollback allows a cluster operator to quickly revert to a stable version if the latest update introduces errors.
usageTranslations.tr: Dağıtımı Geri Alma, güncelleme hatalıysa hızlıca önceki sürüme dönmeyi sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La restauration de déploiement permet de revenir rapidement à une version stable.
usageTranslations.de: Rollback ermöglicht das schnelle Zurücksetzen auf eine stabile Version.
usageTranslations.es: La reversión de despliegue permite volver rápidamente a una versión estable.
usageTranslations.zh: 部署回滚可在更新出错时快速恢复到稳定版本。
usageTranslations.ar: استرجاع النشر يسمح بالعودة بسرعة إلى نسخة مستقرة.
usageTranslations.pt: O rollback permite reverter rapidamente para uma versão estável.
usageTranslations.ru: Откат развертывания быстро возвращает к стабильной версии.
usageTranslations.ja: ロールバックで安定版へ即戻せる。
usageTranslations.it: Il rollback permette di tornare rapidamente a una versione stabile.
usageTranslations.vi: Hoàn tác triển khai giúp nhanh chóng quay lại phiên bản ổn định.
usageTranslations.hi: रोलबैक से operator तेज़ी से stable version पर लौट सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: Rollback ช่วยให้กลับไปเวอร์ชันเสถียรได้ทันที
usageTranslations.id: Rollback memungkinkan operator segera kembali ke versi stabil.

terms.definition: Pod Disruption refers to the interruption or forced removal of pods from a node, whether planned or unplanned, impacting running workloads.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pod Disruption can occur due to node maintenance, scaling, or network failures, causing temporary unavailability.

termTranslations.ja: ポッドディスラプション
termTranslations.th: การหยุดชะงักของ pod

usageTranslations.en: Pod Disruption can occur due to node maintenance, scaling, or network failures, causing temporary unavailability.
usageTranslations.tr: Pod Kesintisi, bakım, ölçekleme veya ağ hatasından kaynaklanabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: La perturbation de pod peut être due à la maintenance, au scaling ou à des pannes réseau.
usageTranslations.de: Pod-Unterbrechung kann durch Wartung, Skalierung oder Netzwerkfehler verursacht werden.
usageTranslations.es: La interrupción de pod puede deberse a mantenimiento, escalado o fallos de red.
usageTranslations.zh: Pod 中断可能由维护、扩容或网络故障引起。
usageTranslations.ar: انقطاع البود قد يحدث بسبب الصيانة أو التحجيم أو فشل الشبكة.
usageTranslations.pt: A interrupção de pod pode ocorrer por manutenção, escalonamento ou falhas de rede.
usageTranslations.ru: Сбой пода может быть вызван обслуживанием, масштабированием или сбоями сети.
usageTranslations.ja: ポッドディスラプションはメンテやスケーリングで発生する場合がある。
usageTranslations.it: L’interruzione del pod può derivare da manutenzione, scaling o errori di rete.
usageTranslations.vi: Gián đoạn pod có thể do bảo trì, scale hoặc lỗi mạng.
usageTranslations.hi: पॉड विघटन मेंटेनेंस, स्केलिंग या नेटवर्क फेल से हो सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: การหยุดชะงักของ pod เกิดได้จาก maintenance, scaling หรือ network fail
usageTranslations.id: Gangguan pod dapat terjadi karena pemeliharaan, penskalaan, atau kegagalan jaringan.

terms.definition: Service Discovery is the automatic detection of services and endpoints in a network, allowing applications and systems to find and communicate with each other dynamically.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Service Discovery enables microservices to locate and connect with each other automatically in dynamic cloud environments.

termTranslations.ja: サービスディスカバリ
termTranslations.th: การค้นพบบริการ

usageTranslations.en: Service Discovery enables microservices to locate and connect with each other automatically in dynamic cloud environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Servis Keşfi, mikroservislerin dinamik bulut ortamlarında otomatik olarak birbirini bulmasını ve bağlanmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La découverte de service permet aux microservices de se trouver automatiquement.
usageTranslations.de: Service-Erkennung ermöglicht es Microservices, sich automatisch zu finden.
usageTranslations.es: El descubrimiento de servicio permite a los microservicios localizarse y conectarse.
usageTranslations.zh: 服务发现让微服务能自动找到并连接彼此。
usageTranslations.ar: اكتشاف الخدمة يمكّن الخدمات المصغرة من العثور على بعضها تلقائيًا.
usageTranslations.pt: A descoberta de serviço permite que microservices se conectem automaticamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Обнаружение сервисов позволяет микросервисам автоматически находить друг друга.
usageTranslations.ja: サービスディスカバリにより、マイクロサービス同士が自動で接続できる。
usageTranslations.it: La scoperta servizio permette ai microservizi di connettersi automaticamente.
usageTranslations.vi: Khám phá dịch vụ giúp microservices tự động kết nối với nhau.
usageTranslations.hi: सेवा खोज से माइक्रोसर्विसेज़ स्वतः एक-दूसरे से जुड़ सकती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: การค้นพบบริการช่วยให้ microservice เชื่อมต่อกันอัตโนมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Penemuan layanan memungkinkan microservices terhubung otomatis.

terms.definition: Endpoint Slice is a Kubernetes API resource that groups network endpoints, providing scalable and efficient service discovery for large clusters.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Endpoint Slices make service discovery more scalable by splitting large numbers of endpoints into manageable groups.

termTranslations.ja: エンドポイントスライス
termTranslations.th: ส่วนของ Endpoint

usageTranslations.en: Endpoint Slices make service discovery more scalable by splitting large numbers of endpoints into manageable groups.
usageTranslations.tr: Endpoint Dilimleri, çok sayıda endpoint’i yönetilebilir gruplara bölerek servis keşfini daha ölçeklenebilir kılar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les tranches de point de terminaison rendent la découverte de service plus évolutive.
usageTranslations.de: Endpoint Slices machen Service-Erkennung durch Gruppierung skalierbar.
usageTranslations.es: Los segmentos de endpoint hacen el descubrimiento de servicios más escalable.
usageTranslations.zh: 端点分片通过分组端点提升服务发现的可扩展性。
usageTranslations.ar: شريحة نقطة النهاية تجعل اكتشاف الخدمة أكثر قابلية للتوسع.
usageTranslations.pt: Segmentos de endpoint tornam a descoberta de serviços escalável.
usageTranslations.ru: Срезы конечных точек делают обнаружение сервисов масштабируемым.
usageTranslations.ja: エンドポイントスライスでサービスディスカバリが拡張性向上。
usageTranslations.it: Le slice di endpoint rendono la scoperta più scalabile.
usageTranslations.vi: Phân đoạn endpoint giúp khám phá dịch vụ dễ mở rộng.
usageTranslations.hi: एंडपॉइंट स्लाइस से सेवा खोज स्केलेबल बनती है।
usageTranslations.th: ส่วนของ endpoint ช่วยให้การค้นหาบริการขยายตัวได้ดีขึ้น
usageTranslations.id: Irisan endpoint membuat penemuan layanan lebih skalabel.

terms.definition: Network Policy defines rules for allowing or denying network traffic to pods or services within a Kubernetes cluster, enhancing security and compliance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Network Policies control which pods can communicate with each other, enforcing security boundaries inside the cluster.

termTranslations.ja: ネットワークポリシー
termTranslations.th: นโยบายเครือข่าย

usageTranslations.en: Network Policies control which pods can communicate with each other, enforcing security boundaries inside the cluster.
usageTranslations.tr: Ağ Politikaları, pod’ların birbirleriyle iletişimini kontrol ederek kümede güvenlik sınırları oluşturur.
usageTranslations.fr: Les politiques réseau contrôlent la communication entre pods.
usageTranslations.de: Netzwerk-Policies steuern die Kommunikation zwischen Pods.
usageTranslations.es: Las políticas de red controlan la comunicación entre pods.
usageTranslations.zh: 网络策略控制 Pod 之间的通信，强化安全隔离。
usageTranslations.ar: سياسات الشبكة تتحكم في الاتصال بين البودات.
usageTranslations.pt: As políticas de rede controlam a comunicação entre pods.
usageTranslations.ru: Сетевые политики контролируют взаимодействие между подами.
usageTranslations.ja: ネットワークポリシーでPod間通信を制御し、セキュリティを強化する。
usageTranslations.it: Le politiche di rete regolano la comunicazione tra pod.
usageTranslations.vi: Chính sách mạng kiểm soát kết nối giữa các pod.
usageTranslations.hi: नेटवर्क नीति pod के बीच संचार नियंत्रित करती है।
usageTranslations.th: นโยบายเครือข่ายควบคุมการสื่อสารระหว่าง pod
usageTranslations.id: Kebijakan jaringan mengatur komunikasi antar pod.

terms.definition: Load Balancer is a network device or software that distributes incoming application traffic across multiple servers or pods to optimize performance and reliability.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A Load Balancer ensures traffic is evenly distributed across all healthy backend pods, improving availability and user experience.

termTranslations.th: โหลดบาลานเซอร์

usageTranslations.en: A Load Balancer ensures traffic is evenly distributed across all healthy backend pods, improving availability and user experience.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük Dengeleyici, tüm sağlıklı pod’lar arasında trafiği dengeli dağıtarak erişilebilirliği ve kullanıcı deneyimini artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le répartiteur de charge distribue le trafic de manière équilibrée entre pods.
usageTranslations.de: Lastenausgleich verteilt den Traffic gleichmäßig über gesunde Pods.
usageTranslations.es: El balanceador de carga distribuye el tráfico entre pods saludables.
usageTranslations.zh: 负载均衡器将流量均匀分配到所有健康的后端 Pod。
usageTranslations.ar: موازن التحميل يوزع الحركة بالتساوي بين البودات السليمة.
usageTranslations.pt: O balanceador de carga distribui o tráfego entre pods saudáveis.
usageTranslations.ru: Балансировщик нагрузки равномерно распределяет трафик между подами.
usageTranslations.ja: ロードバランサーが健全なPod間でトラフィックを分散。
usageTranslations.it: Il bilanciatore di carico distribuisce il traffico fra pod sani.
usageTranslations.vi: Bộ cân bằng tải phân phối lưu lượng đều giữa các pod khỏe mạnh.
usageTranslations.hi: लोड बैलेंसर ट्रैफिक को हेल्दी pods में बाँटता है।
usageTranslations.th: โหลดบาลานเซอร์แจกจ่ายทราฟฟิกไปยัง pod ที่ดีทั้งหมด
usageTranslations.id: Penyeimbang beban mendistribusikan traffic ke pod sehat.

terms.definition: Image Registry is a centralized repository where container images are stored, managed, and retrieved for deployment in orchestration platforms.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Image Registry stores versioned application container images that can be pulled during deployments and scaling operations.

termTranslations.th: รีจิสทรีภาพ

usageTranslations.en: The Image Registry stores versioned application container images that can be pulled during deployments and scaling operations.
usageTranslations.tr: Görsel Kayıt Defteri, dağıtım ve ölçekleme sırasında çekilebilecek sürümlenmiş container imajlarını saklar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le registre d’images stocke les images versionnées pour les déploiements.
usageTranslations.de: Die Image-Registry speichert versionierte Images für Deployments.
usageTranslations.es: El registro de imágenes almacena imágenes versionadas para despliegues.
usageTranslations.zh: 镜像仓库存储可在部署和扩展时拉取的版本化容器镜像。
usageTranslations.ar: سجل الصور يخزن صور الحاوية المرقمة.
usageTranslations.pt: O registro de imagens armazena imagens versionadas para deploy.
usageTranslations.ru: Реестр образов хранит версии контейнерных образов для деплоя.
usageTranslations.ja: イメージレジストリはバージョン管理されたイメージを保存。
usageTranslations.it: Il registro immagini salva le immagini versionate per i deployment.
usageTranslations.vi: Kho ảnh lưu trữ image container có version để dùng khi triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: इमेज रजिस्ट्री वर्शन वाली इमेज स्टोर करती है।
usageTranslations.th: รีจิสทรีภาพเก็บภาพคอนเทนเนอร์สำหรับ deploy
usageTranslations.id: Registri gambar menyimpan image versi untuk deployment.

terms.definition: Admission Controller is a Kubernetes component that intercepts requests to the API server before persistence, enforcing security, policy, or custom logic.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Admission Controllers validate and mutate incoming API requests, rejecting noncompliant objects to enforce cluster policy.

termTranslations.ja: アドミッションコントローラー
termTranslations.th: ตัวควบคุมการรับเข้า

usageTranslations.en: Admission Controllers validate and mutate incoming API requests, rejecting noncompliant objects to enforce cluster policy.
usageTranslations.tr: Kabul Denetleyicileri, API isteklerini doğrular ve küme politikasına uymayan nesneleri reddeder.
usageTranslations.fr: Les contrôleurs d’admission valident les requêtes API entrantes.
usageTranslations.de: Admission Controller prüfen und ändern eingehende API-Anfragen.
usageTranslations.es: El controlador de admisión valida las solicitudes API entrantes.
usageTranslations.zh: 准入控制器验证API请求，拒绝不合规对象。
usageTranslations.ar: مراقبو القبول يتحققون من طلبات API الواردة ويرفضون المخالف.
usageTranslations.pt: Controladores de admissão validam requisições API e rejeitam objetos fora da política.
usageTranslations.ru: Контроллер допуска проверяет входящие API-запросы и отклоняет несоответствующие объекты.
usageTranslations.ja: アドミッションコントローラーはAPIリクエストを検証・変換する。
usageTranslations.it: Il controllore di ammissione valida le richieste API in entrata.
usageTranslations.vi: Bộ kiểm soát truy cập xác thực yêu cầu API, loại bỏ object không phù hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: एडमिशन कंट्रोलर API अनुरोध की जांच कर गैर-अनुपालक ऑब्जेक्ट को रिजेक्ट करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวควบคุมการรับเข้าตรวจสอบคำขอ API และปฏิเสธที่ไม่ผ่าน
usageTranslations.id: Pengontrol penerimaan memvalidasi permintaan API dan menolak objek tidak sesuai.

terms.definition: Operator Pattern is a design pattern in Kubernetes for automating complex application management using custom controllers and resources.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Operator Pattern extends Kubernetes to manage stateful applications with custom resources and controllers.

termTranslations.th: รูปแบบโอเปอเรเตอร์

usageTranslations.en: The Operator Pattern extends Kubernetes to manage stateful applications with custom resources and controllers.
usageTranslations.tr: Operatör Deseni, Kubernetes’i özel kaynaklar ve kontrolcülerle stateful uygulama yönetimine genişletir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le patron opérateur étend Kubernetes pour gérer des applications avec des ressources personnalisées.
usageTranslations.de: Operator Pattern erweitert Kubernetes für zustandsbehaftete Anwendungen.
usageTranslations.es: El patrón de operador amplía Kubernetes para administrar aplicaciones stateful.
usageTranslations.zh: 运算符模式扩展 Kubernetes 以管理有状态应用。
usageTranslations.ar: نمط المشغل يوسع كوبرنيتس لإدارة التطبيقات ذات الحالة.
usageTranslations.pt: O padrão operador expande o Kubernetes para aplicativos stateful.
usageTranslations.ru: Паттерн оператора расширяет Kubernetes для управления stateful-приложениями.
usageTranslations.ja: オペレータパターンはKubernetesでステートフルアプリを管理可能にする。
usageTranslations.it: Il pattern operatore estende Kubernetes per applicazioni stateful.
usageTranslations.vi: Mẫu Operator mở rộng Kubernetes để quản lý ứng dụng stateful.
usageTranslations.hi: ऑपरेटर पैटर्न क्यूबेरनेट्स को स्टेटफुल ऐप्स के लिए बढ़ाता है।
usageTranslations.th: รูปแบบโอเปอเรเตอร์ขยาย Kubernetes ให้รองรับแอพ stateful
usageTranslations.id: Pola Operator memperluas Kubernetes untuk aplikasi stateful.

terms.definition: Custom Resource is a user-defined extension of the Kubernetes API, enabling the management of custom application objects and automation via controllers.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Custom Resources enable developers to create domain-specific objects and automate their lifecycle in Kubernetes.

termTranslations.th: ทรัพยากรที่กำหนดเอง

usageTranslations.en: Custom Resources enable developers to create domain-specific objects and automate their lifecycle in Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.tr: Özel Kaynaklar, geliştiricilerin alan özel nesneler oluşturmasına ve yaşam döngüsünü otomatikleştirmesine olanak tanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les ressources personnalisées permettent de créer et automatiser des objets spécifiques.
usageTranslations.de: Benutzerdefinierte Ressourcen erlauben domänenspezifische Objekte in Kubernetes.
usageTranslations.es: Los recursos personalizados permiten crear y automatizar objetos de dominio.
usageTranslations.zh: 自定义资源允许开发者创建和自动化领域对象。
usageTranslations.ar: الموارد المخصصة تمكن المطورين من إنشاء كائنات خاصة.
usageTranslations.pt: Recursos personalizados permitem automatizar objetos específicos.
usageTranslations.ru: Пользовательские ресурсы позволяют создавать и автоматизировать объекты.
usageTranslations.ja: カスタムリソースはドメイン固有オブジェクトを自動管理できる。
usageTranslations.it: Le risorse personalizzate permettono la gestione automatica di oggetti custom.
usageTranslations.vi: Tài nguyên tùy chỉnh cho phép tạo và tự động hóa đối tượng.
usageTranslations.hi: कस्टम रिसोर्स domain-specific ऑब्जेक्ट को automate करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ทรัพยากรที่กำหนดเองช่วยสร้างและออโต้ lifecycle
usageTranslations.id: Sumber daya kustom memungkinkan otomatisasi objek khusus.

terms.definition: Node Selector is a Kubernetes scheduling mechanism that assigns pods to nodes based on label matching, enabling targeted workload placement.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Node Selector lets administrators assign pods to nodes with specific hardware or labels, ensuring optimal resource usage.

termTranslations.th: ตัวเลือกโหนด

usageTranslations.en: Node Selector lets administrators assign pods to nodes with specific hardware or labels, ensuring optimal resource usage.
usageTranslations.tr: Node Seçici, pod’ları belirli donanım ya da label’a sahip node’lara atamayı sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le sélecteur de nœud permet d’assigner des pods à certains nœuds.
usageTranslations.de: Node-Selector weist Pods Nodes mit bestimmten Labels zu.
usageTranslations.es: El selector de nodo asigna pods a nodos con etiquetas específicas.
usageTranslations.zh: 节点选择器可将 Pod 分配到特定标签节点。
usageTranslations.ar: محدد العقدة يعين البودات لعقد معينة.
usageTranslations.pt: Seletor de nó atribui pods a nós com rótulos específicos.
usageTranslations.ru: Селектор узлов назначает поды на узлы с нужными метками.
usageTranslations.ja: ノードセレクターで特定ラベルのノードへPod割当可能。
usageTranslations.it: Il selettore nodo consente di assegnare pod a nodi specifici.
usageTranslations.vi: Bộ chọn nút gán pod cho node theo nhãn.
usageTranslations.hi: नोड चयनकर्ता pod को label वाले node पर रखता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวเลือกโหนดกำหนด pod ไปยัง node ตาม label
usageTranslations.id: Pemilih node mengatur penempatan pod ke node tertentu.

terms.definition: A Readiness Probe is a Kubernetes mechanism that checks if a container is ready to serve traffic, ensuring only healthy pods receive requests.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Readiness Probe checks if the pod is prepared to accept traffic before routing requests to it.

termTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบความพร้อม

usageTranslations.en: The Readiness Probe checks if the pod is prepared to accept traffic before routing requests to it.
usageTranslations.tr: Hazırlık Probı, pod’a trafik yönlendirilmeden önce hazır olup olmadığını kontrol eder.
usageTranslations.fr: La sonde de disponibilité vérifie si le pod peut recevoir du trafic.
usageTranslations.de: Die Bereitschafts-Prüfung prüft, ob ein Pod Anfragen empfangen kann.
usageTranslations.es: La sonda de disponibilidad verifica si el pod puede recibir tráfico.
usageTranslations.zh: 就绪探针检查 Pod 是否能接收流量。
usageTranslations.ar: مسبار الجاهزية يتحقق من استعداد البود لاستقبال الحركة.
usageTranslations.pt: A sonda de prontidão verifica se o pod pode receber tráfego.
usageTranslations.ru: Проба готовности проверяет, готов ли под принимать трафик.
usageTranslations.ja: レディネスプローブはPodがトラフィック受信可かを確認する。
usageTranslations.it: La probe di prontezza verifica se il pod può ricevere traffico.
usageTranslations.vi: Thăm dò sẵn sàng kiểm tra pod đã nhận traffic chưa.
usageTranslations.hi: तत्परता जांच करती है कि pod ट्रैफिक ले सकता है या नहीं।
usageTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบความพร้อมจะเช็คว่า pod พร้อมรับทราฟฟิกหรือไม่
usageTranslations.id: Probe kesiapan memeriksa apakah pod siap menerima trafik.

terms.definition: A Liveness Probe is a health check used by Kubernetes to determine if a container is running. If it fails, the container is restarted automatically.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Liveness Probe helps ensure the container is healthy and restarts it automatically if it becomes unresponsive.

termTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบการมีชีวิต

usageTranslations.en: The Liveness Probe helps ensure the container is healthy and restarts it automatically if it becomes unresponsive.
usageTranslations.tr: Canlılık Probı, container sağlığını kontrol eder ve yanıt vermezse otomatik yeniden başlatır.
usageTranslations.fr: La sonde de vivacité vérifie la santé du conteneur et le redémarre si nécessaire.
usageTranslations.de: Die Lebens-Prüfung überwacht die Gesundheit und startet neu bei Problemen.
usageTranslations.es: La sonda de vitalidad comprueba la salud del contenedor y lo reinicia si no responde.
usageTranslations.zh: 存活探针确保容器健康，无响应时自动重启。
usageTranslations.ar: مسبار الحية يضمن صحة الحاوية ويعيد تشغيلها تلقائيًا.
usageTranslations.pt: A sonda de vivacidade reinicia o container automaticamente se não responder.
usageTranslations.ru: Проба живости обеспечивает автоматический рестарт контейнера.
usageTranslations.ja: ライブネスプローブは健康状態を確認し応答がないと再起動する。
usageTranslations.it: La probe di vitalità riavvia automaticamente il container se non risponde.
usageTranslations.vi: Thăm dò sống kiểm tra và khởi động lại container nếu không phản hồi.
usageTranslations.hi: सक्रियता जांच से कंटेनर अनुत्तरदायी होने पर रीस्टार्ट होता है।
usageTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบการมีชีวิตช่วย restart container อัตโนมัติเมื่อไม่ตอบสนอง
usageTranslations.id: Probe kehidupan akan restart container otomatis jika tidak responsif.

terms.definition: A Pod Template is a Kubernetes object that defines the specification for creating pods, including containers, resources, and labels, used by controllers for replication.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Pod Template defines container images, resources, and metadata for all replicated pods managed by controllers.

termTranslations.th: แม่แบบ Pod

usageTranslations.en: The Pod Template defines container images, resources, and metadata for all replicated pods managed by controllers.
usageTranslations.tr: Pod Şablonu, kontrolcüler tarafından yönetilen çoğaltılmış pod’ların container imajı, kaynakları ve metadata’sını tanımlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le modèle de pod définit les images, ressources et métadonnées des pods.
usageTranslations.de: Die Pod-Vorlage legt Images, Ressourcen und Metadaten fest.
usageTranslations.es: La plantilla de pod define imágenes, recursos y metadatos.
usageTranslations.zh: Pod 模板定义容器镜像、资源和元数据。
usageTranslations.ar: قالب البود يحدد الصور والموارد والبيانات الوصفية.
usageTranslations.pt: O modelo de pod define imagens, recursos e metadados.
usageTranslations.ru: Шаблон пода задаёт образы, ресурсы и метаданные.
usageTranslations.ja: ポッドテンプレートはイメージ、リソース、メタデータを定義。
usageTranslations.it: Il template pod definisce immagini, risorse e metadati.
usageTranslations.vi: Mẫu pod xác định image, tài nguyên, và metadata.
usageTranslations.hi: पॉड टेम्पलेट images, resources, metadata निर्धारित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: แม่แบบ Pod กำหนด image, resource และ metadata
usageTranslations.id: Template pod menentukan image, resource, dan metadata.

terms.definition: Pod Security refers to the policies and controls applied to Kubernetes pods to enforce isolation, least privilege, and protection against security threats.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pod Security Policies restrict container privileges and prevent escalation of security risks in Kubernetes clusters.

termTranslations.th: ความปลอดภัยของ pod

usageTranslations.en: Pod Security Policies restrict container privileges and prevent escalation of security risks in Kubernetes clusters.
usageTranslations.tr: Pod Güvenliği Politikaları, container ayrıcalıklarını kısıtlar ve güvenlik risklerinin artmasını önler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les politiques de sécurité du pod restreignent les privilèges des conteneurs.
usageTranslations.de: Pod-Sicherheitsrichtlinien beschränken Container-Rechte.
usageTranslations.es: Las políticas de seguridad de pod limitan los privilegios del contenedor.
usageTranslations.zh: Pod 安全策略限制容器权限并防止安全风险升级。
usageTranslations.ar: سياسات أمان البود تقيد صلاحيات الحاوية وتمنع تصعيد المخاطر.
usageTranslations.pt: Políticas de segurança de pod restringem privilégios dos containers.
usageTranslations.ru: Политики безопасности пода ограничивают привилегии контейнеров.
usageTranslations.ja: ポッドセキュリティポリシーは特権とリスクを制限。
usageTranslations.it: Le policy di sicurezza pod limitano i privilegi dei container.
usageTranslations.vi: Chính sách bảo mật pod giới hạn quyền container.
usageTranslations.hi: पॉड सुरक्षा नीति container विशेषाधिकार सीमित करती है।
usageTranslations.th: นโยบายความปลอดภัยของ pod จำกัดสิทธิ์ container
usageTranslations.id: Kebijakan keamanan pod membatasi hak istimewa container.

terms.definition: Resource Limit defines the maximum CPU and memory allocation for a container or pod, ensuring stable cluster operation and fair resource usage.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Setting a Resource Limit prevents a single pod from consuming excessive CPU or memory, protecting cluster stability.

termTranslations.th: ขีดจำกัดทรัพยากร

usageTranslations.en: Setting a Resource Limit prevents a single pod from consuming excessive CPU or memory, protecting cluster stability.
usageTranslations.tr: Kaynak Limiti belirlemek, bir pod’un aşırı CPU veya hafıza tüketmesini önler.
usageTranslations.fr: Définir une limite de ressource empêche une surconsommation par un pod.
usageTranslations.de: Ressourcenlimits verhindern, dass ein Pod zu viele Ressourcen verbraucht.
usageTranslations.es: El límite de recursos impide que un pod consuma demasiado.
usageTranslations.zh: 设置资源限制防止单个 Pod 过度占用资源。
usageTranslations.ar: تحديد حد للموارد يمنع الاستهلاك المفرط من بود واحد.
usageTranslations.pt: Limite de recurso impede que um pod consuma demais.
usageTranslations.ru: Лимит ресурсов не даёт поду потреблять лишние ресурсы.
usageTranslations.ja: リソース制限でPodの過剰な消費を防ぐ。
usageTranslations.it: Il limite di risorse evita il sovrautilizzo da parte di un pod.
usageTranslations.vi: Giới hạn tài nguyên tránh pod tiêu tốn quá nhiều.
usageTranslations.hi: संसाधन सीमा से pod अत्यधिक CPU या मेमोरी नहीं लेता।
usageTranslations.th: ขีดจำกัดทรัพยากรป้องกัน pod ใช้เกิน
usageTranslations.id: Batasan sumber daya mencegah pod memakai terlalu banyak.

terms.definition: Auto Scaling automatically adjusts the number of running pods or nodes in response to workload demand, optimizing resource utilization and costs.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Auto Scaling increases or decreases pod counts automatically based on CPU utilization metrics in Kubernetes clusters.

termTranslations.th: การปรับขนาดอัตโนมัติ

usageTranslations.en: Auto Scaling increases or decreases pod counts automatically based on CPU utilization metrics in Kubernetes clusters.
usageTranslations.tr: Otomatik Ölçekleme, CPU kullanımına göre pod sayısını otomatik artırır veya azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: La mise à l’échelle automatique ajuste le nombre de pods selon l’utilisation CPU.
usageTranslations.de: Automatisches Skalieren passt die Pod-Anzahl je nach CPU-Auslastung an.
usageTranslations.es: El escalado automático ajusta la cantidad de pods según el uso de CPU.
usageTranslations.zh: 自动扩缩容根据CPU使用率自动调整Pod数量。
usageTranslations.ar: التوسيع التلقائي يضبط عدد البودات حسب استهلاك المعالج.
usageTranslations.pt: Auto Scaling ajusta a quantidade de pods conforme uso de CPU.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматическое масштабирование регулирует число подов по загрузке CPU.
usageTranslations.ja: オートスケーリングはCPU使用率でPod数を調整する。
usageTranslations.it: Auto Scaling regola il numero di pod secondo l’uso CPU.
usageTranslations.vi: Tự động mở rộng điều chỉnh số lượng pod theo CPU.
usageTranslations.hi: स्वचालित स्केलिंग CPU के अनुसार pod की संख्या बदलती है।
usageTranslations.th: การปรับขนาดอัตโนมัติปรับจำนวน pod ตาม CPU
usageTranslations.id: Auto Scaling mengatur jumlah pod sesuai CPU.

terms.definition: Controller Manager is a Kubernetes component that runs core controllers, automating tasks such as node management, replication, and endpoint updates.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The Controller Manager orchestrates the actions of controllers such as Replication, Node, and Endpoint Controllers within the cluster.

termTranslations.ja: コントローラマネージャー
termTranslations.vi: Trình quản lý bộ điều khiển
termTranslations.th: ตัวจัดการคอนโทรลเลอร์

usageTranslations.en: The Controller Manager orchestrates the actions of controllers such as Replication, Node, and Endpoint Controllers within the cluster.
usageTranslations.tr: Kontrolcü Yöneticisi, Replication, Node ve Endpoint gibi kontrolcülerin kümedeki eylemlerini koordine eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Le gestionnaire de contrôleur orchestre les actions des contrôleurs dans le cluster.
usageTranslations.de: Der Controller-Manager steuert alle Controller-Aktionen im Cluster.
usageTranslations.es: El gestor de controladores orquesta las acciones de los controladores en el clúster.
usageTranslations.zh: 控制器管理器协调集群中各控制器的操作。
usageTranslations.ar: مدير وحدة التحكم ينسق بين وحدات التحكم في المجموعة.
usageTranslations.pt: O gerenciador de controladores orquestra as ações dos controladores.
