terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: All major application changes must be deployed within an approved release window to avoid peak usage disruptions.

termTranslations.th: ช่วงเวลาปล่อยอัปเดต

usageTranslations.en: All major application changes must be deployed within an approved release window to avoid peak usage disruptions.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm büyük uygulama değişiklikleri, yoğun kullanım kesintilerini önlemek için onaylı bir yayın zaman aralığında dağıtılmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Tous les changements majeurs d’application doivent être déployés dans une fenêtre de déploiement approuvée pour éviter les perturbations aux heures de pointe.
usageTranslations.de: Alle größeren Anwendungsänderungen müssen innerhalb eines genehmigten Release-Fensters bereitgestellt werden, um Störungen zu Spitzenzeiten zu vermeiden.
usageTranslations.es: Todos los cambios importantes en la aplicación deben implementarse dentro de una ventana de lanzamiento aprobada para evitar interrupciones en horas pico.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有主要应用更改都必须在批准的发布窗口内部署，以避免高峰期中断。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب نشر جميع تغييرات التطبيقات الرئيسية ضمن نافذة الإصدار المعتمدة لتجنب تعطيل فترات الذروة.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as principais alterações de aplicativos devem ser implementadas dentro de uma janela de liberação aprovada para evitar interrupções em horários de pico.
usageTranslations.ru: Все значительные изменения в приложении должны внедряться в утвержденное окно релиза, чтобы избежать перебоев в часы пик.
usageTranslations.ja: すべての主要なアプリケーション変更は、ピーク時の中断を避けるため、承認されたリリースウィンドウ内にデプロイする必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le principali modifiche all’applicazione devono essere distribuite all’interno di una finestra di rilascio approvata per evitare interruzioni nei periodi di massimo utilizzo.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả các thay đổi lớn của ứng dụng phải được triển khai trong khung thời gian phát hành đã phê duyệt để tránh gián đoạn giờ cao điểm.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी बड़े एप्लिकेशन बदलावों को स्वीकृत रिलीज़ विंडो के भीतर ही डिप्लॉय किया जाना चाहिए ताकि पीक उपयोग के दौरान व्यवधान से बचा जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: การเปลี่ยนแปลงแอปพลิเคชันครั้งสำคัญทั้งหมดต้องถูกปล่อยภายในช่วงเวลาปล่อยอัปเดตที่ได้รับอนุมัติเพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงปัญหาในช่วงที่มีการใช้งานสูงสุด
usageTranslations.id: Semua perubahan aplikasi utama harus diterapkan dalam jendela rilis yang disetujui untuk menghindari gangguan pada jam sibuk.

terms.definition: A chronological record of key events, actions, alerts, and communications during an incident, enabling postmortem analysis and process improvement.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The incident timeline documents when alerts fired, who responded, and each mitigation step until service restoration.

termTranslations.ja: インシデントタイムライン
termTranslations.th: ไทม์ไลน์เหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: The incident timeline documents when alerts fired, who responded, and each mitigation step until service restoration.
usageTranslations.tr: Olay zaman çizelgesi, uyarıların ne zaman tetiklendiğini, kimin yanıt verdiğini ve hizmetin geri getirilmesine kadar atılan her adımı belgeler.
usageTranslations.fr: La chronologie de l’incident documente quand les alertes ont été déclenchées, qui a répondu et chaque étape d’atténuation jusqu’à la restauration du service.
usageTranslations.de: Die Vorfall-Timeline dokumentiert, wann Alarme ausgelöst wurden, wer reagierte und welche Maßnahmen bis zur Wiederherstellung des Dienstes ergriffen wurden.
usageTranslations.es: La cronología del incidente documenta cuándo se activaron las alertas, quién respondió y cada paso de mitigación hasta la restauración del servicio.
usageTranslations.zh: 事件时间线记录了警报触发的时间、响应人员以及恢复服务前的每个缓解步骤。
usageTranslations.ar: يوثق الجدول الزمني للحادث متى تم إطلاق التنبيهات ومن استجاب وكل خطوة للتخفيف حتى استعادة الخدمة.
usageTranslations.pt: A linha do tempo do incidente documenta quando os alertas foram disparados, quem respondeu e cada etapa de mitigação até a restauração do serviço.
usageTranslations.ru: Хронология инцидента фиксирует время срабатывания оповещений, кто реагировал и каждый шаг по устранению до восстановления сервиса.
usageTranslations.ja: インシデントタイムラインは、アラートの発生時刻、対応者、および復旧までの各対応を記録します。
usageTranslations.it: La cronologia dell’incidente documenta quando sono scattati gli avvisi, chi ha risposto e ogni fase di mitigazione fino al ripristino del servizio.
usageTranslations.vi: Dòng thời gian sự cố ghi lại thời điểm cảnh báo được kích hoạt, ai phản hồi và từng bước khắc phục cho đến khi phục hồi dịch vụ.
usageTranslations.hi: घटना समयरेखा में अलर्ट कब ट्रिगर हुए, किसने प्रतिक्रिया दी और सेवा बहाली तक के सभी निवारण चरण दर्ज होते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ไทม์ไลน์เหตุการณ์บันทึกเวลาที่แจ้งเตือนถูกทริกเกอร์ ใครเป็นผู้ตอบสนอง และแต่ละขั้นตอนการแก้ไขจนกว่าบริการจะกลับคืน
usageTranslations.id: Linimasa insiden mendokumentasikan kapan peringatan dipicu, siapa yang merespons, dan setiap langkah mitigasi hingga layanan dipulihkan.

terms.definition: The process of correcting or reverting configuration, infrastructure, or policy drift to realign with the approved baseline or desired state.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Automated drift remediation returns infrastructure to its intended state after unauthorized changes are detected.

termTranslations.th: การแก้ไขดริฟท์

usageTranslations.en: Automated drift remediation returns infrastructure to its intended state after unauthorized changes are detected.
usageTranslations.tr: Otomatik sapma giderme, yetkisiz değişiklikler tespit edildikten sonra altyapıyı hedeflenen duruma geri getirir.
usageTranslations.fr: La remédiation de dérive automatisée ramène l’infrastructure à son état prévu après la détection de modifications non autorisées.
usageTranslations.de: Automatisierte Drift-Behebung stellt die Infrastruktur nach Erkennung unautorisierter Änderungen wieder in den Soll-Zustand zurück.
usageTranslations.es: La remediación automática de desviaciones restaura la infraestructura a su estado previsto tras detectar cambios no autorizados.
usageTranslations.zh: 自动漂移修正会在检测到未授权更改后将基础设施恢复到预期状态。
usageTranslations.ar: تعيد معالجة الانحراف التلقائية البنية التحتية إلى حالتها المقصودة بعد اكتشاف تغييرات غير مصرح بها.
usageTranslations.pt: A remediação automatizada de desvio devolve a infraestrutura ao estado pretendido após a detecção de alterações não autorizadas.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматическое устранение отклонений возвращает инфраструктуру к требуемому состоянию после обнаружения несанкционированных изменений.
usageTranslations.ja: 自動ドリフト修復は、不正な変更が検出された後にインフラを意図した状態に戻します。
usageTranslations.it: La correzione automatica delle deviazioni riporta l’infrastruttura allo stato desiderato dopo il rilevamento di modifiche non autorizzate.
usageTranslations.vi: Khắc phục trôi tự động đưa cơ sở hạ tầng trở về trạng thái dự kiến sau khi phát hiện thay đổi trái phép.
usageTranslations.hi: स्वचालित ड्रिफ्ट सुधार अनधिकृत परिवर्तनों का पता चलने के बाद इन्फ्रास्ट्रक्चर को उसके इच्छित स्थिति में लौटाता है।
usageTranslations.th: การแก้ไขดริฟท์อัตโนมัติจะคืนโครงสร้างพื้นฐานให้กลับสู่สถานะที่ต้องการหลังตรวจพบการเปลี่ยนแปลงที่ไม่ได้รับอนุญาต
usageTranslations.id: Remediasi drift otomatis mengembalikan infrastruktur ke keadaan yang dimaksudkan setelah perubahan tidak sah terdeteksi.

terms.definition: A formal process of simulating user loads or transactions to measure application, service, or infrastructure responsiveness, stability, and scalability under various conditions.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A performance test revealed that the database could not handle peak-hour query volume without significant latency.

termTranslations.ja: パフォーマンステスト
termTranslations.th: การทดสอบประสิทธิภาพ

usageTranslations.en: A performance test revealed that the database could not handle peak-hour query volume without significant latency.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir performans testi, veritabanının yoğun saatlerdeki sorgu hacmini önemli gecikme olmadan işleyemediğini ortaya koydu.
usageTranslations.fr: Un test de performance a révélé que la base de données ne pouvait pas gérer le volume de requêtes aux heures de pointe sans latence significative.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Leistungstest zeigte, dass die Datenbank das Abfragevolumen zu Spitzenzeiten nicht ohne erhebliche Latenz bewältigen konnte.
usageTranslations.es: Una prueba de rendimiento reveló que la base de datos no podía manejar el volumen de consultas en horas pico sin latencia significativa.
usageTranslations.zh: 性能测试显示数据库无法在高峰时段处理大量查询而不会产生严重延迟。
usageTranslations.ar: كشف اختبار الأداء أن قاعدة البيانات لا يمكنها معالجة حجم الاستعلام في ساعات الذروة بدون زمن انتقال كبير.
usageTranslations.pt: Um teste de desempenho revelou que o banco de dados não conseguia lidar com o volume de consultas no horário de pico sem latência significativa.
usageTranslations.ru: Тест производительности показал, что база данных не справляется с объемом запросов в часы пик без значительной задержки.
usageTranslations.ja: パフォーマンステストにより、データベースはピーク時のクエリ量を大きな遅延なしに処理できないことが判明した。
usageTranslations.it: Un test delle prestazioni ha rivelato che il database non riusciva a gestire il volume di query nelle ore di punta senza latenza significativa.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm tra hiệu năng cho thấy cơ sở dữ liệu không thể xử lý khối lượng truy vấn giờ cao điểm mà không gặp độ trễ đáng kể.
usageTranslations.hi: एक परफॉरमेंस टेस्ट से पता चला कि डाटाबेस पीक आवर क्वेरी वॉल्यूम को महत्वपूर्ण विलंबता के बिना संभाल नहीं सकता था।
usageTranslations.th: การทดสอบประสิทธิภาพเผยว่าฐานข้อมูลไม่สามารถรองรับปริมาณคำขอช่วงพีคโดยไม่มีความหน่วงสำคัญ
usageTranslations.id: Tes kinerja mengungkapkan bahwa basis data tidak dapat menangani volume kueri jam sibuk tanpa latensi yang signifikan.

terms.definition: The measurement and analysis of how computing resources such as CPU, memory, storage, or network bandwidth are consumed by systems, services, or workloads.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Continuous monitoring of resource utilization helps prevent capacity bottlenecks and optimizes cloud spend.

termTranslations.th: การใช้ทรัพยากร

usageTranslations.en: Continuous monitoring of resource utilization helps prevent capacity bottlenecks and optimizes cloud spend.
usageTranslations.tr: Kaynak kullanımının sürekli izlenmesi, kapasite darboğazlarını önlemeye ve bulut harcamalarını optimize etmeye yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: La surveillance continue de l’utilisation des ressources aide à prévenir les goulots d’étranglement de capacité et à optimiser les dépenses cloud.
usageTranslations.de: Die kontinuierliche Überwachung der Ressourcenauslastung hilft, Kapazitätsengpässe zu vermeiden und die Cloud-Ausgaben zu optimieren.
usageTranslations.es: La monitorización continua del uso de recursos ayuda a evitar cuellos de botella de capacidad y optimiza el gasto en la nube.
usageTranslations.zh: 对资源利用率的持续监控有助于防止容量瓶颈并优化云支出。
usageTranslations.ar: تساعد المراقبة المستمرة لاستخدام الموارد على منع اختناقات السعة وتحسين إنفاق السحابة.
usageTranslations.pt: O monitoramento contínuo da utilização de recursos ajuda a evitar gargalos de capacidade e otimiza os gastos com nuvem.
usageTranslations.ru: Постоянный мониторинг использования ресурсов помогает предотвратить узкие места по мощности и оптимизировать расходы на облако.
usageTranslations.ja: リソース使用率の継続的な監視は、容量のボトルネックを防ぎ、クラウドコストを最適化します。
usageTranslations.it: Il monitoraggio continuo dell’utilizzo delle risorse aiuta a prevenire colli di bottiglia di capacità e ottimizza la spesa cloud.
usageTranslations.vi: Giám sát liên tục việc sử dụng tài nguyên giúp ngăn ngừa tắc nghẽn dung lượng và tối ưu hóa chi phí đám mây.
usageTranslations.hi: रिसोर्स उपयोग की निरंतर निगरानी क्षमता की रुकावटों को रोकती है और क्लाउड खर्च को अनुकूलित करती है।
usageTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบการใช้ทรัพยากรอย่างต่อเนื่องช่วยป้องกันปัญหาคอขวดและเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพค่าใช้จ่ายบนคลาวด์
usageTranslations.id: Pemantauan berkelanjutan atas pemanfaatan sumber daya membantu mencegah kemacetan kapasitas dan mengoptimalkan pengeluaran cloud.

terms.definition: A logically isolated location within a cloud region designed with independent power, networking, and cooling to increase service resilience and fault tolerance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Deploying resources across multiple availability zones mitigates the risk of a single point of failure.

termTranslations.ja: アベイラビリティゾーン
termTranslations.th: เขตความพร้อมใช้งาน

usageTranslations.en: Deploying resources across multiple availability zones mitigates the risk of a single point of failure.
usageTranslations.tr: Kaynakların birden fazla erişilebilirlik alanına dağıtılması, tekil hata noktası riskini azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le déploiement de ressources dans plusieurs zones de disponibilité atténue le risque de point de défaillance unique.
usageTranslations.de: Die Bereitstellung von Ressourcen in mehreren Verfügbarkeitszonen mindert das Risiko eines einzelnen Ausfallpunkts.
usageTranslations.es: Implementar recursos en varias zonas de disponibilidad mitiga el riesgo de un punto único de falla.
usageTranslations.zh: 在多个可用区部署资源可降低单点故障的风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يؤدي توزيع الموارد عبر عدة مناطق توفر إلى تقليل مخاطر نقطة الفشل المفردة.
usageTranslations.pt: Implantar recursos em várias zonas de disponibilidade reduz o risco de um ponto único de falha.
usageTranslations.ru: Развертывание ресурсов в нескольких зонах доступности снижает риск единой точки отказа.
usageTranslations.ja: 複数のアベイラビリティゾーンにリソースを展開すると、単一障害点のリスクが軽減されます。
usageTranslations.it: Distribuire le risorse su più zone di disponibilità riduce il rischio di un singolo punto di guasto.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai tài nguyên trên nhiều vùng khả dụng giảm rủi ro điểm lỗi đơn lẻ.
usageTranslations.hi: कई अवेलिबिलिटी जोन में संसाधनों को डिप्लॉय करने से सिंगल पॉइंट ऑफ फेल्योर का जोखिम कम होता है।
usageTranslations.th: การปรับใช้ทรัพยากรในหลายเขตความพร้อมใช้งานจะช่วยลดความเสี่ยงของจุดล้มเหลวเดียว
usageTranslations.id: Penyebaran sumber daya di beberapa zona ketersediaan mengurangi risiko titik kegagalan tunggal.

terms.definition: An automated or manual alert that informs users, stakeholders, or integrated systems about planned or unplanned service outages, including expected impact and resolution updates.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A downtime notification was sent to all clients prior to scheduled system maintenance.

termTranslations.th: การแจ้งเตือนการหยุดทำงาน

usageTranslations.en: A downtime notification was sent to all clients prior to scheduled system maintenance.
usageTranslations.tr: Planlı sistem bakımı öncesinde tüm müşterilere kesinti bildirimi gönderildi.
usageTranslations.fr: Une notification d’indisponibilité a été envoyée à tous les clients avant la maintenance programmée du système.
usageTranslations.de: Vor der geplanten Systemwartung wurde eine Ausfallbenachrichtigung an alle Kunden versendet.
usageTranslations.es: Se envió una notificación de inactividad a todos los clientes antes del mantenimiento programado del sistema.
usageTranslations.zh: 在计划的系统维护之前，向所有客户发送了停机通知。
usageTranslations.ar: تم إرسال إشعار التوقف إلى جميع العملاء قبل صيانة النظام المجدولة.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma notificação de indisponibilidade foi enviada a todos os clientes antes da manutenção programada do sistema.
usageTranslations.ru: Уведомление о простое было отправлено всем клиентам перед запланированным обслуживанием системы.
usageTranslations.ja: 予定されたシステムメンテナンス前に、すべてのクライアントにダウンタイム通知が送信されました。
usageTranslations.it: Una notifica di inattività è stata inviata a tutti i clienti prima della manutenzione programmata del sistema.
usageTranslations.vi: Thông báo ngừng hoạt động đã được gửi đến tất cả khách hàng trước khi bảo trì hệ thống theo lịch trình.
usageTranslations.hi: अनुसूचित सिस्टम रखरखाव से पहले सभी ग्राहकों को डाउनटाइम सूचना भेजी गई।
usageTranslations.th: มีการส่งการแจ้งเตือนการหยุดทำงานไปยังลูกค้าทุกคนก่อนการบำรุงรักษาระบบที่กำหนดไว้
usageTranslations.id: Notifikasi downtime dikirim ke semua klien sebelum pemeliharaan sistem terjadwal.

terms.definition: A documented protocol specifying how, when, and to whom alerts or incidents are elevated if initial response targets are unmet, ensuring timely mitigation and accountability.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The escalation policy ensures that unresolved critical incidents are assigned to senior engineers within 15 minutes.

termTranslations.ja: エスカレーションポリシー
termTranslations.th: นโยบายการยกระดับ

usageTranslations.en: The escalation policy ensures that unresolved critical incidents are assigned to senior engineers within 15 minutes.
usageTranslations.tr: Yükseltme politikası, çözülemeyen kritik olayların 15 dakika içinde kıdemli mühendislere atanmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La politique d’escalade garantit que les incidents critiques non résolus sont affectés à des ingénieurs seniors sous 15 minutes.
usageTranslations.de: Die Eskalationsrichtlinie stellt sicher, dass ungelöste kritische Vorfälle innerhalb von 15 Minuten an leitende Ingenieure weitergeleitet werden.
usageTranslations.es: La política de escalamiento garantiza que los incidentes críticos no resueltos se asignen a ingenieros sénior en 15 minutos.
usageTranslations.zh: 升级策略确保未解决的关键事件在15分钟内分配给高级工程师。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن سياسة التصعيد إسناد الحوادث الحرجة غير المحلولة إلى مهندسين كبار خلال 15 دقيقة.
usageTranslations.pt: A política de escalonamento garante que incidentes críticos não resolvidos sejam atribuídos a engenheiros seniores em 15 minutos.
usageTranslations.ru: Политика эскалации гарантирует, что нерешённые критические инциденты будут назначены старшим инженерам в течение 15 минут.
usageTranslations.ja: エスカレーションポリシーは、未解決の重大なインシデントが15分以内に上級エンジニアに割り当てられることを保証します。
usageTranslations.it: La politica di escalation garantisce che gli incidenti critici irrisolti siano assegnati a ingegneri senior entro 15 minuti.
usageTranslations.vi: Chính sách leo thang đảm bảo các sự cố nghiêm trọng chưa được giải quyết sẽ được giao cho kỹ sư cấp cao trong vòng 15 phút.
usageTranslations.hi: एस्केलेशन नीति यह सुनिश्चित करती है कि अनसुलझे गंभीर घटनाएं 15 मिनट के भीतर वरिष्ठ इंजीनियरों को सौंप दी जाएं।
usageTranslations.th: นโยบายการยกระดับช่วยให้แน่ใจว่าเหตุการณ์วิกฤตที่ยังไม่ได้รับการแก้ไขจะถูกมอบหมายให้วิศวกรอาวุโสภายใน 15 นาที
usageTranslations.id: Kebijakan eskalasi memastikan insiden kritis yang belum terselesaikan ditugaskan ke insinyur senior dalam 15 menit.

terms.definition: A sudden, often short-lived increase in response time or processing delay in services, networks, or integrations, potentially signaling overload, bottlenecks, or emerging incidents.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A latency spike during peak usage hours caused API timeouts and user-facing errors.

termTranslations.th: พุ่งขึ้นของค่าความหน่วง

usageTranslations.en: A latency spike during peak usage hours caused API timeouts and user-facing errors.
usageTranslations.tr: Yoğun kullanım saatlerinde yaşanan gecikme sıçraması, API zaman aşımına ve kullanıcı hatalarına yol açtı.
usageTranslations.fr: Un pic de latence pendant les heures de pointe a entraîné des expirations d’API et des erreurs côté utilisateur.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Latenzspitze während der Hauptnutzungszeiten führte zu API-Timeouts und Nutzerfehlern.
usageTranslations.es: Un pico de latencia durante las horas pico causó expiraciones de API y errores visibles para los usuarios.
usageTranslations.zh: 高峰时段的延迟激增导致API超时和用户错误。
usageTranslations.ar: تسبب ارتفاع الكمون خلال ساعات الذروة في انتهاء مهلة واجهات برمجة التطبيقات وأخطاء تواجه المستخدم.
usageTranslations.pt: Um pico de latência durante os horários de pico causou timeouts de API e erros para os usuários.
usageTranslations.ru: Всплеск задержки в часы пик привёл к тайм-аутам API и ошибкам для пользователей.
usageTranslations.ja: ピーク時のレイテンシスパイクがAPIタイムアウトとユーザー向けエラーを引き起こしました。
usageTranslations.it: Un picco di latenza durante le ore di punta ha causato timeout API ed errori lato utente.
usageTranslations.vi: Đột biến độ trễ trong giờ cao điểm khiến API bị timeout và lỗi phía người dùng.
usageTranslations.hi: पीक उपयोग समय के दौरान लेटेंसी स्पाइक ने API टाइमआउट और यूज़र त्रुटियाँ उत्पन्न कीं।
usageTranslations.th: พุ่งขึ้นของค่าความหน่วงในช่วงเวลาใช้งานสูงสุดทำให้ API หมดเวลาและเกิดข้อผิดพลาดต่อผู้ใช้
usageTranslations.id: Lonjakan latensi selama jam sibuk menyebabkan timeout API dan kesalahan yang dihadapi pengguna.

terms.definition: A defined numerical limit or value set for a monitored metric which, when breached, triggers alerts or automated remediation actions.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: If the CPU usage metric threshold exceeds 90%, an alert is triggered and logged.

termTranslations.ja: メトリックスレッショルド
termTranslations.th: เกณฑ์เมตริก

usageTranslations.en: If the CPU usage metric threshold exceeds 90%, an alert is triggered and logged.
usageTranslations.tr: CPU kullanımı metrik eşiği %90’ı aşarsa bir uyarı tetiklenir ve kaydedilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Si le seuil de métrique d’utilisation du CPU dépasse 90 %, une alerte est déclenchée et enregistrée.
usageTranslations.de: Wenn die Metrikschwelle für die CPU-Auslastung 90 % überschreitet, wird ein Alarm ausgelöst und protokolliert.
usageTranslations.es: Si el umbral de métrica de uso de CPU supera el 90%, se activa y registra una alerta.
usageTranslations.zh: 如果CPU使用率指标阈值超过90%，则会触发并记录警报。
usageTranslations.ar: إذا تجاوزت عتبة مقياس استخدام وحدة المعالجة المركزية 90٪، يتم تشغيل تنبيه وتسجيله.
usageTranslations.pt: Se o limite de métrica de uso da CPU exceder 90%, um alerta é acionado e registrado.
usageTranslations.ru: Если порог метрики использования процессора превышает 90%, срабатывает и фиксируется оповещение.
usageTranslations.ja: CPU使用率のメトリックスレッショルドが90%を超えると、アラートがトリガーされ、記録されます。
usageTranslations.it: Se la soglia della metrica di utilizzo della CPU supera il 90%, viene attivato un avviso e registrato.
usageTranslations.vi: Nếu ngưỡng chỉ số sử dụng CPU vượt quá 90%, sẽ có cảnh báo được kích hoạt và ghi lại.
usageTranslations.hi: यदि CPU उपयोग मेट्रिक थ्रेशोल्ड 90% से अधिक हो जाता है, तो एक अलर्ट ट्रिगर होता है और लॉग किया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: หากเกณฑ์เมตริกของการใช้ CPU เกิน 90% จะมีการทริกเกอร์การแจ้งเตือนและบันทึกไว้
usageTranslations.id: Jika ambang metrik penggunaan CPU melebihi 90%, peringatan dipicu dan dicatat.

terms.definition: An occurrence—planned or unplanned—where a system, service, or application becomes unavailable, recorded for compliance, SLA, and incident review purposes.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Every downtime event is logged and reviewed to identify root causes and improve future availability.

termTranslations.ja: ダウンタイムイベント
termTranslations.th: เหตุการณ์หยุดทำงาน

usageTranslations.en: Every downtime event is logged and reviewed to identify root causes and improve future availability.
usageTranslations.tr: Her kesinti olayı kaydedilir ve temel nedenlerin belirlenmesi ile gelecekteki erişilebilirliğin iyileştirilmesi için incelenir.
usageTranslations.fr: Chaque événement d’indisponibilité est consigné et examiné afin d’identifier les causes profondes et d’améliorer la disponibilité future.
usageTranslations.de: Jedes Ausfallereignis wird protokolliert und überprüft, um Ursachen zu ermitteln und die zukünftige Verfügbarkeit zu verbessern.
usageTranslations.es: Cada evento de inactividad se registra y revisa para identificar causas raíz y mejorar la disponibilidad futura.
usageTranslations.zh: 每个停机事件都会被记录和审查，以查明根本原因并提高未来的可用性。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تسجيل ومراجعة كل حدث توقف لتحديد الأسباب الجذرية وتحسين التوافر في المستقبل.
usageTranslations.pt: Todo evento de indisponibilidade é registrado e revisado para identificar causas-raiz e melhorar a disponibilidade futura.
usageTranslations.ru: Каждое событие простоя регистрируется и анализируется для выявления причин и повышения доступности в будущем.
usageTranslations.ja: すべてのダウンタイムイベントは記録され、根本原因の特定と将来の可用性向上のために見直されます。
usageTranslations.it: Ogni evento di inattività viene registrato e rivisto per identificare le cause principali e migliorare la disponibilità futura.
usageTranslations.vi: Mọi sự kiện ngừng hoạt động đều được ghi lại và xem xét để xác định nguyên nhân gốc rễ và cải thiện khả năng sẵn sàng trong tương lai.
usageTranslations.hi: हर डाउनटाइम इवेंट को लॉग किया जाता है और मूल कारणों की पहचान और भविष्य की उपलब्धता सुधारने के लिए समीक्षा की जाती है।
usageTranslations.th: เหตุการณ์หยุดทำงานทุกครั้งจะมีการบันทึกและตรวจสอบเพื่อระบุสาเหตุหลักและปรับปรุงความพร้อมใช้งานในอนาคต
usageTranslations.id: Setiap peristiwa downtime dicatat dan ditinjau untuk mengidentifikasi akar penyebab dan meningkatkan ketersediaan di masa depan.

terms.definition: An ongoing loop of automated or manual input gathered from users, systems, or integrations, used to improve reliability, performance, and service delivery.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Continuous feedback from monitoring tools helps teams rapidly iterate and resolve emerging issues before they impact users.

termTranslations.ja: 継続的フィードバック
termTranslations.th: ข้อเสนอแนะอย่างต่อเนื่อง

usageTranslations.en: Continuous feedback from monitoring tools helps teams rapidly iterate and resolve emerging issues before they impact users.
usageTranslations.tr: İzleme araçlarından gelen sürekli geri bildirim, ekiplerin kullanıcıları etkilemeden önce hızla yineleme yapmasına ve sorunları çözmesine yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le retour continu des outils de surveillance aide les équipes à itérer rapidement et à résoudre les problèmes émergents avant qu’ils n’affectent les utilisateurs.
usageTranslations.de: Kontinuierliches Feedback aus Monitoring-Tools hilft Teams, schnell zu iterieren und aufkommende Probleme zu lösen, bevor Nutzer betroffen sind.
usageTranslations.es: La retroalimentación continua de las herramientas de monitoreo ayuda a los equipos a iterar rápidamente y resolver problemas emergentes antes de que afecten a los usuarios.
usageTranslations.zh: 监控工具的持续反馈帮助团队在问题影响用户前快速迭代并解决新出现的问题。
usageTranslations.ar: تساعد التعليقات المستمرة من أدوات المراقبة الفرق على التكرار بسرعة وحل المشكلات الناشئة قبل أن تؤثر على المستخدمين.
usageTranslations.pt: O feedback contínuo das ferramentas de monitoramento ajuda as equipes a iterar rapidamente e resolver problemas emergentes antes que impactem os usuários.
usageTranslations.ru: Непрерывная обратная связь от инструментов мониторинга помогает командам быстро реагировать и устранять новые проблемы до их воздействия на пользователей.
usageTranslations.ja: モニタリングツールからの継続的なフィードバックにより、チームはユーザーに影響が出る前に迅速に反復し、新たな問題を解決できます。
usageTranslations.it: Il feedback continuo dagli strumenti di monitoraggio aiuta i team a iterare rapidamente e risolvere i problemi emergenti prima che impattino gli utenti.
usageTranslations.vi: Phản hồi liên tục từ công cụ giám sát giúp nhóm lặp lại và giải quyết vấn đề nhanh chóng trước khi ảnh hưởng đến người dùng.
usageTranslations.hi: मॉनिटरिंग टूल्स से निरंतर फीडबैक टीमों को तेजी से सुधार और समस्याओं को हल करने में मदद करता है, इससे पहले कि वे उपयोगकर्ताओं को प्रभावित करें।
usageTranslations.th: ข้อเสนอแนะอย่างต่อเนื่องจากเครื่องมือการตรวจสอบช่วยให้ทีมสามารถปรับปรุงและแก้ไขปัญหาใหม่ ๆ ได้อย่างรวดเร็วก่อนที่จะส่งผลกระทบต่อผู้ใช้
usageTranslations.id: Umpan balik berkelanjutan dari alat pemantauan membantu tim mengiterasi dan menyelesaikan masalah sebelum berdampak pada pengguna.

terms.definition: A scheduled or emergency halt in production releases, updates, or deployments to preserve system stability during critical periods.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: During the end-of-quarter release freeze, all production deployments are suspended except for critical hotfixes.

termTranslations.th: หยุดปล่อยซอฟต์แวร์

usageTranslations.en: During the end-of-quarter release freeze, all production deployments are suspended except for critical hotfixes.
usageTranslations.tr: Çeyrek sonu sürüm dondurma süresince, kritik yamalar haricindeki tüm canlı geçişler askıya alınır.
usageTranslations.fr: Pendant la période de gel de publication, seuls les correctifs urgents sont déployés.
usageTranslations.de: Während des Release-Freeze werden alle Deployments außer Hotfixes ausgesetzt.
usageTranslations.es: Durante la congelación de versión, solo se permiten correcciones críticas.
usageTranslations.zh: 在版本冻结期间，仅允许关键热修复上线。
usageTranslations.ar: خلال فترة تجميد الإصدار، يتم تعليق جميع عمليات النشر باستثناء الإصلاحات الحرجة.
usageTranslations.pt: Durante o congelamento de lançamento, apenas hotfixes críticos são permitidos.
usageTranslations.ru: Во время заморозки релиза разрешены только критические хотфиксы.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースフリーズ中は重要なホットフィックス以外のリリースは禁止されます。
usageTranslations.it: Durante il blocco rilascio, solo hotfix critici sono ammessi.
usageTranslations.vi: Trong thời gian đóng băng phát hành, chỉ cho phép bản vá quan trọng.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ फ्रीज़ के दौरान केवल आवश्यक हॉटफिक्स की अनुमति है।
usageTranslations.th: ระหว่างหยุดปล่อยซอฟต์แวร์ อนุญาตเฉพาะฮอตฟิกซ์สำคัญ
usageTranslations.id: Selama pembekuan rilis, hanya hotfix penting yang diizinkan.

terms.definition: The operational policy and timeframe for preserving observability, monitoring, and system data in logs, traces, or metrics, as mandated by business or regulatory requirements.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Our observability platform enforces a 90-day data retention period for log analytics in compliance with company policy.

termTranslations.th: การเก็บรักษาข้อมูล

usageTranslations.en: Our observability platform enforces a 90-day data retention period for log analytics in compliance with company policy.
usageTranslations.tr: Gözlemlenebilirlik platformumuzda log analizleri için 90 günlük veri saklama politikası uygulanmaktadır.
usageTranslations.fr: Notre plateforme impose une rétention des données de 90 jours pour les logs.
usageTranslations.de: Unsere Plattform erzwingt eine 90-tägige Datenaufbewahrung für Log-Analysen.
usageTranslations.es: La plataforma aplica una retención de datos de 90 días para los registros.
usageTranslations.zh: 我们的可观测性平台对日志分析实施90天的数据保留期。
usageTranslations.ar: تفرض منصتنا فترة احتفاظ بالبيانات لمدة 90 يومًا لتحليلات السجلات.
usageTranslations.pt: Nossa plataforma impõe retenção de dados de 90 dias para logs.
usageTranslations.ru: На платформе действует 90-дневное хранение данных для логов.
usageTranslations.ja: 当社プラットフォームではログ分析のため90日間のデータ保持を行います。
usageTranslations.it: La piattaforma applica una conservazione dati di 90 giorni per i log.
usageTranslations.vi: Nền tảng áp dụng lưu giữ dữ liệu 90 ngày cho phân tích log.
usageTranslations.hi: हमारे प्लेटफ़ॉर्म में 90 दिन की डेटा प्रतिधारण नीति लागू है।
usageTranslations.th: แพลตฟอร์มบังคับเก็บข้อมูล 90 วันสำหรับบันทึก
usageTranslations.id: Platform kami menerapkan retensi data 90 hari untuk log.

terms.definition: A real-time virtual or phone conference line used by IT operations and engineering teams to coordinate during critical incidents, outages, or high-severity service disruptions.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The incident bridge was activated within minutes to facilitate real-time collaboration across engineering and SRE teams.

termTranslations.ja: インシデントブリッジ
termTranslations.th: สะพานเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: The incident bridge was activated within minutes to facilitate real-time collaboration across engineering and SRE teams.
usageTranslations.tr: Olay köprüsü dakikalar içinde etkinleştirilerek ekiplerin anlık işbirliği sağlamasına olanak tanıdı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le pont d'incident a été activé en quelques minutes pour faciliter la collaboration.
usageTranslations.de: Die Incident Bridge wurde innerhalb von Minuten aktiviert.
usageTranslations.es: El puente de incidentes se activó en minutos para colaborar.
usageTranslations.zh: 事故桥接在几分钟内启动，实现跨团队协作。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تفعيل جسر الحوادث خلال دقائق لتسهيل التعاون الفوري.
usageTranslations.pt: A ponte de incidente foi ativada em minutos para colaboração.
usageTranslations.ru: Мост инцидентов был активирован за считанные минуты.
usageTranslations.ja: インシデントブリッジは数分で起動されました。
usageTranslations.it: Il bridge d'incidente è stato attivato in pochi minuti.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu nối sự cố được kích hoạt chỉ trong vài phút.
usageTranslations.hi: इंसिडेंट ब्रिज कुछ ही मिनटों में सक्रिय हुआ।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานเหตุการณ์ถูกเปิดใช้ในไม่กี่นาที
usageTranslations.id: Jembatan insiden diaktifkan dalam beberapa menit.

terms.definition: The process of reverting a deployed service, application, or configuration to a previous stable state following a failed release or incident.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A service rollback was triggered to the previous deployment after detecting critical errors in the latest release.

termTranslations.ja: サービスロールバック
termTranslations.th: ย้อนกลับบริการ

usageTranslations.en: A service rollback was triggered to the previous deployment after detecting critical errors in the latest release.
usageTranslations.tr: Son yayında kritik hatalar tespit edilince önceki sürüme servis geri alma işlemi başlatıldı.
usageTranslations.fr: Un retour arrière de service a été déclenché après la détection d’erreurs critiques.
usageTranslations.de: Nach kritischen Fehlern wurde ein Service-Rollback zur vorherigen Version ausgelöst.
usageTranslations.es: Se activó una reversión de servicio al detectar errores críticos.
usageTranslations.zh: 检测到关键错误后，服务回滚到上一个部署。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تفعيل استرجاع الخدمة بعد اكتشاف أخطاء حرجة.
usageTranslations.pt: O rollback de serviço foi acionado após erros críticos.
usageTranslations.ru: После критических ошибок выполнен откат сервиса.
usageTranslations.ja: 重大なエラー検出後、サービスをロールバックした。
usageTranslations.it: Dopo errori critici, effettuato rollback del servizio.
usageTranslations.vi: Phát hiện lỗi nghiêm trọng, hoàn tác dịch vụ được kích hoạt.
usageTranslations.hi: गंभीर त्रुटियों के बाद सर्विस रोलबैक किया गया।
usageTranslations.th: หลังพบข้อผิดพลาดร้ายแรง ระบบย้อนกลับบริการ
usageTranslations.id: Rollback layanan diaktifkan setelah mendeteksi kesalahan kritis.

terms.definition: Automated adjustment of computing resources such as server instances or containers, in real time, based on system load or traffic metrics.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Auto scaling policies automatically provision or decommission instances to match application demand.

termTranslations.th: ออโต้สเกล

usageTranslations.en: Auto scaling policies automatically provision or decommission instances to match application demand.
usageTranslations.tr: Otomatik ölçekleme, uygulama talebine göre kaynakları ekler veya azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: La mise à l’échelle automatique ajuste les ressources selon la demande.
usageTranslations.de: Auto-Scaling passt Ressourcen automatisch an die Last an.
usageTranslations.es: El escalado automático ajusta recursos según demanda.
usageTranslations.zh: 自动扩缩容根据需求自动调整资源。
usageTranslations.ar: تقوم التوسعة التلقائية بتعديل الموارد تلقائياً.
usageTranslations.pt: O auto scaling ajusta os recursos conforme a demanda.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматическое масштабирование подбирает ресурсы под нагрузку.
usageTranslations.ja: オートスケーリングは需要に応じてリソースを調整する。
usageTranslations.it: Auto scaling adatta le risorse in base alla domanda.
usageTranslations.vi: Tự động mở rộng điều chỉnh tài nguyên theo nhu cầu.
usageTranslations.hi: ऑटो स्केलिंग मांग के अनुसार संसाधन समायोजित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ออโต้สเกลปรับทรัพยากรตามความต้องการ
usageTranslations.id: Auto scaling menyesuaikan sumber daya secara otomatis.

terms.definition: A formal process in which proposed changes to systems or integrations are reviewed and authorized by designated stakeholders before implementation.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Change approval is mandatory for all production system modifications under ITIL change management policy.

termTranslations.th: อนุมัติการเปลี่ยนแปลง

usageTranslations.en: Change approval is mandatory for all production system modifications under ITIL change management policy.
usageTranslations.tr: ITIL değişiklik yönetimi kapsamında tüm canlı sistem değişikliklerinde değişiklik onayı zorunludur.
usageTranslations.fr: L’approbation du changement est requise pour toute modification.
usageTranslations.de: Change-Freigabe ist für Produktionsänderungen zwingend erforderlich.
usageTranslations.es: La aprobación de cambios es obligatoria en producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 根据ITIL，所有生产变更需变更批准。
usageTranslations.ar: موافقة التغيير مطلوبة لأي تعديل بالنظام.
usageTranslations.pt: A aprovação de mudança é obrigatória.
usageTranslations.ru: Утверждение изменений обязательно для продуктивных систем.
usageTranslations.ja: ITILに基づき、変更承認が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: L’approvazione della modifica è richiesta per ogni cambiamento.
usageTranslations.vi: Phê duyệt thay đổi là bắt buộc theo ITIL.
usageTranslations.hi: आईटीआईएल नीति में परिवर्तन अनुमोदन आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องได้รับอนุมัติการเปลี่ยนแปลงตาม ITIL
usageTranslations.id: Persetujuan perubahan wajib menurut ITIL.

terms.definition: A systematically maintained record of all changes, updates, and modifications made to systems, integrations, or monitored environments, typically used for audit and troubleshooting.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The change log details every update applied to the production environment, supporting root cause analysis in incident reviews.

termTranslations.th: บันทึกการเปลี่ยนแปลง

usageTranslations.en: The change log details every update applied to the production environment, supporting root cause analysis in incident reviews.
usageTranslations.tr: Değişiklik kaydı, üretim ortamında yapılan her güncellemeyi ayrıntılı olarak kaydeder ve olay incelemelerinde kök neden analizini destekler.
usageTranslations.fr: Le journal des changements détaille chaque mise à jour appliquée en production et aide à l’analyse des incidents.
usageTranslations.de: Das Änderungsprotokoll dokumentiert alle Updates und unterstützt die Ursachenanalyse.
usageTranslations.es: El registro de cambios documenta todas las actualizaciones y ayuda en el análisis de incidentes.
usageTranslations.zh: 变更日志记录所有更新，有助于事故分析。
usageTranslations.ar: يسجل سجل التغييرات كافة التحديثات ويدعم تحليل الأسباب الجذرية.
usageTranslations.pt: O registro de alterações detalha cada atualização e apoia a análise de incidentes.
usageTranslations.ru: Журнал изменений фиксирует все обновления и помогает анализировать инциденты.
usageTranslations.ja: 変更ログはすべての更新を記録し、インシデント分析を支援する。
usageTranslations.it: Il registro delle modifiche elenca tutti gli aggiornamenti e aiuta nell’analisi degli incidenti.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhật ký thay đổi ghi lại mọi cập nhật và hỗ trợ phân tích sự cố.
usageTranslations.hi: परिवर्तन लॉग हर अपडेट का विवरण देता है और घटना विश्लेषण में सहायक है।
usageTranslations.th: บันทึกการเปลี่ยนแปลงแสดงรายละเอียดทุกอัปเดตและช่วยวิเคราะห์เหตุการณ์
usageTranslations.id: Log perubahan merinci setiap pembaruan dan membantu analisis insiden.

terms.definition: A system-generated notification or escalation indicating a potential or actual deviation from expected operational thresholds, requiring investigation or response.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: An operational alert was triggered when response times exceeded the defined service-level threshold.

termTranslations.th: การแจ้งเตือนการดำเนินงาน

usageTranslations.en: An operational alert was triggered when response times exceeded the defined service-level threshold.
usageTranslations.tr: Yanıt süreleri belirlenen eşik değeri aştığında operasyonel uyarı tetiklendi.
usageTranslations.fr: Une alerte opérationnelle a été déclenchée lorsque les temps de réponse ont dépassé le seuil.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Betriebswarnung wurde ausgelöst, als Antwortzeiten die Schwelle überschritten.
usageTranslations.es: Se activó una alerta operativa al superarse el umbral.
usageTranslations.zh: 响应时间超出阈值时触发运营警报。
usageTranslations.ar: تم إطلاق تنبيه تشغيلي عند تجاوز زمن الاستجابة الحد المسموح.
usageTranslations.pt: Um alerta operacional foi disparado quando o tempo de resposta excedeu o limite.
usageTranslations.ru: Операционное оповещение сработало при превышении порога ответа.
usageTranslations.ja: 応答時間がしきい値を超えたとき、運用アラートが発生した。
usageTranslations.it: Un’allerta operativa è stata attivata quando il tempo di risposta ha superato la soglia.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảnh báo vận hành được kích hoạt khi thời gian phản hồi vượt ngưỡng.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रतिक्रिया समय सीमा पार होते ही ऑपरेशनल अलर्ट आया।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบแจ้งเตือนเมื่อเวลาตอบสนองเกินขีดจำกัด
usageTranslations.id: Peringatan operasional muncul saat waktu respons melewati batas.

terms.definition: A defined set of rules specifying when, how, and to whom alerts are sent for monitored resources or systems, supporting consistent incident response.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The alert policy ensures critical events trigger immediate notifications to the operations team and relevant stakeholders.

termTranslations.th: นโยบายการแจ้งเตือน

usageTranslations.en: The alert policy ensures critical events trigger immediate notifications to the operations team and relevant stakeholders.
usageTranslations.tr: Uyarı politikası, kritik olaylarda operasyon ekibi ve ilgili kişilere anında bildirim gönderilmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La politique d’alerte garantit la notification immédiate des incidents critiques.
usageTranslations.de: Die Alarmrichtlinie stellt sicher, dass bei kritischen Ereignissen sofort benachrichtigt wird.
usageTranslations.es: La política de alerta garantiza notificaciones inmediatas de eventos críticos.
usageTranslations.zh: 警报策略确保关键事件被立即通知到相关团队。
usageTranslations.ar: سياسة التنبيهات تضمن الإبلاغ الفوري عن الأحداث الحرجة.
usageTranslations.pt: A política de alerta garante notificações imediatas de eventos críticos.
usageTranslations.ru: Политика оповещений обеспечивает мгновенные уведомления о критических событиях.
usageTranslations.ja: アラートポリシーは重要イベントの即時通知を保証する。
usageTranslations.it: La politica di allerta assicura la notifica immediata di eventi critici.
usageTranslations.vi: Chính sách cảnh báo đảm bảo sự kiện quan trọng được thông báo ngay lập tức.
usageTranslations.hi: अलर्ट नीति से महत्वपूर्ण घटनाओं की तुरंत सूचना मिलती है।
usageTranslations.th: นโยบายแจ้งเตือนทำให้เหตุการณ์สำคัญแจ้งทันที
usageTranslations.id: Kebijakan peringatan memastikan pemberitahuan segera untuk kejadian kritis.

terms.definition: A specific, configurable criterion or threshold in monitoring tools that, when met or exceeded, triggers an automated alert.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: An alert rule triggers a notification if the system's memory usage exceeds 85% for more than five minutes.

termTranslations.th: กฎการแจ้งเตือน

usageTranslations.en: An alert rule triggers a notification if the system's memory usage exceeds 85% for more than five minutes.
usageTranslations.tr: Sistemin bellek kullanımı beş dakikadan fazla %85’i aşarsa uyarı kuralı bildirim tetikler.
usageTranslations.fr: Une règle d’alerte déclenche une notification si la mémoire dépasse 85% plus de cinq minutes.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Alarmregel löst eine Benachrichtigung aus, wenn die Speichernutzung über 85% liegt.
usageTranslations.es: Una regla de alerta activa notificación si el uso de memoria excede el 85% por más de cinco minutos.
usageTranslations.zh: 如果系统内存使用率超过85%超5分钟，警报规则会触发通知。
usageTranslations.ar: قاعدة التنبيه ترسل إشعارًا عند تجاوز استخدام الذاكرة 85% لخمس دقائق.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma regra de alerta dispara notificação se o uso da memória ultrapassar 85%.
usageTranslations.ru: Правило оповещения сработает, если память превысит 85% более 5 минут.
usageTranslations.ja: アラートルールはメモリ使用率85%超5分で通知します。
usageTranslations.it: Una regola di allerta invia notifica se memoria supera 85% per più di cinque minuti.
usageTranslations.vi: Quy tắc cảnh báo gửi thông báo nếu bộ nhớ vượt 85% trên 5 phút.
usageTranslations.hi: अगर मेमोरी उपयोग 85% से ऊपर पांच मिनट रहे तो अलर्ट नियम सक्रिय।
usageTranslations.th: กฎแจ้งเตือนทำงานถ้าใช้หน่วยความจำเกิน 85% เกิน 5 นาที
usageTranslations.id: Aturan peringatan memicu notifikasi jika penggunaan memori >85%.

terms.definition: A monitoring system or tool that continuously checks the availability and operational status of services or infrastructure endpoints, typically reporting outages or downtime.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Our uptime monitor detected a three-minute service outage and triggered a critical incident ticket.

termTranslations.ja: アップタイムモニター
termTranslations.vi: Giám sát thời gian hoạt động
termTranslations.th: ตัวตรวจสอบเวลาทำงาน

usageTranslations.en: Our uptime monitor detected a three-minute service outage and triggered a critical incident ticket.
usageTranslations.tr: Uptime izleyicimiz üç dakikalık servis kesintisini tespit etti ve kritik olay kaydı oluşturdu.
usageTranslations.fr: Le système de surveillance a détecté une panne de trois minutes.
usageTranslations.de: Der Verfügbarkeitsmonitor stellte einen dreiminütigen Ausfall fest.
usageTranslations.es: El monitor de disponibilidad detectó una caída de tres minutos.
usageTranslations.zh: 在线监控检测到三分钟服务中断。
usageTranslations.ar: كشف مراقب الجهوزية انقطاع الخدمة لمدة ثلاث دقائق.
usageTranslations.pt: O monitor de uptime detectou uma indisponibilidade de três minutos.
usageTranslations.ru: Мониторинг доступности зафиксировал трехминутный сбой.
usageTranslations.ja: アップタイムモニターが3分間の停止を検出しました。
usageTranslations.it: Il monitoraggio uptime ha rilevato un'interruzione di tre minuti.
usageTranslations.vi: Giám sát uptime phát hiện gián đoạn 3 phút.
usageTranslations.hi: अपटाइम मॉनिटर ने 3 मिनट की सेवा रुकावट पकड़ी।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวตรวจสอบเวลาทำงานพบเหตุขัดข้อง 3 นาที
usageTranslations.id: Monitor uptime mendeteksi gangguan selama tiga menit.

terms.definition: A file, binary, container image, or package produced as the output of a build process, which is versioned and deployed in integration pipelines.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Each build artifact is stored in the artifact repository and referenced by deployment automation scripts.

termTranslations.ja: ビルドアーティファクト
termTranslations.th: ไฟล์ผลลัพธ์จากการ build

usageTranslations.en: Each build artifact is stored in the artifact repository and referenced by deployment automation scripts.
usageTranslations.tr: Her derleme artifaktı, artifakt deposunda saklanır ve otomasyon betikleri tarafından kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Chaque artefact de build est stocké dans le référentiel.
usageTranslations.de: Jedes Build-Artefakt wird im Repository abgelegt.
usageTranslations.es: Cada artefacto de compilación se almacena en el repositorio.
usageTranslations.zh: 每个构建产物存储在制品库中并被自动化脚本调用。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تخزين كل أثر بناء في المستودع.
usageTranslations.pt: Cada artefato de build é armazenado no repositório.
usageTranslations.ru: Каждый артефакт сборки хранится в репозитории.
usageTranslations.ja: 各ビルドアーティファクトはリポジトリに保存されます。
usageTranslations.it: Ogni artefatto di build è archiviato nel repository.
usageTranslations.vi: Mỗi tạo phẩm build lưu ở kho artefact.
usageTranslations.hi: हर बिल्ड आर्टिफैक्ट को रिपॉजिटरी में रखा जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: แต่ละไฟล์ผลลัพธ์จะเก็บใน repository
usageTranslations.id: Setiap artefak build disimpan di repositori artefak.

terms.definition: The frequency or proportion of unsuccessful transactions, jobs, or service requests compared to the total, measured over a defined period in monitoring systems.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: An elevated failure rate in API calls prompted immediate escalation and root cause analysis.

termTranslations.th: อัตราความล้มเหลว

usageTranslations.en: An elevated failure rate in API calls prompted immediate escalation and root cause analysis.
usageTranslations.tr: API çağrılarındaki yüksek hata oranı acil müdahale ve kök neden analizi başlattı.
usageTranslations.fr: Un taux d’échec élevé a déclenché une analyse immédiate.
usageTranslations.de: Eine hohe Fehlerrate führte zu sofortiger Eskalation.
usageTranslations.es: Una tasa de fallos elevada provocó una investigación.
usageTranslations.zh: 高失败率导致立即升级和根本原因分析。
usageTranslations.ar: معدل الفشل المرتفع أدى لتصعيد وتحليل فوري.
usageTranslations.pt: Alta taxa de falha levou a análise imediata.
usageTranslations.ru: Повышенная частота сбоев вызвала расследование.
usageTranslations.ja: 失敗率が高騰し即時分析を促した。
usageTranslations.it: Un alto tasso di errore ha portato a un’analisi immediata.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ thất bại cao dẫn đến phân tích nguyên nhân.
usageTranslations.hi: अधिक विफलता दर पर तुरंत जांच की गई।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราความล้มเหลวสูงกระตุ้นการวิเคราะห์ทันที
usageTranslations.id: Tingkat kegagalan tinggi menyebabkan analisis segera.

terms.definition: The proportion of system or application errors, faults, or exceptions encountered during operation, often used as a service health metric.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The error rate is tracked on all production APIs to ensure service reliability and trigger incident response.

termTranslations.th: อัตราความผิดพลาด

usageTranslations.en: The error rate is tracked on all production APIs to ensure service reliability and trigger incident response.
usageTranslations.tr: Hata oranı tüm canlı API'lerde izlenir ve hizmet güvenilirliği için olay yanıtı tetiklenir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le taux d’erreur est suivi sur toutes les API en production.
usageTranslations.de: Die Fehlerrate wird für alle APIs überwacht.
usageTranslations.es: La tasa de errores se monitoriza en todas las APIs.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有API的错误率都被监控。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تتبع معدل الأخطاء في جميع واجهات برمجة التطبيقات الحية.
usageTranslations.pt: A taxa de erro é monitorada em todas as APIs.
usageTranslations.ru: Ошибка отслеживается на всех продуктивных API.
usageTranslations.ja: すべてのAPIのエラー率を監視。
usageTranslations.it: Il tasso di errore è monitorato su tutte le API.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ lỗi được giám sát trên mọi API.
usageTranslations.hi: त्रुटि दर हर API पर ट्रैक की जाती है।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราความผิดพลาดถูกติดตามในทุก API
usageTranslations.id: Tingkat kesalahan dilacak di semua API.

terms.definition: A method for selectively collecting and storing a subset of distributed traces from monitored systems to balance observability with storage and cost efficiency.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Trace sampling reduces observability overhead while still providing representative data for debugging and performance analysis.

termTranslations.ja: トレースサンプリング
termTranslations.th: การสุ่มตัวอย่าง trace

usageTranslations.en: Trace sampling reduces observability overhead while still providing representative data for debugging and performance analysis.
usageTranslations.tr: İzleme örneklemesi, hata ayıklama ve analiz için yeterli veri sağlarken yükü azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: L’échantillonnage des traces réduit la charge tout en fournissant des données utiles.
usageTranslations.de: Tracing-Sampling verringert den Aufwand, liefert aber aussagekräftige Daten.
usageTranslations.es: El muestreo de trazas reduce la carga y aporta datos útiles.
usageTranslations.zh: 跟踪采样降低了负载，但仍提供有用数据。
usageTranslations.ar: تجميع العينات يقلل الحمل ويوفر بيانات ممثلة.
usageTranslations.pt: Amostragem de traço reduz a sobrecarga mantendo dados úteis.
usageTranslations.ru: Сэмплирование трассировки снижает нагрузку, сохраняя полезные данные.
usageTranslations.ja: トレースサンプリングで負荷を軽減し有用なデータを提供。
usageTranslations.it: Il campionamento delle tracce riduce il carico fornendo dati utili.
usageTranslations.vi: Lấy mẫu trace giúp giảm tải mà vẫn cung cấp dữ liệu phân tích.
usageTranslations.hi: ट्रेस सैंपलिंग से भार कम होता है, डेटा मिलता है।
usageTranslations.th: การสุ่มตัวอย่าง trace ช่วยลดภาระระบบแต่ยังมีข้อมูลพอ
usageTranslations.id: Trace sampling mengurangi beban dengan tetap memberikan data representatif.

terms.definition: The duration between a service request and its corresponding response, tracked as a critical performance and SLO metric.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The response time for API endpoints is measured and reported in real-time to maintain SLO compliance.

termTranslations.th: เวลาตอบสนอง

usageTranslations.en: The response time for API endpoints is measured and reported in real-time to maintain SLO compliance.
usageTranslations.tr: API uç noktalarının yanıt süresi, SLO uyumu için gerçek zamanlı olarak izlenir ve raporlanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le temps de réponse des API est mesuré en temps réel.
usageTranslations.de: Die Antwortzeit der API-Endpunkte wird in Echtzeit gemessen.
usageTranslations.es: El tiempo de respuesta de las APIs se mide en tiempo real.
usageTranslations.zh: API的响应时间实时监控以满足SLO。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم قياس زمن الاستجابة لنقاط النهاية في الوقت الحقيقي.
usageTranslations.pt: O tempo de resposta das APIs é monitorado em tempo real.
usageTranslations.ru: Время отклика API измеряется и мониторится в реальном времени.
usageTranslations.ja: APIの応答時間はリアルタイムで計測されます。
usageTranslations.it: Il tempo di risposta delle API viene monitorato in tempo reale.
usageTranslations.vi: Thời gian phản hồi API được đo và báo cáo theo thời gian thực.
usageTranslations.hi: API प्रतिक्रिया समय वास्तविक समय में मापा जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: เวลาตอบสนองของ API ถูกวัดแบบเรียลไทม์
usageTranslations.id: Waktu respons API diukur secara real-time.

terms.definition: A condition where system, application, or infrastructure configurations deviate from the defined baseline or intended state, often due to manual changes or failed automation.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Continuous monitoring detects config drift by comparing live infrastructure state with declared configurations.

termTranslations.th: การเบี่ยงเบนของคอนฟิก

usageTranslations.en: Continuous monitoring detects config drift by comparing live infrastructure state with declared configurations.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürekli izleme, canlı altyapı durumu ile tanımlı yapılandırmaları karşılaştırarak yapılandırma sapmasını tespit eder.
usageTranslations.fr: La surveillance continue détecte la dérive de configuration.
usageTranslations.de: Kontinuierliches Monitoring erkennt Konfigurationsabweichungen.
usageTranslations.es: El monitoreo continuo detecta desviaciones de configuración.
usageTranslations.zh: 持续监控通过对比配置识别配置漂移。
usageTranslations.ar: المراقبة المستمرة تكتشف انحراف الإعدادات.
usageTranslations.pt: O monitoramento contínuo detecta desvios de configuração.
usageTranslations.ru: Постоянный мониторинг выявляет дрифт конфигурации.
usageTranslations.ja: 継続的監視により構成ドリフトが検出されます。
usageTranslations.it: Il monitoraggio continuo rileva la deriva di configurazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Giám sát liên tục phát hiện trôi cấu hình.
usageTranslations.hi: लगातार निगरानी से कॉन्फ़िग ड्रिफ्ट का पता चलता है।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบตรวจสอบต่อเนื่องจะพบการเบี่ยงเบนของคอนฟิก
usageTranslations.id: Monitoring terus-menerus mendeteksi config drift.

terms.definition: The automated process of transmitting log files or events from source systems to centralized storage, analytics, or monitoring platforms for retention and analysis.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Log shipping to a central SIEM platform supports compliance and real-time threat detection.

termTranslations.th: การส่ง log

usageTranslations.en: Log shipping to a central SIEM platform supports compliance and real-time threat detection.
usageTranslations.tr: Merkezi SIEM platformuna log gönderimi uyumluluk ve gerçek zamanlı tehdit tespiti sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’expédition de logs vers une plateforme SIEM centrale facilite la conformité.
usageTranslations.de: Logversand an zentrales SIEM unterstützt Compliance.
usageTranslations.es: El envío de logs a un SIEM central permite detección de amenazas.
usageTranslations.zh: 日志转发至中心SIEM支持合规和威胁检测。
usageTranslations.ar: شحن السجلات إلى SIEM مركزي يدعم الامتثال والكشف الفوري.
usageTranslations.pt: Envio de logs para SIEM centralizado apoia conformidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Передача логов в центральную SIEM поддерживает соответствие.
usageTranslations.ja: 中央SIEMへのログシッピングはリアルタイム検知を支援。
usageTranslations.it: Spedizione log a SIEM centrale supporta conformità.
usageTranslations.vi: Gửi log đến SIEM trung tâm hỗ trợ phát hiện mối đe dọa.
usageTranslations.hi: लॉग शिपिंग कंप्लायंस और थ्रेट डिटेक्शन में सहायक।
usageTranslations.th: การส่ง log ไป SIEM ช่วยการตรวจจับภัยคุกคาม
usageTranslations.id: Log shipping ke SIEM pusat mendukung kepatuhan.

terms.definition: A scheduled or automated probe that verifies the operational health or expected behavior of a monitored service, endpoint, or integration.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Automated service checks run every minute to confirm endpoint availability and detect performance issues.

termTranslations.th: ตรวจสอบบริการ

usageTranslations.en: Automated service checks run every minute to confirm endpoint availability and detect performance issues.
usageTranslations.tr: Otomatik servis kontrolleri, uç nokta erişilebilirliğini doğrulamak ve performans sorunlarını tespit etmek için her dakika çalışır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les vérifications de service automatisées s’exécutent chaque minute.
usageTranslations.de: Automatisierte Service-Prüfungen laufen jede Minute.
usageTranslations.es: Las comprobaciones automáticas de servicio se ejecutan cada minuto.
usageTranslations.zh: 自动服务检查每分钟运行一次。
usageTranslations.ar: تتم فحوصات الخدمة تلقائياً كل دقيقة.
usageTranslations.pt: Verificações automáticas de serviço são realizadas a cada minuto.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматические проверки сервиса выполняются каждую минуту.
usageTranslations.ja: 自動サービスチェックは毎分実行される。
usageTranslations.it: I controlli automatici del servizio sono eseguiti ogni minuto.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm tra dịch vụ tự động chạy mỗi phút.
usageTranslations.hi: हर मिनट सर्विस चेक चलती है।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบตรวจสอบบริการทำงานทุกนาที
usageTranslations.id: Pemeriksaan layanan otomatis dijalankan setiap menit.

terms.definition: A centralized database or directory where details about available services, their instances, and network locations are stored for discovery and health monitoring.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The service registry is queried by the load balancer to discover healthy service instances for routing traffic.

termTranslations.th: รีจิสทรีบริการ

usageTranslations.en: The service registry is queried by the load balancer to discover healthy service instances for routing traffic.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük dengeleyici, trafiği yönlendirmek için sağlıklı servis örneklerini bulmak amacıyla servis rehberini sorgular.
usageTranslations.fr: Le registre est interrogé pour trouver des instances saines.
usageTranslations.de: Die Service-Registry wird vom Load Balancer abgefragt.
usageTranslations.es: El registro de servicios es consultado por el balanceador.
usageTranslations.zh: 负载均衡器查询服务注册表以发现健康实例。
usageTranslations.ar: يستعلم موازن التحميل سجل الخدمات للعثور على الخدمات السليمة.
usageTranslations.pt: O balanceador consulta o registro de serviço.
usageTranslations.ru: Реестр сервисов запрашивается балансировщиком.
usageTranslations.ja: サービスレジストリはロードバランサから参照される。
usageTranslations.it: Il registro servizi è consultato dal bilanciatore.
usageTranslations.vi: Registry dịch vụ được truy vấn bởi load balancer.
usageTranslations.hi: लोड बैलेंसर सर्विस रजिस्ट्री से स्वस्थ उदाहरण ढूंढता है।
usageTranslations.th: load balancer ใช้รีจิสทรีบริการค้นหา instance ที่ทำงานปกติ
usageTranslations.id: Load balancer menanyakan registri layanan.

terms.definition: The percentage or absolute amount of time a monitored system, service, or application is available and operational, typically over a specific reporting period.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Monthly reports include system uptime statistics as a core indicator of service reliability for SLA compliance.

termTranslations.vi: Thời gian hoạt động hệ thống
termTranslations.th: เวลาทำงานของระบบ

usageTranslations.en: Monthly reports include system uptime statistics as a core indicator of service reliability for SLA compliance.
usageTranslations.tr: Aylık raporlar, SLA uyumu için sistem uptime istatistiklerini içerir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les rapports mensuels intègrent la disponibilité système pour le SLA.
usageTranslations.de: Monatsberichte enthalten Uptime-Statistiken für SLA.
usageTranslations.es: Los informes mensuales incluyen el uptime del sistema.
usageTranslations.zh: 月报包括系统正常运行时间以满足SLA。
usageTranslations.ar: التقارير الشهرية تتضمن مدة الجهوزية للنظام.
usageTranslations.pt: Relatórios mensais incluem uptime do sistema para SLA.
usageTranslations.ru: Ежемесячные отчеты включают uptime системы.
usageTranslations.ja: 月次レポートにSLA用稼働時間が記載される。
usageTranslations.it: I report mensili includono uptime di sistema.
usageTranslations.vi: Báo cáo hàng tháng có thống kê uptime hệ thống.
usageTranslations.hi: मासिक रिपोर्ट में सिस्टम अपटाइम शामिल है।
usageTranslations.th: รายงานรายเดือนมีสถิติ uptme ระบบ
usageTranslations.id: Laporan bulanan memuat statistik uptime sistem.

terms.definition: The set of practices, tooling, and monitoring that track, synchronize, and manage the current operational status or configuration of systems and integrations.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Proper state management ensures service continuity and simplifies rollback or recovery in case of failure.

termTranslations.th: การจัดการสถานะ

usageTranslations.en: Proper state management ensures service continuity and simplifies rollback or recovery in case of failure.
usageTranslations.tr: Doğru durum yönetimi, hizmet sürekliliği sağlar ve başarısızlık halinde geri alma veya kurtarmayı kolaylaştırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Une bonne gestion d’état garantit la continuité du service.
usageTranslations.de: Zustandsverwaltung sichert Kontinuität und erleichtert Rollback.
usageTranslations.es: La gestión de estado asegura la continuidad del servicio.
usageTranslations.zh: 良好的状态管理保证服务连续性，简化恢复。
usageTranslations.ar: إدارة الحالة الجيدة تضمن استمرارية الخدمة.
usageTranslations.pt: Gerenciamento de estado garante continuidade do serviço.
usageTranslations.ru: Управление состоянием обеспечивает непрерывность сервиса.
usageTranslations.ja: 適切なステート管理でサービス継続性が確保される。
usageTranslations.it: La gestione dello stato assicura continuità del servizio.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý trạng thái tốt đảm bảo liên tục dịch vụ.
usageTranslations.hi: सही स्टेट मैनेजमेंट सेवा निरंतरता देता है।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดการสถานะที่ดีช่วยให้บริการต่อเนื่อง
usageTranslations.id: Manajemen status yang tepat menjamin kesinambungan layanan.

terms.definition: An automated system notification triggered when monitored performance metrics (e.g., CPU, latency, error rates) exceed pre-defined operational thresholds, indicating potential system degradation.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A performance alert was generated when API response times surpassed the agreed service-level threshold for five consecutive minutes.

termTranslations.ja: パフォーマンスアラート
termTranslations.th: การแจ้งเตือนประสิทธิภาพ

usageTranslations.en: A performance alert was generated when API response times surpassed the agreed service-level threshold for five consecutive minutes.
usageTranslations.tr: API yanıt süreleri beş dakika boyunca belirlenen hizmet seviyesi eşiğini aştığında performans uyarısı üretildi.
usageTranslations.fr: Une alerte de performance a été générée lorsque les temps de réponse ont dépassé le seuil pendant cinq minutes.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Performance-Alarm wurde ausgelöst, als die Antwortzeit der API die Schwelle überschritt.
usageTranslations.es: Se generó una alerta de rendimiento cuando el tiempo de respuesta de la API superó el umbral.
usageTranslations.zh: 当API响应时间连续五分钟超出阈值时，产生性能警报。
usageTranslations.ar: تم إنشاء تنبيه أداء عند تجاوز زمن الاستجابة للواجهة الحد المسموح.
usageTranslations.pt: Um alerta de desempenho foi gerado ao exceder o limite.
usageTranslations.ru: Оповещение о производительности создано при превышении порога.
usageTranslations.ja: API応答時間が5分間閾値を超えたときパフォーマンスアラートが生成された。
usageTranslations.it: Un avviso prestazioni è stato generato quando la risposta API ha superato la soglia.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảnh báo hiệu suất được tạo ra khi thời gian phản hồi API vượt ngưỡng.
usageTranslations.hi: API प्रतिक्रिया समय सीमा पार होते ही परफॉर्मेंस अलर्ट आया।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบแจ้งเตือนประสิทธิภาพทำงานเมื่อเวลาตอบสนองเกินขีดจำกัด
usageTranslations.id: Peringatan performa muncul saat waktu respons API melewati batas.

terms.definition: A formal record created in ITSM or monitoring platforms that logs details of an operational incident, tracks status, and supports investigation, communication, and resolution.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: An incident ticket was automatically created in ServiceNow when the production database became unreachable.

termTranslations.ja: インシデントチケット
termTranslations.th: ทิกเก็ตเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: An incident ticket was automatically created in ServiceNow when the production database became unreachable.
usageTranslations.tr: Üretim veritabanına ulaşılamayınca ServiceNow'da otomatik olarak olay kaydı oluşturuldu.
usageTranslations.fr: Un ticket d’incident a été créé automatiquement dans ServiceNow.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Incident-Ticket wurde in ServiceNow erstellt.
usageTranslations.es: Se creó automáticamente un ticket de incidente en ServiceNow.
usageTranslations.zh: 生产数据库无法访问时在ServiceNow自动创建事故单。
usageTranslations.ar: تم إنشاء تذكرة حادث تلقائيًا في ServiceNow.
usageTranslations.pt: Um ticket de incidente foi criado automaticamente no ServiceNow.
usageTranslations.ru: Тикет инцидента был создан в ServiceNow.
usageTranslations.ja: 本番DBに接続不能時、自動的にインシデントチケットが作成された。
usageTranslations.it: Ticket di incidente creato automaticamente in ServiceNow.
usageTranslations.vi: Phiếu sự cố tự động tạo trên ServiceNow.
usageTranslations.hi: ServiceNow में स्वतः इंसिडेंट टिकट बना।
usageTranslations.th: ทิกเก็ตเหตุการณ์ถูกสร้างอัตโนมัติใน ServiceNow
usageTranslations.id: Tiket insiden otomatis dibuat di ServiceNow.

terms.definition: The deviation of a system's actual configuration from the defined baseline or intended state, often due to manual changes, misapplied automation, or update failures.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Ongoing monitoring detected configuration drift when the live infrastructure diverged from the code-defined baseline.

termTranslations.th: การเบี่ยงเบนของการตั้งค่า

usageTranslations.en: Ongoing monitoring detected configuration drift when the live infrastructure diverged from the code-defined baseline.
usageTranslations.tr: Canlı altyapı kod tabanlı referanstan saptığında sürekli izleme yapılandırma sapmasını tespit etti.
usageTranslations.fr: La surveillance continue a détecté une dérive de configuration.
usageTranslations.de: Monitoring erkannte Konfigurationsabweichung bei Abweichung von der Baseline.
usageTranslations.es: El monitoreo continuo detectó desviación de configuración.
usageTranslations.zh: 持续监控发现配置漂移。
usageTranslations.ar: كشف المراقبة المستمرة عن انحراف التكوين.
usageTranslations.pt: O monitoramento contínuo detectou desvio de configuração.
usageTranslations.ru: Постоянный мониторинг обнаружил дрифт конфигурации.
usageTranslations.ja: 継続的監視で構成ドリフトが検出された。
usageTranslations.it: Il monitoraggio continuo ha rilevato deriva di configurazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Giám sát liên tục phát hiện trôi cấu hình.
usageTranslations.hi: लगातार निगरानी से कॉन्फ़िग ड्रिफ्ट पकड़ा गया।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบตรวจสอบต่อเนื่องพบการเบี่ยงเบนของการตั้งค่า
usageTranslations.id: Monitoring mendeteksi config drift.

terms.definition: A mapped sequence of steps or interactions a user undertakes within an application or service, tracked in monitoring and analytics to assess experience, performance, and incident impact.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The monitoring dashboard visualizes each user journey to identify friction points and correlate them with backend events.

termTranslations.th: เส้นทางผู้ใช้

usageTranslations.en: The monitoring dashboard visualizes each user journey to identify friction points and correlate them with backend events.
usageTranslations.tr: İzleme paneli her kullanıcı yolculuğunu görselleştirir ve olası sorunları arka uç olaylarıyla ilişkilendirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le tableau de bord visualise chaque parcours utilisateur pour détecter les problèmes.
usageTranslations.de: Das Monitoring visualisiert jede User Journey zur Problemidentifikation.
usageTranslations.es: El panel de monitoreo visualiza el recorrido del usuario para detectar fricciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 监控面板可视化用户旅程，定位问题。
usageTranslations.ar: تعرض لوحة المراقبة رحلة المستخدم لتحديد نقاط الاحتكاك.
usageTranslations.pt: O painel de monitoramento visualiza a jornada do usuário.
usageTranslations.ru: Мониторинг визуализирует путь пользователя для поиска проблем.
usageTranslations.ja: 監視ダッシュボードは各ユーザージャーニーを可視化する。
usageTranslations.it: La dashboard monitora la user journey per rilevare problemi.
usageTranslations.vi: Bảng giám sát hiển thị hành trình người dùng.
usageTranslations.hi: मॉनिटरिंग डैशबोर्ड यूज़र जर्नी दिखाता है।
usageTranslations.th: แดชบอร์ดแสดงเส้นทางผู้ใช้เพื่อตรวจปัญหา
usageTranslations.id: Dashboard monitoring memvisualisasi user journey.

terms.definition: A quantifiable measurement used to assess, monitor, and optimize the performance, availability, or reliability of IT systems, integrations, and operational processes.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Latency, error rate, and throughput are common operational metrics tracked in monitoring dashboards to ensure system health.

termTranslations.th: ตัวชี้วัดปฏิบัติการ

usageTranslations.en: Latency, error rate, and throughput are common operational metrics tracked in monitoring dashboards to ensure system health.
usageTranslations.tr: Gecikme, hata oranı ve throughput, sistem sağlığını izlemek için takip edilen yaygın operasyonel metriklerdir.
usageTranslations.fr: La latence, le taux d’erreur et le débit sont des métriques suivies pour garantir la santé du système.
usageTranslations.de: Latenz, Fehlerrate und Durchsatz sind typische Betriebsmetriken.
usageTranslations.es: Latencia, tasa de error y rendimiento son métricas comunes.
usageTranslations.zh: 延迟、错误率和吞吐量是常用的运营指标。
usageTranslations.ar: الكمون، معدل الخطأ، ومعدل النقل هي مقاييس تشغيلية شائعة.
usageTranslations.pt: Latência, taxa de erro e throughput são métricas operacionais comuns.
usageTranslations.ru: Задержка, ошибки и пропускная способность — основные метрики.
usageTranslations.ja: レイテンシ、エラー率、スループットは一般的な運用メトリクスです。
usageTranslations.it: Latenza, tasso di errore e throughput sono metriche operative comuni.
usageTranslations.vi: Độ trễ, tỷ lệ lỗi, throughput là chỉ số vận hành phổ biến.
usageTranslations.hi: लेटेंसी, एरर रेट, थ्रूपुट सामान्य ऑपरेशनल मैट्रिक हैं।
usageTranslations.th: Latency, error rate, throughput คือตัวชี้วัดปฏิบัติการทั่วไป
usageTranslations.id: Latensi, error rate, throughput adalah metrik operasional umum.

terms.definition: The process of analyzing and linking related monitoring or log events to identify patterns, root causes, and reduce alert noise in incident management.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Event correlation grouped hundreds of related alerts into a single incident, streamlining root cause analysis for the ops team.

termTranslations.th: การเชื่อมโยงเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: Event correlation grouped hundreds of related alerts into a single incident, streamlining root cause analysis for the ops team.
usageTranslations.tr: Olay korelasyonu, yüzlerce ilgili uyarıyı tek bir olayda birleştirerek kök neden analizini kolaylaştırdı.
usageTranslations.fr: La corrélation d’événements a agrégé des centaines d’alertes.
usageTranslations.de: Ereigniskorrelation fasste viele Alarme zu einem Incident zusammen.
usageTranslations.es: La correlación de eventos agrupó cientos de alertas.
usageTranslations.zh: 事件关联将数百个警报归并为单一事件。
usageTranslations.ar: ارتباط الأحداث جمع التنبيهات المرتبطة في حادث واحد.
usageTranslations.pt: A correlação de eventos agrupou alertas em um único incidente.
usageTranslations.ru: Корреляция событий объединила сотни оповещений.
usageTranslations.ja: イベント相関で関連アラートを1件にまとめた。
usageTranslations.it: La correlazione eventi ha raggruppato gli alert.
usageTranslations.vi: Liên kết sự kiện gom nhóm cảnh báo thành 1 sự cố.
usageTranslations.hi: इवेंट कोरिलेशन ने सैकड़ों अलर्ट्स को एक में जोड़ा।
usageTranslations.th: การเชื่อมโยงเหตุการณ์รวมหลายการแจ้งเตือนเป็นเหตุการณ์เดียว
usageTranslations.id: Korelasi event mengelompokkan banyak alert.

terms.definition: An isolated environment or instance in a deployment platform (e.g., Azure App Service) allowing multiple app versions to be staged, tested, or swapped without impacting production.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A staging deployment slot allows for testing updates before swapping with production to reduce risk.

termTranslations.ja: デプロイメントスロット
termTranslations.th: สล็อตสำหรับดีพลอย

usageTranslations.en: A staging deployment slot allows for testing updates before swapping with production to reduce risk.
usageTranslations.tr: Staging dağıtım slotu, güncellemeleri canlıya almadan önce test etme imkanı sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Un emplacement de déploiement staging permet de tester avant mise en production.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Staging-Bereitstellungsslot ermöglicht Tests vor Produktivschaltung.
usageTranslations.es: Un slot de staging permite pruebas previas a producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 预发布部署插槽可先测试再上线。
usageTranslations.ar: فتحة النشر التجريبية تتيح اختبار التحديثات قبل الإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: Slot de staging permite testar antes de produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Слот для стейджинга позволяет тестировать обновления.
usageTranslations.ja: ステージングスロットで本番切替前にテスト可能。
usageTranslations.it: Slot di staging consente test prima della produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Slot staging giúp kiểm thử trước khi lên production.
usageTranslations.hi: स्टेजिंग स्लॉट से लाइव से पहले टेस्टिंग संभव है।
usageTranslations.th: สล็อต staging ใช้ทดสอบก่อนปล่อยจริง
usageTranslations.id: Slot staging memungkinkan pengujian sebelum produksi.

terms.definition: A formal retrospective analysis conducted after a major incident or outage to document causes, impacts, and corrective actions for operational improvement.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A postmortem review documented the outage root cause and led to corrective actions for future prevention.

termTranslations.ja: ポストモーテムレビュー
termTranslations.th: รีวิวหลังเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: A postmortem review documented the outage root cause and led to corrective actions for future prevention.
usageTranslations.tr: Olay sonrası inceleme, kesinti nedenini belgeleyip düzeltici eylemleri belirledi.
usageTranslations.fr: La revue post-mortem a identifié la cause et proposé des actions correctives.
usageTranslations.de: Die Postmortem-Analyse dokumentierte die Ursache und Maßnahmen.
usageTranslations.es: La revisión post mortem documentó la causa raíz.
usageTranslations.zh: 事后复盘记录根本原因并制定改进措施。
usageTranslations.ar: مراجعة ما بعد الحادثة وثقت السبب الرئيسي واتخذت إجراءات تصحيحية.
usageTranslations.pt: A revisão post-mortem documentou a causa e as ações corretivas.
usageTranslations.ru: Анализ инцидента определил причину и корректирующие меры.
usageTranslations.ja: ポストモーテムレビューで根本原因と対応策が特定された。
usageTranslations.it: L’analisi post mortem ha documentato la causa e le azioni correttive.
usageTranslations.vi: Đánh giá sau sự cố xác định nguyên nhân và biện pháp khắc phục.
usageTranslations.hi: पोस्टमॉर्टेम समीक्षा में कारण व सुधार तय हुआ।
usageTranslations.th: รีวิวหลังเหตุการณ์สรุปสาเหตุและแนวทางแก้ไข
usageTranslations.id: Tinjauan postmortem mendokumentasikan penyebab dan tindakan korektif.

terms.definition: A version of software or integration package intended for final testing before production release; considered stable and potentially ready for deployment if no major issues are found.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The release candidate passed all automated tests and is pending stakeholder approval for production deployment.

termTranslations.th: เวอร์ชันผู้สมัครเผยแพร่

usageTranslations.en: The release candidate passed all automated tests and is pending stakeholder approval for production deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm adayı tüm otomatik testleri geçti ve canlıya alınmak için onay bekliyor.
usageTranslations.fr: La version candidate a passé tous les tests et attend la validation.
usageTranslations.de: Der Release-Kandidat hat alle Tests bestanden und wartet auf Freigabe.
usageTranslations.es: La versión candidata superó las pruebas y espera la aprobación.
usageTranslations.zh: 候选版本通过所有自动化测试，等待审批。
usageTranslations.ar: اجتازت النسخة المرشحة جميع الاختبارات وتنتظر الموافقة.
usageTranslations.pt: O release candidate passou nos testes e aguarda aprovação.
usageTranslations.ru: Кандидат на релиз прошёл тесты, ждёт одобрения.
usageTranslations.ja: リリース候補は全テストを通過し承認待ちです。
usageTranslations.it: La release candidate ha superato i test e attende l’approvazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Bản ứng viên phát hành vượt qua mọi kiểm thử, chờ phê duyệt.
