usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ कैंडिडेट ने सारे टेस्ट पास किए, अब स्वीकृति शेष है।
usageTranslations.th: เวอร์ชันผู้สมัครผ่านทุกการทดสอบ กำลังรออนุมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Release candidate telah lolos tes dan menunggu persetujuan.

terms.definition: The automated coordination and management of multiple services, microservices, or workflows to achieve complex integration or business processes.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Service orchestration automates task dependencies across microservices for seamless integration and end-to-end transaction processing.

termTranslations.ja: サービスオーケストレーション
termTranslations.th: การประสานบริการ

usageTranslations.en: Service orchestration automates task dependencies across microservices for seamless integration and end-to-end transaction processing.
usageTranslations.tr: Servis orkestrasyonu, mikroservisler arasında bağımlılıkları otomatikleştirerek uçtan uca entegrasyonu sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’orchestration de services automatise les dépendances entre microservices.
usageTranslations.de: Service-Orchestrierung automatisiert Abhängigkeiten zwischen Microservices.
usageTranslations.es: La orquestación de servicios automatiza las dependencias.
usageTranslations.zh: 服务编排自动化微服务间的依赖关系。
usageTranslations.ar: تنسيق الخدمات يحقق التكامل التلقائي بين الميكروخدمات.
usageTranslations.pt: Orquestração de serviços automatiza dependências entre microserviços.
usageTranslations.ru: Оркестрация автоматизирует зависимости между микросервисами.
usageTranslations.ja: サービスオーケストレーションが依存関係を自動化する。
usageTranslations.it: L’orchestrazione dei servizi automatizza le dipendenze tra microservizi.
usageTranslations.vi: Điều phối dịch vụ tự động hoá liên kết giữa microservice.
usageTranslations.hi: सर्विस ऑर्केस्ट्रेशन माइक्रोसर्विस के बीच संबंध ऑटोमेट करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การประสานบริการช่วยให้ระบบทำงานร่วมกันอัตโนมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Orkestrasi layanan mengotomatisasi ketergantungan antar microservice.

terms.definition: A quantitative measure of how much of a codebase or system is exercised by automated or manual tests, typically expressed as a percentage.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Increasing test coverage improves system reliability by ensuring more code paths are validated before deployment.

termTranslations.th: ขอบเขตการทดสอบ

usageTranslations.en: Increasing test coverage improves system reliability by ensuring more code paths are validated before deployment.
usageTranslations.tr: Test kapsamının artırılması, daha fazla kodun doğrulanmasını sağlayarak sistem güvenilirliğini artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Augmenter la couverture de test améliore la fiabilité du système.
usageTranslations.de: Höhere Testabdeckung erhöht die Zuverlässigkeit.
usageTranslations.es: Aumentar la cobertura de pruebas mejora la fiabilidad.
usageTranslations.zh: 提高测试覆盖率能提升系统可靠性。
usageTranslations.ar: زيادة تغطية الاختبار تعزز موثوقية النظام.
usageTranslations.pt: Aumentar a cobertura de teste melhora a confiabilidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Увеличение покрытия тестами повышает надёжность.
usageTranslations.ja: テストカバレッジを上げると信頼性が向上する。
usageTranslations.it: Aumentare la copertura dei test migliora l’affidabilità.
usageTranslations.vi: Tăng độ bao phủ kiểm thử giúp hệ thống ổn định.
usageTranslations.hi: ज्यादा टेस्ट कवरेज से सिस्टम विश्वसनीयता बढ़ती है।
usageTranslations.th: ขอบเขตการทดสอบสูงช่วยเพิ่มความน่าเชื่อถือ
usageTranslations.id: Meningkatkan cakupan pengujian meningkatkan keandalan sistem.

terms.definition: A controlled non-production environment used to execute tests on new code, configurations, or integrations before deploying to production.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: All integrations are validated in a dedicated test environment to prevent issues from reaching production systems.

termTranslations.th: สภาพแวดล้อมการทดสอบ

usageTranslations.en: All integrations are validated in a dedicated test environment to prevent issues from reaching production systems.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm entegrasyonlar, sorunların canlıya ulaşmasını önlemek için test ortamında doğrulanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Toutes les intégrations sont validées en environnement de test.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Integrationen werden in einer Testumgebung geprüft.
usageTranslations.es: Todas las integraciones se validan en un entorno de pruebas.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有集成都在测试环境中验证。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم التحقق من جميع التكاملات في بيئة اختبار.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as integrações são validadas em ambiente de teste.
usageTranslations.ru: Все интеграции проверяются в тестовой среде.
usageTranslations.ja: 全ての統合はテスト環境で検証される。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le integrazioni vengono testate in ambiente di test.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả tích hợp đều được kiểm thử ở môi trường kiểm thử.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी इंटीग्रेशन टेस्ट एनवायरनमेंट में वेरिफाई होते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ทุกการเชื่อมต่อจะทดสอบในสภาพแวดล้อมทดสอบ
usageTranslations.id: Semua integrasi divalidasi di lingkungan pengujian.

terms.definition: A DevOps practice in which code changes are automatically built, tested, and deployed to production environments without manual intervention.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Continuous deployment allows new features to reach users faster by automating the entire build and release pipeline.

termTranslations.th: การ deploy อย่างต่อเนื่อง

usageTranslations.en: Continuous deployment allows new features to reach users faster by automating the entire build and release pipeline.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürekli dağıtım, tüm derleme ve sürüm sürecini otomatikleştirerek yeni özelliklerin hızlıca kullanıcılara ulaşmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le déploiement continu accélère la livraison des fonctionnalités.
usageTranslations.de: Kontinuierliche Bereitstellung beschleunigt neue Features für Nutzer.
usageTranslations.es: El despliegue continuo permite lanzar nuevas funciones más rápido.
usageTranslations.zh: 持续部署加速了新功能的上线。
usageTranslations.ar: النشر المستمر يسرّع إيصال الميزات الجديدة.
usageTranslations.pt: Implantação contínua acelera a entrega de novidades.
usageTranslations.ru: Непрерывное развертывание ускоряет вывод новых функций.
usageTranslations.ja: 継続的デプロイで新機能が素早くユーザーに届く。
usageTranslations.it: Deployment continuo accelera il rilascio di nuove funzionalità.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai liên tục giúp tính năng mới đến tay người dùng nhanh hơn.
usageTranslations.hi: कंटीन्यूअस डिप्लॉयमेंट से नए फीचर तुरंत पहुंचते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: deploy อย่างต่อเนื่องทำให้คุณสมบัติใหม่ถึงผู้ใช้เร็วขึ้น
usageTranslations.id: Continuous deployment mempercepat fitur baru ke pengguna.

terms.definition: A DevOps practice ensuring that code is always in a deployable state and can be released to production at any time with minimal manual intervention.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Continuous delivery ensures that every code change passes automated tests and is always ready for release to production.

termTranslations.th: การส่งมอบอย่างต่อเนื่อง

usageTranslations.en: Continuous delivery ensures that every code change passes automated tests and is always ready for release to production.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürekli teslimat, her kod değişikliğinin otomatik testleri geçip canlıya alınmaya hazır olmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La livraison continue garantit des versions prêtes à déployer.
usageTranslations.de: Kontinuierliche Auslieferung stellt immer einsatzbereite Releases sicher.
usageTranslations.es: La entrega continua asegura versiones listas para producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 持续交付确保每次更改都可部署。
usageTranslations.ar: التسليم المستمر يضمن الجاهزية للنشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Entrega contínua garante builds prontos para produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Непрерывная доставка обеспечивает готовность к релизу.
usageTranslations.ja: 継続的デリバリーで常に本番投入が可能。
usageTranslations.it: Delivery continua assicura rilasci sempre pronti.
usageTranslations.vi: Giao hàng liên tục đảm bảo code luôn sẵn sàng ra mắt.
usageTranslations.hi: कंटीन्यूअस डिलीवरी से कोड हमेशा रिलीज़ के लिए तैयार रहता है।
usageTranslations.th: การส่งมอบอย่างต่อเนื่องทำให้โค้ดพร้อมปล่อยเสมอ
usageTranslations.id: Continuous delivery memastikan setiap perubahan siap produksi.

terms.definition: The connection of alerting systems with other tools or platforms (e.g., chat, incident management, ticketing) to enable automated, end-to-end incident response workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Alert integration routes critical monitoring alerts directly to Slack channels and incident ticketing systems for immediate action.

termTranslations.th: การรวมการแจ้งเตือน

usageTranslations.en: Alert integration routes critical monitoring alerts directly to Slack channels and incident ticketing systems for immediate action.
usageTranslations.tr: Uyarı entegrasyonu, kritik uyarıları doğrudan Slack kanallarına ve olay yönetimine yönlendirir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’intégration des alertes envoie directement les alertes critiques.
usageTranslations.de: Alarmintegration leitet Alarme direkt an Slack und Ticketsysteme weiter.
usageTranslations.es: La integración de alertas envía alertas críticas directamente.
usageTranslations.zh: 警报集成可将警报直接发送到Slack等系统。
usageTranslations.ar: تكامل التنبيهات يوجه التنبيهات للنظم المختلفة فوراً.
usageTranslations.pt: Integração de alertas encaminha alertas críticos diretamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Интеграция оповещений направляет сигналы напрямую.
usageTranslations.ja: アラート統合により重要な通知が即時送信される。
usageTranslations.it: L’integrazione degli alert invia notifiche direttamente.
usageTranslations.vi: Tích hợp cảnh báo chuyển thông báo đến hệ thống xử lý ngay lập tức.
usageTranslations.hi: अलर्ट इंटीग्रेशन अलर्ट्स को डायरेक्ट भेजता है।
usageTranslations.th: การรวมการแจ้งเตือนจะส่งไปยังช่องที่เกี่ยวข้องทันที
usageTranslations.id: Integrasi alert mengirim notifikasi langsung ke sistem lain.

terms.definition: A reference value or set of typical ranges established for key operational metrics, used to detect anomalies and trigger alerts if deviations occur.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Metric baselines are established to monitor for deviations that may indicate performance regressions or incidents.

termTranslations.ja: メトリックベースライン
termTranslations.th: เส้นฐานเมตริก

usageTranslations.en: Metric baselines are established to monitor for deviations that may indicate performance regressions or incidents.
usageTranslations.tr: Metrik baz değerleri, performans düşüşü veya olayları gösterebilecek sapmaları izlemek için belirlenir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les baselines de métrique servent à détecter des écarts.
usageTranslations.de: Metrik-Basislinien helfen bei der Erkennung von Abweichungen.
usageTranslations.es: Las líneas base de métricas permiten detectar desviaciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 指标基线有助于发现异常偏离。
usageTranslations.ar: تُحدد خطوط الأساس لمراقبة الانحرافات.
usageTranslations.pt: Baselines de métricas monitoram desvios.
usageTranslations.ru: Базовые метрики нужны для отслеживания отклонений.
usageTranslations.ja: メトリックベースラインで逸脱を監視できる。
usageTranslations.it: La baseline delle metriche rileva deviazioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Đường cơ sở chỉ số giúp phát hiện sai lệch.
usageTranslations.hi: मेट्रिक बेसलाइन से विचलन पकड़े जाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: เส้นฐานเมตริกช่วยจับความผิดปกติ
usageTranslations.id: Baseline metrik membantu memantau penyimpangan.

terms.definition: The real-time ability to observe, track, and understand the health, performance, and dependencies of services and integrations across an IT environment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Dashboards provide operational visibility into real-time service status, enabling faster troubleshooting and proactive incident response.

termTranslations.vi: Khả năng quan sát vận hành
termTranslations.th: การมองเห็นการปฏิบัติการ

usageTranslations.en: Dashboards provide operational visibility into real-time service status, enabling faster troubleshooting and proactive incident response.
usageTranslations.tr: Paneller, gerçek zamanlı hizmet durumu için operasyonel görünürlük sunar ve hızlı müdahaleye olanak tanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les tableaux de bord offrent une visibilité opérationnelle.
usageTranslations.de: Dashboards bieten betriebliche Sichtbarkeit.
usageTranslations.es: Los paneles brindan visibilidad operativa.
usageTranslations.zh: 面板提供实时运营可视性。
usageTranslations.ar: توفر لوحات المعلومات رؤية تشغيلية لحالة الخدمة.
usageTranslations.pt: Dashboards trazem visibilidade operacional.
usageTranslations.ru: Дашборды обеспечивают операционную видимость.
usageTranslations.ja: ダッシュボードは運用可視性を提供する。
usageTranslations.it: I dashboard offrono visibilità operativa.
usageTranslations.vi: Bảng điều khiển cung cấp khả năng quan sát vận hành.
usageTranslations.hi: डैशबोर्ड से ऑपरेशनल विजिबिलिटी मिलती है।
usageTranslations.th: แดชบอร์ดให้การมองเห็นสถานะการบริการ
usageTranslations.id: Dashboard menyediakan visibilitas operasional.

terms.definition: The coordination and automation of deployment steps, approvals, and testing in a release process to ensure smooth, controlled, and auditable production rollouts.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Release orchestration tools automate deployment steps, manage dependencies, and provide auditable records for compliance.

termTranslations.ja: リリースオーケストレーション
termTranslations.th: การประสานการปล่อยซอฟต์แวร์

usageTranslations.en: Release orchestration tools automate deployment steps, manage dependencies, and provide auditable records for compliance.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürüm orkestrasyonu araçları, dağıtım adımlarını otomatikleştirir, bağımlılıkları yönetir ve denetlenebilir kayıtlar sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les outils d’orchestration de déploiement automatisent les étapes et gèrent les dépendances.
usageTranslations.de: Release-Orchestrierung automatisiert Schritte und steuert Abhängigkeiten.
usageTranslations.es: Las herramientas de orquestación automatizan y gestionan dependencias.
usageTranslations.zh: 发布编排工具自动化部署步骤并管理依赖关系。
usageTranslations.ar: أدوات تنسيق الإصدارات تؤتمت خطوات النشر.
usageTranslations.pt: Ferramentas de orquestração automatizam etapas e dependências.
usageTranslations.ru: Оркестрация релизов автоматизирует и управляет зависимостями.
usageTranslations.ja: リリースオーケストレーションは手順を自動化。
usageTranslations.it: Gli strumenti di orchestrazione automatizzano il rilascio.
usageTranslations.vi: Công cụ điều phối phát hành tự động hoá các bước và quản lý phụ thuộc.
usageTranslations.hi: रिलीज़ ऑर्केस्ट्रेशन डिप्लॉयमेंट को ऑटोमेट करता है।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องมือประสานช่วยให้ deployment เป็นระบบอัตโนมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Alat orkestrasi rilis mengotomatisasi tahapan deployment.

terms.definition: The automated execution of operational procedures and incident response workflows using predefined runbooks, scripts, or orchestration platforms to ensure standardized and repeatable responses across IT systems, integrations, or service monitoring environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Playbook automation enables SRE teams to resolve incidents faster and reduce manual intervention by executing response steps through integrated tools.

termTranslations.th: การทำเพลย์บุ๊กอัตโนมัติ

usageTranslations.en: Playbook automation enables SRE teams to resolve incidents faster and reduce manual intervention by executing response steps through integrated tools.
usageTranslations.tr: Playbook otomasyonu, SRE ekiplerinin olayları daha hızlı çözmesini ve entegre araçlarla yanıt adımlarını uygulayarak manuel müdahaleyi azaltmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L'automatisation de playbook permet aux équipes SRE de résoudre les incidents plus rapidement et de réduire l'intervention manuelle en exécutant les étapes de réponse via des outils intégrés.
usageTranslations.de: Die Playbook-Automatisierung ermöglicht es SRE-Teams, Vorfälle schneller zu beheben und manuelle Eingriffe durch die Ausführung von Reaktionsschritten über integrierte Tools zu reduzieren.
usageTranslations.es: La automatización de playbook permite a los equipos SRE resolver incidentes más rápido y reducir la intervención manual al ejecutar los pasos de respuesta mediante herramientas integradas.
usageTranslations.zh: 剧本自动化使 SRE 团队能够更快地解决事件，并通过集成工具执行响应步骤，从而减少手动干预。
usageTranslations.ar: تمكّن أتمتة دليل الإجراءات فرق SRE من حل الحوادث بسرعة وتقليل التدخل اليدوي من خلال تنفيذ خطوات الاستجابة عبر الأدوات المدمجة.
usageTranslations.pt: A automação de playbook permite que as equipes de SRE resolvam incidentes mais rapidamente e reduzam a intervenção manual ao executar etapas de resposta por meio de ferramentas integradas.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоматизация плейбука позволяет командам SRE быстрее устранять инциденты и снижать ручное вмешательство за счет выполнения шагов реагирования через интегрированные инструменты.
usageTranslations.ja: プレイブック自動化により、SRE チームは統合ツールで対応手順を実行することで、インシデントの解決を迅速化し手動介入を減らせます。
usageTranslations.it: L'automazione dei playbook consente ai team SRE di risolvere più rapidamente gli incidenti e ridurre l'intervento manuale eseguendo le fasi di risposta tramite strumenti integrati.
usageTranslations.vi: Tự động hóa playbook giúp các nhóm SRE xử lý sự cố nhanh hơn và giảm thiểu can thiệp thủ công bằng cách thực hiện các bước phản hồi qua công cụ tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: प्लेबुक ऑटोमेशन से SRE टीमें इंटीग्रेटेड टूल्स के जरिए रिस्पांस स्टेप्स चलाकर तेज़ी से घटनाओं को सुलझा सकती हैं और मैन्युअल हस्तक्षेप कम कर सकती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: การทำเพลย์บุ๊กอัตโนมัติช่วยให้ทีม SRE แก้ไขเหตุการณ์ได้เร็วขึ้นและลดการแทรกแซงด้วยตนเองโดยดำเนินการตามขั้นตอนตอบสนองผ่านเครื่องมือที่รวมไว้
usageTranslations.id: Otomatisasi playbook memungkinkan tim SRE menyelesaikan insiden lebih cepat dan mengurangi intervensi manual dengan menjalankan langkah respons melalui alat terintegrasi.

terms.definition: A formal process in IT operations and incident management by which unresolved service issues or incidents are elevated to higher support tiers, subject-matter experts, or management levels according to escalation policy.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: If a critical incident cannot be resolved within the SLA window, service escalation is triggered to ensure expert intervention.

termTranslations.ja: サービスエスカレーション
termTranslations.th: การส่งต่อบริการ

usageTranslations.en: If a critical incident cannot be resolved within the SLA window, service escalation is triggered to ensure expert intervention.
usageTranslations.tr: Kritik bir olay SLA süresi içinde çözülemezse, uzman müdahalesini sağlamak için hizmet eskalasyonu başlatılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Si un incident critique ne peut pas être résolu dans le délai SLA, une escalade de service est déclenchée pour garantir l'intervention d'experts.
usageTranslations.de: Kann ein kritischer Vorfall nicht innerhalb des SLA-Zeitrahmens behoben werden, wird eine Service-Eskalation ausgelöst, um Experteneinsatz zu gewährleisten.
usageTranslations.es: Si un incidente crítico no puede resolverse dentro del plazo del SLA, se activa el escalado de servicio para garantizar la intervención de expertos.
usageTranslations.zh: 如果关键事件无法在 SLA 时间内解决，则会触发服务升级以确保专家介入。
usageTranslations.ar: إذا تعذر حل الحادث الحرج ضمن نافذة SLA، يتم تفعيل تصعيد الخدمة لضمان تدخل الخبراء.
usageTranslations.pt: Se um incidente crítico não puder ser resolvido dentro do prazo do SLA, o escalonamento de serviço é acionado para garantir a intervenção de especialistas.
usageTranslations.ru: Если критический инцидент не может быть решен в рамках SLA, инициируется эскалация сервиса для обеспечения вмешательства экспертов.
usageTranslations.ja: 重大なインシデントがSLA内で解決できない場合、専門家の介入を確保するためサービスエスカレーションが発動されます。
usageTranslations.it: Se un incidente critico non può essere risolto entro la finestra SLA, viene avviata l'escalation del servizio per garantire l'intervento degli esperti.
usageTranslations.vi: Nếu một sự cố nghiêm trọng không thể giải quyết trong thời gian SLA, việc nâng cấp dịch vụ được kích hoạt để đảm bảo có chuyên gia can thiệp.
usageTranslations.hi: यदि कोई गंभीर घटना SLA विंडो में हल नहीं हो सकती है, तो विशेषज्ञ हस्तक्षेप के लिए सर्विस एस्कलेशन शुरू होता है।
usageTranslations.th: หากไม่สามารถแก้ไขเหตุการณ์สำคัญภายในกรอบ SLA ได้ จะมีการส่งต่อบริการเพื่อให้ผู้เชี่ยวชาญเข้ามาแทรกแซง
usageTranslations.id: Jika insiden kritis tidak dapat diselesaikan dalam jendela SLA, eskalasi layanan dipicu untuk memastikan intervensi ahli.

terms.definition: The rate at which error budget or SLO allowance is consumed over time, indicating the pace of reliability degradation in SRE practice and the urgency of corrective actions.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: When burn rate exceeds the acceptable threshold, SRE teams must pause risky releases and address the underlying causes to protect reliability.

termTranslations.th: Burn Rate

usageTranslations.en: When burn rate exceeds the acceptable threshold, SRE teams must pause risky releases and address the underlying causes to protect reliability.
usageTranslations.tr: Burn rate kabul edilebilir eşiği aştığında, SRE ekipleri riskli yayınları duraklatmalı ve güvenilirliği korumak için temel nedenleri ele almalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Lorsque le burn rate dépasse le seuil acceptable, les équipes SRE doivent suspendre les déploiements risqués et traiter les causes sous-jacentes pour protéger la fiabilité.
usageTranslations.de: Überschreitet die Burn Rate den zulässigen Schwellenwert, müssen SRE-Teams riskante Releases stoppen und die Ursachen beheben, um die Zuverlässigkeit zu schützen.
usageTranslations.es: Cuando el burn rate supera el umbral aceptable, los equipos SRE deben pausar los lanzamientos arriesgados y abordar las causas subyacentes para proteger la fiabilidad.
usageTranslations.zh: 当烧损率超过可接受阈值时，SRE 团队必须暂停高风险发布并解决根本原因以保护可靠性。
usageTranslations.ar: عندما يتجاوز معدل الاستهلاك الحد المقبول، يجب على فرق SRE إيقاف الإصدارات الخطرة ومعالجة الأسباب الجذرية لحماية الموثوقية.
usageTranslations.pt: Quando o burn rate excede o limite aceitável, as equipes SRE devem pausar lançamentos arriscados e tratar as causas subjacentes para proteger a confiabilidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Когда Burn Rate превышает допустимый порог, команды SRE должны приостановить рискованные релизы и устранить первопричины для обеспечения надежности.
usageTranslations.ja: バーンレートが許容しきい値を超えた場合、SRE チームはリスクの高いリリースを停止し、信頼性を守るため根本原因に対処します。
usageTranslations.it: Quando il burn rate supera la soglia accettabile, i team SRE devono sospendere i rilasci rischiosi e affrontare le cause alla base per proteggere l'affidabilità.
usageTranslations.vi: Khi burn rate vượt quá ngưỡng chấp nhận được, các nhóm SRE phải tạm dừng phát hành rủi ro và xử lý nguyên nhân gốc để bảo vệ độ tin cậy.
usageTranslations.hi: जब बर्न रेट स्वीकार्य सीमा से अधिक हो जाता है, SRE टीमों को जोखिमपूर्ण रिलीज़ को रोकना और विश्वसनीयता की रक्षा के लिए मूल कारणों को संबोधित करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: เมื่อ Burn Rate เกินเกณฑ์ที่ยอมรับได้ ทีม SRE ต้องหยุดปล่อยเวอร์ชันที่เสี่ยงและจัดการกับสาเหตุที่แท้จริงเพื่อปกป้องความน่าเชื่อถือ
usageTranslations.id: Ketika burn rate melebihi ambang batas yang dapat diterima, tim SRE harus menghentikan rilis yang berisiko dan mengatasi penyebab yang mendasarinya untuk menjaga keandalan.

terms.definition: A scheduled process in site reliability and IT operations where on-call responsibilities for incident response are rotated among team members according to a predefined roster or policy.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Incident rotation ensures operational load is distributed fairly among SREs, preventing burnout and maintaining round-the-clock coverage.

termTranslations.ja: インシデントローテーション
termTranslations.th: การหมุนเวียนเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: Incident rotation ensures operational load is distributed fairly among SREs, preventing burnout and maintaining round-the-clock coverage.
usageTranslations.tr: Olay nöbet döngüsü, operasyonel yükün SRE’ler arasında adil bir şekilde dağıtılmasını sağlar, tükenmişliği önler ve 7/24 kapsama devamlılığını garanti eder.
usageTranslations.fr: La rotation d'incident garantit une répartition équitable de la charge opérationnelle entre les SRE, évitant l'épuisement et assurant une couverture continue.
usageTranslations.de: Die Incident-Rotation stellt sicher, dass die operative Last fair unter den SREs verteilt wird, Burnout verhindert und eine 24/7-Abdeckung gewährleistet.
usageTranslations.es: La rotación de incidentes garantiza que la carga operativa se distribuya equitativamente entre los SRE, evitando el agotamiento y manteniendo la cobertura continua.
usageTranslations.zh: 事件轮换确保运营负载在 SRE 之间公平分配，防止疲劳，并保持全天候覆盖。
usageTranslations.ar: يضمن تدوير الحوادث توزيع الحمل التشغيلي بشكل عادل بين فرق SRE، ويمنع الإرهاق ويوفر تغطية على مدار الساعة.
usageTranslations.pt: O rodízio de incidentes garante que a carga operacional seja distribuída de forma justa entre os SREs, prevenindo o esgotamento e mantendo a cobertura 24/7.
usageTranslations.ru: Ротация инцидентов обеспечивает справедливое распределение операционной нагрузки среди SRE, предотвращает выгорание и поддерживает круглосуточное покрытие.
usageTranslations.ja: インシデントローテーションにより、SRE間で運用負荷が公平に分散され、燃え尽き症候群を防ぎ、24時間体制が維持されます。
usageTranslations.it: La rotazione degli incidenti garantisce una distribuzione equa del carico operativo tra gli SRE, prevenendo il burnout e mantenendo la copertura continua.
usageTranslations.vi: Luân phiên sự cố đảm bảo phân bổ đều tải công việc giữa các SRE, ngăn ngừa kiệt sức và duy trì sự giám sát liên tục.
usageTranslations.hi: इंसिडेंट रोटेशन से SRE टीमों में कार्यभार समान रूप से वितरित होता है, थकान को रोका जाता है और 24x7 कवरेज बनी रहती है।
usageTranslations.th: การหมุนเวียนเหตุการณ์ช่วยให้การกระจายภาระงานระหว่าง SRE เป็นธรรม ป้องกันความเหนื่อยล้าและยังคงให้การครอบคลุมตลอด 24 ชั่วโมง
usageTranslations.id: Rotasi insiden memastikan beban operasional didistribusikan secara adil di antara SRE, mencegah kelelahan, dan menjaga cakupan 24/7.

terms.definition: A formal set of rules and expectations in site reliability engineering that governs the assignment, escalation, and response to pager or alert notifications for operational incidents.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A robust pager policy ensures that alerts are distributed fairly, acknowledged promptly, and escalated according to severity in SRE environments.

termTranslations.th: นโยบายเพจเจอร์

usageTranslations.en: A robust pager policy ensures that alerts are distributed fairly, acknowledged promptly, and escalated according to severity in SRE environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Güçlü bir pager politikası, uyarıların adil şekilde dağıtılmasını, hızlıca onaylanmasını ve SRE ortamlarında ciddiyetine göre eskale edilmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Une politique de pager robuste garantit que les alertes sont distribuées équitablement, reconnues rapidement et escaladées selon la gravité dans les environnements SRE.
usageTranslations.de: Eine robuste Pager-Policy stellt sicher, dass Alarme fair verteilt, schnell bestätigt und je nach Schweregrad in SRE-Umgebungen eskaliert werden.
usageTranslations.es: Una política de pager sólida asegura que las alertas se distribuyan equitativamente, se reconozcan con prontitud y se escalen según la gravedad en entornos SRE.
usageTranslations.zh: 健全的呼叫策略确保在 SRE 环境中，警报得到公平分配、及时确认并根据严重程度升级。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن سياسة الاستدعاء القوية توزيع التنبيهات بشكل عادل، والاعتراف بها بسرعة، وتصعيدها حسب شدة الموقف في بيئات SRE.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma política de pager robusta garante que os alertas sejam distribuídos de forma justa, reconhecidos prontamente e escalados conforme a gravidade nos ambientes SRE.
usageTranslations.ru: Надежная политика пейджера обеспечивает справедливое распределение оповещений, их своевременное подтверждение и эскалацию по степени серьезности в SRE-среде.
usageTranslations.ja: 堅牢なページャーポリシーは、アラートがSRE環境で公平に分配され、迅速に認識され、重大度に応じてエスカレーションされることを保証します。
usageTranslations.it: Una policy pager robusta garantisce che gli avvisi siano distribuiti equamente, riconosciuti tempestivamente ed escalati in base alla gravità negli ambienti SRE.
usageTranslations.vi: Chính sách pager vững chắc đảm bảo cảnh báo được phân phối công bằng, xác nhận kịp thời và nâng cấp theo mức độ nghiêm trọng trong môi trường SRE.
usageTranslations.hi: एक मजबूत पेजर नीति यह सुनिश्चित करती है कि SRE वातावरण में अलर्ट निष्पक्ष रूप से वितरित हों, शीघ्रता से स्वीकार किए जाएं और गंभीरता के अनुसार एस्कलेट हों।
usageTranslations.th: นโยบายเพจเจอร์ที่แข็งแกร่งช่วยให้มั่นใจว่าแจ้งเตือนถูกแจกจ่ายอย่างเป็นธรรม รับทราบอย่างทันท่วงที และส่งต่อหากมีความรุนแรงในสภาพแวดล้อม SRE
usageTranslations.id: Kebijakan pager yang kuat memastikan bahwa peringatan didistribusikan secara adil, segera diakui, dan dieskalasi sesuai tingkat keparahan di lingkungan SRE.

terms.definition: A detailed set of documented procedures and best practices for handling specific incident types or operational anomalies in IT and integration environments.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A response playbook for API downtime guides SREs through diagnostics, communication, and restoration procedures to ensure minimal disruption.

termTranslations.ja: レスポンスプレイブック
termTranslations.th: เพลย์บุ๊กการตอบสนอง

usageTranslations.en: A response playbook for API downtime guides SREs through diagnostics, communication, and restoration procedures to ensure minimal disruption.
usageTranslations.tr: API kesintisi için bir yanıt playbook’u, SRE’leri teşhis, iletişim ve geri yükleme adımlarında yönlendirerek kesintiyi en aza indirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un playbook de réponse pour une panne d'API guide les SRE dans les diagnostics, la communication et les procédures de restauration afin de minimiser les interruptions.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Response-Playbook für API-Ausfälle führt SREs durch Diagnose-, Kommunikations- und Wiederherstellungsverfahren, um Unterbrechungen zu minimieren.
usageTranslations.es: Un playbook de respuesta para caídas de API guía a los SRE en diagnósticos, comunicación y procedimientos de restauración para minimizar las interrupciones.
usageTranslations.zh: API 停机的响应剧本引导 SRE 完成诊断、沟通和恢复过程，以确保最小化中断。
usageTranslations.ar: دليل الاستجابة لتعطل واجهة برمجة التطبيقات يوجه فرق SRE خلال إجراءات التشخيص والاتصال والاستعادة لضمان الحد الأدنى من التعطل.
usageTranslations.pt: Um playbook de resposta para indisponibilidade de API orienta os SREs em diagnóstico, comunicação e procedimentos de restauração para garantir mínima interrupção.
usageTranslations.ru: Плейбук реагирования на простой API направляет SRE через диагностику, коммуникацию и процедуры восстановления для минимизации сбоев.
usageTranslations.ja: APIダウン時のレスポンスプレイブックは、SREが診断・連絡・復旧手順を踏む際の指針となり、障害の影響を最小化します。
usageTranslations.it: Un playbook di risposta per il downtime delle API guida gli SRE attraverso la diagnostica, la comunicazione e le procedure di ripristino per ridurre al minimo le interruzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Playbook phản hồi cho downtime API hướng dẫn SRE chẩn đoán, giao tiếp và khôi phục để đảm bảo gián đoạn tối thiểu.
usageTranslations.hi: API डाउनटाइम के लिए रिस्पांस प्लेबुक, SRE टीम को निदान, संवाद और पुनर्स्थापना प्रक्रियाओं में मार्गदर्शन करता है, जिससे व्यवधान न्यूनतम हो जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: เพลย์บุ๊กการตอบสนองต่อ API downtime ช่วยให้ทีม SRE ดำเนินการวิเคราะห์ สื่อสาร และกู้คืนได้อย่างเป็นระบบ เพื่อลดผลกระทบ
usageTranslations.id: Playbook respons untuk downtime API membimbing SRE melalui diagnosis, komunikasi, dan prosedur pemulihan untuk meminimalkan gangguan.

terms.definition: An event where the service's actual reliability or performance falls short of the agreed Service Level Objective, triggering error budget consumption and potential incident response.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A major SLO violation requires immediate action from SRE and platform teams to investigate and restore service compliance.

termTranslations.th: การละเมิด SLO

usageTranslations.en: A major SLO violation requires immediate action from SRE and platform teams to investigate and restore service compliance.
usageTranslations.tr: Büyük bir SLO ihlali, SRE ve platform ekiplerinin hemen harekete geçip hizmet uygunluğunu araştırmasını ve geri yüklemesini gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une violation majeure de SLO nécessite une action immédiate des équipes SRE et plateforme pour enquêter et rétablir la conformité du service.
usageTranslations.de: Ein schwerwiegender SLO-Verstoß erfordert sofortiges Handeln der SRE- und Plattform-Teams, um die Servicekonformität zu untersuchen und wiederherzustellen.
usageTranslations.es: Una infracción grave de SLO requiere acción inmediata de los equipos SRE y de plataforma para investigar y restablecer la conformidad del servicio.
usageTranslations.zh: 重大 SLO 违反需要 SRE 和平台团队立即采取行动，调查并恢复服务合规性。
usageTranslations.ar: يتطلب انتهاك SLO الكبير اتخاذ إجراء فوري من فرق SRE والمنصة للتحقيق واستعادة الامتثال للخدمة.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma violação importante de SLO exige ação imediata das equipes de SRE e plataforma para investigar e restaurar a conformidade do serviço.
usageTranslations.ru: Серьезное нарушение SLO требует немедленных действий со стороны команд SRE и платформы для расследования и восстановления соответствия службы.
usageTranslations.ja: 重大なSLO違反は、SREやプラットフォームチームが即座に調査し、サービスの適合性を回復する行動を求めます。
usageTranslations.it: Una grave violazione degli SLO richiede un'azione immediata dei team SRE e piattaforma per indagare e ripristinare la conformità del servizio.
usageTranslations.vi: Vi phạm SLO nghiêm trọng yêu cầu các nhóm SRE và nền tảng phải hành động ngay để điều tra và khôi phục sự tuân thủ dịch vụ.
usageTranslations.hi: एक बड़ी SLO उल्लंघन के लिए SRE और प्लेटफ़ॉर्म टीमों से तत्काल कार्रवाई की आवश्यकता होती है, ताकि सेवा अनुपालन की जांच की जा सके और उसे पुनर्स्थापित किया जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: การละเมิด SLO ครั้งใหญ่ต้องให้ทีม SRE และแพลตฟอร์มดำเนินการทันทีเพื่อตรวจสอบและคืนค่าความสอดคล้องของบริการ
usageTranslations.id: Pelanggaran SLO utama memerlukan tindakan segera dari tim SRE dan platform untuk menyelidiki dan memulihkan kepatuhan layanan.

terms.definition: The ongoing effort to minimize repetitive, manual, and low-value operational work in site reliability engineering by automating tasks and streamlining workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Effective toil reduction increases SRE team productivity and allows engineers to focus on reliability improvements instead of repetitive maintenance.

termTranslations.th: การลดงานซ้ำซาก

usageTranslations.en: Effective toil reduction increases SRE team productivity and allows engineers to focus on reliability improvements instead of repetitive maintenance.
usageTranslations.tr: Etkili toil azaltımı, SRE ekibi verimliliğini artırır ve mühendislerin tekrar eden bakım yerine güvenilirlik iyileştirmelerine odaklanmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Une réduction efficace du toil augmente la productivité de l'équipe SRE et permet aux ingénieurs de se concentrer sur les améliorations de la fiabilité plutôt que sur la maintenance répétitive.
usageTranslations.de: Eine effektive Toil-Reduzierung steigert die Produktivität des SRE-Teams und ermöglicht es den Ingenieuren, sich auf Verbesserungen der Zuverlässigkeit anstatt auf wiederholte Wartungsarbeiten zu konzentrieren.
usageTranslations.es: La reducción eficaz de toil aumenta la productividad del equipo SRE y permite a los ingenieros centrarse en las mejoras de fiabilidad en lugar del mantenimiento repetitivo.
usageTranslations.zh: 有效减少苦工可以提高 SRE 团队的生产力，使工程师专注于可靠性改进，而不是重复性维护。
usageTranslations.ar: يؤدي تقليل الأعمال الروتينية بشكل فعال إلى زيادة إنتاجية فريق SRE ويسمح للمهندسين بالتركيز على تحسينات الموثوقية بدلاً من الصيانة المتكررة.
usageTranslations.pt: A redução eficaz de toil aumenta a produtividade da equipe SRE e permite que os engenheiros se concentrem em melhorias de confiabilidade em vez de manutenção repetitiva.
usageTranslations.ru: Эффективное сокращение рутинных задач повышает продуктивность команды SRE и позволяет инженерам сосредоточиться на повышении надежности, а не на повторяющемся обслуживании.
usageTranslations.ja: 効果的なトイル削減により、SREチームの生産性が向上し、エンジニアは繰り返しの保守作業ではなく信頼性向上に集中できます。
usageTranslations.it: Una riduzione efficace del toil aumenta la produttività del team SRE e consente agli ingegneri di concentrarsi sui miglioramenti della affidabilità invece della manutenzione ripetitiva.
usageTranslations.vi: Giảm toil hiệu quả giúp tăng năng suất nhóm SRE và cho phép kỹ sư tập trung vào cải tiến độ tin cậy thay vì bảo trì lặp đi lặp lại.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रभावी toil में कमी SRE टीम की उत्पादकता बढ़ाती है और इंजीनियरों को बार-बार रखरखाव के बजाय विश्वसनीयता सुधार पर ध्यान केंद्रित करने देती है।
usageTranslations.th: การลดงานซ้ำซากอย่างมีประสิทธิภาพช่วยเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพของทีม SRE และให้นักวิศวกรเน้นปรับปรุงความน่าเชื่อถือมากกว่าการบำรุงรักษาซ้ำ
usageTranslations.id: Pengurangan toil yang efektif meningkatkan produktivitas tim SRE dan memungkinkan engineer fokus pada peningkatan keandalan, bukan pemeliharaan berulang.

terms.definition: The controlled practice of deliberately introducing faults or failures into production-like environments to test system resilience, observability, and incident response procedures.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Chaos simulation helps SREs identify weaknesses in distributed systems by safely injecting faults and monitoring system response.

termTranslations.ja: カオスシミュレーション
termTranslations.th: การจำลองความวุ่นวาย

usageTranslations.en: Chaos simulation helps SREs identify weaknesses in distributed systems by safely injecting faults and monitoring system response.
usageTranslations.tr: Kaos simülasyonu, hataları güvenli şekilde enjekte ederek ve sistem yanıtını izleyerek SRE’lerin dağıtık sistemlerdeki zayıflıkları tespit etmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La simulation du chaos aide les SRE à identifier les faiblesses des systèmes distribués en injectant des défauts en toute sécurité et en surveillant la réponse du système.
usageTranslations.de: Chaos-Simulation hilft SREs, Schwachstellen in verteilten Systemen zu identifizieren, indem Fehler sicher injiziert und Systemreaktionen überwacht werden.
usageTranslations.es: La simulación de caos ayuda a los SRE a identificar debilidades en sistemas distribuidos al inyectar fallos de manera segura y monitorizar la respuesta del sistema.
usageTranslations.zh: 混沌模拟通过安全地注入故障并监控系统响应，帮助 SRE 发现分布式系统中的弱点。
usageTranslations.ar: تساعد محاكاة الفوضى فرق SRE في تحديد نقاط الضعف في الأنظمة الموزعة من خلال حقن الأعطال بأمان ومراقبة استجابة النظام.
usageTranslations.pt: A simulação de caos ajuda os SREs a identificar fraquezas em sistemas distribuídos, injetando falhas de forma segura e monitorando a resposta do sistema.
usageTranslations.ru: Хаос-симуляция помогает SRE выявлять слабые места в распределенных системах путем безопасного внесения сбоев и мониторинга реакции системы.
usageTranslations.ja: カオスシミュレーションは、SREが分散システムの弱点を特定するのに役立ちます。障害を安全に注入し、システムの応答を監視します。
usageTranslations.it: La simulazione del caos aiuta gli SRE a individuare le debolezze nei sistemi distribuiti iniettando guasti in modo sicuro e monitorando la risposta del sistema.
usageTranslations.vi: Mô phỏng hỗn loạn giúp SRE xác định điểm yếu trong hệ thống phân tán bằng cách bơm lỗi an toàn và giám sát phản ứng hệ thống.
usageTranslations.hi: अव्यवस्था सिमुलेशन SRE टीमों को वितरित प्रणालियों में कमियों की पहचान करने में मदद करता है, सुरक्षित रूप से दोष इंजेक्ट कर और सिस्टम प्रतिक्रिया की निगरानी कर।
usageTranslations.th: การจำลองความวุ่นวายช่วยให้ทีม SRE ระบุจุดอ่อนในระบบแบบกระจายโดยการฉีดความผิดพลาดอย่างปลอดภัยและเฝ้าติดตามการตอบสนองของระบบ
usageTranslations.id: Simulasi chaos membantu SRE mengidentifikasi kelemahan dalam sistem terdistribusi dengan menyuntikkan kesalahan secara aman dan memantau respons sistem.

terms.definition: The maximum allowable time allocated for a transaction, operation, or request in an IT system before breaching service-level objectives or user expectations.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: APIs must process requests within their defined latency budget to avoid SLO violations and ensure optimal user experience.

termTranslations.th: งบประมาณความหน่วง

usageTranslations.en: APIs must process requests within their defined latency budget to avoid SLO violations and ensure optimal user experience.
usageTranslations.tr: API’ler, SLO ihlallerini önlemek ve en iyi kullanıcı deneyimini sağlamak için tanımlı gecikme bütçeleri içinde istekleri işlemek zorundadır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les API doivent traiter les demandes dans le budget de latence défini pour éviter les violations SLO et garantir une expérience utilisateur optimale.
usageTranslations.de: APIs müssen Anfragen innerhalb des festgelegten Latenzbudgets verarbeiten, um SLO-Verletzungen zu vermeiden und eine optimale Benutzererfahrung zu gewährleisten.
usageTranslations.es: Las API deben procesar las solicitudes dentro de su presupuesto de latencia definido para evitar infracciones de SLO y garantizar una experiencia de usuario óptima.
usageTranslations.zh: API 必须在其定义的延迟预算内处理请求，以避免 SLO 违反并确保最佳用户体验。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن تعالج واجهات برمجة التطبيقات الطلبات ضمن ميزانية الكمون المحددة لتجنب انتهاكات SLO وضمان أفضل تجربة للمستخدم.
usageTranslations.pt: As APIs devem processar solicitações dentro do orçamento de latência definido para evitar violações de SLO e garantir a melhor experiência do usuário.
usageTranslations.ru: API должны обрабатывать запросы в пределах установленного бюджета задержки, чтобы избежать нарушений SLO и обеспечить оптимальный пользовательский опыт.
usageTranslations.ja: APIは定義されたレイテンシ予算内でリクエストを処理し、SLO違反を回避し最適なユーザー体験を保証する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Le API devono elaborare le richieste entro il budget di latenza definito per evitare violazioni degli SLO e garantire un'esperienza utente ottimale.
usageTranslations.vi: API phải xử lý yêu cầu trong phạm vi ngân sách độ trễ xác định để tránh vi phạm SLO và đảm bảo trải nghiệm người dùng tối ưu.
usageTranslations.hi: API को अपने परिभाषित लेटेंसी बजट के भीतर अनुरोधों को संसाधित करना चाहिए ताकि SLO उल्लंघन से बचा जा सके और इष्टतम उपयोगकर्ता अनुभव सुनिश्चित हो सके।
usageTranslations.th: API ต้องประมวลผลคำขอภายในงบประมาณความหน่วงที่กำหนดเพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงการละเมิด SLO และให้ประสบการณ์ผู้ใช้ที่ดีที่สุด
usageTranslations.id: API harus memproses permintaan dalam anggaran latensi yang ditentukan untuk menghindari pelanggaran SLO dan memastikan pengalaman pengguna yang optimal.

terms.definition: A quantifiable goal set for the availability, performance, or correctness of a system or integration, typically expressed as a percentage (e.g., 99.9% uptime) to guide engineering and operational decisions.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Teams align their monitoring and incident response efforts with the system's stated reliability target to ensure contractual and operational compliance.

termTranslations.th: เป้าหมายความน่าเชื่อถือ

usageTranslations.en: Teams align their monitoring and incident response efforts with the system's stated reliability target to ensure contractual and operational compliance.
usageTranslations.tr: Ekipler, sözleşmesel ve operasyonel uygunluğu sağlamak için izleme ve olay müdahale çalışmalarını sistemin belirlenen güvenilirlik hedefine göre hizalar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les équipes alignent leurs efforts de surveillance et de réponse aux incidents sur l'objectif de fiabilité du système afin de garantir la conformité contractuelle et opérationnelle.
usageTranslations.de: Teams richten ihre Überwachungs- und Incident-Response-Maßnahmen am festgelegten Zuverlässigkeitsziel des Systems aus, um die vertragliche und operative Einhaltung zu gewährleisten.
usageTranslations.es: Los equipos alinean sus esfuerzos de monitoreo y respuesta a incidentes con el objetivo de confiabilidad del sistema para garantizar el cumplimiento contractual y operativo.
usageTranslations.zh: 团队将他们的监控和事故响应工作与系统设定的可靠性目标保持一致，以确保合同和运营合规性。
usageTranslations.ar: تتوافق الفرق مع جهود المراقبة والاستجابة للحوادث مع هدف الموثوقية المحدد للنظام لضمان الامتثال التعاقدي والتشغيلي.
usageTranslations.pt: As equipes alinham seus esforços de monitoramento e resposta a incidentes com a meta de confiabilidade do sistema para garantir conformidade contratual e operacional.
usageTranslations.ru: Команды согласуют свои усилия по мониторингу и реагированию на инциденты с заявленной целью надежности системы, чтобы обеспечить договорное и операционное соответствие.
usageTranslations.ja: チームは、システムの信頼性目標にモニタリングやインシデント対応を合わせ、契約・運用上の遵守を確保します。
usageTranslations.it: I team allineano il monitoraggio e la risposta agli incidenti con l'obiettivo di affidabilità del sistema per garantire la conformità contrattuale e operativa.
usageTranslations.vi: Các nhóm căn chỉnh hoạt động giám sát và phản hồi sự cố với mục tiêu độ tin cậy hệ thống để đảm bảo tuân thủ hợp đồng và vận hành.
usageTranslations.hi: टीमें अनुबंध और संचालन अनुपालन सुनिश्चित करने के लिए सिस्टम के विश्वसनीयता लक्ष्य के अनुसार अपनी निगरानी और घटना प्रतिक्रिया प्रयासों को संरेखित करती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ทีมต่างๆ จัดการตรวจสอบและตอบสนองต่อเหตุการณ์ให้สอดคล้องกับเป้าหมายความน่าเชื่อถือของระบบ เพื่อให้เป็นไปตามข้อสัญญาและการดำเนินงาน
usageTranslations.id: Tim menyelaraskan upaya pemantauan dan respons insiden dengan target keandalan sistem untuk memastikan kepatuhan kontrak dan operasional.

terms.definition: A simulated incident event conducted by IT operations or SRE teams to practice and evaluate readiness, coordination, and effectiveness of incident response procedures.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Regular incident drills are essential for SRE teams to validate their ability to respond rapidly and effectively to major outages.

termTranslations.th: การซ้อมเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: Regular incident drills are essential for SRE teams to validate their ability to respond rapidly and effectively to major outages.
usageTranslations.tr: Düzenli olay tatbikatları, SRE ekiplerinin büyük kesintilere hızlı ve etkili şekilde yanıt verebilme yeteneğini doğrulamak için gereklidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Des exercices d'incident réguliers sont essentiels pour que les équipes SRE valident leur capacité à réagir rapidement et efficacement à des pannes majeures.
usageTranslations.de: Regelmäßige Incident-Drills sind für SRE-Teams unerlässlich, um ihre Fähigkeit zu validieren, auf größere Ausfälle schnell und effektiv zu reagieren.
usageTranslations.es: Los simulacros de incidentes regulares son esenciales para que los equipos SRE validen su capacidad de responder de manera rápida y efectiva a grandes interrupciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 定期进行事件演练对于 SRE 团队验证其快速有效应对重大故障的能力至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: التدريبات المنتظمة على الحوادث ضرورية لفرق SRE للتحقق من قدرتهم على الاستجابة بسرعة وفعالية لانقطاع الخدمة الرئيسي.
usageTranslations.pt: Simulados de incidentes regulares são essenciais para que as equipes SRE validem sua capacidade de responder rápida e efetivamente a grandes interrupções.
usageTranslations.ru: Регулярные учебные тревоги по инцидентам необходимы командам SRE для проверки их способности быстро и эффективно реагировать на серьезные сбои.
usageTranslations.ja: 定期的なインシデント訓練は、SREチームが重大な障害に迅速かつ効果的に対応できる能力を検証するために不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Le esercitazioni regolari sugli incidenti sono essenziali per consentire ai team SRE di convalidare la propria capacità di rispondere rapidamente ed efficacemente a interruzioni importanti.
usageTranslations.vi: Diễn tập sự cố thường xuyên rất quan trọng để nhóm SRE xác nhận khả năng phản ứng nhanh và hiệu quả với các sự cố lớn.
usageTranslations.hi: नियमित इंसिडेंट ड्रिल SRE टीमों के लिए जरूरी हैं ताकि वे बड़ी आउटेज के प्रति तेज़ और प्रभावी प्रतिक्रिया देने की अपनी क्षमता को सत्यापित कर सकें।
usageTranslations.th: การซ้อมเหตุการณ์อย่างสม่ำเสมอเป็นสิ่งสำคัญสำหรับทีม SRE ในการตรวจสอบความสามารถในการตอบสนองต่อเหตุขัดข้องครั้งใหญ่ได้อย่างรวดเร็วและมีประสิทธิภาพ
usageTranslations.id: Latihan insiden secara teratur penting bagi tim SRE untuk memvalidasi kemampuan merespons gangguan besar dengan cepat dan efektif.

terms.definition: A formal incident management process by which unresolved issues are elevated to higher-tier support or management according to predefined escalation policy.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Service escalation ensures unresolved critical incidents are addressed by the appropriate expertise according to escalation policy and incident severity.

termTranslations.ja: サービスエスカレーション
termTranslations.th: การส่งต่อบริการ

usageTranslations.en: Service escalation ensures unresolved critical incidents are addressed by the appropriate expertise according to escalation policy and incident severity.
usageTranslations.tr: Hizmet eskalasyonu, çözülmeyen kritik olayların eskalasyon politikasına ve olayın ciddiyetine göre uygun uzmanlıkla ele alınmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L'escalade de service garantit que les incidents critiques non résolus sont traités par l'expertise appropriée conformément à la politique d'escalade et à la gravité de l'incident.
usageTranslations.de: Die Service-Eskalation stellt sicher, dass ungelöste kritische Vorfälle entsprechend Eskalationsrichtlinie und Schweregrad von geeignetem Fachpersonal behandelt werden.
usageTranslations.es: El escalado de servicio garantiza que los incidentes críticos no resueltos sean atendidos por el equipo adecuado según la política de escalado y la gravedad del incidente.
usageTranslations.zh: 服务升级确保未解决的关键事件根据升级策略和事件严重性由适当的专家处理。
usageTranslations.ar: يضمن تصعيد الخدمة معالجة الحوادث الحرجة غير المحلولة من قبل الخبرة المناسبة وفقًا لسياسة التصعيد وشدة الحادث.
usageTranslations.pt: O escalonamento de serviço garante que incidentes críticos não resolvidos sejam tratados pela expertise adequada de acordo com a política de escalonamento e a gravidade do incidente.
usageTranslations.ru: Эскалация сервиса обеспечивает, чтобы нерешённые критические инциденты рассматривались соответствующими экспертами в соответствии с политикой эскалации и серьёзностью инцидента.
usageTranslations.ja: サービスエスカレーションは、未解決の重大なインシデントがエスカレーションポリシーとインシデントの重大度に従って適切な専門家により対応されることを保証します。
usageTranslations.it: L'escalation del servizio garantisce che gli incidenti critici non risolti siano gestiti dalla competenza appropriata secondo la policy di escalation e la gravità dell'incidente.
usageTranslations.vi: Nâng cấp dịch vụ đảm bảo các sự cố nghiêm trọng chưa được giải quyết sẽ được xử lý bởi chuyên môn phù hợp theo chính sách nâng cấp và mức độ nghiêm trọng.
usageTranslations.hi: सर्विस एस्कलेशन यह सुनिश्चित करता है कि अनसुलझे गंभीर घटनाओं को एस्कलेशन नीति और घटना की गंभीरता के अनुसार उचित विशेषज्ञता द्वारा संबोधित किया जाए।
usageTranslations.th: การส่งต่อบริการช่วยให้แน่ใจว่าเหตุการณ์สำคัญที่ยังไม่ได้รับการแก้ไขจะได้รับการจัดการโดยผู้เชี่ยวชาญที่เหมาะสมตามนโยบายและระดับความรุนแรง
usageTranslations.id: Eskalasi layanan memastikan insiden kritis yang belum terselesaikan ditangani oleh keahlian yang sesuai sesuai kebijakan eskalasi dan tingkat keparahan insiden.

terms.definition: A structured review conducted after a major incident to analyze root causes, assess response effectiveness, and document corrective actions for future prevention.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Postmortem analysis documents incident timelines, system failures, and contributing factors to support learning and continuous improvement.

termTranslations.th: การวิเคราะห์หลังเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: Postmortem analysis documents incident timelines, system failures, and contributing factors to support learning and continuous improvement.
usageTranslations.tr: Postmortem analizi, öğrenmeyi ve sürekli iyileştirmeyi desteklemek için olay zaman çizelgelerini, sistem arızalarını ve katkıda bulunan faktörleri belgeler.
usageTranslations.fr: L'analyse post-mortem documente les chronologies des incidents, les défaillances système et les facteurs contributifs pour soutenir l'apprentissage et l'amélioration continue.
usageTranslations.de: Die Postmortem-Analyse dokumentiert Zeitabläufe von Vorfällen, Systemausfälle und beitragende Faktoren zur Unterstützung des Lernens und der kontinuierlichen Verbesserung.
usageTranslations.es: El análisis post-mortem documenta las líneas de tiempo de incidentes, las fallas del sistema y los factores que contribuyen para apoyar el aprendizaje y la mejora continua.
usageTranslations.zh: 事后分析记录事件时间线、系统故障和促成因素，以支持学习和持续改进。
usageTranslations.ar: يوثق تحليل ما بعد الحادثة الجداول الزمنية للحوادث، وإخفاقات النظام، والعوامل المساهمة لدعم التعلم والتحسين المستمر.
usageTranslations.pt: A análise post-mortem documenta cronogramas de incidentes, falhas de sistema e fatores contribuintes para apoiar o aprendizado e a melhoria contínua.
usageTranslations.ru: Постмортем-анализ документирует хронологию инцидентов, сбои систем и способствующие факторы для поддержки обучения и непрерывного улучшения.
usageTranslations.ja: ポストモーテム分析は、インシデントのタイムライン、システム障害、寄与要因を記録し、学習と継続的な改善を支援します。
usageTranslations.it: L'analisi postmortem documenta le tempistiche degli incidenti, i guasti di sistema e i fattori che contribuiscono per supportare l'apprendimento e il miglioramento continuo.
usageTranslations.vi: Phân tích postmortem ghi lại dòng thời gian sự cố, các lỗi hệ thống và các yếu tố góp phần để hỗ trợ học tập và cải tiến liên tục.
usageTranslations.hi: पोस्टमॉर्टेम विश्लेषण सीखने और सतत सुधार के लिए घटना की समयरेखा, सिस्टम विफलताएं और सहायक कारकों का दस्तावेजीकरण करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การวิเคราะห์หลังเหตุการณ์จะบันทึกลำดับเหตุการณ์ ข้อผิดพลาดของระบบ และปัจจัยที่มีผล เพื่อสนับสนุนการเรียนรู้และการปรับปรุงอย่างต่อเนื่อง
usageTranslations.id: Analisis postmortem mendokumentasikan garis waktu insiden, kegagalan sistem, dan faktor penyumbang untuk mendukung pembelajaran dan perbaikan berkelanjutan.

terms.definition: A structured hierarchy that defines the sequence and roles for escalating unresolved incidents to higher support or management levels within IT operations or SRE organizations.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The escalation ladder specifies when and how incidents are advanced to senior engineers or management, reducing resolution delays in enterprise environments.

termTranslations.ja: エスカレーションラダー
termTranslations.th: ลำดับการส่งต่อเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: The escalation ladder specifies when and how incidents are advanced to senior engineers or management, reducing resolution delays in enterprise environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Eskalasyon merdiveni, olayların ne zaman ve nasıl kıdemli mühendislere veya yönetime iletileceğini belirler ve kurumsal ortamlarda çözüm gecikmelerini azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: L'échelle d'escalade définit quand et comment les incidents sont transmis aux ingénieurs seniors ou à la direction, réduisant ainsi les retards de résolution.
usageTranslations.de: Die Eskalationsleiter legt fest, wann und wie Vorfälle an leitende Ingenieure oder das Management weitergeleitet werden, um Verzögerungen zu minimieren.
usageTranslations.es: La escalera de escalado especifica cuándo y cómo los incidentes se derivan a ingenieros senior o a la gerencia, reduciendo los retrasos en la resolución.
usageTranslations.zh: 升级阶梯明确规定了何时以及如何将事件升级至高级工程师或管理层，从而减少解决延迟。
usageTranslations.ar: يحدد سلم التصعيد متى وكيف يتم تصعيد الحوادث للمهندسين الكبار أو الإدارة، مما يقلل من تأخيرات الحل.
usageTranslations.pt: A escada de escalonamento especifica quando e como os incidentes são encaminhados para engenheiros seniores ou gestão, reduzindo atrasos na resolução.
usageTranslations.ru: Лестница эскалации определяет, когда и как инциденты передаются старшим инженерам или руководству, снижая задержки в разрешении.
usageTranslations.ja: エスカレーションラダーは、インシデントがいつどのように上位エンジニアやマネジメントにエスカレートされるかを定め、解決の遅延を減らします。
usageTranslations.it: La scala di escalation stabilisce quando e come gli incidenti vengono avanzati a ingegneri senior o management, riducendo i ritardi di risoluzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Thang nâng cấp quy định thời điểm và cách sự cố được chuyển lên kỹ sư cấp cao hoặc quản lý, giảm thiểu độ trễ xử lý.
usageTranslations.hi: एस्केलेशन सीढ़ी यह निर्दिष्ट करती है कि घटनाएं कब और कैसे वरिष्ठ इंजीनियरों या प्रबंधन तक बढ़ाई जाएं, जिससे समाधान में देरी कम होती है।
usageTranslations.th: ลำดับการส่งต่อเหตุการณ์กำหนดว่าควรส่งต่อเหตุการณ์ไปยังวิศวกรอาวุโสหรือฝ่ายบริหารเมื่อใดและอย่างไร เพื่อลดความล่าช้าในการแก้ไข
usageTranslations.id: Tangga eskalasi menentukan kapan dan bagaimana insiden diteruskan ke engineer senior atau manajemen, mengurangi keterlambatan penyelesaian.

terms.definition: An incident or alert triggered by a system, application, or integration exceeding its predefined resource limits, such as CPU, memory, or connection thresholds.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A capacity event may be triggered when integration traffic causes database CPU utilization to exceed the defined maximum threshold.

termTranslations.ja: キャパシティイベント
termTranslations.th: เหตุการณ์ความจุ

usageTranslations.en: A capacity event may be triggered when integration traffic causes database CPU utilization to exceed the defined maximum threshold.
usageTranslations.tr: Entegrasyon trafiği veritabanı CPU kullanımını tanımlı üst sınıra çıkardığında kapasite olayı tetiklenebilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un événement de capacité peut être déclenché lorsque le trafic d'intégration fait dépasser à la base de données le seuil maximal défini pour l'utilisation du CPU.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Kapazitätsereignis kann ausgelöst werden, wenn Integrationsverkehr die CPU-Auslastung der Datenbank über den definierten Maximalwert hinaus erhöht.
usageTranslations.es: Se puede activar un evento de capacidad si el tráfico de integración provoca que la utilización de CPU de la base de datos supere el umbral máximo definido.
usageTranslations.zh: 当集成流量导致数据库CPU使用率超过定义的最大阈值时，可能会触发容量事件。
usageTranslations.ar: قد يتم تشغيل حدث السعة عندما يتسبب مرور التكامل في تجاوز استخدام وحدة المعالجة المركزية لقاعدة البيانات الحد الأقصى المحدد.
usageTranslations.pt: Um evento de capacidade pode ser acionado quando o tráfego de integração faz com que o uso da CPU do banco de dados exceda o limite máximo definido.
usageTranslations.ru: Событие емкости может быть вызвано, если интеграционный трафик приводит к превышению использования CPU базы данных установленного максимального порога.
usageTranslations.ja: 統合トラフィックがデータベースのCPU使用率を定義された最大しきい値を超えさせると、キャパシティイベントが発生する可能性があります。
usageTranslations.it: Un evento di capacità può essere attivato quando il traffico di integrazione causa il superamento della soglia massima definita di utilizzo della CPU del database.
usageTranslations.vi: Sự kiện dung lượng có thể được kích hoạt khi lưu lượng tích hợp làm cho việc sử dụng CPU của cơ sở dữ liệu vượt quá ngưỡng tối đa đã xác định.
usageTranslations.hi: जब एकीकरण ट्रैफ़िक के कारण डेटाबेस CPU उपयोग परिभाषित अधिकतम सीमा से अधिक हो जाता है, तो क्षमता घटना ट्रिगर हो सकती है।
usageTranslations.th: เหตุการณ์ความจุอาจถูกกระตุ้นเมื่อทราฟฟิกการเชื่อมต่อทำให้การใช้ CPU ของฐานข้อมูลเกินขีดจำกัดสูงสุดที่กำหนดไว้
usageTranslations.id: Peristiwa kapasitas dapat dipicu ketika lalu lintas integrasi menyebabkan pemanfaatan CPU basis data melebihi ambang maksimum yang ditentukan.

terms.definition: A dedicated virtual or physical space where stakeholders, engineers, and incident commanders collaborate in real time to coordinate resolution of major incidents.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The incident warroom brought together SREs, product owners, and comms teams to resolve the integration outage in real time.

termTranslations.ja: インシデント・ウォールーム
termTranslations.th: วอร์รูมเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: The incident warroom brought together SREs, product owners, and comms teams to resolve the integration outage in real time.
usageTranslations.tr: Olay warroom’u, entegrasyon kesintisini gerçek zamanlı çözmek için SRE’leri, ürün sahiplerini ve iletişim ekiplerini bir araya getirdi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le warroom d’incident a réuni les SRE, les responsables produits et les équipes de communication pour résoudre la panne d’intégration en temps réel.
usageTranslations.de: Der Incident-Warroom brachte SREs, Produktverantwortliche und Kommunikationsteams zusammen, um den Integrationsausfall in Echtzeit zu beheben.
usageTranslations.es: El warroom de incidentes reunió a SRE, propietarios de producto y equipos de comunicación para resolver la interrupción de integración en tiempo real.
usageTranslations.zh: 事件战情室将 SRE、产品负责人和沟通团队聚集在一起，实时解决集成中断问题。
usageTranslations.ar: جمعت غرفة حرب الحوادث فرق SRE ومالكي المنتجات وفرق الاتصال لحل الانقطاع في الوقت الفعلي.
usageTranslations.pt: O warroom de incidentes reuniu SREs, donos de produtos e equipes de comunicação para resolver a interrupção de integração em tempo real.
usageTranslations.ru: Инцидентный варрум собрал SRE, продукт-менеджеров и команды связи для оперативного решения проблемы интеграции.
usageTranslations.ja: インシデント・ウォールームはSRE、プロダクトオーナー、コミュニケーションチームを集め、統合停止をリアルタイムで解決しました。
usageTranslations.it: Il warroom incidente ha riunito SRE, owner di prodotto e team di comunicazione per risolvere in tempo reale il problema di integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Warroom sự cố tập hợp SRE, chủ sản phẩm và nhóm truyền thông để khắc phục sự cố tích hợp theo thời gian thực.
usageTranslations.hi: इंसिडेंट वॉररूम ने SRE, प्रोडक्ट ओनर और कम्युनिकेशन टीमों को एक साथ लाकर एकीकरण आउटेज को रियल-टाइम में हल किया।
usageTranslations.th: วอร์รูมเหตุการณ์ได้รวบรวม SRE, เจ้าของผลิตภัณฑ์ และทีมสื่อสารเพื่อแก้ไขเหตุขัดข้องของการรวมระบบแบบเรียลไทม์
usageTranslations.id: Warroom insiden mempertemukan SRE, pemilik produk, dan tim komunikasi untuk mengatasi gangguan integrasi secara real time.

terms.definition: A quantitative limit representing allowable error or degradation in system health, used in SRE for monitoring, alerting, and balancing feature deployment risk.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: When the health budget is nearly exhausted, new deployments are paused to prevent service reliability degradation.

termTranslations.th: งบประมาณสุขภาพ

usageTranslations.en: When the health budget is nearly exhausted, new deployments are paused to prevent service reliability degradation.
usageTranslations.tr: Sağlık bütçesi neredeyse tükenince, hizmet güvenilirliğinin bozulmasını önlemek için yeni dağıtımlar durdurulur.
usageTranslations.fr: Lorsque le budget de santé est presque épuisé, les nouveaux déploiements sont suspendus pour éviter la dégradation de la fiabilité du service.
usageTranslations.de: Wenn das Gesundheitsbudget fast ausgeschöpft ist, werden neue Deployments gestoppt, um eine Verschlechterung der Servicezuverlässigkeit zu vermeiden.
usageTranslations.es: Cuando el presupuesto de salud está casi agotado, se detienen los nuevos despliegues para evitar la degradación de la fiabilidad del servicio.
usageTranslations.zh: 当健康预算接近耗尽时，为防止服务可靠性下降，会暂停新部署。
usageTranslations.ar: عندما تكون ميزانية الصحة على وشك النفاد، يتم إيقاف عمليات النشر الجديدة لمنع تدهور موثوقية الخدمة.
usageTranslations.pt: Quando o orçamento de saúde está quase esgotado, novas implantações são pausadas para evitar a degradação da confiabilidade do serviço.
usageTranslations.ru: Когда бюджет здоровья почти исчерпан, новые развертывания приостанавливаются для предотвращения снижения надежности сервиса.
usageTranslations.ja: ヘルスバジェットがほぼ使い切られると、新しいデプロイはサービス信頼性低下防止のため一時停止されます。
usageTranslations.it: Quando il budget di salute è quasi esaurito, le nuove distribuzioni vengono sospese per evitare il degrado dell'affidabilità del servizio.
usageTranslations.vi: Khi ngân sách sức khỏe gần cạn kiệt, các bản triển khai mới sẽ bị tạm dừng để tránh suy giảm độ tin cậy dịch vụ.
usageTranslations.hi: जब हेल्थ बजट लगभग समाप्त हो जाता है, सेवा विश्वसनीयता में गिरावट को रोकने के लिए नए डिप्लॉयमेंट रोक दिए जाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: เมื่อใช้งบประมาณสุขภาพเกือบหมด การปรับใช้ใหม่จะถูกหยุดเพื่อป้องกันความน่าเชื่อถือของบริการลดลง
usageTranslations.id: Ketika anggaran kesehatan hampir habis, deployment baru dihentikan untuk mencegah penurunan keandalan layanan.

terms.definition: An SRE and incident management principle that emphasizes learning and systemic improvement over assigning personal blame for incidents or failures.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A blameless culture encourages open incident reviews and focuses on finding systemic solutions rather than individual fault.

termTranslations.th: วัฒนธรรมไร้การตำหนิ

usageTranslations.en: A blameless culture encourages open incident reviews and focuses on finding systemic solutions rather than individual fault.
usageTranslations.tr: Suçlamasız kültür, açık olay incelemelerini teşvik eder ve bireysel hatadan ziyade sistemsel çözüm arayışına odaklanır.
usageTranslations.fr: La culture sans blâme encourage des revues d'incidents ouvertes et vise à trouver des solutions systémiques plutôt que des fautes individuelles.
usageTranslations.de: Eine fehlerfreundliche Kultur fördert offene Incident-Reviews und konzentriert sich auf systemische Lösungen statt individuelle Schuldzuweisung.
usageTranslations.es: La cultura sin culpa fomenta revisiones abiertas de incidentes y se enfoca en soluciones sistémicas en vez de culpar a individuos.
usageTranslations.zh: 无责文化鼓励公开事件复盘，重在系统性解决方案而非个人责任。
usageTranslations.ar: تشجع الثقافة بلا لوم مراجعات الحوادث المفتوحة والتركيز على إيجاد حلول نظامية بدلاً من لوم الأفراد.
usageTranslations.pt: A cultura sem culpa incentiva revisões abertas de incidentes e foca em soluções sistêmicas ao invés de culpar indivíduos.
usageTranslations.ru: Культура без вины поощряет открытый разбор инцидентов и акцент на поиске системных решений, а не вины отдельного сотрудника.
usageTranslations.ja: ブレームレス文化は、オープンなインシデントレビューを奨励し、個人の責任追及よりもシステム的な解決策に重点を置きます。
usageTranslations.it: La cultura blameless promuove revisioni aperte degli incidenti e punta a soluzioni sistemiche invece di colpe individuali.
usageTranslations.vi: Văn hóa không đổ lỗi khuyến khích xem xét sự cố một cách cởi mở và tập trung vào giải pháp hệ thống thay vì lỗi cá nhân.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्लेमलेस कल्चर खुली घटना समीक्षाओं को बढ़ावा देता है और व्यक्तिगत दोष के बजाय प्रणालीगत समाधान पर ध्यान केंद्रित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: วัฒนธรรมไร้การตำหนิส่งเสริมการตรวจสอบเหตุการณ์แบบเปิดและเน้นหาทางออกเชิงระบบมากกว่าตำหนิบุคคล
usageTranslations.id: Budaya tanpa menyalahkan mendorong review insiden terbuka dan fokus pada solusi sistemik, bukan kesalahan individu.

terms.definition: A centralized repository containing versioned, actionable runbooks for routine tasks, troubleshooting, and incident response in IT operations and SRE.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Engineers reference the runbook library to find approved procedures for system recovery and integration incident remediation.

termTranslations.ja: ランブックライブラリ
termTranslations.th: ห้องสมุดรันบุ๊ก

usageTranslations.en: Engineers reference the runbook library to find approved procedures for system recovery and integration incident remediation.
usageTranslations.tr: Mühendisler, sistem kurtarma ve entegrasyon olaylarının çözümü için onaylı prosedürleri runbook kütüphanesinden bulurlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les ingénieurs consultent la bibliothèque de runbooks pour trouver les procédures approuvées de récupération du système et de résolution des incidents d'intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Ingenieure greifen auf die Runbook-Bibliothek zurück, um genehmigte Verfahren zur Systemwiederherstellung und zur Behebung von Integrationsvorfällen zu finden.
usageTranslations.es: Los ingenieros consultan la biblioteca de runbooks para encontrar procedimientos aprobados para la recuperación del sistema y la remediación de incidentes de integración.
usageTranslations.zh: 工程师参考运行手册库查找已批准的系统恢复和集成事件修复程序。
usageTranslations.ar: يستعين المهندسون بمكتبة رنبوك للعثور على الإجراءات المعتمدة لاستعادة النظام وحل الحوادث المتعلقة بالتكامل.
usageTranslations.pt: Engenheiros consultam a biblioteca de runbooks para encontrar procedimentos aprovados de recuperação de sistemas e remediação de incidentes de integração.
usageTranslations.ru: Инженеры используют библиотеку ранбуков для поиска утвержденных процедур восстановления системы и устранения инцидентов интеграции.
usageTranslations.ja: エンジニアはランブックライブラリを参照して、システム回復や統合インシデント修復の承認済み手順を見つけます。
usageTranslations.it: Gli ingegneri fanno riferimento alla libreria runbook per trovare le procedure approvate per il ripristino del sistema e la correzione degli incidenti di integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Kỹ sư tham khảo thư viện runbook để tìm các quy trình đã được phê duyệt cho khôi phục hệ thống và khắc phục sự cố tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजीनियर सिस्टम रिकवरी और इंटीग्रेशन घटना निवारण के लिए स्वीकृत प्रक्रियाएं रनबुक लाइब्रेरी से ढूंढते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: วิศวกรอ้างอิงห้องสมุดรันบุ๊กเพื่อค้นหากระบวนการที่ได้รับอนุมัติสำหรับการกู้คืนระบบและการแก้ไขเหตุการณ์การรวมระบบ
usageTranslations.id: Engineer merujuk ke perpustakaan runbook untuk menemukan prosedur yang disetujui untuk pemulihan sistem dan remediasi insiden integrasi.

terms.definition: A scheduled system for rotating on-call or incident response responsibilities among team members to ensure fair distribution of operational workload.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Response rotation helps prevent burnout by sharing after-hours incident alert responsibilities across the SRE team.

termTranslations.ja: レスポンスローテーション
termTranslations.th: การหมุนเวียนการตอบสนอง

usageTranslations.en: Response rotation helps prevent burnout by sharing after-hours incident alert responsibilities across the SRE team.
usageTranslations.tr: Yanıt nöbet döngüsü, SRE ekibi arasında mesai dışı olay uyarı sorumluluğunu paylaşarak tükenmişliği önlemeye yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: La rotation de réponse aide à prévenir l'épuisement professionnel en partageant les responsabilités d'alerte hors heures au sein de l'équipe SRE.
usageTranslations.de: Die Antwort-Rotation hilft, Burnout zu verhindern, indem die Verantwortung für Vorfallsmeldungen außerhalb der Arbeitszeiten auf das SRE-Team verteilt wird.
usageTranslations.es: La rotación de respuesta ayuda a prevenir el agotamiento al compartir la responsabilidad de alertas fuera de horario entre el equipo SRE.
usageTranslations.zh: 响应轮换通过在 SRE 团队之间分担非工作时间的事件警报责任，有助于防止疲劳。
usageTranslations.ar: يساعد تدوير الاستجابة في منع الإرهاق من خلال تقاسم مسؤوليات تنبيهات الحوادث خارج ساعات العمل بين فريق SRE.
usageTranslations.pt: O rodízio de resposta ajuda a prevenir o esgotamento ao compartilhar a responsabilidade por alertas de incidentes fora do horário entre a equipe SRE.
usageTranslations.ru: Ротация реагирования помогает предотвратить выгорание, распределяя обязанности по реагированию на инциденты вне рабочего времени между членами команды SRE.
usageTranslations.ja: レスポンスローテーションは、SREチーム内で時間外インシデント対応の責任を分担することで燃え尽きを防ぎます。
usageTranslations.it: La rotazione di risposta aiuta a prevenire il burnout condividendo la responsabilità degli avvisi fuori orario tra il team SRE.
usageTranslations.vi: Luân phiên phản hồi giúp ngăn ngừa kiệt sức bằng cách chia sẻ trách nhiệm cảnh báo sự cố ngoài giờ trong nhóm SRE.
usageTranslations.hi: रिस्पांस रोटेशन टीम में ऑफ-आवर इवेंट अलर्ट जिम्मेदारी साझा कर बर्नआउट को रोकने में मदद करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การหมุนเวียนการตอบสนองช่วยป้องกันอาการเหนื่อยล้าด้วยการแบ่งปันความรับผิดชอบในการแจ้งเตือนเหตุการณ์นอกเวลาทำงานในทีม SRE
usageTranslations.id: Rotasi respons membantu mencegah kelelahan dengan berbagi tanggung jawab peringatan insiden di luar jam kerja di tim SRE.

terms.definition: A documented framework detailing incident severity levels, responsible roles, and the stepwise escalation path for critical incidents across support tiers.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The escalation matrix ensures each incident is routed to the correct level of support, avoiding bottlenecks and communication gaps.

termTranslations.ja: エスカレーションマトリックス
termTranslations.th: เมทริกซ์การส่งต่อเหตุการณ์

usageTranslations.en: The escalation matrix ensures each incident is routed to the correct level of support, avoiding bottlenecks and communication gaps.
usageTranslations.tr: Eskalasyon matrisi, her olayın doğru destek seviyesine yönlendirilmesini sağlar ve darboğazları ve iletişim kopukluklarını önler.
usageTranslations.fr: La matrice d’escalade garantit que chaque incident est dirigé vers le bon niveau de support, évitant ainsi les goulets d'étranglement et les lacunes de communication.
usageTranslations.de: Die Eskalationsmatrix sorgt dafür, dass jeder Vorfall zur richtigen Supportebene weitergeleitet wird und verhindert Engpässe sowie Kommunikationslücken.
usageTranslations.es: La matriz de escalado garantiza que cada incidente se canalice al nivel de soporte correcto, evitando cuellos de botella y brechas de comunicación.
usageTranslations.zh: 升级矩阵确保每个事件被路由到正确的支持级别，避免瓶颈和沟通断裂。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن مصفوفة التصعيد توجيه كل حادثة إلى مستوى الدعم الصحيح، مما يمنع الاختناقات والفجوات في التواصل.
usageTranslations.pt: A matriz de escalonamento garante que cada incidente seja direcionado ao nível correto de suporte, evitando gargalos e falhas de comunicação.
usageTranslations.ru: Матрица эскалации обеспечивает направление каждого инцидента на соответствующий уровень поддержки, избегая узких мест и разрывов в коммуникации.
usageTranslations.ja: エスカレーションマトリックスにより、すべてのインシデントが適切なサポートレベルにルーティングされ、ボトルネックやコミュニケーションギャップが回避されます。
usageTranslations.it: La matrice di escalation assicura che ogni incidente sia instradato al giusto livello di supporto, evitando colli di bottiglia e lacune comunicative.
usageTranslations.vi: Ma trận nâng cấp đảm bảo mỗi sự cố được chuyển đến đúng cấp độ hỗ trợ, tránh tắc nghẽn và khoảng trống giao tiếp.
usageTranslations.hi: एस्केलेशन मैट्रिक्स यह सुनिश्चित करता है कि प्रत्येक घटना सही समर्थन स्तर तक पहुँचे, जिससे रुकावट और संवाद में गैप न हो।
usageTranslations.th: เมทริกซ์การส่งต่อเหตุการณ์ช่วยให้เหตุการณ์แต่ละรายการถูกส่งไปยังระดับการสนับสนุนที่ถูกต้อง ป้องกันปัญหาคอขวดและช่องว่างในการสื่อสาร
usageTranslations.id: Matriks eskalasi memastikan setiap insiden diarahkan ke tingkat dukungan yang tepat, menghindari kemacetan dan kesenjangan komunikasi.

terms.definition: A defined time period during which a designated team member is responsible for responding to alerts and incidents as the primary on-call engineer.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The oncall shift schedule is published weekly to ensure all incident alerts have a designated primary responder.

termTranslations.th: กะปฏิบัติหน้าที่

usageTranslations.en: The oncall shift schedule is published weekly to ensure all incident alerts have a designated primary responder.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm olay uyarılarının atanmış birincil yanıtlayıcıya sahip olmasını sağlamak için nöbet vardiyası çizelgesi haftalık olarak yayınlanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le planning des shifts d’astreinte est publié chaque semaine afin que toutes les alertes d’incident aient un intervenant principal désigné.
usageTranslations.de: Der Oncall-Schichtplan wird wöchentlich veröffentlicht, um sicherzustellen, dass alle Vorfallwarnungen einen primären Ansprechpartner haben.
usageTranslations.es: El calendario de turnos de guardia se publica semanalmente para que todas las alertas de incidentes tengan un responsable principal asignado.
usageTranslations.zh: 值班班次安排每周发布，确保所有事件警报都有指定的主响应人。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم نشر جدول نوبات الاستدعاء أسبوعياً لضمان أن جميع تنبيهات الحوادث لها مستجيب أساسي معين.
usageTranslations.pt: A escala de plantão oncall é publicada semanalmente para garantir que todos os alertas de incidentes tenham um respondente primário designado.
usageTranslations.ru: График дежурных смен публикуется еженедельно, чтобы у всех оповещений об инцидентах был назначенный основной исполнитель.
usageTranslations.ja: オンコールシフトスケジュールは毎週公開され、すべてのインシデントアラートに指定された主要担当者が割り当てられるようにします。
usageTranslations.it: Il turno oncall viene pubblicato settimanalmente per garantire che tutti gli alert sugli incidenti abbiano un risponditore primario designato.
usageTranslations.vi: Lịch ca trực oncall được công bố hàng tuần để đảm bảo mọi cảnh báo sự cố đều có người phản hồi chính được chỉ định.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी घटना अलर्ट के लिए नामित प्राइमरी रिस्पॉन्डर सुनिश्चित करने हेतु ऑनकॉल शिफ्ट शेड्यूल साप्ताहिक प्रकाशित किया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตารางกะปฏิบัติหน้าที่จะเผยแพร่ทุกสัปดาห์เพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าแจ้งเตือนเหตุการณ์แต่ละรายการมีผู้รับผิดชอบหลักที่กำหนด
usageTranslations.id: Jadwal shift oncall diterbitkan mingguan untuk memastikan semua peringatan insiden memiliki penanggung jawab utama.

terms.definition: A specific pointer or hyperlink to a documented runbook procedure for rapid access during incident diagnosis or resolution.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Engineers rely on runbook references embedded in monitoring alerts to launch resolution steps without delay.

termTranslations.th: อ้างอิงรันบุ๊ก

usageTranslations.en: Engineers rely on runbook references embedded in monitoring alerts to launch resolution steps without delay.
usageTranslations.tr: Mühendisler, izleme uyarılarına gömülü runbook referanslarına güvenerek çözüm adımlarını gecikmeden başlatır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les ingénieurs s'appuient sur les références de runbook intégrées aux alertes de surveillance pour lancer rapidement les étapes de résolution.
usageTranslations.de: Ingenieure verlassen sich auf Runbook-Referenzen in Überwachungswarnungen, um unverzüglich mit den Lösungsschritten zu beginnen.
usageTranslations.es: Los ingenieros dependen de referencias de runbook integradas en las alertas de monitoreo para iniciar rápidamente los pasos de resolución.
usageTranslations.zh: 工程师依赖嵌入在监控警报中的运行手册引用以便及时启动解决步骤。
usageTranslations.ar: يعتمد المهندسون على مراجع رنبوك المضمنة في تنبيهات المراقبة لإطلاق خطوات الحل دون تأخير.
