usageTranslations.tr: Dal takibi, geliştiricinin yerel dalı ile üst akış uzaktaki dal arasında otomatik senkronizasyon sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le suivi de branche permet la synchronisation automatique entre la branche locale du développeur et la branche distante amont dans les workflows collaboratifs.
usageTranslations.de: Branch-Tracking ermöglicht die automatische Synchronisierung zwischen dem lokalen Branch eines Entwicklers und dem Upstream-Remote-Branch in kollaborativen Workflows.
usageTranslations.es: El seguimiento de ramas permite la sincronización automática entre la rama local de un desarrollador y la rama remota principal en flujos de trabajo colaborativos.
usageTranslations.zh: 分支跟踪实现了开发者本地分支与上游远程分支的自动同步，在协作工作流中非常重要。
usageTranslations.ar: تتبع الفروع يمكّن من مزامنة تلقائية بين فرع المطور المحلي والفرع البعيد الرئيسي في تدفقات العمل التعاونية.
usageTranslations.pt: O rastreamento de branch permite a sincronização automática entre o branch local do desenvolvedor e o branch remoto upstream em fluxos de trabalho colaborativos.
usageTranslations.ru: Branch Tracking обеспечивает автоматическую синхронизацию между локальным и удалённым ветками разработчика в коллективных рабочих процессах.
usageTranslations.ja: ブランチトラッキングは、開発者のローカルブランチと上流リモートブランチ間の自動同期を可能にします。
usageTranslations.it: Il tracciamento branch consente la sincronizzazione automatica tra il branch locale di uno sviluppatore e il branch remoto upstream nei workflow collaborativi.
usageTranslations.vi: Theo dõi nhánh cho phép đồng bộ hóa tự động giữa nhánh local của lập trình viên và nhánh remote upstream trong quy trình làm việc cộng tác.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रांच ट्रैकिंग डेवलपर की लोकल ब्रांच और अपस्ट्रीम रिमोट ब्रांच के बीच स्वतः सिंक्रनाइज़ेशन सक्षम करती है।
usageTranslations.th: การติดตามสาขาช่วยให้สามารถซิงโครไนซ์อัตโนมัติระหว่างสาขาท้องถิ่นของนักพัฒนาและสาขาต้นน้ำระยะไกลในเวิร์กโฟลว์แบบร่วมมือ
usageTranslations.id: Pelacakan Branch memungkinkan sinkronisasi otomatis antara branch lokal pengembang dan branch remote upstream dalam alur kerja kolaboratif.

terms.definition: The operation in a version control system that copies files from a repository (or a specific branch or commit) to a local working directory, making them available for editing, testing, or deployment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Engineers perform a code checkout to access the latest version of the integration script before deploying changes to production.

termTranslations.ja: コードチェックアウト
termTranslations.th: เช็คเอาท์โค้ด

usageTranslations.en: Engineers perform a code checkout to access the latest version of the integration script before deploying changes to production.
usageTranslations.tr: Mühendisler, değişiklikleri canlıya almadan önce entegrasyon betiğinin en güncel sürümüne erişmek için kod checkout işlemi yapar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les ingénieurs effectuent un checkout du code pour accéder à la dernière version du script d'intégration avant de déployer les modifications en production.
usageTranslations.de: Ingenieure führen einen Code-Checkout durch, um die neueste Version des Integrationsskripts vor der Bereitstellung von Änderungen in der Produktion zu erhalten.
usageTranslations.es: Los ingenieros realizan un checkout de código para acceder a la última versión del script de integración antes de desplegar cambios a producción.
usageTranslations.zh: 工程师在将更改部署到生产环境之前，会执行代码签出以获取集成脚本的最新版本。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم المهندسون بسحب الكود (Checkout) للوصول إلى أحدث نسخة من نص التكامل قبل نشر التغييرات في الإنتاج.
usageTranslations.pt: Engenheiros fazem o checkout de código para acessar a versão mais recente do script de integração antes de implantar as alterações em produção.
usageTranslations.ru: Инженеры выполняют Code Checkout, чтобы получить последнюю версию интеграционного скрипта перед развертыванием изменений в продакшн.
usageTranslations.ja: エンジニアは、本番環境に変更をデプロイする前に、統合スクリプトの最新版にアクセスするためにコードチェックアウトを実行します。
usageTranslations.it: Gli ingegneri eseguono il checkout del codice per accedere all'ultima versione dello script di integrazione prima di distribuire le modifiche in produzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Kỹ sư thực hiện checkout mã nguồn để lấy phiên bản mới nhất của script tích hợp trước khi triển khai thay đổi lên production.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजीनियर प्रोडक्शन में बदलाव तैनात करने से पहले इंटीग्रेशन स्क्रिप्ट के नवीनतम संस्करण तक पहुंचने के लिए कोड चेकआउट करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: วิศวกรทำการเช็คเอาท์โค้ดเพื่อเข้าถึงสคริปต์อินทิเกรตเวอร์ชันล่าสุดก่อนจะดีพลอยไปยังโปรดักชัน
usageTranslations.id: Engineer melakukan checkout kode untuk mengakses versi terbaru skrip integrasi sebelum menerapkan perubahan ke produksi.

terms.definition: A visual indicator in files generated by version control systems during merge conflicts, marking the boundaries of conflicting code regions that must be resolved before a commit can proceed.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: When two team members edit the same file simultaneously, conflict markers appear in the file to highlight sections requiring manual resolution.

termTranslations.ja: コンフリクトマーカー
termTranslations.th: ตัวบ่งชี้ข้อขัดแย้ง

usageTranslations.en: When two team members edit the same file simultaneously, conflict markers appear in the file to highlight sections requiring manual resolution.
usageTranslations.tr: İki ekip üyesi aynı dosyayı aynı anda düzenlediğinde, manuel çözüm gerektiren bölümleri vurgulamak için dosyada çakışma işaretleri ortaya çıkar.
usageTranslations.fr: Lorsque deux membres de l'équipe modifient simultanément le même fichier, des marqueurs de conflit apparaissent pour mettre en évidence les sections nécessitant une résolution manuelle.
usageTranslations.de: Wenn zwei Teammitglieder gleichzeitig dieselbe Datei bearbeiten, erscheinen Konfliktmarkierungen im Dokument, die Bereiche kennzeichnen, die manuell gelöst werden müssen.
usageTranslations.es: Cuando dos miembros del equipo editan el mismo archivo simultáneamente, aparecen marcadores de conflicto para resaltar las secciones que requieren resolución manual.
usageTranslations.zh: 当两个团队成员同时编辑同一个文件时，文件中会出现冲突标记，以突出需要手动解决的部分。
usageTranslations.ar: عندما يقوم عضوان في الفريق بتحرير نفس الملف في نفس الوقت، تظهر علامات التعارض في الملف لتسليط الضوء على الأقسام التي تتطلب حلاً يدويًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Quando dois membros da equipe editam o mesmo arquivo simultaneamente, marcadores de conflito aparecem no arquivo para destacar as seções que precisam de resolução manual.
usageTranslations.ru: Когда два члена команды одновременно редактируют один и тот же файл, появляются Conflict Marker, выделяя участки, требующие ручного разрешения.
usageTranslations.ja: 2人のチームメンバーが同じファイルを同時に編集すると、手動で解決が必要な部分を強調するためにファイル内にコンフリクトマーカーが現れます。
usageTranslations.it: Quando due membri del team modificano lo stesso file contemporaneamente, nel file compaiono indicatori di conflitto che evidenziano le sezioni che richiedono una risoluzione manuale.
usageTranslations.vi: Khi hai thành viên nhóm cùng chỉnh sửa một tệp cùng lúc, dấu đánh dấu xung đột xuất hiện trong tệp để làm nổi bật các phần cần giải quyết thủ công.
usageTranslations.hi: जब दो टीम सदस्य एक ही फ़ाइल को एक साथ संपादित करते हैं, तो फ़ाइल में कंफ्लिक्ट मार्कर उन हिस्सों को दिखाते हैं जिन्हें मैन्युअल समाधान की आवश्यकता है।
usageTranslations.th: เมื่อสมาชิกในทีมสองคนแก้ไขไฟล์เดียวกันพร้อมกัน ตัวบ่งชี้ข้อขัดแย้งจะปรากฏขึ้นเพื่อเน้นส่วนที่ต้องแก้ไขด้วยตนเอง
usageTranslations.id: Ketika dua anggota tim mengedit file yang sama secara bersamaan, penanda konflik akan muncul dalam file untuk menyoroti bagian yang memerlukan penyelesaian manual.

terms.definition: The process of creating a complete local copy of a remote repository, including all branches, tags, and commit history, enabling independent development or integration tasks.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A clone operation is used when initializing a new integration environment, ensuring all developers work from the same baseline.

termTranslations.th: การโคลนรีโพซิทอรี

usageTranslations.en: A clone operation is used when initializing a new integration environment, ensuring all developers work from the same baseline.
usageTranslations.tr: Yeni bir entegrasyon ortamı başlatılırken klonlama işlemi kullanılır ve böylece tüm geliştiriciler aynı taban üzerinden çalışır.
usageTranslations.fr: Une opération de clonage est utilisée lors de l'initialisation d'un nouvel environnement d'intégration, garantissant que tous les développeurs partent de la même base.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Klon-Operation wird beim Einrichten einer neuen Integrationsumgebung verwendet, um sicherzustellen, dass alle Entwickler vom gleichen Ausgangspunkt arbeiten.
usageTranslations.es: Se utiliza una operación de clonado al iniciar un nuevo entorno de integración, asegurando que todos los desarrolladores trabajen desde la misma base.
usageTranslations.zh: 在初始化新的集成环境时会使用克隆操作，以确保所有开发人员从相同的基线开始工作。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم استخدام عملية الاستنساخ عند بدء بيئة تكامل جديدة لضمان أن جميع المطورين يعملون من نفس الأساس.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma operação de clone é usada ao iniciar um novo ambiente de integração, garantindo que todos os desenvolvedores trabalhem a partir da mesma base.
usageTranslations.ru: Clone Operation используется при инициализации новой интеграционной среды, чтобы все разработчики работали с одной и той же базой.
usageTranslations.ja: 新しい統合環境を初期化する際にクローン操作が使用され、すべての開発者が同じベースラインから作業することを保証します。
usageTranslations.it: L'operazione di clonazione viene utilizzata durante l'inizializzazione di un nuovo ambiente di integrazione, assicurando che tutti gli sviluppatori lavorino dallo stesso punto di partenza.
usageTranslations.vi: Hoạt động clone được sử dụng khi khởi tạo môi trường tích hợp mới, đảm bảo tất cả lập trình viên làm việc từ cùng một nền tảng.
usageTranslations.hi: नई इंटीग्रेशन एनवायरनमेंट की शुरुआत करते समय क्लोन ऑपरेशन का उपयोग किया जाता है, जिससे सभी डेवलपर्स एक ही बेसलाइन से काम करें।
usageTranslations.th: การโคลนรีโพซิทอรีถูกใช้เมื่อเริ่มต้นสภาพแวดล้อมการผสานใหม่เพื่อให้แน่ใจว่านักพัฒนาทุกคนทำงานจากพื้นฐานเดียวกัน
usageTranslations.id: Operasi clone digunakan saat menginisialisasi lingkungan integrasi baru, memastikan semua developer bekerja dari baseline yang sama.

terms.definition: A note or piece of feedback left by a reviewer on a code change, pull request, or merge request in a version control platform, facilitating collaborative code quality and integration standards.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A senior engineer left several review comments on the pull request to address integration issues and enforce coding standards.

termTranslations.th: คอมเมนต์รีวิว

usageTranslations.en: A senior engineer left several review comments on the pull request to address integration issues and enforce coding standards.
usageTranslations.tr: Kıdemli bir mühendis, entegrasyon sorunlarını çözmek ve kodlama standartlarını sağlamak için pull request'te birkaç inceleme yorumu bıraktı.
usageTranslations.fr: Un ingénieur senior a laissé plusieurs commentaires de revue sur la pull request pour résoudre les problèmes d'intégration et appliquer les standards de codage.
usageTranslations.de: Ein leitender Ingenieur hinterließ mehrere Review-Kommentare im Pull Request, um Integrationsprobleme zu beheben und Programmierstandards durchzusetzen.
usageTranslations.es: Un ingeniero sénior dejó varios comentarios de revisión en la pull request para abordar problemas de integración y hacer cumplir los estándares de codificación.
usageTranslations.zh: 一位高级工程师在拉取请求中留下了多条审查评论，以解决集成问题并执行编码标准。
usageTranslations.ar: ترك مهندس كبير عدة تعليقات مراجعة على طلب السحب لمعالجة مشكلات التكامل وفرض معايير الترميز.
usageTranslations.pt: Um engenheiro sênior deixou vários comentários de revisão na pull request para resolver problemas de integração e impor padrões de codificação.
usageTranslations.ru: Старший инженер оставил несколько Review Comment в pull request, чтобы решить проблемы интеграции и соблюдения стандартов кодирования.
usageTranslations.ja: シニアエンジニアがプルリクエストに複数のレビューコメントを残し、統合問題を解決し、コーディング基準を徹底しました。
usageTranslations.it: Un ingegnere senior ha lasciato diversi commenti di revisione sulla pull request per affrontare problemi di integrazione e applicare gli standard di codifica.
usageTranslations.vi: Kỹ sư cao cấp để lại nhiều nhận xét đánh giá trên pull request để giải quyết vấn đề tích hợp và đảm bảo tiêu chuẩn mã hóa.
usageTranslations.hi: एक वरिष्ठ इंजीनियर ने इंटीग्रेशन समस्याओं को हल करने और कोडिंग मानकों को लागू करने के लिए पुल रिक्वेस्ट पर कई रिव्यू टिप्पणियां छोड़ीं।
usageTranslations.th: วิศวกรอาวุโสได้ทิ้งคอมเมนต์รีวิวหลายรายการไว้ใน pull request เพื่อแก้ไขปัญหาการผสานและกำหนดมาตรฐานโค้ด
usageTranslations.id: Seorang engineer senior memberikan beberapa komentar review pada pull request untuk menangani masalah integrasi dan menegakkan standar pengkodean.

terms.definition: A type of merge in version control where the current branch pointer is simply moved forward to the target commit, as there are no divergent changes to reconcile.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The integration branch performed a fast-forward merge since there were no conflicting changes between the branches.

termTranslations.th: ฟาสต์ฟอร์เวิร์ด

usageTranslations.en: The integration branch performed a fast-forward merge since there were no conflicting changes between the branches.
usageTranslations.tr: Entegrasyon dalı, dallar arasında çakışan değişiklikler olmadığı için hızlı ileri birleştirme gerçekleştirdi.
usageTranslations.fr: La branche d'intégration a effectué une fusion en avance rapide car il n'y avait pas de modifications conflictuelles entre les branches.
usageTranslations.de: Der Integrationsbranch führte einen Fast-Forward-Merge durch, da keine widersprüchlichen Änderungen zwischen den Branches vorlagen.
usageTranslations.es: La rama de integración realizó una fusión fast-forward ya que no había cambios conflictivos entre las ramas.
usageTranslations.zh: 集成分支执行了快进合并，因为分支之间没有冲突的更改。
usageTranslations.ar: نفذ فرع التكامل دمج تقديم سريع لأنه لم تكن هناك تغييرات متعارضة بين الفروع.
usageTranslations.pt: O branch de integração realizou um merge fast-forward, pois não havia alterações conflitantes entre os branches.
usageTranslations.ru: Интеграционная ветка выполнила Fast-Forward merge, так как между ветками не было конфликтующих изменений.
usageTranslations.ja: 統合ブランチは、ブランチ間に競合する変更がなかったため、ファストフォワードマージを行いました。
usageTranslations.it: Il branch di integrazione ha eseguito un merge fast-forward poiché non c'erano modifiche in conflitto tra i branch.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhánh tích hợp thực hiện hợp nhất tiến nhanh vì không có thay đổi xung đột giữa các nhánh.
usageTranslations.hi: इंटीग्रेशन ब्रांच ने फास्ट-फॉरवर्ड मर्ज किया क्योंकि ब्रांचों में कोई विरोधाभासी बदलाव नहीं थे।
usageTranslations.th: สาขาอินทิเกรตดำเนินการ merge แบบฟาสต์ฟอร์เวิร์ดเนื่องจากไม่มีการเปลี่ยนแปลงที่ขัดแย้งกันระหว่างสาขา
usageTranslations.id: Branch integrasi melakukan merge fast-forward karena tidak ada perubahan yang bertentangan di antara branch.

terms.definition: The operation in version control that applies a specific commit from one branch onto another, used for selectively integrating bug fixes or features without merging the entire branch.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A hotfix was cherry-picked from the release branch to the main branch to quickly resolve a production issue without merging unrelated changes.

termTranslations.th: เชอร์รี่พิค

usageTranslations.en: A hotfix was cherry-picked from the release branch to the main branch to quickly resolve a production issue without merging unrelated changes.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir hotfix, alakasız değişiklikleri birleştirmeden üretim sorununu hızlıca çözmek için release dalından ana dala cherry pick ile aktarıldı.
usageTranslations.fr: Un correctif urgent a été cherry-pické de la branche release vers la branche principale afin de résoudre rapidement un problème en production sans fusionner des modifications non liées.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Hotfix wurde per Cherry-Pick vom Release-Branch in den Main-Branch übernommen, um ein Produktionsproblem schnell zu lösen, ohne nicht zusammenhängende Änderungen zu mergen.
usageTranslations.es: Se cherry-pickeó un hotfix de la rama release a la rama principal para resolver rápidamente un problema de producción sin fusionar cambios no relacionados.
usageTranslations.zh: 一个热修复通过拣选从发布分支应用到主分支，以便快速解决生产问题，而无需合并无关更改。
usageTranslations.ar: تم اختيار تصحيح عاجل (Cherry Pick) من فرع الإصدار إلى الفرع الرئيسي لحل مشكلة الإنتاج بسرعة دون دمج تغييرات غير ذات صلة.
usageTranslations.pt: Um hotfix foi cherry-pickado do branch de release para o branch principal para resolver rapidamente um problema em produção sem mesclar alterações não relacionadas.
usageTranslations.ru: Хотфикс был Cherry Pick-ом из ветки релиза в основную ветку для быстрого решения проблемы в продакшене без объединения несвязанных изменений.
usageTranslations.ja: ホットフィックスがリリースブランチからメインブランチにチェリーピックされ、関係のない変更をマージせずに本番問題を迅速に解決しました。
usageTranslations.it: Una hotfix è stata cherry-pickata dal branch di rilascio a quello principale per risolvere rapidamente un problema in produzione senza fondere modifiche non correlate.
usageTranslations.vi: Một hotfix đã được cherry-pick từ nhánh phát hành sang nhánh chính để nhanh chóng giải quyết sự cố sản xuất mà không cần hợp nhất các thay đổi không liên quan.
usageTranslations.hi: एक हॉटफिक्स को रिलीज़ ब्रांच से मेन ब्रांच में चेरी-पिक किया गया ताकि असंबंधित बदलावों को मर्ज किए बिना प्रोडक्शन समस्या जल्दी हल हो सके।
usageTranslations.th: มีการ cherry-pick hotfix จาก release branch ไปยัง main branch เพื่อแก้ไขปัญหา production อย่างรวดเร็วโดยไม่ต้อง merge การเปลี่ยนแปลงที่ไม่เกี่ยวข้อง
usageTranslations.id: Sebuah hotfix di-cherry-pick dari branch release ke branch utama untuk segera menyelesaikan masalah produksi tanpa menggabungkan perubahan yang tidak terkait.

terms.definition: An optional message attached to a tag in version control, providing metadata such as release notes, version identifiers, or author details to aid in traceability and documentation.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Tag annotation is used to record release information and deployment notes for traceability in integration monitoring dashboards.

termTranslations.th: คำอธิบายประกอบแท็ก

usageTranslations.en: Tag annotation is used to record release information and deployment notes for traceability in integration monitoring dashboards.
usageTranslations.tr: Etiket açıklaması, entegrasyon izleme panolarında izlenebilirlik için sürüm bilgisi ve dağıtım notlarını kaydetmek amacıyla kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: L'annotation de tag est utilisée pour enregistrer les informations de version et les notes de déploiement afin d'assurer la traçabilité dans les tableaux de bord de surveillance d'intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Tag-Annotation wird verwendet, um Versionsinformationen und Deployment-Notizen für die Rückverfolgbarkeit in Integrationsüberwachungs-Dashboards aufzuzeichnen.
usageTranslations.es: La anotación de tag se utiliza para registrar información de lanzamiento y notas de despliegue para la trazabilidad en los paneles de monitoreo de integración.
usageTranslations.zh: 标签注释用于在集成监控仪表板中记录发布信息和部署说明，以实现可追溯性。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم استخدام تعليق الوسم لتسجيل معلومات الإصدار وملاحظات النشر للتتبع في لوحات مراقبة التكامل.
usageTranslations.pt: Anotação de tag é usada para registrar informações de lançamento e notas de implantação para rastreabilidade em painéis de monitoramento de integração.
usageTranslations.ru: Tag Annotation используется для записи информации о релизе и заметок по развертыванию для отслеживания на панелях мониторинга интеграций.
usageTranslations.ja: タグ注釈は、統合監視ダッシュボードでの追跡性のためにリリース情報やデプロイメントノートを記録するために使用されます。
usageTranslations.it: L'annotazione tag viene utilizzata per registrare informazioni sulle release e note di deployment per la tracciabilità nei dashboard di monitoraggio delle integrazioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Chú thích Tag được sử dụng để ghi lại thông tin phát hành và ghi chú triển khai cho khả năng truy xuất trong bảng điều khiển giám sát tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: टैग एनोटेशन का उपयोग इंटीग्रेशन मॉनिटरिंग डैशबोर्ड में ट्रेसबिलिटी के लिए रिलीज़ जानकारी और डिप्लॉयमेंट नोट्स रिकॉर्ड करने में किया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: คำอธิบายประกอบแท็กถูกใช้เพื่อบันทึกข้อมูลรีลีสและบันทึกการดีพลอยเพื่อการตรวจสอบย้อนกลับในแดชบอร์ดการตรวจสอบการผสาน
usageTranslations.id: Anotasi tag digunakan untuk mencatat informasi rilis dan catatan deployment untuk keperluan pelacakan pada dashboard monitoring integrasi.

terms.definition: A sequence in version control where changes from one branch are reapplied onto another, producing a linear history and reducing merge conflicts.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Teams use the rebase workflow to maintain a cleaner, linear project history and simplify integration tracking in GitOps pipelines.

termTranslations.ja: リベースワークフロー
termTranslations.th: เวิร์กโฟลว์รีเบส

usageTranslations.en: Teams use the rebase workflow to maintain a cleaner, linear project history and simplify integration tracking in GitOps pipelines.
usageTranslations.tr: Ekipler, daha temiz ve doğrusal bir proje geçmişi tutmak ve GitOps hatlarında entegrasyon takibini kolaylaştırmak için rebase iş akışını kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les équipes utilisent le flux de travail de rebase pour maintenir un historique de projet linéaire et faciliter le suivi d'intégration dans les pipelines GitOps.
usageTranslations.de: Teams nutzen den Rebase-Workflow, um eine lineare Projekthistorie zu bewahren und die Integrationsverfolgung in GitOps-Pipelines zu vereinfachen.
usageTranslations.es: Los equipos usan el flujo de trabajo de rebase para mantener un historial de proyecto lineal y facilitar el seguimiento de integración en pipelines de GitOps.
usageTranslations.zh: 团队使用 Rebase 工作流以保持项目历史的线性和清晰，并简化 GitOps 流水线中的集成追踪。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم الفرق مسار عمل Rebase للحفاظ على تاريخ مشروع خطي وأنظف وتبسيط تتبع التكامل في خطوط GitOps.
usageTranslations.pt: As equipes usam o fluxo de trabalho de rebase para manter um histórico linear e simplificar o rastreamento de integração em pipelines GitOps.
usageTranslations.ru: Команды используют Rebase-воркфлоу для поддержания линейной истории проекта и упрощения отслеживания интеграции в GitOps пайплайнах.
usageTranslations.ja: チームはリベースワークフローを使い、よりクリーンで線形なプロジェクト履歴を維持し、GitOpsパイプラインで統合追跡を簡素化します。
usageTranslations.it: I team utilizzano il flusso di lavoro di rebase per mantenere una cronologia lineare e semplificare il tracciamento delle integrazioni nelle pipeline GitOps.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhóm sử dụng quy trình rebase để duy trì lịch sử dự án tuyến tính và đơn giản hóa theo dõi tích hợp trong pipeline GitOps.
usageTranslations.hi: टीमें रिबेस वर्कफ़्लो का उपयोग एक स्वच्छ, रैखिक प्रोजेक्ट इतिहास बनाए रखने और GitOps पाइपलाइनों में एकीकरण ट्रैकिंग को सरल बनाने के लिए करती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ทีมใช้เวิร์กโฟลว์รีเบสเพื่อคงประวัติโครงการที่เป็นเส้นตรงและง่ายต่อการติดตามการผสานใน GitOps pipeline
usageTranslations.id: Tim menggunakan alur kerja rebase untuk menjaga riwayat proyek yang lebih rapi dan linear serta menyederhanakan pelacakan integrasi di pipeline GitOps.

terms.definition: A Git merging method that condenses all changes from a feature branch into a single commit before integrating into the main branch, streamlining history.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A squash merge is performed when multiple commits from a feature branch should appear as a single commit in the main history, aiding traceability.

termTranslations.th: Squash Merge

usageTranslations.en: A squash merge is performed when multiple commits from a feature branch should appear as a single commit in the main history, aiding traceability.
usageTranslations.tr: Birden fazla commit'in ana geçmişte tek bir commit olarak görünmesi gerektiğinde squash birleştirme uygulanır ve izlenebilirlik artar.
usageTranslations.fr: Une fusion avec écrasement est utilisée lorsque plusieurs commits doivent apparaître comme un seul dans l’historique principal, améliorant la traçabilité.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Squash-Merge wird verwendet, wenn mehrere Commits als ein Commit in der Haupt-Historie erscheinen sollen, um die Nachverfolgbarkeit zu verbessern.
usageTranslations.es: Se realiza un squash merge cuando varios commits deben figurar como un solo commit en el historial principal, facilitando el rastreo.
usageTranslations.zh: 当需要将功能分支上的多个提交以单一提交形式并入主分支时，使用 Squash 合并，有助于追踪。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تنفيذ دمج Squash عندما يجب أن تظهر عدة عمليات commit كعملية واحدة في السجل الرئيسي، مما يسهل التتبع.
usageTranslations.pt: Um squash merge é realizado quando múltiplos commits devem aparecer como um único commit no histórico principal, facilitando a rastreabilidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Squash Merge применяется, когда нужно объединить несколько коммитов из ветки в один коммит в основной истории для лучшей отслеживаемости.
usageTranslations.ja: 複数のコミットをメイン履歴で単一コミットとして表示する必要がある場合、スカッシュマージが使用されます。
usageTranslations.it: Il merge squash viene usato per mostrare più commit come uno solo nella cronologia principale, facilitando la tracciabilità.
usageTranslations.vi: Squash merge được dùng khi nhiều commit nên xuất hiện dưới dạng một commit trong lịch sử chính, giúp dễ theo dõi.
usageTranslations.hi: फीचर ब्रांच के कई कमिट्स को मुख्य इतिहास में एक कमिट के रूप में दिखाने के लिए स्क्वैश मर्ज किया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: เมื่อหลายคอมมิทควรแสดงเป็นคอมมิทเดียวในประวัติหลักจะใช้ Squash Merge เพื่อช่วยให้ติดตามง่ายขึ้น
usageTranslations.id: Squash merge dilakukan saat beberapa commit dari branch fitur perlu tampil sebagai satu commit di riwayat utama untuk memudahkan penelusuran.

terms.definition: The default remote repository in Git configuration that acts as the main synchronization point for local-to-remote operations.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Developers push code to the remote origin to ensure that changes are reflected in the central project repository.

termTranslations.th: รีโมตออริจิน

usageTranslations.en: Developers push code to the remote origin to ensure that changes are reflected in the central project repository.
usageTranslations.tr: Geliştiriciler, değişikliklerin merkezi depo yansıtılması için kodlarını uzak kaynağa gönderir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les développeurs poussent le code vers l’origine distante pour garantir la mise à jour du dépôt central.
usageTranslations.de: Entwickler pushen Code zum Remote-Origin, damit Änderungen im zentralen Repository erscheinen.
usageTranslations.es: Los desarrolladores envían código al origen remoto para que los cambios se reflejen en el repositorio central.
usageTranslations.zh: 开发人员将代码推送到远程 Origin，以确保更改反映在中心仓库中。
usageTranslations.ar: يدفع المطورون الكود إلى المصدر البعيد لضمان عكس التغييرات في المستودع المركزي.
usageTranslations.pt: Os desenvolvedores enviam código para a origem remota para garantir que as alterações sejam refletidas no repositório central.
usageTranslations.ru: Разработчики отправляют код на Remote Origin, чтобы изменения отразились в центральном репозитории.
usageTranslations.ja: 開発者は変更を中央リポジトリに反映させるため、リモートオリジンにコードをプッシュします。
usageTranslations.it: Gli sviluppatori eseguono il push del codice sull'origine remota per riflettere le modifiche nel repository centrale.
usageTranslations.vi: Các nhà phát triển đẩy code lên remote origin để đảm bảo thay đổi phản ánh trong kho trung tâm.
usageTranslations.hi: डेवलपर्स कोड को रिमोट ओरिजिन पर पुश करते हैं ताकि बदलाव सेंट्रल प्रोजेक्ट रिपॉजिटरी में दिखें।
usageTranslations.th: นักพัฒนาส่งโค้ดไปที่รีโมตออริจินเพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าการเปลี่ยนแปลงสะท้อนในคลังกลาง
usageTranslations.id: Developer mendorong kode ke remote origin untuk memastikan perubahan tercermin di repositori proyek pusat.

terms.definition: The operation of changing the base branch pointer in a repository, typically to align with updated integration or release workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Branch repointing is required when adjusting the base of a feature branch to match an updated main or release branch for CI/CD consistency.

termTranslations.th: เปลี่ยนตำแหน่งสาขา

usageTranslations.en: Branch repointing is required when adjusting the base of a feature branch to match an updated main or release branch for CI/CD consistency.
usageTranslations.tr: Dal yönlendirme, bir özellik dalının tabanını güncel ana veya sürüm dalına uyarlarken gereklidir ve CI/CD tutarlılığı sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le repointage de branche est nécessaire pour ajuster la base d’une branche de fonctionnalité à une branche principale mise à jour afin de maintenir la cohérence CI/CD.
usageTranslations.de: Branch-Repoint ist erforderlich, um den Basiszweig einer Feature-Branch an einen aktualisierten Main- oder Release-Branch für CI/CD-Konsistenz anzupassen.
usageTranslations.es: Se requiere reapuntar la rama al ajustar la base de una rama de característica para coincidir con la rama principal o de lanzamiento actualizada para mantener la coherencia en CI/CD.
usageTranslations.zh: 在将功能分支的基线调整为更新后的主分支或发布分支以保持 CI/CD 一致性时，需要进行分支重指向。
usageTranslations.ar: تكون إعادة توجيه الفرع مطلوبة عند تعديل قاعدة فرع ميزة لمطابقة فرع رئيسي أو إصدار محدث لضمان اتساق CI/CD.
usageTranslations.pt: O reapontamento de branch é necessário ao ajustar a base de um branch de recurso para corresponder ao branch principal ou de lançamento atualizado para consistência CI/CD.
usageTranslations.ru: Branch Repoint требуется при изменении базы feature branch на обновленный main или release branch для обеспечения согласованности CI/CD.
usageTranslations.ja: CI/CDの一貫性のために、フィーチャーブランチのベースを更新されたメインまたはリリースブランチに合わせて調整する際にブランチ再指向が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: Il reindirizzamento del branch è necessario per allineare la base di una branch feature a una branch principale o di rilascio aggiornata per la coerenza CI/CD.
usageTranslations.vi: Cần chuyển hướng nhánh khi điều chỉnh nhánh tính năng phù hợp với nhánh chính hoặc nhánh phát hành cập nhật để đảm bảo tính nhất quán CI/CD.
usageTranslations.hi: CI/CD संगति के लिए फीचर ब्रांच का आधार अपडेटेड मेन या रिलीज ब्रांच से मिलाने के लिए ब्रांच रीपॉइंट आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: การเปลี่ยนตำแหน่งสาขาจำเป็นเมื่อปรับฐานของสาขาฟีเจอร์ให้ตรงกับสาขาหลักหรือสาขารีลีสที่อัปเดตเพื่อความสอดคล้องของ CI/CD
usageTranslations.id: Branch repoint diperlukan saat menyesuaikan basis branch fitur agar sesuai dengan branch utama atau rilis yang diperbarui untuk konsistensi CI/CD.

terms.definition: A situation in version control where changes from different branches cannot be automatically reconciled, requiring manual intervention for resolution.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Merge conflicts are flagged by CI/CD systems when simultaneous changes in different branches affect the same lines of code.

termTranslations.th: ข้อขัดแย้งการรวม

usageTranslations.en: Merge conflicts are flagged by CI/CD systems when simultaneous changes in different branches affect the same lines of code.
usageTranslations.tr: Farklı dallarda aynı kod satırları değiştirildiğinde CI/CD sistemleri birleştirme çakışmalarını bildirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les systèmes CI/CD signalent les conflits de fusion lorsque des modifications simultanées affectent les mêmes lignes de code.
usageTranslations.de: Merge-Konflikte werden von CI/CD-Systemen gemeldet, wenn gleichzeitige Änderungen in verschiedenen Branches dieselben Codezeilen betreffen.
usageTranslations.es: Los conflictos de fusión son marcados por sistemas CI/CD cuando los cambios simultáneos afectan las mismas líneas de código.
usageTranslations.zh: 当不同分支的更改影响同一代码行时，CI/CD 系统会标记合并冲突。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم وضع علامة على تعارضات الدمج بواسطة أنظمة CI/CD عند حدوث تغييرات متزامنة في فروع مختلفة تؤثر على نفس أسطر الشيفرة.
usageTranslations.pt: Conflitos de merge são sinalizados por sistemas CI/CD quando alterações simultâneas afetam as mesmas linhas de código.
usageTranslations.ru: Конфликты слияния отмечаются CI/CD-системами, когда одновременные изменения в разных ветках затрагивают одни и те же строки кода.
usageTranslations.ja: 異なるブランチで同じコード行が同時に変更された場合、CI/CDシステムはマージコンフリクトを通知します。
usageTranslations.it: I conflitti di merge vengono segnalati dai sistemi CI/CD quando modifiche simultanee interessano le stesse righe di codice.
usageTranslations.vi: CI/CD sẽ cảnh báo xung đột hợp nhất khi các thay đổi đồng thời ở các nhánh khác nhau ảnh hưởng cùng một dòng mã.
usageTranslations.hi: अलग-अलग ब्रांच में एक साथ कोड की समान पंक्तियों में बदलाव होने पर CI/CD सिस्टम मर्ज कॉन्फ्लिक्ट को चिह्नित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ข้อขัดแย้งการรวมจะถูกระบบ CI/CD แจ้งเตือนเมื่อมีการเปลี่ยนแปลงพร้อมกันในสาขาต่าง ๆ ที่มีผลกับโค้ดบรรทัดเดียวกัน
usageTranslations.id: Konflik merge ditandai oleh sistem CI/CD saat perubahan bersamaan pada cabang berbeda mempengaruhi baris kode yang sama.

terms.definition: A view or record showing the exact code changes between commits, used for audit, review, and integration monitoring.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The commit diff allows reviewers to see exactly what code was changed before the branch is merged into main.

termTranslations.th: ความแตกต่างของ commit

usageTranslations.en: The commit diff allows reviewers to see exactly what code was changed before the branch is merged into main.
usageTranslations.tr: Commit farkı, bir dal ana dala birleştirilmeden önce kodda nelerin değiştiğini inceleyiciye gösterir.
usageTranslations.fr: La différence de commit permet aux réviseurs de voir les modifications exactes avant la fusion dans la branche principale.
usageTranslations.de: Das Commit-Diff zeigt Prüfern genau, welche Änderungen vor dem Merge gemacht wurden.
usageTranslations.es: La diferencia de commit permite a los revisores ver qué código cambió antes de fusionar la rama al main.
usageTranslations.zh: 提交差异使审阅者能够在分支合并到主干前看到具体更改内容。
usageTranslations.ar: يتيح فرق الالتزام للمراجعين رؤية ما تم تغييره في الكود قبل دمج الفرع في الرئيسي.
usageTranslations.pt: O diff de commit permite que revisores vejam as alterações antes do merge.
usageTranslations.ru: Commit Diff позволяет рецензентам видеть изменения в коде до слияния ветки.
usageTranslations.ja: コミット差分でレビュアーはブランチ統合前に変更内容を確認できる。
usageTranslations.it: La diff commit consente ai revisori di vedere le modifiche prima della fusione.
usageTranslations.vi: So sánh commit giúp reviewer biết thay đổi nào trước khi merge.
usageTranslations.hi: कमिट डिफ़ रिव्यूअर को बताता है कि मुख्य में मर्ज से पहले क्या बदला।
usageTranslations.th: ความแตกต่างของ commit ช่วยให้ผู้รีวิวเห็นว่ามีอะไรเปลี่ยนแปลงก่อน merge
usageTranslations.id: Commit diff memungkinkan reviewer melihat perubahan kode sebelum branch digabungkan ke main.

terms.definition: A version control operation that modifies the most recent commit, typically to correct or add information before it is pushed.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: If you forget to include a file, use amend commit to update your last commit before pushing to remote origin.

termTranslations.th: แก้ไข commit

usageTranslations.en: If you forget to include a file, use amend commit to update your last commit before pushing to remote origin.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir dosyayı eklemeyi unuttuysanız, uzak kaynağa göndermeden önce commit düzeltme işlemi kullanın.
usageTranslations.fr: Si vous oubliez un fichier, utilisez l’amendement du commit avant le push.
usageTranslations.de: Wenn Sie eine Datei vergessen haben, nutzen Sie Commit ändern vor dem Push.
usageTranslations.es: Si olvida un archivo, use enmendar commit antes de hacer push al origen remoto.
usageTranslations.zh: 如果忘记添加文件，请在推送到远程 Origin 前用修正提交操作。
usageTranslations.ar: إذا نسيت ملفًا، استخدم تعديل الالتزام قبل الدفع إلى المصدر البعيد.
usageTranslations.pt: Se esquecer de um arquivo, altere o commit antes do push.
usageTranslations.ru: Если забыли файл, используйте Amend Commit перед отправкой на удаленный origin.
usageTranslations.ja: ファイルの追加忘れはリモートにプッシュする前にコミット修正で対応。
usageTranslations.it: Se dimentichi un file, modifica il commit prima del push.
usageTranslations.vi: Nếu quên file, hãy sửa commit trước khi push lên remote origin.
usageTranslations.hi: अगर फ़ाइल छूट जाए तो रिमोट ओरिजिन पर पुश से पहले अमेंड कमिट करें।
usageTranslations.th: หากลืมไฟล์ ให้แก้ไข commit ก่อน push ไปรีโมตออริจิน
usageTranslations.id: Jika lupa file, gunakan amend commit sebelum push ke remote origin.

terms.definition: A threaded discussion attached to code review changesets for tracking comments, decisions, and approvals in collaborative workflows.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A review thread captures the discussion between reviewers and developers on specific code lines in a pull request.

termTranslations.ja: レビュー スレッド
termTranslations.th: เธรดรีวิว

usageTranslations.en: A review thread captures the discussion between reviewers and developers on specific code lines in a pull request.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir inceleme konusu, bir pull request'te belirli kod satırlarında yapılan tartışmaları kaydeder.
usageTranslations.fr: Un fil de revue capture la discussion entre réviseurs et développeurs sur des lignes de code précises.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Review-Thread dokumentiert Diskussionen zu bestimmten Codezeilen im Pull Request.
usageTranslations.es: Un hilo de revisión recopila la discusión sobre líneas de código en un pull request.
usageTranslations.zh: 评审线程记录在拉取请求中特定代码行的讨论。
usageTranslations.ar: خيط المراجعة يوثق النقاش بين المراجعين والمطورين حول أسطر الكود المحددة.
usageTranslations.pt: Thread de revisão registra discussões sobre linhas de código em pull request.
usageTranslations.ru: Review Thread фиксирует обсуждения между ревьюерами и разработчиками в pull request.
usageTranslations.ja: レビュー スレッドはプルリクエストの特定コード行での議論を記録します。
usageTranslations.it: Il thread di revisione cattura le discussioni su linee di codice specifiche.
usageTranslations.vi: Luồng đánh giá ghi lại thảo luận về dòng code cụ thể trong pull request.
usageTranslations.hi: रिव्यू थ्रेड, पुल रिक्वेस्ट में कोड की लाइन पर चर्चा दर्ज करता है।
usageTranslations.th: เธรดรีวิวบันทึกการสนทนาเกี่ยวกับโค้ดใน pull request
usageTranslations.id: Thread review mencatat diskusi pada baris kode tertentu dalam pull request.

terms.definition: A formal review of code modifications bundled as a patch, ensuring quality and compliance before integration or deployment.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A patch review is required for all third-party code contributions to critical production systems in regulated environments.

termTranslations.th: รีวิวแพตช์

usageTranslations.en: A patch review is required for all third-party code contributions to critical production systems in regulated environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Düzenlemeye tabi ortamlarda, tüm üçüncü parti kod katkıları için yama incelemesi zorunludur.
usageTranslations.fr: Une revue de patch est requise pour les contributions de code tierces dans des environnements réglementés.
usageTranslations.de: In regulierten Umgebungen ist ein Patch-Review für alle externen Beiträge erforderlich.
usageTranslations.es: Se requiere revisión de patch para contribuciones externas en sistemas críticos regulados.
usageTranslations.zh: 在受监管环境中，所有第三方代码的关键系统集成都需补丁审查。
usageTranslations.ar: مراجعة التصحيح مطلوبة لجميع مساهمات الشيفرة الخارجية في الأنظمة الحرجة.
usageTranslations.pt: Revisão de patch é obrigatória para contribuições externas em sistemas críticos regulados.
usageTranslations.ru: Patch Review обязателен для сторонних изменений в критических системах в регулируемых средах.
usageTranslations.ja: 規制環境ではサードパーティコードのパッチレビューが必須です。
usageTranslations.it: La revisione patch è richiesta per contributi di terze parti nei sistemi critici regolamentati.
usageTranslations.vi: Xem xét bản vá là bắt buộc với đóng góp bên ngoài cho hệ thống quan trọng có kiểm soát.
usageTranslations.hi: नियंत्रित सिस्टम में तीसरे पक्ष के कोड के लिए पैच रिव्यू आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องมีรีวิวแพตช์สำหรับโค้ดจากภายนอกในระบบสำคัญที่ถูกควบคุม
usageTranslations.id: Patch review wajib dilakukan untuk kontribusi kode eksternal di sistem produksi kritis yang diatur.

terms.definition: A tool or interface within version control platforms that visually displays differences between code changesets or commits.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: The diff viewer highlights additions and deletions between commits, making code review and integration audits more efficient.

termTranslations.th: ตัวแสดง diff

usageTranslations.en: The diff viewer highlights additions and deletions between commits, making code review and integration audits more efficient.
usageTranslations.tr: Fark görüntüleyici, commit'ler arasındaki ekleme ve silmeleri vurgular; bu da kod inceleme ve entegrasyon denetimlerini kolaylaştırır.
usageTranslations.fr: La visionneuse de diff met en évidence les ajouts et suppressions, facilitant la revue et l’audit d’intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Der Diff-Viewer hebt Änderungen hervor und erleichtert Review und Audit.
usageTranslations.es: El visor de diferencias resalta adiciones y eliminaciones, facilitando revisión y auditoría.
usageTranslations.zh: 差异查看器突出显示提交间的新增和删除，提升评审和审计效率。
usageTranslations.ar: يعرض عارض الفروق الإضافات والحذف بين الالتزامات لتسهيل المراجعة.
usageTranslations.pt: O visualizador de diff destaca adições e remoções, tornando revisões mais eficientes.
usageTranslations.ru: Diff Viewer выделяет добавления и удаления, облегчая ревью и аудит.
usageTranslations.ja: 差分ビューアは追加・削除を強調し、レビューを効率化します。
usageTranslations.it: Il visualizzatore diff evidenzia aggiunte e rimozioni per revisioni efficienti.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình xem diff làm nổi bật phần thêm/xóa giúp review hiệu quả.
usageTranslations.hi: डिफ़ व्यूअर जोड़ और हटाने को हाईलाइट करता है, रिव्यू आसान बनाता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตัวแสดง diff เน้นส่วนที่เพิ่มและลบ ทำให้รีวิวและตรวจสอบง่ายขึ้น
usageTranslations.id: Diff viewer menyoroti penambahan dan penghapusan antara commit, mempercepat audit integrasi.

terms.definition: A state in Git where the repository points directly to a commit rather than a branch, often used for review or temporary changes.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Working in detached head state means commits are not on any branch and risk being lost unless saved explicitly.

termTranslations.th: หัว detached

usageTranslations.en: Working in detached head state means commits are not on any branch and risk being lost unless saved explicitly.
usageTranslations.tr: Bağlantısız baş durumunda çalışmak, commit'lerin dalda yer almadığı ve açıkça kaydedilmediğinde kaybolabileceği anlamına gelir.
usageTranslations.fr: Travailler en tête détachée signifie que les commits ne sont sur aucune branche et risquent d'être perdus.
usageTranslations.de: Im Detached-Head-Modus sind Commits keinem Branch zugeordnet und können verloren gehen.
usageTranslations.es: En cabeza separada, los commits no están en ninguna rama y pueden perderse.
usageTranslations.zh: 游离 HEAD 状态下，提交未在分支上，若未保存将丢失。
usageTranslations.ar: العمل في حالة رأس منفصل يعني أن الالتزامات ليست على فرع وقد تُفقد.
usageTranslations.pt: No estado head destacado, commits não estão em branch e podem ser perdidos.
usageTranslations.ru: В Detached Head коммиты не относятся к ветке и могут быть потеряны.
usageTranslations.ja: デタッチドヘッド状態ではコミットはブランチ外で保存されなければ消える可能性。
usageTranslations.it: In testa staccata, i commit non sono su nessun branch e rischiano di essere persi.
usageTranslations.vi: Ở trạng thái detached head, commit không thuộc nhánh nào và dễ mất nếu không lưu.
usageTranslations.hi: डिटैच्ड हेड में कमिट्स किसी ब्रांच पर नहीं होते और खो सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ใน detached head commit ไม่อยู่บนสาขาและอาจสูญหายได้
usageTranslations.id: Pada detached head, commit tidak di branch dan bisa hilang jika tidak disimpan.

terms.definition: A synchronization method in which a repository automatically pulls updates from another source, maintaining a mirrored copy for redundancy or distributed integration.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pull mirror configurations ensure disaster recovery by maintaining synchronized backup repositories in geographically dispersed locations.

termTranslations.th: Pull Mirror

usageTranslations.en: Pull mirror configurations ensure disaster recovery by maintaining synchronized backup repositories in geographically dispersed locations.
usageTranslations.tr: Çekme aynası yapılandırmaları, coğrafi olarak dağıtılmış konumlarda senkronize yedek depolar tutarak felaket kurtarmayı sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les configurations de miroir de pull garantissent la reprise après sinistre avec des dépôts de secours synchronisés.
usageTranslations.de: Pull-Mirror-Konfigurationen gewährleisten Disaster Recovery durch synchronisierte Backups an verschiedenen Standorten.
usageTranslations.es: Las configuraciones de espejo de pull garantizan la recuperación ante desastres mediante repositorios sincronizados.
usageTranslations.zh: 拉取镜像配置通过地理分布的同步备份库实现灾难恢复。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن إعدادات مرآة السحب التعافي من الكوارث عبر مستودعات احتياطية متزامنة.
usageTranslations.pt: Configurações de espelho de pull garantem recuperação de desastre com repositórios sincronizados.
usageTranslations.ru: Pull Mirror гарантирует восстановление после сбоев за счет синхронизированных резервных копий.
usageTranslations.ja: プルミラー構成は分散場所で同期されたバックアップで災害復旧を実現。
usageTranslations.it: Le configurazioni di pull mirror garantiscono il disaster recovery mantenendo backup sincronizzati.
usageTranslations.vi: Cấu hình pull mirror đảm bảo phục hồi thảm họa với backup được đồng bộ hóa.
usageTranslations.hi: पुल मिरर सेटअप आपदा रिकवरी के लिए सिंक्रनाइज़्ड बैकअप रखता है।
usageTranslations.th: การตั้งค่า Pull Mirror ทำให้มีคลังสำรองซิงค์สำหรับกู้คืนจากภัยพิบัติ
usageTranslations.id: Konfigurasi pull mirror menjamin pemulihan bencana dengan backup repositori sinkron.

terms.definition: A personal copy of a repository, allowing contributors to propose changes via pull or merge requests without affecting the source project.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Repository forks are standard in open source collaboration, enabling contributors to propose updates without direct write access.

termTranslations.th: ฟอร์ครีโพซิทอรี

usageTranslations.en: Repository forks are standard in open source collaboration, enabling contributors to propose updates without direct write access.
usageTranslations.tr: Depo çatalı, açık kaynak işbirliğinde standarttır ve katkıcıların doğrudan yazma izni olmadan güncelleme önermesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les forks de dépôt sont standard en open source, permettant de proposer des mises à jour sans accès en écriture.
usageTranslations.de: Repository-Forks sind Standard in Open-Source-Projekten und ermöglichen Beiträge ohne Schreibzugriff.
usageTranslations.es: El fork de repositorio es estándar en open source y permite proponer cambios sin acceso directo.
usageTranslations.zh: 仓库派生在开源协作中很常见，允许在无写入权限的情况下提议更改。
usageTranslations.ar: تفرعات المستودع شائعة في المصادر المفتوحة للسماح بالمساهمة دون إذن كتابة.
usageTranslations.pt: Forks de repositório são padrão em open source para sugerir atualizações sem acesso de escrita.
usageTranslations.ru: Repository Fork — стандарт в open source, позволяющий вносить изменения без доступа на запись.
usageTranslations.ja: リポジトリフォークはオープンソース協業で標準で、直接書き込み権なしで貢献可能。
usageTranslations.it: Il fork del repository è standard nella collaborazione open source per proporre aggiornamenti senza scrittura diretta.
usageTranslations.vi: Fork kho lưu trữ là tiêu chuẩn trong cộng tác open source giúp đề xuất thay đổi khi không có quyền ghi.
usageTranslations.hi: रिपॉजिटरी फोर्क ओपन सोर्स में मानक है और लिखने की अनुमति के बिना अपडेट प्रस्तावित करने देता है।
usageTranslations.th: ฟอร์ครีโพซิทอรีเป็นมาตรฐานในโอเพนซอร์ส ให้ผู้ร่วมงานเสนอกการอัปเดตโดยไม่มีสิทธิ์เขียน
usageTranslations.id: Repository fork adalah standar kolaborasi open source, memungkinkan kontribusi tanpa akses tulis langsung.

terms.definition: A secondary name or reference assigned to a branch, often used for flexible environment mapping or backward compatibility in CI/CD pipelines.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Teams use branch aliases to refer to stable or release-ready environments without renaming actual branches in version control.

termTranslations.th: ชื่อเล่นของสาขา

usageTranslations.en: Teams use branch aliases to refer to stable or release-ready environments without renaming actual branches in version control.
usageTranslations.tr: Ekipler, sürüm veya kararlı ortamları temsil etmek için gerçek dal adını değiştirmeden dal takma adlarını kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les équipes utilisent des alias de branche pour référencer des environnements stables sans renommer les branches.
usageTranslations.de: Teams verwenden Branch-Alias, um stabile Umgebungen zu referenzieren, ohne echte Branches umzubenennen.
usageTranslations.es: Los equipos usan alias de rama para señalar entornos estables sin renombrar ramas reales.
usageTranslations.zh: 团队通过分支别名引用稳定或发布环境，无需重命名真实分支。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم الفرق أسماء مستعارة للفرع للإشارة إلى بيئات مستقرة دون إعادة تسمية الفروع الحقيقية.
usageTranslations.pt: Equipes usam alias de branch para ambientes estáveis sem renomear branches reais.
usageTranslations.ru: Branch Alias позволяет ссылаться на стабильные среды без переименования веток.
usageTranslations.ja: ブランチエイリアスで安定環境をブランチ名変更なしに参照できる。
usageTranslations.it: Gli alias di branch consentono di riferirsi a ambienti stabili senza rinominare i branch reali.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhóm dùng bí danh nhánh để tham chiếu môi trường ổn định mà không đổi tên nhánh thật.
usageTranslations.hi: टीमें स्थिर या रिलीज़ तैयार एनवायरनमेंट के लिए ब्रांच उपनाम का उपयोग करती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ทีมใช้ชื่อเล่นของสาขาเพื่อระบุสภาพแวดล้อมที่เสถียรโดยไม่ต้องเปลี่ยนชื่อสาขาจริง
usageTranslations.id: Tim menggunakan alias cabang untuk menandai lingkungan stabil tanpa mengganti nama cabang sebenarnya.

terms.definition: A set of rules or permissions defining how, when, and by whom changes may be pushed to repositories; controls integration security and process compliance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Most organizations enforce a push policy to prevent direct updates to main branches and require pull requests for integration.

termTranslations.th: นโยบาย push

usageTranslations.en: Most organizations enforce a push policy to prevent direct updates to main branches and require pull requests for integration.
usageTranslations.tr: Çoğu kuruluş, ana dallara doğrudan güncelleme yapılmasını önlemek ve entegrasyon için pull request zorunlu kılmak için itme politikası uygular.
usageTranslations.fr: La plupart des organisations appliquent une politique de push pour empêcher les modifications directes sur la branche principale.
usageTranslations.de: Die meisten Organisationen nutzen eine Push-Policy, um direkte Änderungen am Hauptbranch zu verhindern.
usageTranslations.es: La mayoría de las organizaciones usan una política de push para impedir actualizaciones directas al branch principal.
usageTranslations.zh: 大多数组织实施推送策略，防止直接修改主分支，并要求集成前必须有拉取请求。
usageTranslations.ar: تطبق معظم المؤسسات سياسة الدفع لمنع التحديث المباشر للفروع الرئيسية وفرض طلبات السحب.
usageTranslations.pt: A maioria das organizações implementa política de push para evitar atualizações diretas na branch principal.
usageTranslations.ru: Push Policy используется для предотвращения прямых обновлений основных веток.
usageTranslations.ja: 多くの組織でプッシュポリシーによりmainへの直接更新を制限。
usageTranslations.it: La push policy impedisce aggiornamenti diretti sui branch principali e richiede pull request.
usageTranslations.vi: Phần lớn tổ chức áp dụng chính sách push để tránh cập nhật trực tiếp lên nhánh chính.
usageTranslations.hi: अधिकांश संगठन पुश नीति लागू करते हैं ताकि मुख्य ब्रांच में सीधे बदलाव न हो।
usageTranslations.th: องค์กรส่วนใหญ่ใช้ push policy เพื่อป้องกันการอัปเดตโดยตรงไปที่สาขาหลัก
usageTranslations.id: Sebagian besar organisasi menerapkan kebijakan push untuk mencegah update langsung ke branch utama.

terms.definition: A descriptive summary attached to each commit in version control, documenting the purpose and context of code changes for audit, review, and compliance.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Clear and detailed commit messages are essential for effective peer review and for tracing changes in regulated environments.

termTranslations.th: ข้อความ commit

usageTranslations.en: Clear and detailed commit messages are essential for effective peer review and for tracing changes in regulated environments.
usageTranslations.tr: Açık ve ayrıntılı commit mesajları, etkili inceleme ve düzenlemeye tabi ortamlarda değişiklik takibi için gereklidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Des messages de commit clairs sont essentiels pour la revue et la traçabilité en environnements réglementés.
usageTranslations.de: Klare Commit-Nachrichten sind wichtig für Reviews und Nachverfolgbarkeit.
usageTranslations.es: Mensajes de commit claros son clave para la revisión y el rastreo en entornos regulados.
usageTranslations.zh: 清晰详细的提交信息对审核和变更追踪至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: رسائل الالتزام الواضحة مهمة للمراجعة وتتبع التغييرات في البيئات المنظمة.
usageTranslations.pt: Mensagens de commit claras são essenciais para revisão e rastreio em ambientes regulados.
usageTranslations.ru: Commit Message необходимы для эффективного ревью и аудита.
usageTranslations.ja: 明確なコミットメッセージはレビューや追跡に不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Messaggi di commit chiari sono fondamentali per revisioni e tracciabilità.
usageTranslations.vi: Thông điệp commit rõ ràng cần thiết cho review và truy vết.
usageTranslations.hi: स्पष्ट कमिट संदेश रिव्यू और ट्रेसिंग के लिए आवश्यक हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ข้อความ commit ที่ชัดเจนสำคัญต่อการรีวิวและติดตามการเปลี่ยนแปลง
usageTranslations.id: Pesan commit yang jelas sangat penting untuk review dan pelacakan perubahan.

terms.definition: A custom script triggered by version control events (e.g., commit, push), automating checks, integrations, or policy enforcement in repositories.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Pre-commit hook scripts are used to enforce code style or run tests before commits are accepted into the repository.

termTranslations.th: สคริปต์ hook

usageTranslations.en: Pre-commit hook scripts are used to enforce code style or run tests before commits are accepted into the repository.
usageTranslations.tr: Pre-commit hook scriptleri, commit'lerin depoya kabulünden önce kod stilini zorunlu kılar veya testleri çalıştırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les scripts de hook pre-commit imposent le style de code ou lancent des tests avant acceptation du commit.
usageTranslations.de: Pre-commit-Hook-Skripte prüfen Stil oder führen Tests aus, bevor Commits akzeptiert werden.
usageTranslations.es: Los scripts de hook pre-commit aplican estilos o pruebas antes de aceptar commits.
usageTranslations.zh: 预提交钩子脚本可在提交前强制代码规范或运行测试。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم سكريبتات الربط قبل الالتزام لفرض نمط الكود أو اختباراته.
usageTranslations.pt: Scripts de hook pre-commit garantem padrão de código ou testes antes do commit.
usageTranslations.ru: Pre-commit Hook Script используется для проверки стиля или тестов до принятия коммита.
usageTranslations.ja: プリコミットフックスクリプトはスタイル強制やテスト実行に使われます。
usageTranslations.it: Gli script di hook pre-commit impongono lo stile o eseguono test prima dell'accettazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Script hook pre-commit giúp kiểm tra style hoặc test trước khi commit.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रि-कमिट हुक स्क्रिप्ट स्टाइल लागू या टेस्ट के लिए उपयोग होती है।
usageTranslations.th: สคริปต์ hook pre-commit ใช้บังคับรูปแบบโค้ดหรือรันทดสอบ
usageTranslations.id: Script hook pre-commit digunakan untuk validasi style atau menjalankan test sebelum commit diterima.

terms.definition: A secure, revocable credential generated by systems (e.g., GitHub, GitLab) to authenticate users or services for repository access and API integration.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Personal access tokens replace passwords for automated repository operations, providing granular permission control and enhanced security.

termTranslations.th: โทเค็นการเข้าถึง

usageTranslations.en: Personal access tokens replace passwords for automated repository operations, providing granular permission control and enhanced security.
usageTranslations.tr: Kişisel erişim anahtarları, otomatik depo işlemlerinde şifrelerin yerini alır ve daha ayrıntılı yetki ile güvenlik sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les jetons d'accès remplacent les mots de passe pour les opérations automatisées et offrent plus de sécurité.
usageTranslations.de: Access Tokens ersetzen Passwörter für Automatisierung und bieten granulare Rechte.
usageTranslations.es: Los tokens de acceso reemplazan contraseñas en operaciones automatizadas y mejoran la seguridad.
usageTranslations.zh: 个人访问令牌取代密码用于自动化操作，并提供更精细权限控制与安全性。
usageTranslations.ar: تحل رموز الوصول محل كلمات المرور للعمليات الآلية وتوفر أمانًا مع تحكم دقيق.
usageTranslations.pt: Tokens de acesso substituem senhas para automação e aumentam a segurança.
usageTranslations.ru: Access Token заменяет пароль для автоматизированных операций и улучшает безопасность.
usageTranslations.ja: アクセストークンはパスワードの代わりに使われ、権限とセキュリティが強化される。
usageTranslations.it: I token di accesso sostituiscono le password per operazioni automatizzate, migliorando la sicurezza.
usageTranslations.vi: Mã truy cập cá nhân thay thế mật khẩu cho thao tác tự động, tăng kiểm soát và bảo mật.
usageTranslations.hi: पर्सनल एक्सेस टोकन, पासवर्ड की जगह लेकर सुरक्षा और अनुमति को बेहतर बनाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: โทเค็นการเข้าถึงใช้แทนรหัสผ่านในการดำเนินการอัตโนมัติ เพิ่มความปลอดภัย
usageTranslations.id: Token akses pribadi menggantikan password untuk operasi otomatisasi dan meningkatkan keamanan.

terms.definition: A filter mechanism in source control or CI/CD tools allowing users to view, select, or restrict results based on Git tags, typically used for deployment, release, or monitoring operations.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Use the tag filter to limit deployment monitoring to only stable release tags in the CI/CD dashboard.

termTranslations.th: ตัวกรองแท็ก

usageTranslations.en: Use the tag filter to limit deployment monitoring to only stable release tags in the CI/CD dashboard.
usageTranslations.tr: Dağıtım izlemeyi yalnızca kararlı sürüm etiketleriyle sınırlandırmak için etiket filtresini kullanın.
usageTranslations.fr: Utilisez le filtre de tag pour limiter la surveillance du déploiement aux tags de version stables dans le tableau de bord CI/CD.
usageTranslations.de: Verwenden Sie den Tag-Filter, um die Überwachung von Deployments auf stabile Release-Tags im CI/CD-Dashboard zu beschränken.
usageTranslations.es: Utilice el filtro de etiquetas para limitar la supervisión de implementaciones solo a etiquetas de versión estables en el panel CI/CD.
usageTranslations.zh: 使用标签过滤器，仅在CI/CD仪表板中监控稳定版本标签的部署。
usageTranslations.ar: استخدم مُرشّح العلامات لتقييد مراقبة النشر بعلامات الإصدارات المستقرة فقط في لوحة معلومات CI/CD.
usageTranslations.pt: Use o filtro de tag para limitar o monitoramento de implantações apenas para tags de lançamentos estáveis no painel CI/CD.
usageTranslations.ru: Используйте фильтр тегов, чтобы ограничить мониторинг развертывания только стабильными тегами релизов на CI/CD панели.
usageTranslations.ja: タグフィルターを使用して、CI/CDダッシュボードで安定版リリースタグのみのデプロイ監視に制限します。
usageTranslations.it: Usa il filtro tag per limitare il monitoraggio del deployment solo ai tag di rilascio stabili nel dashboard CI/CD.
usageTranslations.vi: Sử dụng bộ lọc thẻ để giới hạn giám sát triển khai chỉ cho các thẻ phát hành ổn định trong bảng điều khiển CI/CD.
usageTranslations.hi: CI/CD डैशबोर्ड में केवल स्थिर रिलीज टैग की निगरानी तक सीमित करने के लिए टैग फ़िल्टर का उपयोग करें।
usageTranslations.th: ใช้ตัวกรองแท็กเพื่อจำกัดการตรวจสอบการปรับใช้เฉพาะแท็กเวอร์ชันที่เสถียรในแดชบอร์ด CI/CD
usageTranslations.id: Gunakan filter tag untuk membatasi pemantauan deployment hanya pada tag rilis stabil di dasbor CI/CD.

terms.definition: A branch in a version control repository configured to prevent force pushes, direct commits, or deletion, requiring code review and compliance checks before integration.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Direct pushes to the protected branch are restricted; all code must be reviewed and merged via pull requests.

termTranslations.th: สาขาที่ป้องกันไว้

usageTranslations.en: Direct pushes to the protected branch are restricted; all code must be reviewed and merged via pull requests.
usageTranslations.tr: Korumalı dala doğrudan gönderimler kısıtlanmıştır; tüm kodlar gözden geçirilmeli ve çekme isteğiyle birleştirilmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les pushs directs sur la branche protégée sont restreints ; tout le code doit être revu et fusionné via des pull requests.
usageTranslations.de: Direkte Pushs auf den geschützten Branch sind eingeschränkt; der gesamte Code muss überprüft und per Pull Request gemergt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Los envíos directos a la rama protegida están restringidos; todo el código debe ser revisado y fusionado a través de pull requests.
usageTranslations.zh: 对受保护分支的直接推送受到限制；所有代码必须通过拉取请求审查和合并。
usageTranslations.ar: الدفع المباشر إلى الفرع المحمي مقيد؛ يجب مراجعة ودمج جميع الشيفرات عبر طلبات السحب.
usageTranslations.pt: Pushs diretos para o branch protegido são restritos; todo o código deve ser revisado e mesclado via pull requests.
usageTranslations.ru: Прямые пуши в защищённую ветку ограничены; весь код должен проходить ревью и сливаться через pull request.
usageTranslations.ja: 保護されたブランチへの直接プッシュは禁止されており、すべてのコードはプルリクエスト経由でレビュー・マージされる必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: I push diretti al branch protetto sono limitati; tutto il codice deve essere revisionato e unito tramite pull request.
usageTranslations.vi: Đẩy trực tiếp vào nhánh được bảo vệ bị hạn chế; tất cả mã phải được xem xét và hợp nhất qua pull request.
usageTranslations.hi: सुरक्षित ब्रांच पर डायरेक्ट पुश प्रतिबंधित है; सभी कोड की समीक्षा करके पुल रिक्वेस्ट के माध्यम से मर्ज किया जाना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: การผลักดันโดยตรงไปยังสาขาที่ป้องกันไว้ถูกจำกัด; โค้ดทั้งหมดต้องได้รับการตรวจสอบและรวมผ่าน pull request
usageTranslations.id: Push langsung ke branch terlindungi dibatasi; seluruh kode harus ditinjau dan digabungkan melalui pull request.

terms.definition: The coordinated integration of code contributions from multiple developers or squads into a single branch or repository, often using enterprise workflows or automation.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A team merge consolidates parallel feature branches into the integration branch for system testing and review.

termTranslations.th: รวมทีม

usageTranslations.en: A team merge consolidates parallel feature branches into the integration branch for system testing and review.
usageTranslations.tr: Takım birleştirme, paralel özellik dallarını entegrasyon dalında birleştirir ve sistem testi ile inceleme için hazırlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Une fusion d'équipe consolide les branches de fonctionnalités parallèles dans la branche d'intégration pour les tests système et la révision.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Team-Merge konsolidiert parallele Feature-Branches im Integrations-Branch für Systemtests und Reviews.
usageTranslations.es: Una fusión de equipo consolida las ramas de características paralelas en la rama de integración para pruebas y revisión del sistema.
usageTranslations.zh: 团队合并将并行功能分支合并到集成分支中以进行系统测试和审查。
usageTranslations.ar: دمج الفريق يوحّد الفروع المتوازية في فرع التكامل لاختبار النظام والمراجعة.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma mesclagem de equipe consolida ramificações paralelas de recursos no branch de integração para testes e revisão do sistema.
usageTranslations.ru: Объединение команды сводит параллельные ветки функций в интеграционную ветку для системного тестирования и ревью.
usageTranslations.ja: チームマージは並行する機能ブランチを統合ブランチに統合し、システムテストとレビューに備えます。
usageTranslations.it: Un merge di team consolida i branch delle funzionalità paralleli nel branch di integrazione per i test di sistema e la revisione.
usageTranslations.vi: Gộp nhóm hợp nhất các nhánh tính năng song song vào nhánh tích hợp để kiểm tra hệ thống và đánh giá.
usageTranslations.hi: टीम मर्ज समानांतर फीचर ब्रांच को इंटीग्रेशन ब्रांच में एकीकृत करता है ताकि सिस्टम परीक्षण और समीक्षा की जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: การรวมทีมจะรวมสาขาคุณลักษณะคู่ขนานเข้าไปยังสาขาการผสานรวมสำหรับการทดสอบและตรวจสอบระบบ
usageTranslations.id: Penggabungan tim mengonsolidasikan branch fitur paralel ke dalam branch integrasi untuk pengujian dan peninjauan sistem.

terms.definition: A person or automation designated to examine, comment on, and approve code changes before they are merged, ensuring compliance with policy, standards, and security requirements.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: A code reviewer must validate that all integration tests pass and that security checks are enforced before approving the pull request.

termTranslations.th: ผู้ตรวจสอบโค้ด

usageTranslations.en: A code reviewer must validate that all integration tests pass and that security checks are enforced before approving the pull request.
usageTranslations.tr: Kod inceleyici, çekme isteğini onaylamadan önce tüm entegrasyon testlerinin geçtiğini ve güvenlik kontrollerinin uygulandığını doğrulamalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le relecteur de code doit valider que tous les tests d'intégration sont réussis et que les contrôles de sécurité sont appliqués avant d'approuver la pull request.
usageTranslations.de: Der Code-Reviewer muss validieren, dass alle Integrationstests bestanden sind und Sicherheitsprüfungen durchgesetzt wurden, bevor er den Pull Request genehmigt.
usageTranslations.es: El revisor de código debe validar que todas las pruebas de integración se hayan superado y que los controles de seguridad se apliquen antes de aprobar el pull request.
usageTranslations.zh: 代码审查员必须在批准拉取请求之前验证所有集成测试是否通过且安全检查已执行。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على مراجع الكود التحقق من اجتياز جميع اختبارات التكامل وتطبيق الفحوصات الأمنية قبل الموافقة على طلب السحب.
usageTranslations.pt: O revisor de código deve validar que todos os testes de integração foram aprovados e que as verificações de segurança foram aplicadas antes de aprovar o pull request.
usageTranslations.ru: Рецензент кода должен убедиться, что все интеграционные тесты пройдены и проверки безопасности соблюдены перед утверждением pull request.
usageTranslations.ja: コードレビュアーはプルリクエストを承認する前に、すべての統合テストが合格し、セキュリティチェックが適用されていることを確認しなければなりません。
usageTranslations.it: Il revisore del codice deve convalidare che tutti i test di integrazione siano superati e che i controlli di sicurezza siano applicati prima di approvare la pull request.
usageTranslations.vi: Người kiểm tra mã phải xác nhận rằng tất cả các bài kiểm tra tích hợp đều đạt và kiểm tra bảo mật đã được thực thi trước khi phê duyệt pull request.
usageTranslations.hi: कोड समीक्षक को पुल रिक्वेस्ट को स्वीकृति देने से पहले यह सत्यापित करना होगा कि सभी इंटीग्रेशन टेस्ट पास हुए हैं और सुरक्षा जांच लागू की गई है।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ตรวจสอบโค้ดต้องตรวจสอบว่าการทดสอบการผสานรวมทั้งหมดผ่านแล้วและได้มีการบังคับใช้การตรวจสอบความปลอดภัยก่อนที่จะอนุมัติ pull request
usageTranslations.id: Peninjau kode harus memvalidasi bahwa semua pengujian integrasi lulus dan pemeriksaan keamanan diterapkan sebelum menyetujui pull request.

terms.definition: A formal suggestion for a code or configuration change in a repository, tracked and discussed before being accepted into production or mainline integration.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Submit a change proposal through the issue tracker to initiate peer discussion and impact review before implementation.

termTranslations.th: ข้อเสนอการเปลี่ยนแปลง

usageTranslations.en: Submit a change proposal through the issue tracker to initiate peer discussion and impact review before implementation.
usageTranslations.tr: Uygulamadan önce eş tartışması ve etki değerlendirmesi başlatmak için değişiklik önerisini konu takipçisinden gönderin.
usageTranslations.fr: Soumettez une proposition de changement via le gestionnaire de tickets pour initier une discussion entre pairs et une évaluation d'impact avant la mise en œuvre.
usageTranslations.de: Reichen Sie einen Change Proposal über den Issue Tracker ein, um vor der Implementierung eine Peer-Diskussion und eine Impact-Review zu starten.
usageTranslations.es: Envíe una propuesta de cambio a través del gestor de incidencias para iniciar la discusión entre pares y la revisión de impacto antes de la implementación.
usageTranslations.zh: 通过问题跟踪器提交变更提议，以在实施前启动同行讨论和影响评审。
usageTranslations.ar: قدّم مقترح التغيير عبر متتبع المشكلات لبدء النقاش بين الأقران ومراجعة الأثر قبل التنفيذ.
usageTranslations.pt: Envie uma proposta de mudança pelo rastreador de problemas para iniciar a discussão entre pares e a revisão de impacto antes da implementação.
usageTranslations.ru: Отправьте предложение об изменении через трекер задач, чтобы инициировать обсуждение с коллегами и анализ последствий перед внедрением.
usageTranslations.ja: 実装前にピアディスカッションと影響評価を開始するため、課題トラッカー経由で変更提案を提出してください。
usageTranslations.it: Invia una proposta di modifica tramite il tracker dei problemi per avviare una discussione tra pari e la revisione dell'impatto prima dell'implementazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Gửi đề xuất thay đổi qua trình theo dõi vấn đề để bắt đầu thảo luận nhóm và đánh giá tác động trước khi triển khai.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्यान्वयन से पहले समकक्ष चर्चा और प्रभाव समीक्षा शुरू करने के लिए इश्यू ट्रैकर के माध्यम से परिवर्तन प्रस्ताव जमा करें।
usageTranslations.th: ส่งข้อเสนอการเปลี่ยนแปลงผ่านตัวติดตามปัญหาเพื่อเริ่มการอภิปรายกับเพื่อนและการตรวจสอบผลกระทบก่อนการนำไปใช้
usageTranslations.id: Kirim usulan perubahan melalui pelacak masalah untuk memulai diskusi kelompok dan tinjauan dampak sebelum pelaksanaan.

terms.definition: An automated process that merges code changes into a target branch once all checks, reviews, and conditions are met, minimizing manual intervention.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Enable auto merge to allow approved pull requests to be merged automatically when all status checks pass.

termTranslations.th: ผสานอัตโนมัติ

usageTranslations.en: Enable auto merge to allow approved pull requests to be merged automatically when all status checks pass.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm durum kontrolleri geçildiğinde onaylı çekme isteklerinin otomatik olarak birleştirilmesini sağlamak için otomatik birleştirmeyi etkinleştirin.
usageTranslations.fr: Activez la fusion automatique pour permettre aux pull requests approuvées d'être fusionnées automatiquement lorsque toutes les vérifications d'état sont réussies.
usageTranslations.de: Aktivieren Sie das automatische Zusammenführen, damit genehmigte Pull Requests automatisch gemergt werden, sobald alle Statusprüfungen bestanden sind.
usageTranslations.es: Habilite la fusión automática para permitir que las pull requests aprobadas se fusionen automáticamente cuando se superen todas las verificaciones de estado.
usageTranslations.zh: 启用自动合并，以便在所有状态检查通过后自动合并已批准的拉取请求。
usageTranslations.ar: فعّل الدمج التلقائي للسماح بدمج طلبات السحب المعتمدة تلقائيًا عند اجتياز جميع الفحوصات.
usageTranslations.pt: Habilite a mesclagem automática para permitir que pull requests aprovados sejam mesclados automaticamente quando todas as verificações de status forem aprovadas.
usageTranslations.ru: Включите автоматическое слияние, чтобы одобренные pull request автоматически сливались после прохождения всех проверок статуса.
usageTranslations.ja: すべてのステータスチェックに合格した場合、承認されたプルリクエストを自動でマージできるように自動マージを有効にしてください。
usageTranslations.it: Abilita il merge automatico per consentire la fusione automatica delle pull request approvate quando tutti i controlli di stato sono superati.
usageTranslations.vi: Bật tự động gộp để pull request đã được duyệt tự động gộp khi tất cả kiểm tra trạng thái đều đạt.
usageTranslations.hi: ऑटो मर्ज सक्षम करें ताकि सभी स्टेटस चेक पास होने पर अनुमोदित पुल रिक्वेस्ट अपने आप मर्ज हो जाएं।
usageTranslations.th: เปิดใช้งานการผสานอัตโนมัติเพื่อให้ pull request ที่ได้รับการอนุมัติสามารถผสานได้โดยอัตโนมัติเมื่อผ่านการตรวจสอบสถานะทั้งหมด
usageTranslations.id: Aktifkan penggabungan otomatis untuk memungkinkan pull request yang disetujui digabungkan secara otomatis setelah semua pemeriksaan status lulus.

terms.definition: The process of removing obsolete, duplicate, or irrelevant Git tags from repositories to maintain clarity in release and deployment tracking.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Regular tag cleanup prevents confusion in deployment pipelines and ensures only current release tags are visible to integration teams.

termTranslations.th: ทำความสะอาดแท็ก

usageTranslations.en: Regular tag cleanup prevents confusion in deployment pipelines and ensures only current release tags are visible to integration teams.
usageTranslations.tr: Düzenli etiket temizliği, dağıtım süreçlerinde karışıklığı önler ve yalnızca güncel sürüm etiketlerinin entegrasyon ekiplerine görünmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Un nettoyage régulier des tags évite toute confusion dans les pipelines de déploiement et garantit que seuls les tags de version actuels sont visibles pour les équipes d'intégration.
usageTranslations.de: Regelmäßige Tag-Bereinigung verhindert Verwirrung in Deployment-Pipelines und stellt sicher, dass nur aktuelle Release-Tags für Integrationsteams sichtbar sind.
usageTranslations.es: La limpieza regular de etiquetas evita confusiones en los pipelines de despliegue y garantiza que solo las etiquetas de lanzamiento actuales sean visibles para los equipos de integración.
usageTranslations.zh: 定期进行标签清理可防止部署流程混乱，并确保只有当前版本标签对集成团队可见。
usageTranslations.ar: تنظيف العلامات بانتظام يمنع الارتباك في خطوط نشر البرمجيات ويضمن ظهور علامات الإصدارات الحالية فقط لفرق التكامل.
usageTranslations.pt: A limpeza regular de tags evita confusão nas pipelines de deployment e garante que apenas as tags de lançamento atuais estejam visíveis para as equipes de integração.
usageTranslations.ru: Регулярная очистка тегов предотвращает путаницу в процессах развертывания и гарантирует, что только актуальные релизные теги видны командам интеграции.
usageTranslations.ja: 定期的なタグクリーンアップはデプロイパイプラインでの混乱を防ぎ、統合チームに現在のリリースタグのみが表示されるようにします。
usageTranslations.it: La pulizia regolare dei tag previene confusione nelle pipeline di deployment e garantisce che solo i tag di rilascio attuali siano visibili ai team di integrazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Dọn dẹp thẻ thường xuyên giúp tránh nhầm lẫn trong pipeline triển khai và đảm bảo chỉ các thẻ phát hành hiện tại hiển thị cho nhóm tích hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: नियमित टैग सफाई डिप्लॉयमेंट पाइपलाइन में भ्रम को रोकती है और केवल वर्तमान रिलीज टैग को इंटीग्रेशन टीमों के लिए दृश्य बनाती है।
usageTranslations.th: การทำความสะอาดแท็กอย่างสม่ำเสมอช่วยป้องกันความสับสนในสายการปรับใช้และทำให้เห็นเฉพาะแท็กเวอร์ชันปัจจุบันสำหรับทีมบูรณาการ
usageTranslations.id: Pembersihan tag rutin mencegah kebingungan dalam pipeline deployment dan memastikan hanya tag rilis terkini yang terlihat oleh tim integrasi.

terms.definition: A series of pending patches or updates managed and applied in order, often used in large-scale code integration and change management systems.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Apply each patch in the patch queue to the integration branch only after previous patches have passed all tests.

termTranslations.th: คิวแพตช์

usageTranslations.en: Apply each patch in the patch queue to the integration branch only after previous patches have passed all tests.
usageTranslations.tr: Önceki yamalar tüm testleri geçtikten sonra yama kuyruğundaki her yamayı entegrasyon dalına uygulayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Appliquez chaque patch de la file d’attente au branch d’intégration uniquement après la réussite des tests des patchs précédents.
usageTranslations.de: Wenden Sie jeden Patch in der Patch-Warteschlange erst nach bestandenem Test der vorherigen Patches auf den Integrations-Branch an.
usageTranslations.es: Aplica cada parche de la cola de parches a la rama de integración solo después de que los parches anteriores hayan pasado todas las pruebas.
usageTranslations.zh: 仅在前一个补丁通过所有测试后，才将补丁队列中的每个补丁应用到集成分支。
usageTranslations.ar: طبّق كل تصحيح في قائمة التصحيحات على فرع التكامل فقط بعد أن تجتاز التصحيحات السابقة جميع الاختبارات.
usageTranslations.pt: Aplique cada patch na fila de patch ao branch de integração somente após os patches anteriores passarem por todos os testes.
usageTranslations.ru: Применяйте каждый патч из очереди патчей к интеграционной ветке только после того, как предыдущие патчи прошли все тесты.
usageTranslations.ja: 前のパッチがすべてのテストに合格した後でのみ、パッチキュー内の各パッチを統合ブランチに適用します。
usageTranslations.it: Applica ogni patch nella coda patch al branch di integrazione solo dopo che le patch precedenti hanno superato tutti i test.
usageTranslations.vi: Chỉ áp dụng từng bản vá trong hàng đợi bản vá vào nhánh tích hợp sau khi các bản vá trước đó đã vượt qua tất cả kiểm tra.
usageTranslations.hi: पिछले पैच सभी टेस्ट पास करने के बाद ही पैच कतार के हर पैच को इंटीग्रेशन ब्रांच में लगाएं।
usageTranslations.th: ใช้แต่ละแพตช์ในคิวแพตช์กับสาขาการผสานรวมหลังจากแพตช์ก่อนหน้าผ่านการทดสอบทั้งหมดแล้วเท่านั้น
usageTranslations.id: Terapkan setiap patch di antrian patch ke branch integrasi hanya setelah patch sebelumnya lolos semua pengujian.

terms.definition: A user interface or tool allowing users to navigate, search, and review repository content, structure, and changes across branches and commits.
terms.source: ITIL v4, AWS Well-Architected Framework, Kubernetes Documentation, CNCF
terms.usage: Navigate the repo browser to compare file changes across different feature branches and audit commit history.

termTranslations.th: เบราว์เซอร์ที่เก็บโค้ด

usageTranslations.en: Navigate the repo browser to compare file changes across different feature branches and audit commit history.
